cards.passage:
Man: Pipe Dreams, how can I help you?
Woman: Hi there. My toilet is clogged. I've tried flushing it several times but it just keeps flooding.
Man: First of all, don't try flushing it anymore. How's the water level now?
Woman: It has gone down a bit but it's still quite high.
Man: Have you tried using a plunger?
Woman: Sure, but it's no use.
Man: I'm just eating lunch. It'll probably take me a few hours to get there.
Woman: Is there anything else I could try in the meantime?
Man: Try adding some bleach and waiting a few minutes. After that you can try plunging it again.
Woman: I'll give it a shot.
Man: If that fails, give me a call and I'll be over as soon as possible.
Woman: Great, thanks!
cards.passageTranslation:
男： 這裡是瞬通水電, 有什麼我能為你服務的？
女： 你好。我的馬桶塞住了。我試著沖了幾次，可是水一直溢出來。
男： 首先，別再一直嘗試沖馬桶了。現在的水位如何？
女： 有消了一點但還是很高。
男： 你有試過用馬桶吸盤嗎？
女： 當然，可是沒有用。
男： 現在是我的午餐時間。我可能要好幾個小時才能到你那裡。
女： 在這段時間內有什麼其他方法我可以嘗試嗎？
男：加些漂白水後等個幾分鐘試試看。之後你可以試著再通一次。
女：我會試試看。
男： 如果失敗了，打個電話給我，我會盡快趕過去。
女： 太棒了，謝謝！
vocabulary: plumber n. 水管工 first of all 首先
ex. First of all, you have to promise that you won't make the same mistake again. 首先，你必須承諾你不會再犯同樣的錯。
in the meantime 在…期間內；同時
ex. Can you unlock the door, please? In the meantime, I'll go get the luggage from the car. 你可以幫我開門嗎？同時，我會去車裡拿行李。
give it a shot 試試看；放手一搏
ex. Give it a shot and see what you can make. 放手一搏並且看看你能做什麼。

questions.stem: Who is the woman talking to?
translation: 以下何者誰在和該名女子通話？
a. 她的丈夫
b. 水管工
c. 清潔工
d. 木匠

questions.stem: What time will the man be able to come over?
translation: 這名男子什麼時候可以到現場？
a. 大約上午11點
b. 大約下午6點
c. 大約下午10點
d. 大約下午2點

questions.stem: Which of the following statements is correct?
translation: 下列敘述何者正確？
a. 她為必須等候而感到生氣。
b. 她得回電給這名男子。
c. 她會嘗試自己修好它。
d. 她不知道要怎麼用馬桶吸盤。
options: (A) She is angry that she has to wait.
(B) She will have to call the man back.
(C) She will try to fix it on her own.
(D) She doesn't know how to use a plunger.

cards.passage:
Woman: I'm sorry, sir. I can't find any flights on the day you requested within your price range.
Man: What if I wanted to travel in September instead of August? Would that be cheaper?
Woman: Yes. September is not peak travel season so it should be a little bit cheaper. I can check for you now if you have time to wait.
Man: Yes, that sounds good. I have this afternoon off work so I have time.
Woman: Would you like a cup of coffee while you wait?
Man: No, thank you. A glass of water would be nice if it's not too much trouble.
Woman: Certainly, sir.
cards.passageTranslation:
女： 我很抱歉，先生。您要求的那個日期我找不到任何在您價格區間的班機。
男：那如果我改成九月出發而不是八月？這樣會比較便宜嗎？
女： 會的。九月不是旅遊旺季，所以應該會稍微便宜一些。如果你有時間可以等的話，我現在可以幫你查一下。
男： 好的，聽起來不錯。我今天下午不用上班所以我有時間等你。
女： 您想邊等邊喝杯咖啡嗎？
男： 不用了，謝謝妳。如果不是太麻煩的話，一杯白開水就可以了。
女： 沒問題，先生。
vocabulary: agency n. 代辦處 instead of 代替；而不是
ex Instead of studying in your office all day, why don't you go for a walk? 你何不去散散步，而不是在辦公室坐一整天？
recover from 自疾病或異常狀態恢復
ex. She is still recovering from a failed relationship. 她正從失戀復原中。

questions.stem: Where is this conversation taking place?
translation: 以下何者是這段對話發生的地點？
a. 機場。
b. 該男子家中。
c. 旅行社。
d. 該男子的辦公室。

questions.stem: Why does the man have time to wait?
translation: 為什麼該男子有時間可以等？
a. 他沒有工作。
b. 他下午不用上班。
c. 他生完病正在復原中。
d. 他正在度假。
options: (B) He has taken the afternoon off work.
(C) He is recovering from an illness.

questions.stem: When did the man originally plan to travel?
translation: 該男子原訂何時出遊？
a. 夏天時。
b. 春天時。
c. 秋天時。
d. 冬天時。

cards.passage:
Man: Congratulations! I heard you made partner.
Woman: Thanks, it seems like just yesterday I was taking the Bar exam.
Man: You really earned it. You took on a lot of tough cases this year.
Woman: Thanks, your legal expertise played a big role in my success. I think you would have made a fine choice as well.
Man: We should grab a drink to celebrate.
Woman: I'd love to but I have to be in court early tomorrow and have a lot of work to get done.
Man: Come on! One quick drink won't kill you.
Woman: Okay, we'll see. I might be able to slip out for a bit if I can finish working on my opening statement.
Man: Sounds good, I'll leave you to it then.
cards.passageTranslation:
男： 恭喜！我聽說妳成為合夥人了。
女： 謝謝，我參加律師資格考試彷彿還只是昨天的事而已。
男： 這是妳應得的。妳今年接了許多棘手的案子。
女： 謝謝，你的法律專業在我的成功路上扮演了很重要的角色。我覺得你也會成為一個不錯的公司合夥人的。
男： 我們應該喝一杯慶祝一下。
女： 我很樂意，可是我明天一大早得出庭，而且還有許多工作得完成。
男： 得了吧！只喝一杯不會礙事的！
女： 好吧，再說吧。如果我可以把我的開審陳述做完，我可能可以溜出去一下。
男： 聽起來不錯，那我不打擾你了。
vocabulary: uncertain adj. 不確定的 take on承擔；接受
ex. If you want this position, you will have to take on a whole new set of responsibilities. 如果你想要這個職位，你就要承擔所有新的責任。
ex. I'll take advantage of the lunch break to slip out for a while. 我會利用午餐時間溜出來一下。

questions.stem: What does the woman do for a living?
translation: 該女子從事什麼工作為生？
a. 她是一名酒保。
b. 她是一名教授。
c. 她是一名醫生。
d. 她是一名律師。

questions.stem: What is the man's relation to the woman?
translation: 該男子與這名女子是什麼關係？
a. 他是她的老闆。
b. 他是她的客戶。
c. 他是她的同事。
d. 他是她的丈夫。

questions.stem: What can be inferred from the conversation?
translation: 以下選項何者可從這段對話可以推測？
a. 不確定他們會不會一起出去。
b. 該女子不想出去。
c. 該男子忙到沒時間出去。
d. 如果他們出去的話他們會惹上麻煩。
options: (A) It is uncertain whether they will go out.
(B) The woman doesn't want to go out.
(C) The man is too busy to go out.
(D) They will get in trouble if they go out.

cards.passage:
Woman: I'm sorry, Mr. Adams. The reason that you have not received your order is because we currently don't have the shoes in the size you requested.
Man: But I ordered those shoes last month. Why did I have to call you in order to be notified?
Woman: I'm sorry sir, but it's the company policy not to divulge personal information by any means other than over the telephone. Hence we could not inform you by post or by email.
Man: But I don't understand. What personal information do you need to reveal by telling me you don't have my shoes in stock?
Woman: Your shoe size is considered personal information, sir. Would you like me to put you through to our complaints department?
cards.passageTranslation:
女： 我很抱歉，Adams先生。您尚未收到訂單內容的原因是因為我們目前沒有您所要的尺寸的鞋子。
男： 可是我上個月就訂了這些鞋子。為什麼我非得打電話給妳才告知我這件事呢？
女： 先生我很抱歉，但公司規定除了透過電話不得以任何方式揭露個人資料。因此我們不能以一般郵件或電子郵件通知您。
男： 可是我不懂。告訴我妳庫存裡沒有我要的鞋子會需要妳透露什麼個人資訊？
女： 您鞋子的尺寸被視為是個人資訊，先生。您要我幫您轉接我們的客訴部門嗎？
vocabulary: complaint n. 抱怨 in order to 為了
ex. In order to save money, he ate instant noodles every day for three months. 為了要存錢，他每天吃泡麵吃了三個月。
in stock 有現貨或存貨
ex. We don't have this pattern in stock, because it sold out last week. 這個花樣我們並沒有庫存，因為上個禮拜賣光了。

questions.stem: How are these two people communicating?
translation: 這兩個人如何溝通？
a. 面對面。
b. 透過電子郵件。
c. 簡訊。
d. 透過電話。

questions.stem: Why hasn't the man received the shoes he ordered?
translation: 以下何者是該名男子尚未收到他訂的鞋子的原因？
a. 這家店的鞋子有許多人等著要。
b. 這家店沒有正確尺寸的鞋子。
c. 鞋子寄錯地方了。
d. 鞋子意外的被寄到客訴部門。
options: (A) The store has a long waiting list for those shoes.
(B) The store doesn't have the shoes in the right size.
(C) The shoes were sent to the wrong address.
(D) The shoes were accidentally sent to the complaints department.

questions.stem: When did the man place his order?
translation: 該名男子何時下的訂單？
a. 前一天。
b. 兩個月前。
c. 上個月。
d. 這個月的第一天。
options: (D) The first day of the current month.

cards.passage:
Woman: How much for that silver one you're standing beside?
Man: I'm asking for 23,000 but I'll let you guys have it for 21,000.
Man2: How many does it seat?
Man: A maximum of nine passengers. It's also very fuel efficient.
Man2: How many kilometers does it have on it?
Man: Only 40,000; it's in excellent condition.
Woman: That's quite a lot of mileage. Do you think we might have problems with it like we did with the last van, Frankie?
Man2: It's hard to say… I could be convinced if the price were a little lower.
Man: Just so you know, I've inspected it myself. On top of that we back up all of our vehicles with a ninety-day guarantee. We'll cover any repair costs if you discover something wrong with it.
Woman: Drop it by another two thousand and we'll sign the papers right now.
Man: I guess I can do that.
Man2: Then you have yourself a deal.
cards.passageTranslation:
女： 你旁邊的那部銀色的要多少錢？
男： 我要賣二萬三千美金，可是我可以用二萬一千美金賣給妳。
男2： 可以坐幾個人？
男： 最多九名乘客。而且非常省油。
男2： 跑多少公里了？
男： 只有四萬公里；狀況極佳。
女： 這英哩數相當多。你覺得就像我們會像上一台廂旅車一樣有問題嗎，Frankie？
男2：很難講…如果價格再低點我就可以被說服。
男： 要跟你說一聲。我親自檢查過了。除此之外，我們的車子提供九十天的售後保固。如果妳發現什麼地方有問題的話，我們會負責一切的修理費用。.
女： 再降個兩千美金我就馬上簽約。
男： 我想可以。
男2：： 那我們成交了。
vocabulary: excellent adj. 極好的；傑出的
mechanic n. 技師 ask for 要求
ex. The audience demanded that the performer get off the stage. 觀眾要求表演者下台。
ex. My father backed up my little brother's decision. 我的父親支持我小弟的決定。
pay for 為…付錢；為…付出代價
ex. The troublemaker has to pay for what he's done. 肇事者要為他所做的付出代價。

questions.stem: What is the couple doing?
translation: 這一對夫妻在做什麼？
a. 買中古車
b. 買新車
c. 買新的廂型車
d. 買中古的廂型車

questions.stem: How much do they agree to pay for the vehicle?
translation: 他們同意支付多少金額買這部車？
a. 二萬三千美金
b. 一萬九千美金
c. 二萬一千美金
d. 一萬七千美金

questions.stem: What does the man's offer include?
translation: 以下何者包含在該名男子所開列的條件中？
a. 一個月內汽油免費
b. 經銷商保固
c. 退款保證
d. 技師免費鑑價
options: (D) a free estimate from a mechanic

cards.passage:
Man: Priority Parcels. How may I help you?
Woman: Hi, I'd like to inquire about a package I sent a few days ago.
Man: Sure, could you please give me the tracking number?
Woman: It's GH23079.
Man: According to my database the package is scheduled to arrive tomorrow morning.
Woman: I paid extra to guarantee delivery within 48 hours.
Man: Yes, I see that. Unfortunately, the ice storm that swept through the east coast led to delays. Rest assured that you will only be charged for a standard delivery.
Woman: I appreciate that correction but the prompt delivery was absolutely crucial. I will require further compensation.
Man: I'm not authorized to do that. I'll put you through to my supervisor.
Woman: Very well then.
cards.passageTranslation:
男： 這裡是速可達貨運公司。有什麼我能為您服務的嗎？
女： 你好，我想查詢我幾天前寄出的一個包裹。
男： 沒問題，可以請您給我貨品追蹤號碼嗎？
女： 號碼是GH23079。
男： 根據我的資料庫顯示，這個包裹預定明天早上送到。
女： 我多付了錢保證會在四十八小時內送到。
男： 是的，我知道。不幸的是，橫掃東岸的暴風雪造成了運送延誤。請您放心，您只會被收取標準運送的費用。
女： 感謝你的更正，可是準時送達絕對是最重要的。我要求進一步的補償。
男： 我沒有得到授權可以這麼做。我會將您的電話轉給到我的主管。
女： 好的。
vocabulary: prompt adj. 準時的；迅速的
plea v. 懇求；請求 according to 根據
ex. According to our company records, your transaction wasn't successful. 根據我們電腦紀錄，你的交易並沒有成功。
ex. You can rest assured that the typhoon will not affect our crops. 你可以放心颱風不會影響到我們的農作物。
ex. Please continue to handle the customer's issue until I return. 我回來之前請繼續處理顧客的問題。

questions.stem: Who is the woman talking to?
translation: 以下何者正在與該名女子通話？
a. 她的生意夥伴
b. 這個包裹的收件人
c. 客服部人員
d. 主管

questions.stem: What's the problem?
translation: 以下何者為對話討論的問題？
a. 包裹已經受損。
b. 包裹運送延遲。
c. 包裹被送錯地方。
d. 找不到這個包裹。
options: (C) The package was sent to the wrong place.

questions.stem: What conclusion can be drawn?
translation: 可以做怎樣的結論？
a. 該女子的顧慮已經被解決了。
b. 該包裹是因為人為疏失而被延誤。
c. 該女子會對這名男子提出投訴。
d. 該女子會為她的案件繼續爭取。
options: (A) The woman's concerns have been dealt with.
(B) The package was delayed due to human error.
(C) The woman will file a complaint against the man.
(D) The woman will continue to plea her case.

cards.passage:
Man: Do you think we should try keeping the shop open on weekends to generate more income?
Woman: Well, I don't know about you, but I really like having those two days off. I need to take care of my kids, because that is when my husband works.
Man: To be honest, I don't have much to do on my days off. I could definitely use the money. Maybe I'll try hiring a part time worker just to help me out on the weekends.
Woman: That's not a bad idea. Then maybe I could trade shifts with them if I ever need a day off.
Man: Well, I'll make up a job posting and we will see.
cards.passageTranslation:
Man: 你想我們週末時應不應該繼續開店多賺點收入？
Woman: 我不知道你的想法，但我真的很想那兩天放假。我要照顧小孩，因為我老公週末要工作。
Man: 說實話，我放假時也沒有太多事可做。我絕對可以 。也許我會雇用兼職的員工週末時來幫忙。
Woman: 這主意不錯。如果我需要休假，也許我可以和他們換班。
Man: 好吧，我會刊登求職廣告，然後我們再看看

questions.stem: Why does the man want to open the shop on weekends?
translation: 為何這位男子週末想要開店？
A.多賺點錢
B.他可以完成額外的工作。
C.因為週末是最忙碌的時候
D.他想要多點員工來交替班。
options: (B) So he can finish the extra work.
(C) Because weekends are the busiest time.
(D) He wants more staff to trade shifts with.

questions.stem: Why doesn't the woman want to work on weekends?
translation: 為何那位女子週末不想上班？
A.她的會議太多了。
B.家庭責任
C.時薪太低
D.她其他的工作太過忙碌
options: (D) Her other job is too busy.

questions.stem: How will the man find another person to work?
translation: 這個男人要如何招募其他人員來工作？
A.他將會自己開一家店
B.他會支付這個女子更多的薪水來工作
C.他會雇用他的一名友人
D.他會刊登工作廣告
options: (A) He will just open the shop on his own.
(B) He will offer the woman more money to do it.
(C) He will hire one of his friends.
(D) He will post a job advertisement.

cards.passage:
W: I need twelve copies of this book made, from cover to cover.
M: Sure. What about the cover itself?
W: If you could have them put a copy of the cover and bind it together like a real book, that would be great.
M: Sure. Black and white or color?
W: Black and white.
M: When do you need it by?
W: So long as they are ready for the seminar next Friday, that's fine.
M: Sure. I'll drop them off today. I can't imagine it will take more than a few days.
cards.passageTranslation:
女：我需要這本書的影印本共十二本，每一頁都要。
男：好的。封面呢？
女: 如果你可以讓他們把封面的影印本也合在一起像一本真正的書一樣，那就再好不過了。
男：當然。要黑白或是彩色？
白：黑白。
男：你什們時候要？
女：只要下星期五的研討會前準備好就可以了。
男：好的。我今天就把它們拿過去。我想不會需要很多天。
影印專店
店家規則列表
1.我們不能保證當天能取件。這取決於您要的影印大小和我們目前正在處理的工作數量。
2.我們不能影印整本書，因為這違反了版權法。
3.客戶不得操作機器。只有工作人員可以使用它們。
4. 無法影印或列印任何非法或不當料材。

questions.stem: Look at the graphic. Which rule will be a problem for the man if he goes there to make the copies?
translation: 請看圖表。如果該男子去那裏影印，哪一個規則會讓他碰上麻煩?
a. 規則1
b. 規則2
c. 規則3
d. 規則4

questions.stem: When does the woman need the copies?
translation: 女人什麼時候需要影印本?
a. 今天
b. 周五前
c. 下周五
d. 最晚周一

questions.stem: When does the man think they will be ready?
translation: 男人認為它們什麼時候會準備好?
a. 今天
b. 明天
c. 幾天內
d. 一周內

cards.passage:
Man: Will I receive any additional training on the job?
Woman: Yes, all new employees must undergo an on-site intensive training program as soon as the get hired. You will be paid for this time.
Man: What is the duration of the program?
Woman: It depends on your rate of progress, but most get through it in two weeks or less.
Man: Is there anything I need to bring, or are all of the supplies provided?
Woman: Just show up in appropriate attire and we will give you everything that you need.
cards.passageTranslation:
Man: 我會有額外的職訓嗎？
Woman: 是的，所有的職員一被雇用，就必須經歷密集的定點訓練計畫。這次有支薪。
Man: 這項訓練計畫會持續多久？
Woman: 根據你進步的速度來看，但一般都是兩個星期或更短。
Man: 我需要攜帶任何物品嗎？還是，你們會提供所有的文具？
Woman: 只是著適當服裝出席即可，我們會提供你所有需要的物品。

questions.stem: What has just happened?
translation: 對話中發生什麼事了？
A.這位男士剛開始一份新的工作
B.這位女士在面試新的職位
C.這位男士與女士將會一起接受職訓
D.這位女士要離職了
options: (A) The man has started a new job.
(B) The woman is being interviewed for a new position.
(C) The man and woman will be training together.
(D) The woman is leaving her job.

questions.stem: How long does the training program take to complete?
translation: 多久才會完成這一份訓練計畫？
A.約兩個小時
B.約兩天
C.約兩個星期
D.約兩個月

questions.stem: What does the woman tell the man to remember for the first day of training?
translation: 這位女士告知男士記得第一天的職訓要做什麼？
A.攜帶合適的文具
B.別遲到
C.快點完成
D.穿著合適的衣物

cards.passage:
Man: Hi, how can I help you today?
Woman: I was wondering if it is possible to pre-select my seats for the New York to Paris flight ticket that I just purchased on-line.
Man: I am sorry, seats on that flight are selected on a first come, first serve basis at the check in counter on the day of the flight.
Woman: Sure. Can you tell me what time the counter will open?
Man: You can begin checking in three hours before the scheduled departure.
Woman: Great. Thanks for your assistance.
Man: It was my pleasure. Thank for calling, and have a nice day.
cards.passageTranslation:
Man: 哈囉，我今天可以幫你什麼？
Woman: 我在想是否有可能可以優先選訂我剛在網站上購買從紐約飛往巴黎的班機機位？
Man: 很抱歉，飛機座位依到場順位選擇，起飛當天根據在櫃台登機優先選擇。
Woman: 好吧。可以告訴我櫃台何時會開始嗎？
Man: 預計起飛時間前三個小時就可開始辦理登機。
Woman: 好。謝謝您的協助。
Man: 我很樂意。感謝您的來電，祝你有個美好的一天。

questions.stem: Where is this conversation taking place?
translation: 此段對話在何處發生？
A.在機場
B.在登機櫃台
C.在航班訂位辦公室
D.在電話中

questions.stem: What does the woman want to do?
translation: 這位女子想要什麼服務？
A.她要優先選擇班機的座位
B.她要購買從紐約到巴黎的機票
C.她要更改回程的機位
D.她在機場詢問付款方式
options: (A) She wants to choose her seat on a flight.
(B) She wants to purchase tickets for New York to Paris.
(C) She wants to change her seat on the return flight.
(D) She wants to inquire about the payment options at the airport.

questions.stem: When will the woman be able to select her seat on the flight?
translation: 這位女子何時可以選擇班機上的座位？
A.現在這位男子正在幫她
B.她一上飛機就可以選擇
C.當她到達機場的時候
D.當她去櫃台辦理登機時
options: (A) The man is helping her do it right now.
(B) As soon as she boards the flight.
(C) When she arrives at the airport.
(D) When she checks at the counter.

cards.passage:
Woman: Can you believe that they increased our income tax from 12% to 16%?
Man: How much money are they going to take from us? It's getting harder and harder to make a decent living these days.
Man2: Actually, I am not so bothered by this. Don't you guys know what they use that money for?
Woman: Not really, to be honest.
Man: Sure, it goes towards welfare programs for people who are too lazy to work.
Man2: Not really… Most of it goes towards things like health care and research, constructing roads and other public spaces, schools, and the military. Unemployment insurance is only a small part of it, and some people can't work for other reasons than just being lazy.
Woman: I'm okay with all of those, except for the military. I don't want to support our country's wars abroad. Can we choose exactly where our tax dollars will go?
Man2: I wish!
cards.passageTranslation:
女：你相信我們的所得稅從百分之十二增加到百分之十六嗎？
男：他們要從我們這裡拿多少錢？現在要賺取像樣的薪資愈來愈難了。
男2：其實，我不覺得困難。你知道他們要如何使用那筆錢嗎？
女：老實說，其實不知道。
男：好的，這些錢大部份用來支付那些懶的工作的人的福利。
男2：不盡然…這些錢大部份用來支付健保、研究、道路營建及其他的公共建設、學校及軍隊。失業保險只是一小部分，有些人無法工作是有緣由的，而非只是懶惰。
女：我對那些都沒意見，除了軍隊。我不想支持我們國家在海外的戰爭。我們可以選擇要如何使用我們的稅收嗎？
男2：我希望可以！

questions.stem: What topic is being discussed in this dialogue?
translation: 這段對話在討論什麼主題？
A.教育
B.研究
C.稅收
D.醫藥

questions.stem: What opinion does the first man express about social welfare programs?
translation: 第一位男子對社會福利計畫的看法為何？
A. 他認為政府應該試圖降低失業率。
B. 他認為社會福利計畫很重要，因為那能幫助貧窮的人們。
C. 他認為經濟援助只應該提供給市民。
D. 他認為大部分的稅收被用來幫助失業人口。
options: (A) He thinks the government should try to reduce unemployment.
(B) He thinks social welfare programs are important because they assist the needy.
(C) He thinks that financial assistance should only be provided to citizens.
(D) He thinks most tax dollars go toward helping the unemployed.

questions.stem: Which of the mentioned topics does the woman not care to support financially?
translation: 這位女士不想要以經濟支援以下提及何者選項？
A.軍隊
B.公共建築物
C.學校
D.醫院

cards.passage:
Man: Next time a situation like this occurs, could you make sure to record all of the details right after it happens? The police are probably going to ask for that when they get here.
Woman: I'm sorry. It happened so quickly, I wasn't even thinking.
Man: I understand completely. I am sorry you had to deal with that. We have never had theft occur in this store before.
Woman: Well, I just hope it doesn't happen again.
Man: Me too. Did you at least see what the guy looked like?
Woman: Sorry, I just can't remember.
cards.passageTranslation:
Man: 下次有類似的情況發生，你務必要紀錄發生後的一切細節？警察來到這裡可能會需要這些細節。
Woman: 對不起。那發生的太快了，我想都沒有想。
Man: 我完全了解。我很抱歉你必須處裡那些事情。我們店裡以前從來沒有遭竊。
Woman: 我只是希望這件事不要再發生了。
Man: 我也是。你至少有看見那個男人長什麼樣子吧？
Woman: 對不起，我記不得他的長相。

questions.stem: What happened while the woman was working?
translation: 這位女士工作時發生什麼事？
A.警察進來店裡
B.有人拿槍進來店裡搶劫
C.有人偷竊物品
D.有位顧客對她施以暴力
options: (A) The police came into the shop.
(B) The store was robbed at gunpoint.
(D) A customer became violent with her.

questions.stem: How many times has this happened in the shop before?
translation: 店裡之前發生過幾次偷竊事件了？
A.這是第一次
B.之前有一次
C.好幾次
D.很多次

questions.stem: Why is the man a little disappointed with the woman?
translation: 為何這位男士對女子有點失望？
A.她沒有在他離開商店之前阻止犯罪
B.她很慢才打電話給店經理及報案
C.她沒有拍下偷竊男子的照片
D.她沒有紀錄也沒有記下發生的經過
options: (A) She didn't stop the criminal before he left the store.
(B) She was slow to call the police and the store manager.
(C) She didn't get a picture of the guy.
(D) She didn't write down or remember anything about what happened.

cards.passage:
M: How can I help you, ma'am?
W: I'm looking to purchase a property in this neighborhood.
M: Sure. And what kind of property are you interested in?
W: A condo.
M: Sure. What is your budget range?
W: Under 400,000 is ideal. Also, we want something that is quiet, not on a main street. A heated parking lot would be great, too.
M: Sure. I'm going to prepare a list of available properties for you. I'll just need a few minutes. Would you like coffee or water while you wait?
cards.passageTranslation:
男：要我幫忙嗎，夫人？
女：我要在這附近購買房產。
男：好的。你對什麼樣的房地產有興趣？
女：一間公寓。
男：好的。您的預算範圍？
女：理想範圍是40萬美金以內。此外，我們想要安靜，不在主要街道上。有暖氣的停車場就更好了。
男：好的。我去準備一份可申購的房產列表給您。我只需要幾分鐘。你等待的時候想要喝咖啡或水呢？
毛里西奧房地產仲介
我們提供以下地區最優惠的價格的服務：
公寓&住家租賃 商業用地租賃 公寓出售 出售您的房產

questions.stem: Look at the graphic. Which advertised service is the woman looking for?
translation: 請看圖表。該女子在找的是廣告中的哪項服務？
a. 公寓&住家租賃
b. 商業用地租賃
c. 公寓出售
d. 出售房產
options: (D) Put Your Property on the Market

questions.stem: Which prerequisite is NOT desired by the woman?
translation: 哪一個不是女人想要的條件？
a. 花費40萬美金以內
b. 在主要街道上
c. 安靜的街區
d. 有暖氣的停車場

questions.stem: Does the real estate agent have any properties that match her prerequisites?
translation: 房地產仲介有無任何房產符合她的條件？
a. 沒有。
b. 有一間。
c. 沒有，但是他有幾間能夠滿足她的一些條件。
d. 有。有幾個。
options: (C) No, but he has some that meet a few of her prerequisites.

cards.passage:
Man: Have you ever used this kind of machinery before? It's a little complicated.
Woman: Don't worry; my father owns a private landscaping business. I have been using equipment like this since I was twelve years old.
Man: Really? What is your father's company's name? I just had some work done in my yard a few years ago. Maybe it was him that did it.
Woman: Actually, we are from out of town, so it definitely wasn't us. But we are planning to get some business around here, so feel free to tell your customers about us. We are called 'Ray's Landscaping'. Here's my card. I'll be taking over the business next year when my father retires.
Man: Well, I look forward to doing business with you in the future!
cards.passageTranslation:
Man: 你以前曾經使用過這一型的機器嗎？這有點複雜。
Woman: 別擔心; 我的父親有一間私人的景觀公司。我從12歲就曾使用過這種機器設備。
Man: 真的嗎？你父親公司的名稱為何？幾年前我的後院才完工。也許是你父親的作品。
Woman: 我們其實從外縣市來的，所以那絕對不會是我們。但是我們計畫要在這附近接幾份生意，請告訴你的顧客。我們公司名稱為"磊斯景觀公司"。這是我的名片。明年我父親退休後我會接管公司。
Man: 好的，我很期待以後有機會和你合作！

questions.stem: What is the woman doing in the man's shop?
translation: 這位女士在男子的店裡做什麼？
A.購買油漆以及其他的用品
B.詢問她哪裡可以找到一個庭園設計師
C.幫她父親的公司購買一部機器
D.取得關於這個新城市的資訊
options: (B) Inquiring about where she can find a landscaper.
(C) Purchasing a machine for her father's company.
(D) Trying to get information about the new city.

questions.stem: What does the woman ask the man to do for her?
translation: 這位女士要求男子為她做什麼事情？
A.成交她要購買的機器
B.告訴他的顧客有關她父親的公司
C.請男子修整她院子的庭園景觀
D.幫她搬機器上車
options: (A) Ring through the machine that she is buying.
(B) Tell his customers about her father's company.
(C) Some landscaping work on her yard.
(D) Help her to carry the machine to her car.

questions.stem: What is possibly happening next year?
translation: 明年可能會發生什麼事？
A.這位女士和男子會搬到一個新城市
B.男子會請磊斯景觀公司來整修他的院子
C.男子會退休
D.那位女士會接管她父親的公司
options: (A) The woman and her father will move to a new city.
(B) The man will have 'Ray's Landscaping' do some work in his yard.
(D) The woman will take over her father's company.

cards.passage:
Woman: Is this your first time in Shanghai?
Man: I have been here for work a number of times before, but this is the first time that I have time between meetings to take a look around the city. What about you?
Woman: I was actually born here and then my family migrated to America right after, but this is my first time ever coming back. I have been avoiding it up until now.
Man: Why is that?
Woman: Well, I actually can't speak any Chinese at all, and I heard that people here might find that a little strange because I look like I am Chinese.
cards.passageTranslation:
Woman: 這是你第一次來上海嗎？
Man: 我以前來這裡出差過很多次，但是我第一次有時間在會期來市區到處看看。那你呢？
Woman: 其實我在這裡出生後，我家人就移民到美國，但這是我第一次回來。之前我一直避免要來這裡。
Man: 為什麼？
Woman: 其實我一點中文都不會說，又因為我看起來像中國人，所以我聽說人們可能會覺得有點怪。

questions.stem: How many times has the woman been to Shanghai?
translation: 這位女士來上海幾次了？
A.從未
B.一次
C.她住在這裡
D.很多次

questions.stem: What is the purpose of the man's visit to Shanghai?
translation: 這位男士來上海的目的為何？
A.商務
B.樂趣
C.轉機
D.探望家人

questions.stem: What reason did the woman give for not returning to Shanghai before?
translation: 這位女士之前沒有回來上海的理由為何？
A.班機昂貴
B.工作行程忙碌
C.家人問題
D.當地人可能的反應

cards.passage:
Man: Where did you buy your phone? It looks really high tech.
Woman: I got mine from the shop down the street, but they sell these all over the place. Haven't you noticed? Everybody has one these days.
Man: I am always behind on technology. I don't even chat on the phone much anyways.
Woman: It's not just a telephone though. You can also send e-mails, check the weather, make a calendar with your schedule, take pictures, listen to music, and play games. Seriously, you are always on the road making sales. This would be really handy for you.
Man: Wow. Phones have really changed. I still remember the days where most people carried pagers!
Woman: You need to keep up with the times!
cards.passageTranslation:
Man: 你在哪裡購得你的手機？看起來很高科技。
Woman: 我從這條街上的店裡買的，但是他們到處都有販賣這款手機。你沒注意到嗎？最近每個人都人手一機？
Man: 我對科技一直很落伍。我甚至不太用電話聊天。
Woman: 但這不只是一支手機。你也可以收發電子郵件、查看天氣、用日曆表記事、拍照、聽音樂、玩遊戲。說真的，你都在路上做生意。，這真的對你很方便。
Man: 手機電話真的不一樣了。我還記得以前大部份的人用Call機的時候。
Woman: 你需要跟上時代的腳步！

questions.stem: Why does the woman think that the man would benefit from having a phone like hers?
translation: 為什麼這位女士覺得擁有一支像她一樣的電話對這位男士而言有幫助？
A.因為他是位到處走動的業務。
B.因為他不知道你可以用手機玩遊戲
C.因為他還在用Call機
D.因為他從事行銷科技產業
options: (A) Because he is a traveling salesman.
(B) Because he didn't realize that you could play games on the phone.
(C) Because he is still using a pager.
(D) Because he works on marketing technology.

questions.stem: What excuse does he give for not upgrading his phone before?
translation: 他對他之前手機沒有升級的藉口為何？
A.他沒有聽音樂
B.這些新手機真的很貴
C.他現在的手機還不夠好
D.他不太常用手機通話
options: (A) He doesn't listen to much music.
(B) These new phones are really costly.
(C) His current phone is still good enough.
(D) He doesn't talk much on the phone.

questions.stem: Where did the woman buy her telephone?
translation: 這位女士在何處購買手機？
A.從一間線上商店購得
B.從他們工作的公司購得
C.從鄰近地區的商店中購得
D.從一位在街上賣手機的男子那購得
options: (B) From the company they are working for.
(C) From a shop in the neighborhood.
(D) From the man who sells phone on the street.

cards.passage:
Woman: It looks like you are going to have to get a few fillings.
Man: I don't think I can afford it right now.
Woman: Don't you have full dental coverage through your company's health insurance policy?
Man: Oh, does my coverage include fillings as well?
Woman: Of course it does!
Man: Well, I guess I will be seeing you again soon then!
Woman: Actually, I am fully booked until summer.
cards.passageTranslation:
Woman: 看來你得填補幾處蛀牙。
Man: 我想我現在無法負擔。
Woman: 你的公司健保細項完全沒有涵蓋看牙醫的費用嗎？
Man: 我的健保項目也包括牙洞填補嗎？
Woman: 當然有！
Man: 那我想我很快又會回來見你了！
Woman: 事實上，夏天前我的病人都已經訂滿了

questions.stem: What part of the man is the woman taking a look at?
translation: 這位女子正在查看男子身上的哪一個部份？
A.他的頭髮
B.他的牙齒
C.他的眼睛
D.他的心臟

questions.stem: What is the man's main concern when he finds out that he needs fillings?
translation: 當這位男士發現他需要填補蛀牙，他主要的考量是什麼？
A.時間
B.外觀如何
C.價格
D.他太過忙碌，沒時間再約門診
options: (D) He's too busy to get an appointment.

questions.stem: Why does the man need to wait a long time before he can see her again?
translation: 為什麼這位男士要等很久才能再見她？
A.她要查看他的健保項目。
B.他要先存錢
C.她沒有時間
D.他們夏天後很忙碌
options: (A) She needs to check out his health insurance plan.
(B) He needs to save up some money first.
(D) They will be very busy after summer.

cards.passage:
M: Here is your passport and boarding pass.
W: Thanks. I'd also like to confirm that I have a vegetarian meal on the flight.
M: Sure, just let me check for you. Hmm…I'm afraid I don't see any special meal requests under your name.
W: Is it too late?
M: I'll send a note to the cabin crew. Usually they have a few extras, but I can't guarantee it.
W: Sure, thanks.
M: What kind of vegetarian meal would you like? We have Western vegetarian, Chinese vegetarian, Indian vegetarian, and vegan.
W: I'd like Indian vegetarian, please. But if that's not possible, any kind will do.
cards.passageTranslation:
男：這是你的護照和登機證。
女：謝謝。我想順便確認一下飛航中的素食餐。
男：好的，讓我幫你查一下。嗯......恐怕我沒有看到你名下的任何特殊餐請求。
女：太遲了嗎？
男：我會送一張字條給機組人員。通常他們有幾分額外餐點，但我不能保證。
女：好的，謝謝。
男：你想要哪一種素食餐？我們有西方素食、中國素食、印度素食和全素餐。
女 ：請給我印度素食，如果沒辦法，任何一種都行。
辛科航空公司素食餐
#1:西方素食（蛋奶素食主義者）
#2:中國素食（不含大蒜，洋蔥，或蛋）
#3:印度素食（可能是辣的，含乳製品）
#4:全素（無任何動物性產品）
*所有素食餐點都不含肉類和海鮮

questions.stem: Where are the speakers?
translation: 說話者在哪裡？
a. 在旅行社
b. 在飛機上
c. 在抵達機門
d. 在登記櫃檯

questions.stem: Look at the graphic. What kind of vegetarian meal does the woman prefer?
translation: 請看圖表。該女子想要哪種素食餐？
a. #1或#2(西方或中國)
d. 她沒有偏好。

questions.stem: What is the outcome of the conversation?
translation: 這段對話的結果為何？
a. 她無法得到素食餐。
b. 她一定會得到一個素食餐。
c. 她大概就能得到一個素食餐。
d. 她無法得到她想要的那種素食餐。
options: (A) She won't be able to get a vegetarian meal.
(B) She will definitely get a vegetarian meal.
(C) She will probably be able to get a vegetarian meal.
(D) She won't be able to get the kind of vegetarian meal she wants.

cards.passage:
Woman: I need you to speed up that spaghetti bolognese. The customer is getting more and more impatient.
Man: But I have six other orders ahead of that one. It wouldn't really be fair.
Woman: Don't worry. Those are for another one of my tables. That crew doesn't seem to be rushed at all.
Man: Fine, I can do it. But if anybody complains, it will be your responsibility, not mine!
Woman: I guarantee nobody will even notice.
cards.passageTranslation:
Woman: 我要你加快那份番茄肉醬義大利麵。顧客愈等愈沒耐心了。
Man: 但我還有其他六份要排在前面。會不公平的。
Woman: 別擔心。那些是我另外一桌的。那桌客人似乎一點都不急。
Man: 好吧，我可以先做。但如果有人抱怨，就是你的責任，不是我的！
Woman: 我保證沒有人會注意到的

questions.stem: What is the woman's job title?
translation: 這位女士的工作職稱是什麼？
A.大廚
B.女服務生
C.女店主
D.吧台人員

questions.stem: What favor is the woman asking from the man?
translation: 她要求這位先生幫忙什麼？
A.快點完成六份餐點
B.在完成其他餐點前，先做某一份餐點。
C.幫她上菜
D.如果有問題要負起責任。
options: (A) To make the six orders faster.
(B) To make one order before the others.
(C) To help her carry out the orders.
(D) To take responsibility if there is a problem.

questions.stem: How does the woman know that the other customers will not be angry?
translation: 她怎麼知道其他的顧客不會生氣？
A.他們和那位不耐煩的顧客坐同一桌。
B.餐廳不是客滿的
C.那些其他的顧客並不急。
D.他們已經以現金付款了。
options: (A) They are at the same table as the impatient person.
(B) The restaurant is not even full.
(C) Those other customers are not in a hurry.

cards.passage:
M: I simply love visiting Korea in the winter, as the countryside is usually decorated in snow. I enjoy watching snow falling from the sky, and I love being surrounded by it. There are also several ski resorts within a few hours' drive of the capital, Seoul. The weather there is cold, but not too cold.
W: It sounds very similar to my hometown.
M2: What a coincidence. Me too!
M: My apologies. I forget where both of you are from!
W: No need to apologize. I don't think I've ever mentioned it! I'm from a suburb of Vancouver, Canada. It's actually only a 30-minute drive from Whistler, a famous ski resort.
M2: And I'm from Austria. We are known worldwide for our ski resorts!
M: Lucky for you two! You'd probably both really like Korea in winter then!
W: To be honest, I've already had my fair share of snow and skiing back home. When it comes to holidays, I prefer tropical destinations.
M: No wonder you and your husband chose to celebrate your tenth year of marriage here in Fiji! What about you, Kevin. Do you fancy a trip to Korea next winter?
M2: I've actually been several times on business, but unfortunately I didn't have time to hit the slopes.
cards.passageTranslation:
M：我就是愛在冬天去參觀韓國，因為鄉村通常被雪裝飾著。我喜歡看雪從天空落下，我喜歡被它包圍。距首都首爾幾個小時車程內還有幾個滑雪勝地。那邊天氣很冷，但又不會太冷。
W：聽起來很像我的故鄉。
M2：真是巧合阿。我的也是！
M：對不起。我忘記了你們兩個是哪裡人。
W：不需要道歉。我不認為我曾經提過！我來自加拿大溫哥華的郊區。實際上距離著名的滑雪勝地惠斯勒只有30分鐘的車程。
M2：我來自奧地利。我們的滑雪勝地世界著名！
M：你們兩個真幸運！那你們應該會很喜歡韓國的冬天！
W：說實話，我在家鄉時已經看夠雪也滑夠雪了。說到假期，我喜歡熱帶地點。
M：難怪你和你丈夫選擇在斐濟慶祝你的結婚十週年！你呢，凱文？你明年冬天想去韓國旅行嗎？
M2：我實際上去那邊出差了幾次，但很遺憾並沒有時間去滑雪。

questions.stem: What is one difference between the ski resorts near Seoul and the woman's city?
translation: 首爾附近的滑雪勝地和女子城市的滑雪場有什麼不同？
(A) 它們離市區的距離。
(B) 它們的大小。
(C) 它們的雪量。
(D) 它們的開放時間。

questions.stem: What country would the woman probably most like to visit on holiday?
translation: 該女子最有可能會去什麼國家度假？
(A) 冰島。
(B) 南韓。
(C) 加拿大。
(D) 越南。

questions.stem: Who in the conversation has been to Korea?
translation: 對話中的誰去過了韓國？
(A) 只有該女子。
(B) 該女子和第一位男子。
(C) 兩位男子。
(D) 全部的人。
options: (B) The woman and the first man only.

cards.passage:
W: For here or to go?
M: For here, please.
W: OK, got it.
M: Um…Why did you put it in a plastic cup if I said for here?
W: Oh, we put all of our iced beverages in plastic cups. We don't have any glasses.
M: That's really too bad. It's such a waste. Could you please put it in a mug then?
W: Of course.
M: May I ask…Why don't you guys have any glasses?
W: We used to have some, but many of our customers complained. They like the convenience of being able to leave quickly if necessary and just take their beverage with them.
M: Well, I would strongly appreciate if you could mention to your manager that some customers, such as myself, would still prefer the glass ones.
W: I am the manager, actually. Thank you for your suggestion. I'll order some glasses in, and they should be here within a week.
cards.passageTranslation:
W：內用還是外帶？
M：麻煩內用。
W：好，知道了。
M：嗯...我已經說是內用了，你為什麼還把它放在塑料杯裡？
W：哦，我們把所有的冰飲品都放塑料杯裡。 我們沒有任何玻璃杯。
M：真是太糟糕了。 這是一種浪費。 你能把它放在馬克杯裡嗎？
W：當然。
M：我可以問...你為什麼沒有玻璃杯嗎？
W：我們以前有一些，但有很多客戶抱怨。他們喜歡能夠方便地快速離開，如果必要的話，只需直接帶走他們的飲料。
M：嗯，若妳能向妳的經理提到有些客戶(如我自己)仍然喜歡用玻璃，我會很感激的。
W：其實我就是經理。 感謝您的建議。 我會訂一些玻璃杯的，它們應該會在一個星期內送達。
點單項目
1.熱飲
2.冷飲
器具
3.冷飲玻璃杯
4.熱飲馬克杯

questions.stem: Look at the graphic. Which item listed does the woman's shop not presently carry?
translation: 請看圖表。該女子商店中目前沒有列出哪一個項目？
a. 項目1
b. 項目2
c. 項目3
d. 項目4

questions.stem: What reason does the woman give for her shop not carrying this item?
translation: 對於她的店裡沒有這個項目，女子給的原因是什麼？
a. 和天氣相關。
b. 這不是她店的專長。
c. 此商品不適合這家店的環境。
d. 許多客戶似乎不喜歡這個項目。
options: (B) It is not her shop's specialty.
(C) This item is not suitable for this shop's environment.
(D) Many customers didn't seem to like this item.

questions.stem: What is the end result of the conversation?
translation: 以下選項何者是談話的最終結果？
a. 女子會滿足男子的要求。
b. 女子會記下男子的要求，並考慮一下。
c. 女子不會滿足男子的要求。
d. 女子會把男子的要求轉告給經理。
options: (A) The woman will fulfill the man's request.
(B) The woman will take note of the man's request and think about it.
(C) The woman will not fulfill the man's request.
(D) The woman will forward the man's request to the manager.

cards.passage:
M: Excuse me. Can you tell me how to get to the New Museum of Contemporary Art?
W: The New Museum of Contemporary Art? It's near here. You must be new to the city. It's the most well-known landmark in town.
M: Right. I've only been here for a couple of days. I'm visiting my best friend. He suggested the New Museum as a good place to visit. But he has a meeting today, so I'm going there alone.
W: It's located at 235 Bowery. You can take tram M103 to Prince and Bowery. You have to hurry up, though; it closes at six p.m. on weekends.
cards.passageTranslation:
M：對不起，可以請你告訴我到新當代藝術博物館怎麼走？
W：新當代藝術博物館？就在這附近。你一定剛到這城市。這是這裡最著名的地標。
M：對。我來這裡才幾天。我來拜訪我最好的朋友。他建議新當代藝術博物館是遊覽的好去處。不過，他今天開會，所以我獨自去這個地方。
W：它位於Bowery235號。你可以搭M103號電車到Prince 和Bowery路。你要快點。周末下午6點就會關館。
New Museum of Contemporary Art 新當代藝術博物館

questions.stem: How does the woman know that the man is from out of town?
translation: 該女子如何得知道該男子不是當地人？
(A) 他不知道如何在這城市趕搭公車。
(B) 他從來沒有聽說過新當代藝術博物館。
(C) 他不知道如何去新當代藝術博物館。
(D) 他獨自旅行。
options: (A) He doesn't know how to catch buses in this city.
(B) He's never heard of the New Museum of Contemporary Art.
(C) He's doesn't know how to get to the New Museum of Contemporary Art.

questions.stem: How will the man get to the place he is going?
translation: 該男子將如何到達目的地？
(A) 他會坐火車。
(B) 他會搭巴士。
(C) 他會搭便車。
(D) 他會搭電車。
解析：
女子跟他說搭電車，故選 (D) 才是正確解答。

questions.stem: On what day is the conversation likely taking place?
translation: 這段對話有可能是星期幾發生的?
(A)星期六。
(B)星期二。
(C)星期三。
(D)星期一。
解析:
因為提到周末六點關門，因此推知星期六或者星期天，只有選項 (A) 為最佳解答。

cards.passage:
M: Mrs. Pitt, did you bring your resume, reference letters, and bio?
W: I brought my resume and reference letters, but unfortunately I forgot my bio at home. I was called for this interview this morning so I was in a great rush to leave home. I realize that this probably doesn't seem very professional, but I assure you that this is not normal for me. I could e-mail it to you as soon as I get back home.
M: That won't be necessary. I see here on your resume that you recently graduated with a Bachelor of Science. However, the position is open to graduate degree holders only, as mentioned in the job posting. We put much importance on education here at Biovet Solutions.
W: I apologize for wasting your time.
cards.passageTranslation:
M：彼特女士，你有帶簡歷，推薦書和自傳嗎？
W：我有帶履歷和推薦信，但不幸的是，我把自傳留在家裡。我今天早上接到面試通知，因此我很趕著出門。我知道這可能不是很專業，但我向你保證，這是對我來說很不正常。 我一回到家就可以寄電子郵件給你。
M：沒有這個必要。我看了你的簡歷，你最近剛大學畢業，拿到理學學士學位。然而，如刊登的職缺，我們的職位是開放給碩士學位。Biovet Solutions很重視學歷。
W：對於浪費您的時間，我深表歉意。

questions.stem: What kind of document did the woman forget to bring?
translation: 以下選項何者是該女子忘了攜帶的文件？
(A) 她的學位。
(B) 她的個人自傳。
(C) 推薦信。
(D) 她的簡歷。

questions.stem: Why does the man say, "That won't be necessary"?
translation: 該男子為什麼說「沒有這個必要」？
(A) 他不需要看到那份文件才能僱用這女子。
(B) .他不需要知道她畢業大學的名字。
(C) 他不想接受女子的道歉。
(D) 依面試的結果，他不會提供這個女子工作。
options: (A) He doesn't need to see that document in order to hire the woman.
(B) He doesn't need to know the name of the university that she graduated from.
(C) He doesn't want to accept the woman's apology.
(D) He is not going to offer the woman a job as a result of this interview.

questions.stem: Why does the woman feel that she has wasted the man's time?
translation: 為什麼該女子覺得她浪費了男子的時間？
(A) 因為她忘了帶家中幾件必要的物品。
(B) 她沒有注意到她沒有足夠的資格應徵這個職位。
(C) 她拒絕了男子給的工作機會。
(D) 她沒有意識到她應徵了什麼樣的公司。
options: (A) Because she forgot several necessary items at home.
(B) She failed to notice that she wasn't sufficiently qualified for the position.
(C) She declined the man's job offer.
(D) She didn't realize what kind of company she had applied to.

cards.passage:
M: Teresa, I was just reviewing your sales figures from the last year and I find them rather unusual.
W: Why do you say that?
M: Well, they seem to have fluctuated wildly. Your first quarter was obviously a very successful one, but you failed to meet your quota in the second. In the third you bounced back again, but in the last one you were once again lagging behind.
W: Well, there are several factors that can explain that.
M: Such as?
W: In the first quarter I closed an unusually big deal. The second quarter is always slow in my region, while late summer always picks up again. In the final quarter I had to take over Brenda's role on top of my usual responsibilities so that set me back a little.
M: I understand, but we'd still like to see a little more consistency from you next year if possible.
cards.passageTranslation:
M：Teresa，我剛在檢視妳去年的銷售數字，我發現它們相當不尋常。
W：你為什麼這麼說？
M：嗯，因為它們似乎經過瘋狂的波動。 你的第一季顯然非常成功，但你第二季未能達到目標額度。 在第三季，你再次回彈，但在最後一次，你又再次落後。
W：嗯，有幾個因素可以解釋這件事。
M：比如？
W：在第一季，我成交了一筆非常大的交易。 第二季我的區域總是比較冷清，然而夏末總會再次回升。 在最後一季，除了我本身的責任外，我不得不接手布蘭達的角色，所以讓我倒退了一點。
M：我明白了，但如果可能的話，我們還是希望明年能達到更高的一致性。

questions.stem: Look at the graphic. Which chart represents the woman's sales figures in the last year?
translation: 請看圖表。 哪個圖表代表女子在去年的銷售數字？

questions.stem: Which factor affecting her sales is not mentioned by the woman?
translation: 以下哪一個是女子未提及影響銷售的因素？
a. 季節性需求。
b. 額外的工作職責。
c. 成交一筆很大的交易。
d. 休產假。

questions.stem: What does the man want the woman to do in the next year?
translation: 以下選項何者是該男子想要該女子在明年所做的事情？
a. 提高她的銷售數字。
b. 使她的銷售數字更一致。
c. 改變她的銷售策略。
d. 更準確地報告她的銷售數字。
options: (B) Make her sales figures more consistent.
(D) Report her sales figures more accurately.

cards.passage:
W: Excuse me, sir. I am looking for my daughter, Nancy. I just bent over to pick up a bag of potatoes, and when I stood up, she was gone.
M: What does she look like?
W: She has long straight hair. She's wearing a pink hat and a white dress - oh, by the way, she is six years old.
M: Don't worry, ma'am. We'll find her. I will make an announcement first and see if she comes to us. You stay right here for now. If she doesn't come to us right away, I'll dispatch some employees to search every aisle.
cards.passageTranslation:
W：抱歉先生，我在找我的女兒南西。我才剛彎腰挑了一袋馬鈴薯，我站起來她就不見了。
M：她長得什麼樣子？
W：她有長直髮。戴著粉紅色的帽子，白色的洋裝。喔，對了，她六歲。
M：別擔心，太太。我們會找到她的。我先廣播看她會不會來找我們。妳先在這裡等著。如果她沒有馬上來找我們，我會派一些員工到每一個走道尋找。
straight (adj.) 直直的

questions.stem: Where is this conversation taking place?
translation: 這段對話的發生地點在何處？
(A) 在女子的辦公室。
(B) 在一家超市。
(C) 在一間家具店。
(D) 在火車站。
解析：
furniture (n.) 家具
女子有說明自己要選購馬鈴薯，因此可判斷這段對話是在超市。故選項 (B) 為正確解答。

questions.stem: What information does the man specifically ask the woman to provide about her daughter?
translation: 男子特別要求女子提供有關她女兒的什麼資訊？
(A) 身型描述。
(B) 她的年齡。
(C) 她的名字。
(D) 最後看見她女兒的地方。
解析：
argue with 和某人起爭執
提到女兒不見了，故選項 (A) 為正確解答。
options: (D) the location that she was last seen

questions.stem: What will the man do if the missing daughter doesn't find them after he makes an announcement?
translation: 如果失蹤的女兒在廣播後沒來找他們，以下選項是該男子將會做的事情？
(A) 他會親自去找她。
(B) 他會打電話報警。
(C) 他會指示一些員工去找她。
(D) 他會用錄影監視器找到她的位置。
options: (A) He will personally go find her.
(C) He will instruct some staff to find her.
(D) He will use video surveillance to locate her.

cards.passage:
M: Rickter Supplies. Douglas speaking. How may I help you?
W: Hi. I just placed an order through your online ordering system but I made one small mistake.
M: No problem. I'll help you fix that right now. How long ago did you make the order?
W: I just hit confirm about a minute ago.
M: Unfortunately, it usually takes about 20 minutes for me to be able to see the order. Could you just tell me what you want to change, and I'll make sure it happens once I receive it?
W: Sure. For the neon green post-it notes, I meant to order 2 cases, not 20.
M: Got it. I'll make sure we send you 2, not 20. Anything else?
W: No. But could you please give me a ring to confirm the change?
M: Of course.
cards.passageTranslation:
M：Rickter用品。 我是道格拉斯。請問需要什麼協助呢？
W：嗨！我剛經由您們的在線訂購系統下訂單，但我犯了一個小錯誤。
M：沒問題。我現在幫你解決這個問題。你多久之前訂購的？
W：我大概一分鐘前按下確認。
M：不幸的是，我通常需要大約20分鐘才能看到訂單。 你能告訴我你想調整什麼，我會確保一收到它後就馬上更改。
W：當然。 針對霓虹綠的便條，我是要訂2個，而不是20個。
M：知道了。 我會確保我們寄送2個，而不是20個，還有什麼問題嗎？
W：不，但你能打電話給我確認修改嗎？
M：當然。
項目清單 項目號碼 產品描述 顏色 #446 便條紙 霓虹綠 #447 便條紙 亮綠 #448 便條紙 薄荷綠 #449 便條紙 高山綠

questions.stem: What is the purpose of the woman's call?
translation: 以下選項何者是該女子來電的目的？
a, 她想下訂單。
b. 她想取消訂單上的一個項目。
c. 她想取消整個訂單。
d. 她想修改她訂單上的一個項目。
options: (A) She wants to place an order.
(B) She wants to cancel one item on her order.
(C) She wants to cancel an entire order.
(D) She wants to amend one item on her order.

questions.stem: Look at the graphic. Which specific item on the order does the woman refer to during the conversation?
translation: 請看圖表。以下選項何者是該女子在對話裡提到的？

questions.stem: What does the woman want the man to do after he completes her request?
translation: 以下選項是該女子在完成需求後想要男子做什麼？
a. 親自確認。
b. 寄發確認電子郵件。
c. 打電話通知確認。
d. 她不需要任何確認。

cards.passage:
M: I heard that you work for the bookstore that's going to close down.
W: Yes. It's really sad news. I've been employed there for over two decades.
M: So why the big change?
W: Rent in that location has gone up dramatically in recent years. What's worse, people are buying fewer and fewer paper books these days. The owner is barely turning a profit.
M: That's really too bad. What are you going to do next?
W: I'm thinking of executing my lifelong dream.
M: Which is?
W: I've always wanted to own my own cafe. I've been setting aside money for years. I think I finally have enough start-up capital. All that remains is to find the ideal location.
cards.passageTranslation:
M：我聽說你工作的書店那將倒閉了。
W：是的。真是一個讓人傷心的消息。我在那裡工作超過20年了。
M：是為什麼有這麼大的變動呢？
W：這幾年該地區的租金大幅上漲。更糟糕的是，人們現在購買的書籍越來越少。老闆幾乎賺不到什麼利潤。
M：這真是太糟了。你接下來要做什麼呢？
W：我想要實現我終身的夢想。
M：是什麼呢？
W：我一直想擁有自己的咖啡館。我幾年來一直在存錢。我想我終於有足夠的創業資本。 現在只需找到理想的地點。
close down 停業，關閉
Capital n.本錢、資金

questions.stem: How long has the woman been working for the bookstore that is going to close?
translation: 該女子為那家即將關閉的書店工作多久了？
(D) 超過20年以上。
解析：
A decade指10年，故over two decades指超過20年，故因此正確解答為 (D)。

questions.stem: Which reason is not mentioned for the owner of the bookstore closing the shop down?
translation: 下面選項何者不是書店老闆關店的原因？
(A) 他沒有賺什麼錢。
(B) 人們買的書不如以往。
(C) 他準備退休。
(D) 房租很高。
解析：
employ (v.) 雇用
文中並沒有提到退休，故選項 (C) 為正確解答。
options: (B) People aren't buying as many books as before.

questions.stem: What does the woman still need to do in order to execute her new business plan?
translation: 為了執行她的新商業計劃，該女還需要做什麼？
(A) 學習更多有關咖啡產業的事。
(B) 為她的咖啡廳找一個地點。
(C) 決定她到底要做什麼。
(D) 再存多一點錢。
解析：
女子僅需要找理想的開店地點。
因此選項 (B) 才是正確解答。
options: (A) learn more about the coffee industry
(B) find a place to open her new cafe
(C) decide exactly what she wants to do
(D) save up a little more money

cards.passage:
W: What did you do yesterday?
M: I went to the International Information Technology Show.
W: Cool. What was your impression?
M: There were crowds of people trying to squeeze into the building. I'm kind of an impatient person, so it was really frustrating.
W: So I'm assuming you didn't stay for very long?
M: Actually, I didn't really have a choice. My son is thinking about majoring in IT. He had been looking forward to this event for some time. We spent the entire afternoon there.
W: That's really decent of you. I'm sure your son really appreciated it.
cards.passageTranslation:
W：你昨天做了什麼？
M：我去了國際電腦展。
W：真棒！你的感想如何呢？
M：成群的人試著擠到建築物裡。我是個有點沒耐心的人，所以我覺得很不耐煩。
W：那麼我猜你並沒有待很久吧？
M：其實，我並無選擇。 我的兒子正在考慮專攻IT。 他一直期待著這個展覽。 我們在那待了一整個下午。
W： 你真是不錯。 我相信你的兒子一定很感激。
International Information Technology Show 國際資訊(電腦)展
Impression (n.)印象、感想
Decent (adj.)體面的、親切的

questions.stem: What complaint did the man make about the event?
translation: 以下選項何者是該男子對此展覽的怨言？
(A) 規劃不好。
(B) 太過擁擠。
(C) 要花太多時間買票。
(D) 工作人員很沒禮貌。
解析：
fitness (n.) 健身
options: (C) It took a long time to get a ticket.

questions.stem: Despite this complaint, why did the man stay all afternoon?
translation: 僅管有怨言，為什麼該男子待了一整個下午？
(A) 他一直期待著這個展覽。
(B) 展覽過一陣子後變好了。
(C) 他在展覽中表演。
(D) 他的小孩很想留下來。
解析：
annoyed (adj.) 煩躁的
options: (A) He had been looking forward to the event.
(B) The event got better after a while.
(C) He was performing at the event.
(D) His kid really wanted to stay.

questions.stem: For about how long did the man attend the event in total?
translation: 該男子總共花了多少時間參加展覽？
(A) 不到一小時。
(B) 大約兩個小時。
(C) 四到五個小時。
(D) 超過八個小時。

cards.passage:
W: Hi. My name is Helen Smith. I would like to return an item, but I don't know the procedure.
M: First, complete a return form, available on our website, remembering to fill in the reason code. Then, choose whether you want to return by express or standard mail. Lastly, please package your return carefully and place the original receipt in the package before you mail it off. The address to mail it to is found on the return form. You will not be reimbursed for the mailing cost, but you will have the option of receiving either a store credit or a full refund to your credit card, that is, if you used a credit card to make the original purchase.
W: What happens if I lost the receipt?
M: Then you can print off a copy of the purchase invoice that you should have received by email.
W: I don't recall receiving that.
M: I would suggest you check you junk mail box. It might be in there.
cards.passageTranslation:
W：你好，我是的名字是海倫史密斯。我想退貨，但我不知道退貨程序。
M：首先，填寫退貨單，可於我們的網站取得。記住要填寫原因代碼。然後，選擇你的退貨要用快遞或是平信。最後，仔細地包好妳要退回的東西，然後在寄出之前將原來的收據放在包裹中。郵寄地址可以在退貨單上找到。您不會得到郵寄費用的退款，但您可以選擇接受商店折抵金額或信用卡全額退款，前提是，如果您使用信用卡進行最初的購買
W：如果我的收據不見了會怎麼樣？
M：沒關係。您可以列印出您應該會從電子郵件收到的購買發票副本。
W：我沒有印象有收過那個。
M：我建議您檢查你的垃圾郵箱。 它可能會在那裡。
procedure (n)程序
complete(vt.)完成
express (n.)快遞

questions.stem: What reason does the woman give for wanting to return an item?
translation: 該女子告知想退回產品的原因是什麼？
(A) 產品與她的期望不符。
(B) 產品規格不正確。
(C) 是瑕疵品。
(D) 她並沒有告知想退回的原因。
解析：
order (vt.) 訂貨
merchandise (n)商品
options: (A) It wasn't what she had been hoping for.
(B) It doesn't have the right specifications.
(D) She doesn't give a reason for wanting to return it.

questions.stem: How much money will the woman get back after she sends the product back by mail?
translation: 通過郵件寄回產品後，該女子會收回多少錢？
(A) 她將得到最初為產品支付的全額，且會收到郵寄費用的補償。
(B) 她將得到最初為產品支付的全額，但不會收到郵寄費用的補償。
(C) 她將得最初為產品支付全額的一部分，且會收到郵寄費用的補償。
(D) 她將得最初為產品支付全額的一部分，但不會收到郵寄費用的補償。
options: (A) She will get the full amount that she originally paid for the product and she will be reimbursed for the mailing costs.
(B) She will get the full amount that she originally paid for the product but she will not be reimbursed for the mailing costs.
(C) She will get a partial amount of money that she originally paid for the product and she will be reimbursed for the mailing costs.
(D) She will get a partial amount of money that she originally paid for the product and she will not be reimbursed for the mailing costs.

questions.stem: What happens if she doesn't have the receipt?
translation: 如果她沒有收據會發生什麼事？
(A) 她可以用購買發票副本代替。
(B) 她能寄電子郵件給該公司，告訴他們購買的明細。
(C) 她能在不提供任何收據或購買證明的情況下寄出包裹。
(D) 她將無法退回有問題的產品。
options: (A) She can substitute it with a copy of the purchase invoice.
(B) She can email the company and inform them of the purchase details.
(C) She can send the package without any receipt or proof of purchase.
(D) She will not be able to return the item in question.

cards.passage:
W: You look exhausted, Martin.
M: I am. I've been working overtime every day for the last month, even on weekends.
W: No wonder. I hope you are getting paid time-and-half for all that extra work.
M: Nope. I am on salary.
W: If I were you, I'd be looking elsewhere for work. Why don't you just hand in your notice and treat yourself to a holiday. You know, catch up on sleep. Then you can be more refreshed and do whatever it takes to find something better.
M: I appreciate your advice, but I'm quite loyal to my company. This situation is only temporary. If I hold out a little longer, surely things will improve.
cards.passageTranslation:
W：你看起來很累壞了，馬丁。
M： 沒錯。我過去這個月每天都在加班，連週末也是。
W：難怪。我希望你加班的時間會得到1.5倍的薪資。
M：不，我是月薪制的。
W：如果我是你，我會找別的工作。你為什麼不提出辭呈，然後休個假呢？你知道的，補個眠。你可以恢復精神，然後想辦法找更好的工作。
M： 謝謝你的建議，但我對我的公司很忠誠。這種情況只是暫時的。如果我再堅持一下，事情肯定會改善。
frustrated (adj.)挫敗的
concern (vt.) 擔心
promise (vt.)保證，答應
raise (vt.)提升
matter (n.)問題

questions.stem: Why is the man so tired?
translation: 以下何者是該男子這麼累的原因？
(A) 他連續一個月每天都加班。
(B) 由於他的工作量很大，他上個月每週只有一天的周末。
(C) 除了週未之外，他上個月一直在加班。
(D) 他的工作被賦予了新的責任，包括監督週末工作人員。
options: (A) He has been working extra hours every day for a month in a row.
(B) He has only had one-day weekends for the last month due to his heavy workload.
(C) He has been working overtime every day for the last month, excluding weekends.
(D) He has been given new responsibilities at his job, including overseeing weekend staff.

questions.stem: Which of the following pieces of advice is not offered by the woman?
translation: 以下哪一個建議不是由該女子提出的？
(A) 辭掉工作。
(B) 休假。
(C) 找不同公司的職缺，
(D) 拒絕加班。
options: (C) Look for job vacancies in a different company.

questions.stem: What is the man's opinion?
translation: 以下選項何者是該男子的意見？
(A) 他會聽女子的建議。
(B) 他不會辭職，但他會調整他的工作。
(C) 他會留下，因為他覺得會變好。
(D) 他會休假，因為他不會辭職。
options: (A) He will follow the woman's advice.
(B) He won't quit but he will make changes to his job.
(C) He will stay because he thinks it will get better.
(D) He will take a holiday but he won't quit.

cards.passage:
M: Lucy, you showed confidence and excellent performance this year. We have been very impressed by your performance. Hence, we agree you have what it takes to be the manager.
W: Thank you so much. I think this will be a great opportunity for my career development.
M: Certainly. And we believe you will make the best of this opportunity.
W: Could we please discuss some of the specifics?
M: Sure. Let's start with the salary. Your annual base salary will be bumped up to $720,000.
W: Wow. I must say I am a little surprised.
M: We truly feel you deserve it.
cards.passageTranslation:
M：露西，妳今年表現出色很有自信。我們對妳的表現印象非常深刻。因此，我們認同妳有資格當經理。
W：非常謝謝您們。我想這對我的職涯發展是一個很好的機會。
M：沒錯。我們相信妳會充分利用這個機會的。
W：我們可以討論一些細節嗎？
M：當然，我們從薪水開始討論。妳年薪將會提高至72萬元。
W：哇！老實說我有點驚訝。
M：我們真心認為是妳應得的。

questions.stem: What are the speakers discussing?
translation: 談話者在討論什麼？
(A) 新的招募。
(B) 實習機會。
(C) 升職問題。
(D) 可以增加利潤。
解析：
重點是升職，所以(B)是錯誤的，故選項 項 (C) 為最佳解答。

questions.stem: How does the woman feel after hearing the details?
translation: 女子得知細節後感覺如何？
(A) 她感到焦慮和擔心。 。
(B) 她感到吃驚但很高興。
(C) 她為自己感到驕傲但不滿意。
(D) 她感到失望和後悔。
解析：
anxious (adj.) 焦慮的
因女子在獲知消息後說這是很棒的決定，因此選項 (B) 在邏輯上較為符合。

questions.stem: What will happen to the woman's salary?
translation: 女子的薪水將會有什麼樣的變動？
(A) 保持不變。
(B) 調漲。
(C) 調降。
(D) 並沒有提到女子的薪水。
解析：
position(n.) 職位
options: (D) There is no mention of the woman's salary.

cards.passage:
M: I am curious as to how your company is doing.
W: Our recent product launch has put the company in the black. In fact, the earnings are pouring in.
M: Good for you guys! So I'm guessing you can expect a big raise on the horizon?
W: I will get a 10% salary increase next month. I was already doing OK, so I am more than satisfied.
M: Good thing you didn't hand in your notice!
W: Yes. Thanks to your advice. I can't believe I almost did that!
M: Good fortune comes to those who wait!
cards.passageTranslation:
M：我很好奇，妳的公司發展得如何。
W：我們最近發行的產品讓公司賺進大筆錢。事實上，利潤正開始湧入。
M：對你們來說太棒了！所以我猜你應該可以期待近期大加薪吧？
W：從下個月起，我薪水會調升10％。我的薪水本來就滿不錯的，所以我非常滿意。
M：幸好你沒遞出辭呈。
W：是的。感謝你的建議。我不敢相信我差點這樣做。
M：好運是會留給那些有耐心的人的！
in the black 有利潤
increase (n.)(vt.)增加
fortunately (adv.)幸運地
hand in one's notice 辭職
otherwise(adv.) 否則

questions.stem: How has the woman's company been doing lately?
translation: 該女子的公司最近發展得如何？
(A) 處於破產的邊緣。
(B) 生意不好，但正在緩慢恢復。
(C) 生意有時好有時壞。
(D) 公司賺了很多。
options: (A) It is on the verge of bankruptcy.
(B) Business is down but slowly recovering.
(D) The company is earning a lot.

questions.stem: What does the woman imply?
translation: 該女子在暗示什麼？
(A) 她對她的薪水非常不滿意。
(B) 她的薪水本來就不錯，但現在更好。
(C) 她不敢相信自己沒有被調薪。
(D) 這是她第一次被調薪。
options: (A) She's not very satisfied with her salary.
(B) Her salary was good before, but now it's even better.
(C) She can't believe that she didn't get a raise.
(D) This is the first time she has ever gotten a raise.

questions.stem: What advice had the man given to the woman previously?
translation: 以下選項何者該男子先前給的建議？
(A) 她不應該辭職。
(B) 她應該辭職。
(C) 她應該要要求加薪。
(D) 她應該買公司股票然後賺大錢。
options: (A) She shouldn't resign from her job.
(B) She should resign from her job.
(D) She should buy company stocks and make a fortune.

cards.passage:
M: This year we will be offering a new bilingual program for the students. Do you have any interest in enrolling little Fred?
W: We would certainly consider it. What exactly is the ratio of Spanish to English classes?
M: Basically, all of the core classes would be conducted entirely in Spanish. That includes math, science, gym and, of course, the Spanish class. The only class that would be in English is English itself. We figure that the children are already surrounded by English at home and in their daily lives, so the point is to fully immerse them in a second language.
W: It sounds like a great program, but I'm a little concerned that Fred won't develop a proper understanding of his native language.
M: I assure you that studies have been conducted on students that have completed the bilingual program from kindergarten through grade 12, and their English scores proved to be on par with those in the regular English program. Also, Fred is a perfect candidate, since he has shown above average comprehension in all of his first grade classes.
W: Well, maybe we will give it a shot, but I'd like to talk it over with my husband first before I give you a definite answer.
cards.passageTranslation:
男:今年我們將提供新的雙語課程給學生們。你有興趣為小佛瑞德報名嗎?
女:我們一定會考慮一下的。課程的西班牙文對英文的確切比例是怎樣?
M:基本上，所有核心課程會完全以西班牙文教學。那包括數學、科學、體育，當然還有西班牙文課。上課唯一用英文的就是英文課。我們認為小朋友們在家和日常生活裏已經被英文包圍了，所以重點是使他們完全沉浸在第二語言中。
女:這聽起來像是個很棒的課程，不過我有些擔心佛瑞德的母語的理解能力會無法發展得當。
男:我向您保證這樣的學習已用在學生身上，而完成雙語課程的學生從幼稚園直到12年級都有，他們的英文成績證明與那些上一般英語課程的學生相當。此外。佛瑞德是最適合的人選，因為他在所有他一年級的班級中已展現出高於平均的理解能力。
女:那好，或許我們會試試看，但在我給你肯定答覆前我想要和我先生先討論一下。
vocabulary: 4. surround v.包圍/ n. 圍繞物
Ex. His brother was immersed in debts. 他兄弟負債累累。
6. proper adj. 適合的；合乎體統的
7. prove v. 證明；表現；查驗
Ex. The police couldn't prove the suspect's guilt.
警察不能證實嫌疑犯的罪行。
8. average n.平均；一般/ adj.平均的；一般的/ v.平均分配
Ex. He would rather suffer death than betray the promise .
他寧死也不肯違背諾言。

questions.stem: Why does the teacher believe that the Spanish immersion program would be good for Fred?
translation: 為什麼老師相信完全用西班牙上課的課程對佛瑞德是好的?
a. 因為他的家人在家已經都講西班牙語了
b. 因為佛瑞德是一個聰明的學生
c. 因為佛瑞德是老師最喜歡的學生
d. 因為佛瑞德在幼稚園已經學了一點西班牙語了
options: (A) Because his family already speaks Spanish at home.
(B) Because Fred is a smart student.
(C) Because Fred is the teacher's favorite student.
(D) Because Fred already learned a little Spanish in kindergarten.

questions.stem: Which of the following is true about students that have taken Spanish immersion from elementary to high school?
translation: 以下關於學生已經從國小到高中完全都用西班牙語上課哪一個是事實?
a. 他們的英文成績有時候會有點低
b. 他們的英文成績跟一般學生一樣
c. 他們的英文成績比一般學生好
d. 他們的英文能力變糟但是西班牙文很好
options: (A) Their English scores are sometimes a little lower.
(B) Their English scores are the same as normal students.
(C) Their English scores are better than normal students.
(D) Their English ability suffers but their Spanish is great.

questions.stem: What is the mother's main concern initially?
translation: 剛開始這個媽媽主要的擔心是什麼?
a. 她兒子會忘記怎麼講英文
b. 她兒子對於學第二外語會有困難
c. 她兒子非常不喜歡西班牙語
d. 她兒子英文會學不好
options: (A) That her son will forget how to speak English.
(B) That her son will have trouble learning a second language.
(C) That her son will strongly dislike Spanish.
(D) That her son will not learn English as well.

cards.passage:
M: Remington Hotel. 5 minutes by car from Manila Ninoy Aquino International Airport terminal 3. How can I help you?
W: Hi, could you please put me thorough to Mr. Lester Green in room #312?
M: One moment please…I'm sorry madam, but the line appears to be busy.
W: Could I leave a message then?
M: I'm afraid we don't offer a message-taking service. Could you try back again in 15 minutes?
W: Actually, this is a bit of an emergency.
M: I see. Could you stay on the line? I'll send someone up to knock on his door.
W: Much appreciated.
cards.passageTranslation:
M：瑞彌頓飯店。從馬尼拉Ninoy Aquino國際機場三號航廈搭車五分鐘。我能提供什麼協助？
W：嗨，請幫我接通312號房的Lester Green先生？
M：請等一下…我很抱歉，女士，但電話線似乎忙線中。
W：那我可以留言嗎？
M：我恐怕我們沒有留言服務。你可以15分鐘後再打一次嗎？
W：其實，這有點緊急。
M：我懂。你可以在線上等一下嗎？我會請別人去敲門。
W：衷心感謝。
瑞彌頓飯店樓層圖
地面樓層(101房~120房)：家庭式 一樓(201房~220房)：經濟型單人房及雙人房 二樓(301房~320房)：華麗單人房及雙人房 三樓(401房~410房)：貴賓套房

cards.passage:
M: I think these contact lenses are the wrong prescription. They are 4.5. Is it possible to have my eyes rechecked and exchange these ones?
W: What makes you think the prescription is incorrect?
M: Everything looks a little warped when I look around and I feel a little dizzy and off-balance. If I look in the distance, the horizon is not flat; it's at an angle. Also, I got a headache after wearing them for a few hours.
W: Those all sound like the common symptoms of a prescription that is too strong. It is also possible that one of your eyes is different than the other. Please follow me into the back room so we can test your eyes.
M: If the prescription is indeed wrong, will I have to pay for the new ones? I just bought these here yesterday from one of your coworkers.
W: Of course not; the exchange would be on us, since it was our error. I apologize for the inconvenience it has caused you.
cards.passageTranslation:
男: 我覺得這些隱形眼鏡的配鏡度數是錯的。他們是4.5。有可能重驗我的視力並更換這些眼鏡嗎？
女:是什麼讓你覺得度數是錯的？
男:當我四處看時每一樣東西看起來有點扭曲而且我感到有些頭暈跟失去平衡。如果我有點距離的看，視野是不平的；它不是在正確的角度。還有，我戴著它們幾個小時後會頭痛。
女:這全部聽起來像是配鏡度數太重的常見症狀。它也可能是你其中一隻眼睛的視力和另一隻不同。請跟我到後門的房間我們好驗你的視力。
男:如果這配鏡度數確實是錯的，我需要為新的付費嗎？這些是我昨天剛在這裡向你的其中一位同事買的。
女:當然更換費用由我們負責，因為那是我們的失誤。我為造成你的不便道歉。
vocabulary: 2. prescription n. 指示,藥方,慣例
Ex. The window frame was warped. 窗框變形了。
4. dizzy adj. 頭暈的；被弄糊塗/ v.使頭暈眼花；使…茫然
6. distance n.距離；遠處；冷淡/ v.使…疏遠
Ex. They saw a few houses in the distance. 他們看到遠處有幾所房子。

questions.stem: Where is this conversation taking place?

a. 在眼鏡店

c. 在當地的藥房
d. 在賣照相機鏡頭的店
options: (A) In a glasses and contact lens shop.

questions.stem: Which symptom is not mentioned by the man?

questions.stem: If the prescription is wrong, what will be the cost of the replacement lenses?

(B) They will be the same price as the original ones.

cards.passage:
W: This one's way better than the last few we've looked at. Wouldn't you agree?
M: It definitely looks nicer all around. I like that the master bedroom has a private balcony and its own bathroom. However, it's quite out of the way for both of us to get to work. The last place was way more central.
W: I don't mind driving an extra 15 minutes every day if it means I can live in a place like this. And look at the size of that backyard! We could do barbecues or even put in some swings for the kids!
M: Well, it seems you've already made up your mind, but I think we should check out at least a few more before we get ahead of ourselves. This is one of the most important decisions of our lives!
W: I suppose you're right. I want to have a peek at the basement as well before we move on. I want to see if it comes with a washing machine and dryer or not.
M: The agent already mentioned they are down there, but let's go have a look anyways.
W: Watch your head! The ceiling in this staircase is pretty low!
cards.passageTranslation:
女：這一個遠比前幾個我們看過的好多了。你說是不是？
男:這整個看起來明顯地好多了。我喜歡主臥室有個私人陽台跟自有的浴室。但是，這離我們兩個上班的地方有好一段距離。上一個地方比較處於中心。
女:如果這意味著我能住在像這樣的地方，我不介意每天多開15分鐘的車。而且看一下那後院的大小!我們可以烤肉或甚至在裡面放些鞦韆給孩子們!
男:好吧，看起來你已經打定主意了，但我認為我們應該至少多看幾個地方免得高興得太早。這是我們人生中的重要決定之一!
女:我想你是對的。在我們去下一處前我想要看一眼地下室。我要看看它是否附有洗衣機跟乾衣機。
男:仲介已經提過它們就在下面，但我們還是去看一下吧。
女:小心你的頭!這樓梯間的天花板滿低的!
vocabulary: 1. private adj. 私人的；隱蔽的
5. suppose v. 以為；期望；假定
Ex. I don't suppose they wanted any extra help.
我想他們不需要額外幫助。
6. peek v. 偷看/ n. 偷偷一看
Ex. We have renovated the old house and put in new plumbing.
我們修復了這所舊房子,還安裝了新的配管系統。

cards.passage:
M: Hi, Nancy. I'm really sorry to do this, but I won't be able to make it in today. I've woken up with a terrible fever.
W: I'm really sorry to hear that, Michael. I guess we'll have to cancel the meeting that was scheduled for this afternoon.
M: I was hoping that would be possible. I am simply not in the right condition to present the budget plan for the new fiscal year.
W: Could I tentatively reschedule it for tomorrow? Do you think you will be better by then? It is rather important that we get this information out to the employees before the end of the week.
M: Sure, go ahead and alert the staff members that it will take place tomorrow. I will visit a medical center today, and try to be well-rested so that I can recover as quickly as possible.
cards.passageTranslation:
男:嗨，萳西。我很抱歉這麼做，但我今天沒辦法去了。我起床後發了高燒。
女:我很遺憾聽到你這麼說，麥可。我想我們得要取消訂在今天下午的會議了。
男:我希望那是可能的。我的狀況完全不適合簡報新會計年度的預算案。
女:我能暫時改期到明天嗎？你認為你到時會好點嗎？在週末以前我們把這資訊公佈給員工是頗重要的。
男:好的，就這麼辦並通知幕僚人員會議會在明天舉行。我今天會去一家醫學中心，試著好好休息這樣我才能儘快康復。
vocabulary: 1. fever n.發燒；狂熱/ v. 使發燒；使狂熱
2. condition n.情況；條件; v.為...的條件；使適應
3. present v.呈獻/ a.出席的；現在的/ n.禮物
Ex. We don't need it at present. 我們現在不需要。
7. alert adj. 警覺的/ n.警戒/ v. 使警覺
8. recover v. 恢復(健康) ；重新獲得
Ex. It took a long time for him to recover from the bad cold.
他患重感冒，很長時間才康復。
Ex. She insisted that he was wrong. 她堅持認為他錯了。

questions.stem: Why did the man call in sick today?
translation: 為什麼這個男子今天請病假?
a. 他感冒一整個禮拜了
b. 他吃到不乾淨的東西覺得不太舒服
c. 他早上發燒了
d. 他的醫生說他不應該工作
options: (A) He's had a cold all week.
(B) He ate something bad and doesn't feel well.
(C) He had a fever in the morning.
(D) His doctor said he shouldn't work.

questions.stem: Will the man be able to attend the meeting tomorrow?

a. 絕對沒辦法因為他病的太重了
b. 只要他的醫生給他最好的藥就可以了
c. 他會努力康復並參加會議
d. 不能參加，幕僚人員會自己開會。
options: (A) Definitely not because he is too ill.
(B) Only if his doctor gives him the best medicine.
(C) He will try to recover and make it.
(D) No, the staff members will have it without him.

questions.stem: Why does the woman insist they have it tomorrow?

a. 因為她希望員工能在周末之前得到這個資訊
b. 因為員工必須告訴她相關的預算案
c. 因為會議之前已經被延期了
d. 因為幕僚人員有很多問題
options: (A) Because she wants to employees to get the info before the weekend.
(B) Because the employees must tell her about the budget plan.
(C) Because the meeting has already been delayed before.
(D) Because the staff members have many questions.

cards.passage:
W: Is that everything for you today Sir?
M: Yes.
W: That comes to 47 dollars and 15 cents.
M: I'd like to use this 50-dollar store credit I have.
W: I'm sorry, but you can't use the store credit for alcohol. It can only be redeemed for food or general grocery items.
M: But I have some food items here. If I use it for those, could I get the remaining credit in cash?
W: Sorry, but we don't offer cash back on store credit, and I won't be able to issue a new credit either. Your food items only come to about 12 dollars, so you would lose the other 38 dollars. I'd suggest you pick up some more items today if you want to use all 50 dollars of your credit.
M: Sure. Could I leave these things here while I go grab a few more food items?
W: Certainly.
cards.passageTranslation:
W：今天點的就這些嗎？先生。
M：是的。
W：總共是47.15元。
M：我想要使用我這張50元的店家購物卡。
W：對不起，但購物卡不可抵酒類消費。只能抵食物或一般生活用品消費。
M：但我買了一些食物商品。假如我用這張卡，剩下的信用額度可轉成現金嗎？
W：對不起，但我們不能將額度轉換成現金，我也不能發張新卡。你的食物商品大約只有12元，所以你會失去剩餘38元。假如你想用光全部的50元，我會建議你再多買些商品。
M：好的。我可以將這些商品留在這裡，我再去多拿幾樣商品嗎？
W：當然可以。
卡片無法抵用菸酒類消費。
2015年3月31日到期

cards.passage:
W: I'm having trouble logging on to the Internet. It appears that my connection is down. Can you please give me a hand with that?
M: Sure. Before we do anything, I'd like you to close your Internet browser.
W: Okay. What next?
M: Now, open up 'System Preferences', select 'Options', and then double click on 'Internet Connectivity'. Then tell me what is says.
W: Um…It says, "Internet connectivity is temporarily disabled. Please contact your service provider."
M: Got it. It's just what I expected. A number of users in your area are currently experiencing the same issue at the moment. It appears that there is some sort of interference that our experts are solving as we speak. I have just received notice that they expect to get it up and running in no less than ten minutes. Could you please try logging on again after that amount of time, and if it is still not working, call us back?
W: Sure, thanks for your assistance.
cards.passageTranslation:
女:我登入網際網路遇到了麻煩。似乎是我的連線中斷了。你能幫我處理嗎？
男:當然可以。在我們做任何事前，我想請妳關掉你的網路瀏覽器。
女:好了。下一步呢？
男:現在開啟 '系統參數'，選擇'選項'，然後在'網路連線功能'上點兩下。再告訴我它說什麼。
女:嗯...它說"網路連線功能暫時關閉。請聯絡你的服務供應商。"
男:知道了。正如我所預料的。在你的地區內有許多使用者此刻正遭受相同的問題。似乎那裏有某種干擾而當我們在通話時我們的專業人員正在解決中。我剛收到通知他們預期可讓它在不下十分鐘後上線運作。可否請您在這所需時間後再次嘗試登入，若它仍然無法使用再回電給我們?
女:好的，謝謝你的協助。
vocabulary: Ex. She will appear in court next Friday.下星期五她將出庭。
Ex. His legs were disabled in the accident. 他的雙腿在意外中傷殘。
7. experience n. 經驗/ v.經歷；感受
9. expert n.專家; adj. 熟練的

questions.stem: Why did the woman place the phone call?
translation: 為什麼這個女人打了這個電話?
a. 她現在不能上網

c. 她的網路已經斷線十分鐘了
d. 她的電子信箱似乎被暫時鎖住了
options: (A) She can't get online at the moment.

questions.stem: In what situation does the man say she should call them again?

c. 如果專業人員在十分鐘內沒有到的話
d. 如果她十分鐘內沒有辦法上網
options: (B) If she wants to renew her Internet in 10 minutes.
(C) If the experts don't arrive in 10 minutes.
(D) If she can't access the net in 10 minutes.

questions.stem: What was the first thing the man asked the woman to do?

cards.passage:
W: Good afternoon. Could you fill it up, please?
M: Certainly. Would you like regular or premium gasoline today, Miss?
W: Always the premium. I want nothing but the best quality going into this thing. I just spent a fortune on it! By the way, do you mind also giving the windows a scrub? They are caked with insects.
M: Would you like this done by hand, free of charge, or would you like to purchase a ticket for our automatic washing room for only 3.49 extra?
W: By hand will be fine. I am in a bit of a rush.
cards.passageTranslation:
女:早安。能請你把它加滿嗎？
男:當然可以。今天您要一般還是優質汽油，小姐？
女:只要優質的。我別的都不要只加品質最好的進這玩意裏。我剛花了大筆錢在它身上！對了，你介意順便刷一下窗戶嗎？它們塗滿了蟲子。
男:您要免費的手工洗，還是買一張我們的自動洗車房的洗車券只要3.49元？
女:手洗就可以了。我有點趕時間。
vocabulary: 1. fill up v ph. 裝滿
2. premium adj.優質的/ n.獎品；津貼
Ex. He made a fortune in the gold fields of South Africa.
他在南非的金礦區發了大財。
6. automatic adj.自動的；習慣性的/ n.自動機械
Ex. He gave a description of what he had seen. 他對看到的情況作了描述。
Ex. I prefer country life to city life. 我喜愛鄉村生活，不喜愛城市生活。
