Domestic flights on Stagecoach Airways, Southeast Airlines, and Horizons will depart from terminal two. All passengers flying internationally today will need to report to terminal three. If you find yourself in the wrong terminal, please use the airport monorail to travel rapidly to the correct terminal. Thank you for using Sky Shuttle and to ensure a pleasant airport experience, make sure that you take all of your belongings before disembarking.
cards.passageTranslation: 各位女士、先生，我們快到出境航站了，請檢查你的機票確認你的班機在哪一個航廈起飛。善意的提醒您，西山航空、貝達、 康德航空，以及廉航航空公司的國內線班機將從第一航廈出發。Stagecoach航空、東南航空，和天際航空公司的國內線班機會從第二航站出發。今天所有國際線的乘客必須到第三航站報到。如果你發現自己跑錯航站，請利用機場的單軌電車迅速前往正確的航站。感謝您利用機場空中巴士，為了確保你有個愉快的經驗，下車前請務必確認你已將所有個人物品帶走。
vocabulary: approach v. 接近；即將到達
ex. The train to Taipei will depart from platform 7 immediately. 開往台北的列車馬上要離開月台了。
ex. All new students have to report to their homeroom teacher to pick up their textbooks. 所有的新生必須向導師回報去領取教科用書。
pick up 用汽車搭載某人或接某人
ex. The taxi driver has picked up our customer from the airport. 計程車司機已經從機場接到我們的客戶了。

questions.stem: Where is this announcement being made?
translation: 本則廣播會在以下何處播放？
a. 機場接駁巴士
b. 機場航站
c. 飛機上
d. 計程車

questions.stem: If you are flying abroad, which terminal will you depart from?
translation: 如果你要搭機出國，會從以下哪一個航站出境？
a. 第一航站
b. 第三航站
c. 第二航站
d. 這個資訊並未提供

questions.stem: Who would be interested in this talk?
translation: 誰會對這段對話感興趣？
a. 抵達的乘客
b. 來接機的人
c. 要搭機離開的乘客
d. 航空公司的機師
options: (B) people coming to pick up arriving passengers

cards.passage: For your weekend forecast, ladies and gentlemen, you can expect sunny skies and low humidity across most of the Southeast on Saturday with a high of 88 degrees. On Sunday, however, all those gorgeous days we've been enjoying will be a thing of the past because a strong low-pressure system is moving in slowly from the Midwest that will bring significant showers to the region. Expect temperatures to drop down to the low eighties during the day and it could even bring some severe weather. Moving ahead to Wednesday, that low-pressure system will work its way eastward toward the Carolinas and sunny skies will once again prevail here in the Tennessee Valley.
cards.passageTranslation: 未來這個週末的天氣預測，女士、先生們，您可以期待這禮拜六整個東南部的大部分地區晴朗且濕度偏低的好天氣，高溫達到華氏88度。但是到了禮拜天，這一陣子我們喜歡的好天氣就要結束了，因為有一個強烈的低氣壓正從中西部緩緩移入，為本地區帶來顯著的降雨。除了白天氣溫最低會降到華氏八十幾度，甚至可能會帶來惡劣的天氣。接下來看到禮拜三的天氣，這個低氣壓系統會向東往卡羅萊納州移動，之後陽光會再次普照田納西河流域。
vocabulary: waterproof adj. 防水的 a thing of the past 老式的東西；過時的事物
ex. This problem will be a thing of the past once we resolve this issue. 一但我們解決這個問題，這件麻煩事將成為過去式。
ex. Now is a good time to get a credit card because interest rates have dropped down to 1%. 目前是申請信用卡的好時機，因為利率已經下降了百分之一。

questions.stem: On what day will it start to rain?
translation: 從哪一天開始下雨？
a. 禮拜六
b. 禮拜天
c. 禮拜三
d. 禮拜一

questions.stem: What is the purpose of this announcement?
translation: 這則報導的目的為何？
a. 警告市民即將有大地震發生
b. 教育氣象學的學生
c. 告訴大眾天氣的預測
d. 宣傳防水服裝
options: (A) to warn citizens of an imminent earthquake
(C) to inform the public of the weather forecast

questions.stem: What does the speaker imply about the low-pressure system?
translation: 有關這個低氣壓系統，以下何者是報導人員的暗示？
a. 它會帶來風和日麗的好天氣。
b. 它會造成氣溫上升。
c. 它完全不會對東南部造成影響。
d. 它將帶來令人討厭的天氣。
options: (B) It will cause the temperature to rise.
(C) It will not affect the Southeast at all.

cards.passage: Hello everyone, and welcome to the American Dental Association Annual Conference. If I could ask everyone to look over here to your right, you'll notice our registration table. Before entering the main conference room, we'll need everyone to sign in here and take the blue packet that contains all of your conference materials. Please do not forget to wear your conference identification card because without it, you will not be allowed to access any of the events. To give everyone a rough idea of what our schedule will look like today, our first round of presentations will get started around 9 am and run until lunch. Each presentation will last one hour. We'll take a two-hour lunch break and from 2 to 4 pm, we will do team building exercises. If there aren't any questions, I'll ask everyone to go ahead and get your materials.
cards.passageTranslation:
大家好，歡迎參加美國牙科協會年會。請各位往您的右手邊看，您會看到我們的登記櫃檯。進到大會主廳之前，需要各位到櫃檯簽名並領取這個藍色資料包，內有全部的會議資料。請別忘了配戴您的會議識別證，少了它您就不能參加任何活動。概略說一下我們今天的時間安排，我們第一輪的簡報將從大約上午九點進行到午餐時間。每一段簡報會持續一個小時。我們會休息二小時用午餐，然後從下午二點到四點我們會有分組練習。如果沒有問題的話，那就請各位前去領取您的資料。
會議流程
第1天：
上午7:45 Daisy Witaker歡迎致詞
上午8到10點 Connor Einheart醫生簡報
上午10點至中午12點 Sarah Lee博士簡報
中午12點到下午2點 午餐
下午2點到4點 Nancy White的團隊發展課程
vocabulary: dental adj. 牙科的；牙齒的
identification card 身分證；識別證
ex. Club members have to sign in before they can partake in any activities. 俱樂部會員參加活動前都要簽到。

questions.stem: What is probably true about this conference?
translation: 關於這個會議以下何者可能正確？
a. 在場的人大多數是醫生。
b. 在場的人大多數是老師。
c. 在場的人大多數是牙醫。
d. 在場的人大多數是資訊技術專業人員。
options: (A) Most of the people there are doctors.
(B) Most of the people there are teachers.
(C) Most of the people there are dentists.
(D) Most of the people there are IT professionals.

questions.stem: Why is it important to always have the conference ID card?
translation: 為什麼隨身攜帶會議識別證很重要？
a. 你需要用才能參加所有的活動。
b. 你必須帶著它，這樣別人才知道你的名字。
c. 它可以讓你享有牙科器材的優惠。
d. 它會被拿來當成分組練習裡的棋子。
options: (A) You need it to access all of the events.
(B) You need it so people know your name.
(C) It will get you discounts on dental equipment.
(D) It will be used as a game piece in a team building exercise.

questions.stem: Look at the graphic. Who is giving this announcement?
translation: 請看圖表。在進行此公告的是誰？
A. Daisy Witaker
B. Doctor Connor Einheart
C. Sarah Lee, PhD
D. Nancy White

cards.passage: Hey, John. This is Julius Hovator here from Appliance Jungle. I just wanted to return your call regarding the washing machine you purchased from us. Judging from your description of the noise that the machine is making, it seems that your inner-tub and your outer-tub are slightly off their axis causing them knock up against the metal wall of the washer. This is a common problem for new machines and it's a pretty easy fix. The problem is that all of our repair staff is booked solid until Wednesday, but I'll do my best to rearrange our schedule to get someone there sooner. In the meantime, you can try leveling the washer yourself. Sorry again for the inconvenience.
cards.passageTranslation: John。我是Appliance Jungle公司的Julius Hovator。我想對你來電詢問有關你向公司購買洗衣機的事做個回覆。就你所描述的洗衣機所發出的噪音來判斷，似乎是你的洗衣機的內槽與外槽些微地偏離軸心，造成它們與洗衣機的金屬壁面碰撞。這是新的洗衣機常見的問題且很容易修好。問題是我們所有的維修人員到禮拜三的預約時間都已經排滿了，但我會盡可能重新安排時間早點派人過去。這段期間，你可以試著自行將洗衣機調成水平。很抱歉造成你的不便。
vocabulary: disgruntled adj. 不滿的；不高興的
upkeep n. 維護；保養 washing machine 洗衣機
ex. The washing machine has been broken for three days. 這台洗衣機已經壞三天了。
judging from 根據…做出判斷
ex. Judging from the new evidence, the suspect is innocent. 根據新的證據來判斷，這個嫌疑犯是清白的。

questions.stem: Who left this message?
translation: 這則訊息是以下何者留下的？
a. 一名快樂的顧客
b. 一名電台播報員
c. Appliance Jungle公司的一名員工
d. 一名不悅的顧客

questions.stem: What is probably true about this talk?
translation: 關於這則對話以下何者可能正確的
a. 修理員已經打電話通知該顧客關於年度維修的事。
b. 該顧客的洗衣機有問題。
c. 該顧客打電話叫人送一台洗衣機過來。
d. 這名維修人員不認為他能把這個毛病修好。
options: (A) The repairman has called to inform the customer about annual upkeep.
(B) The customer is having a problem with his washing machine.
(C) The customer called to have a washing machine delivered.
(D) The repairman doesn't think he'll be able to fix the problem.

questions.stem: What is NOT true about this message?
translation: 關於這則訊息以下何者為非？
a. 內槽偏離軸心。
b. 維修人員認為這個問題很常見。
c. 通話者會試著提供協助。
d. 洗衣機可以馬上修好。
options: (A) The inner tub is off its axis.
(B) The repairman thinks the problem is common.
(C) The speaker will try to provide assistance.
(D) The washer can be repaired immediately.

cards.passage: This is your 92.3 Charm City hourly traffic report brought to you by Wholesome Bran Cereal. Traffic is moving at a snail's pace today down most of the I-85 corridor near White Marsh due to an accident near the off-ramp. Motorists taking the tunnel beware of a collision on Toll Road that has traffic backed up for miles. Drivers taking 695 today should drive carefully this morning because road crews are repairing the right lane stretching from Towson to the Key Bridge exit. Workers are present all along the route, so please drive slowly and refrain from passing other cars. This has been your 92.3 morning traffic report. Drive safely.
cards.passageTranslation: 這是「魅力城市92.3電台」整點路況報導，由「強健麥片公司」所贊助提供。由於I-85號公路匝道出口有起事故發生，在靠近White Marsh附近目前的車流移動速度正以蝸速前進。行經隧道的駕駛人要當心透爾路上的車輛相撞而造成車流回堵數英里。早上走695號道路的駕駛人今天要小心開車，因為道路工程小組正在維修從透申一路到奇翼大橋的匝道出口的右側車道。沿線都有工人在作業，因此請駕駛人放慢車速並且不要超車。以上是92.3電台的晨間路況報導。祝行車平安。
vocabulary: hourly adj. 整點的；每小時的
off-ramp n. (高速公路等)駛出匝道
guardrail n. 欄杆 at a snail's pace 極慢
ex. The disabled man crossed the street at a snail's pace. 那個行動不變的人過街時走得很緩慢。
ex. You must beware of the pickpockets in the market. 在市場裡你必須要小心扒手。
ex. Please refrain from using your cellphone during the movie. 請克制不要看電影時使用手機。

questions.stem: Why should drivers using 695 be careful?
translation: 以下何者是走695號道的駕駛人應該要小心開車的原因？
a. 那裡有道路施工。
b. 那裡有一起事故發生。
c. 那裡沒有護欄。
d. 那裡的駕駛人車速過快。
options: (D) The drivers there go too fast.

questions.stem: What can we infer about this station?
translation: 關於這個電臺以下何者是我們所做的推論？
a. 它每天都會播報像這樣的廣播。
b. 它每天都會播報好幾起這樣的廣播。
c. 它每個禮拜都會播報像這樣的廣播。
d. 它只有在路況不佳時才會播報像這樣的廣播。
options: (A) It makes announcements like this daily.
(B) It makes announcements like this several times per day.
(C) It makes announcements like this weekly.
(D) It makes announcements like this only when traffic is bad.

questions.stem: Look at the graphic. Where did an accident take place?
translation: 請看圖表。事故發生在以下何處？
a. 位置1
b. 位置2
c. 位置3
d. 位置4

cards.passage: From June 1st through 4th, Summer Slam is back again and this year it's going to be bigger than ever. Come down to see California's premier poetry and folk music festival featuring literary geniuses Madeline LaRue and Jess Stanphill. Musical guests include amazing up and coming artists such as Taught and Trivial, Hidden Cutlery Friends, Moose Authority and many, many more. Tickets go on sale on May 4th and can be purchased online at www.summerslam.com. Camping will be allowed, but please no recreational vehicles. What are you waiting for? Get in touch with your deeper side here at Summer Slam!
cards.passageTranslation: 從六月一號到四號，Summer Slam音樂會捲土重來而且今年的規模將比以往更大。親自來看看加州最重要的詩與民謠嘉年華會，主打場有文學才子Madeline LaRue和Jess Stanphill 。音樂人嘉賓包括令人驚嘆的新銳藝人，像是「Taught and Trivial」、「Hidden Cutlery Friends」、「Moose Authority」等且還有更多。門票將於五月四號開始販售，可在www.summerslam.com 網路購票。會場可露營但請勿開露營車前來。你還在等什麼？到Summer Slam與心靈深處對話吧！
vocabulary: feature v. 以…做為號召；以…為特色
up and coming adj. 嶄露頭角的
protest n. 抗議 recreational vehicle 家庭用旅遊車
ex. Recreational vehicle come with equipment that make them quite suitable for camping. 家庭用旅遊車的裝備相當適合露營使用。
get in touch with sb. 與…聯絡
get in touch with oneself 探討內心世界
ex. The reception on my cell phone isn't very good right now, so I can't get in touch with my mother. 我的手機目前收訊不好，所以我無法和媽媽聯絡。

questions.stem: Which statement is true?
translation: 以下哪一項敘述正確？
a. 不得露營。
b. 可以開露營車來露營。
c. 可以露營，但不可以在露營車上。
d. 露營只限嘉年華會期間的第一個晚上。
options: (B) Camping is allowed with recreational vehicles.
(C) Camping is allowed, but not in recreational vehicles.
(D) Camping will only be allowed on the first night of the festival.

questions.stem: Where will the festival take place?
translation: 這個嘉年華會將在何處舉行？
a. 奧勒岡州
b. 加州
c. 德州
d. 科羅拉多州

questions.stem: What is happening in this talk?
translation: 這段對話正在討論以下何者？
a. 說話者在推廣詩樂嘉年華會。
b. 某人在推銷「Moose Authority」的新專輯。
c. 說話者正向民眾通知一場抗議活動。
d. 這則通告是在告訴民眾露營規定的變更。
options: (A) The speaker is promoting a poetry and music festival.
(B) Someone is promoting Moose Authority's new album.
(C) The speaker is informing the public of a protest movement.
(D) The announcement informs the public of changes to camping codes.

cards.passage: A healthy meal is something many of us take for granted. Yet every year thousands of Metroville families fail to get the basic nourishment they need. That's why we need your help. This coming long weekend we urge you to bring by your unwanted foodstuffs to participating Bingman Grocers. This weekend only, we will match all donations made. Please ensure all packages are sealed and that donated items are not expired. For every five items donated, you will receive a ticket for a draw to be held at the end of the weekend. Prizes include a trip for two to Hawaii, a mountain bike and Bingman Grocer gift cards. Please come down beginning this Friday morning and help make a difference.
cards.passageTranslation:
大部分的人都把健康食物視為理所當然。但是，每年有好幾千個Metroville家庭沒有足夠攝取每日需要的基本營養。這就是為什麼我們需要你們的幫忙。即將來臨的漫長週末，我們呼籲您帶著家裡不再需要的食物來參加賓門超級市場活動。只有這週末，我們將捐出與你捐贈的相同量。請確保所有的包裝密封，以及捐贈商品沒有過期。每捐贈五項產品，你將會有資格參加週末抽獎機會。獎品包含兩張夏威夷旅程、登山越野腳踏車、還有賓門超市的禮物卡。所以，星期五早上請開始到店裡消費，一起為世界貢獻。
賓門超市週末抽獎活動獎品
全額免費夏威夷雙人行
（價值$3200！） 賓門超市$250禮物卡 Anthem 27.5 捷安特登山腳踏車
(價值 $2000) Epson Powerlit家庭電影投影機
(價值 $495)
vocabulary: seal v. 密封，圖章，封印
Ex. We should always be grateful for the people around us and not take them for granted. 我們應該感激我們周圍的人們，而非視為理所當然是不對的。

questions.stem: What is the purpose of this ad?
translation: 本則廣告的目的為何?
a. 公布全國商店促銷。
b. 銷售抽獎票?。
c. 宣傳捐贈食物活動。
d. 鼓勵大家捐贈衣服。
options: (B) to sell tickets for a raffle

questions.stem: How many days will this event last?
translation: 活動將會持續幾天?

questions.stem: Look at the graphic. Which of the prizes is NOT mentioned in the talk?
translation: 請看圖表。下列一項獎項沒有被提到？
a. 全額免費夏威夷雙人行
b. 超市的$250禮物卡
c. Anthem 27.5 捷安特登山越野腳踏車
d. Epson Powerlite家庭劇院投影機
options: (B) $250 gift card for our grocery store

cards.passage: In recent days there have been multiple reports of overnight car break-ins in the Millview district. Items stolen include car stereos, loose change, sunglasses and golf clubs. According to video footage captured in a parking lot, the assailant appears to be roughly 160-165 cm tall with a slim build and appears to be carrying a baseball bat. Unfortunately, the quality of the video recording combined with the poor lighting make the age, gender, and other specific features difficult to determine. Police are advising Millview residents to be on the lookout for anyone who fits this description and to report any suspicious behavior. They are also warning car owners to avoid parking in remote areas, and to choose parking spots in well-lit areas.
cards.passageTranslation: 警方近期收到數個關於在米勒高地深夜時汽車玻璃遭人打破竊取財物案件。被偷的物品有車音響、零錢、墨鏡、高爾夫會員卡。根據停車場所拍到的影像，兇手約160-165公分高，體型瘦小而且攜帶棒球棒。不幸地，錄像品質不佳加上光線不良使警方難以辨別兇手的年齡、性別以及其它特徵。警方建議米勒高地地區民眾要注意任何一個符合敘述的人，若有可疑行為，立刻報警。警方也提醒車主應要避免停在偏遠地區，選擇光線良好的停車地點。
vocabulary: assailant n. 攻擊者/ adj. 襲擊的
lookout n. 守望，警戒，瞭望所/哨
club n. 俱樂部，(學)社團，球棒
appear to (= seem to) 似乎，好像
Ex. The snowstorm appeared to be getting worse so we decided to cancel the ski trip.
暴風雪的似乎更糟了，因此我們決定取消滑雪的旅程。
Ex. According to the police officer who I talked to, you are wanted for questioning. 根據和我談話的警官所言，你是令人懷疑的。

questions.stem: Which of the following is NOT among the list of stolen goods?
translation: 下列哪一個沒有列在遭竊商品的清單之中?
a. 金錢。
b. 墨鏡。
c. 棒球帽。
d. 高爾夫球棒。

questions.stem: Which of the following statements are true?
translation: 下列敘述何者正確?
a. 兇手是年輕的。
b. 兇手是瘦的。
c. 兇手是高的。
d. 兇手是男的。

questions.stem: What have police advised residents to do?
translation: 警方建議居民做什麼?
a. 避免把車子放在外面。
b. 對抗任何可疑的人。
c. 晚上鎖門。
d. 停在街燈附近。

cards.passage: Hello, my name is Wilfredo Garcia. My neighbor, Barbara Emerson, recommended you to me after you helped her out after her car accident. I'm calling to seek your counsel regarding an incident I had at a restaurant last week. I was a victim of food poisoning due to negligence on the part of the establishment I was dining at. As a result of this, I was forced to miss four days of work. I hope to recover lost wages and may consider seeking further compensation based upon your advice. Please call me back when you have time. I will be in a meeting until lunch but can be reached during the afternoon at work at 3108320834 or after 5 pm at home at 3107539776.
cards.passageTranslation: 哈囉，我是Wilfredo Garcia。我的鄰居Barbara Emerson，向我推薦你，因為你曾幫他處理過她的車禍事宜。我打電話來是想要詢問上禮拜，我在某餐廳所遭受的事件。由於那間餐廳員工之疏忽，我成為了食物中毒的受害者。因此，我被迫四天不能上班。我希望可以得到失去的工資而且考慮請你建議以要求對方賠償。方便時，請回撥給我。我會開會到中午，但是我在下午上班時間可以接電話，公司電話是3108320834，或五點後請撥打到家裡電話是3107539776。
vocabulary: food poisoning n. 食物中毒
establishment n. 建立；創立的機構/公司…
compensation n. 補償，賠償金，津貼
Ex. Due to the sudden rainstorm, the entire subway system was shut down. 由於突然的陣雨來襲，整個地鐵系統都停擺了。

questions.stem: Who is the man calling?
translation: 這位男子打電話給誰?
a. 衛生部。
b. 醫生。
c. 他的鄰居朋友。
d. 律師。

questions.stem: What is the man's problem?
translation: 這位男子的問題是什麼?
a. 他在工作場所受傷了。
b. 他被歧視。
c. 他吃下受汙染的食物。
d. 他發生車禍。
options: (D) he was in a car accident

questions.stem: Which of the following statements is true?
translation: 下列何者敘述正確?
a. 午餐後就無法聯絡 Wilfredo。
b. Wilfredo無法去上班。
c. Wilfredo開會要遲到。
d. Wilfredo傍晚會在家裡。
options: (A) Wilfredo will be unavailable after lunch.
(C) Wilfredo is late for a meeting.
(D) Wilfredo will be home in the evening.

cards.passage: I'm Brock Samson with your weekend weather forecast. This evening we can expect high winds with gusts up to 70km/h accompanied by heavy rain with a low of 18 degrees. Overnight accumulations are expected to reach 50mm. Moving into tomorrow, expect the rain to slowly taper off in the early morning as we see some partial clearing. Saturday afternoon will bring us a mix of sun and clouds with a 40% chance of an early evening thunderstorm and a high of 31. Overnight we will see some clearing which should pave the way for a spectacular Sunday. Expect a daytime high of 35 degrees with sunny skies and some light wind.
cards.passageTranslation: 我是您的週末天氣預報員，Brock Samson。今天傍晚，預計將有每小時70公里速度的強風來襲，還有大雨特報，最低溫會下降到18度。一日的累積雨量預估會達到50毫米。明天清晨，預計雨量變少，且部分地區會晴朗。星期六下午，偶時天晴偶時陰天，雷雨發生機率是百分之四十，天氣31度。一整夜，我們會看到部分晴朗的天空，其後帶來星期天的好天氣。估計白天溫度高達35度，天氣晴朗帶有微風。
vocabulary: expect v. 期待，預期，指望，認為
partial adj. 部分的，局部的，偏袒的
degree n. 度數，程度，學位
spectacular adj. 壯麗的，壯觀的，驚人的
a mix of …的混合/結合調配…
Ex. Cough syrup is usually a mix of active medicinal ingredients, coloring, and sweeteners.咳嗽糖漿通常由有效藥物、色素及糖精調配而成。

questions.stem: What range of days is covered in the forecast?
translation: 本次天氣預報範圍包含以下哪幾天?
a. 星期五整夜至星期日整夜。
b. 星期五傍晚至星期日下午。
c. 星期六早上至星期日早上。
d. 星期六下午至星期日傍晚。

questions.stem: What will be the highest temperature reached during this period?
translation: 周末最高溫將會達到幾度?

questions.stem: Which of the following statements is true?
translation: 下列敘述何者正確?
a. 禮拜六的天氣將會是炎熱及晴朗。
b. 禮拜六將會下大雨。
c. 禮拜五晚間會開始晴朗。
d. 禮拜五晚上會有強風。
options: (A) It will be hot and sunny Saturday afternoon.
(B) It will rain heavily Saturday morning.
(C) It will begin to clear late Friday
(D) It will be very windy Friday night.

cards.passage: You've reached the office of Dr. Nigel Dawes and Dr. Sarah Sorski. Unfortunately, no one is available to take your call. Please note that our office is currently closed while we complete some renovations designed to better serve you. We plan to reopen this coming Tuesday August 16th with our regular hours on weekdays from 9am to 8pm and on Saturday from 10am to 2pm. For more information about our clinic or to make an appointment, you can check out our website at healthysmile.org. For dental emergencies you can also try calling our customer care hotline at 780-726-4746.
cards.passageTranslation:
您正撥打Nigel Dawes醫師 和 Sarah Sorski醫師的辦公室。可惜我們目前無法接聽您的來電。公司為了提供更好的服務，正在進行裝潢，裝潢期間會暫停營業。我們計畫於下星期二，8月16日重新營業，一般營業時間在平常日早上9點至晚上8點，以及星期六早上10點至下午2點。更多有關本診所的介紹或預約門診，請上我們的網站healthysmile.org。牙科緊急狀況，請打我們的客戶關心專線780-726-4746。
健康笑容
Dawes & Sorski牙醫診所
今日休息
更多資訊請上healthysmiles.org
客戶關心專線：780-726-4746
vocabulary: currently adv. 最近的，近期的
regular adj. 規律的，一般的，普通的，經常的，定期的

questions.stem: Who was this message recorded by?
translation: 本則留言由以下何人所錄?
a. 兒科醫生。
b. 獸醫。
c. 脊醫。
d. 牙醫。

questions.stem: At which of the following times can an appointment NOT be made?
translation: 下列哪一個時間不提供預約的?
a. 星期一晚上7點半。
B. 星期六早上10點半。
C. 星期一早上9點15分。
D. 星期六下午3點。

questions.stem: Look at the graphic. In what case should people call the hotline?
translation: 看這張圖片。什麼樣的人會播打客戶關心專線？
a. 想預約今日稍晚時段看診的人
b. 急迫地想得到幫助的人
c. 想立即和其他醫師通話的人
d. 想知道開診時間的人
options: (A) to make a reservation for later today
(B) to get help with an emergency
(C) to speak to either doctor right now
(D) to find out the opening hours

cards.passage: Valueplex shoppers, please be advised that we'll be closing in twenty minutes. Please start making your way to the front of the store. For the next fifteen minutes, selected items from our deli and dairy departments are 50% off. Look for the red stickers. Also, for customers with ten items or less, in addition to till #1 you may also go to the customer service desk. Shoppers requiring carry-out service should go to till #7 or #8. We'll be open again tomorrow morning at 9 am for Monday Madness. Every Monday, items in the clearance section are buy one to get two for free and our one hundredth shopper will be entered into a draw for a million dollars. Thank you for choosing Valueplex. Have a wonderful night.
cards.passageTranslation: 親愛的Valueplex顧客，請注意，我們即將在二十分鐘內打烊。請開始往商店前方前進。接下來十五分鐘，熟食部以及乳製品的精選商品有五折優惠。請尋找紅標商品。此外，欲購商品少於十項的顧客，可到一號櫃台，或也可到顧客服務櫃台結帳。需要我們服務將商品送上車的顧客，請到七號或八號櫃檯。明天早上九點一開門，我們將舉辦周一瘋狂特價日。每禮拜一，清倉商品有買一送二優惠，而且第100位顧客可以進入獎金一百萬的抽獎活動。感謝您選擇Valueplex。祝您有個愉快的夜晚。
vocabulary: advise v. 建議，給予忠告
section n. (事物)的部分；地區，區域；部分
hardware n. 五金器具，裝備，設備
in addition (to + N) 除此之外
Ex. In addition to shoes, the store also carries women's clothing and cosmetics. 除了那些鞋子之外，店裡還有賣女性衣物及化妝品。

questions.stem: Where did this announcement take place?
translation: 本則公告將在何處發佈?
a. 雜貨店
b. 百貨公司
c. 便利商店
d. 五金行

questions.stem: Which of the following is NOT a purpose of the announcement?
translation: 以下何者不是本則公告的目的?
a. 通知顧客快要打烊了。
b. 告知顧客關於每週促銷的活動。
c. 公佈獲得一百萬的得獎者。
d. 讓顧客知道關於折扣商品。
options: (A) to inform customers the store will soon close
(B) to tell customers about a weekly promotion
(C) to announce the winner of the million dollar prize
(D) to let customers know about discount items

questions.stem: Where should customers who require carry-out service go?
translation: 需要商品送到車上服務的顧客應在何處辦理?
a. 顧客服務台。
b. 櫃台#7或#8
c. 櫃台#1或顧客服務台。
d. 櫃台#1或#8
options: (C) till #1 or the customer service desk

cards.passage: Attention all passengers for flight G416 to Stockholm. We will soon begin boarding. At this time, all passengers with small children or those who require assistance boarding may begin forming a line to the right of the service desk. If you are a gold star preferred member or a service plus subscriber you may begin forming a line to the left of the service desk. All other passengers please remain seated and wait for further instructions. Once again, thank you for your patience. With your cooperation we can hopefully board quickly and get back on schedule.
cards.passageTranslation: 所有搭乘G416班機前往斯德哥爾摩的乘客請注意。我們即將開始登機。現在，所有帶小朋友或需要協助登機的旅客，可以開始在右手邊的服務台排隊。如果你是我們金星貴賓或附加認購服務的乘客，您可以開始在左邊的服務台排隊。其它乘客請保持就坐等候更進一步的指示。再次感謝您耐心等候。有了您的合作，我們希望可以迅速辦理登機以趕上進度。
vocabulary: boarding n. 登上(飛機、船等)
remain v. 維持，保持，留存
instruction n. 指示，命令；操作說明；講授

questions.stem: Where is this announcement taking place?
translation: 本則公告是在以下何處發佈?
a. 保安檢查隊裡。
b. 飛機客艙上。
c. 入境部內。
d. 候機室裡。

questions.stem: Where are passengers with babies instructed to go?
translation: 帶嬰兒的旅客被指示於何處排隊?
a. 仍然就坐等待。
b. 在左手邊排隊。
c. 在右手邊排隊。
d. 移動到隊伍前方。
options: (B) line up on the left side
(C) line up on the right side
(D) move to the front of the line

questions.stem: What can be inferred from the announcement?
translation: 從本公告的內容可以得到以下何種推論?
a. 飛機準備起飛。
b. 班機些許延遲起飛。
c. 有幾名乘客生氣。
d. 頭等艙的乘客會先登機。
options: (A) The plane is ready to take off.
(B) The flight has been slightly delayed.
(D) First class passengers will board first.

cards.passage: Attention passengers. We'll be making a brief stop in Moose Jaw before continuing on to our final destination. Feel free to get out and stretch your legs but don't stray too far. We'll be leaving as soon as our delivery has been completed and have a strict schedule to maintain. For those of you in need of a snack, there are a few vending machines inside the bus terminal. Please do not attempt to make a purchase at the restaurant across the street as they will be unable to process your order in time.
cards.passageTranslation: 各位乘客請注意。在抵達終點前，我們將在Moose Jaw稍作停靠。大家可以隨意出去伸展雙腳，但不要離開太遠。一旦運送完畢後，我們就會按時間表準時出發。需要購買點心的乘客，公車站內有幾台販賣機。請不要試圖到對面的餐廳購買，因為他們無法及時備好您的餐點。
vocabulary: attention n. 注意力，照顧，照料
stretch v. 伸展，拉直，使延伸
stray v. 流浪，迷路，偏離
attempt v. 試圖做，企圖去
process v. 處理 /n. 過程，進展
Ex. Without permission from the proper authority, the foundation will be unable to take further action. 沒有正確的機關發放的許可，基金會無法採取進一步的行動。
in need of 需要，急需
Ex. The construction company is desperately in need of funds. 那間建築公司急需用資金。

questions.stem: Where did this announcement take place?
translation: 本則公告在以下在何處發佈?
a. 在火車上
b. 在公車上
c. 在船上
d. 在飛機上

questions.stem: Which of the following statements are true?
translation: 以下何者敘述正確?
a. 乘客們目前正在外面伸展身體。
b. 預排好中途停靠站將至。
c. 機械問題會造成短暫的延遲。
d. 這家餐廳是吃點心的好地方。
options: (A) Passengers are currently doing stretches outside.
(B) There is a scheduled stopover coming up.
(C) A mechanical problem will cause a short delay.
(D) The restaurant is a good place for a snack.

questions.stem: What can be inferred from the announcement?
translation: 從公告內容，可以得到何種推論?
a. 運送將會在最終目的地執行。
b. 有幾位新乘客即將上車。
c. 乘客們必須備好他們的車票。
d. 乘客們必須在靠近公車得地方。
options: (A) A delivery will be made at the final destination.
(B) Some new passengers will be boarding.
(C) Passengers should have their tickets ready.
(D) Passengers must remain near the vehicle.

cards.passage: Good evening ladies and gentlemen. According to the captain we'll soon be encountering some heavy turbulence. At this time we need you to return to your seats and ensure your seat belts are securely fastened. As a result, we'll have to delay drink and food service until things smooth out a bit. It looks like we should get through this weather disturbance relatively quickly, so just sit back and enjoy the in-flight entertainment system. We have a selection of over 80 films as well as music, games and television programs. If you absolutely must use the bathroom, please do so promptly and be extra careful while moving about the cabin.
cards.passageTranslation: 各位先生女士，晚安。根據機長的判斷，我們即將面臨強烈亂流。現在，我們需要您立刻回到您的座位，並確保您已繫好安全帶。為此，我們必須延遲餐飲服務，直到飛航平順為止。看起來我們很快就會通過這個天氣干擾，所以您只要坐好，享受機艙內的娛樂系統。我們有80部精選電影，還有音樂，遊戲以及電視節目。如果你非用廁所不可，請趕緊過去而且在機艙內走動時，務必格外小心。
vocabulary: absolutely adv. 絕對地，一定地
cabin n. 小屋，(船)客艙，(飛機)駕駛艙
relatively adv. 相對地，比較而言 as a result 因此(後接結果)
Ex. As a result of being sick, the scholar was unable to deliver his lecture at the conference. 那位受邀的學者生病了；因此，他在那場學術論壇上演講。

questions.stem: Where is this announcement being made?
translation: 本則公告將在以下何處宣布？
a. 船。
b. 飛機。
c. 公車。
d. 火車。

questions.stem: What are passengers instructed to do?
translation: 以下何者是乘客被指示的項目？
a. 趕快吃完餐點。
b. 關閉娛樂系統。
c. 確保行李已收好。
d. 繫好安全帶。
options: (C) make sure their bags are stowed

questions.stem: What can be inferred from this announcement?
translation: 從上述公告，可以得到何種推論？
a. 乘客身處危險之中。
b. 飛機將會稍微延遲抵達。
c. 亂流是短暫的。
d. 很多人排隊等著上廁所。
options: (A) The passengers are in grave danger.
(B) Their arrival will be slightly delayed.
(D) There is a long line for the bathroom.

cards.passage: Are you looking for a little more comfort in your life but live on a tight budget? We've got just the answer for you! Introducing the new Wondercloud! This state-of-the-art memory foam pillow forms to the contours of your body. It also comes equipped with a massage insert. Just slide in this thin, lightweight insert, plug it in and enjoy a soothing massage. It fits snugly between the double layered polyurethane shell and can be easily removed for washing. You can get your very own Wondercloud for 3 easy payments of $19.99. Order now and we'll throw in a free delivery and a one-year warranty. Wondercloud is not available in stores, so call now!
cards.passageTranslation:
您是否要讓生活更舒適但是預算又很緊呢？我們有你想要的答案。為您介紹全新Wondercloud!這個最新科技的記憶海綿枕可以幫你調整身體線條。隨附上置入式的按摩器。只要置入這個輕薄的插頭，您就可以舒服的享受按摩。它緊貼在兩層聚氨酯外殼之間，清洗時可以簡單地移除。只要分三期每期付$19.99的款項，就可以得到屬於您個人的Wondercloud。馬上訂購，運費全免並享有一年保固。目前，Wondercloud並無在任何商店販售，所以請馬上撥打電話!
產品詳細規格
最小庫存管理單位：4037-8811-AT
產品名稱：Wondercloud
產品材質：棉(24%)，記憶棉(76%)
產品顏色：棕褐色
產品尺寸：14吋 x 6吋 x 28吋
產品售價：: ____?____ x $19.99美元
vocabulary: foam n. 泡沫，泡沫橡皮
soothing adj. 慰藉的，鎮靜的
snugly adv. 緊貼地，舒適地
Ex. This biotechnology laboratory is equipped with all the latest devices. 這間生科實驗的配備都是最新的儀器。

questions.stem: What is the Wondercloud?
translation: Wondercloud是什麼?
a. 腿部按摩機。
b. 床墊。
c. 枕頭。
d. 發熱棉被。

questions.stem: Look at the graphic. What information is missing?
translation: 看這張圖片。缺少了的資訊是多少？

questions.stem: What can be inferred from the ad?
translation: 從上述廣告內容，可以得到何種推論?
a. 不需要用電池。
b. 產品供應有限。
c. 保固期可以延長。
d. 國外運費另計。

cards.passage: Are you sick of your boring job, but don't have the skills to advance your career? Saber Online College can help. Here at Saber, we specialize in advanced adult education classes that are designed to tailor your skills to a more technical, dynamic workplace. Our flexible online classroom allows you to arrange your classes around your current work schedule, making it easier to meet your needs. All of our lectures are recorded for your convenience, and new interactive classroom models allow you to contact your professors, as well as your classmates. What are you waiting for? Study with Saber and step into the career you always wanted.
cards.passageTranslation: 你是否對乏味工作感到厭煩，但又沒有能力讓您的職業更上一層樓？賽博線上大學可以協助您。在賽博大學，我們專攻成人進修課程，客製化課程設計主要是讓你的技能能符合更有技術及更有活力的工作場所。有彈性的線上教室可以依您目前的上班時間自由安排，讓你更容易的找到符合你的需求的時間。為了您的方便，所有的講課內容將被錄音，而且新式的互動課程模式會讓你可以和教授以及同學聯繫。還在等什麼？來賽博讓你踏入夢寐以求的職涯生活。
vocabulary: advance v. 使向前移動，推進
technical adj. 技術性的，工藝的
dynamic adj. 動力的，動態的

questions.stem: Who would be interested in this talk?
translation: 以下何者會對這段內容有興趣？
a. 尋找新的職業生涯的人。
b. 需要新電腦的人。
c. 尋找伴侶的人。
d. 需要新車的人。
options: (B) someone that needs a new computer
(D) someone that needs a new car

questions.stem: What does Saber Online College specialize in?
translation: 下列何者是賽博線上大學專攻的部分？
a. 兒童教育。
b. 僅電腦教育。
c. 成人教育。
d. 就業指導。

questions.stem: What can we infer about Saber Online College?
translation: 關於賽博線上大學敘述，可以得到何種推論？
a. 他們主要僱用女性。
b. 你必須親自與賽博一起上課。
c. 線上課程僅提供給那些目前有家庭的人。
d. 大部分的顧客是來上課的上班族。
options: (B) You have to physically attend classes with Saber.
(C) Online classes are only offered to those who currently have a family.
(D) Most of their customers work and take classes.

cards.passage: In a recent attempt to slow down China's ever-growing influence in the Asia-Pacific region, the Philippines purchased two surveillance aircraft from the United States this morning. Voltaire Gazmin, the Secretary of Defense of the island nation, called the purchase a landmark achievement, and hopes the increased surveillance will stop Chinese advancements into what most people think is Filipino territory. The topic of Chinese advancement in the South China Sea has received a lot of attention in recent weeks, and the US is eager to strengthen relationships with China's neighbors without angering the economic giant too severely. In this ongoing issue between China, its neighbors, and the West, it will be interesting to see what Beijing will have to say about the transaction.
cards.passageTranslation: 最近，為降低中國在亞太地區日益增長的影響力，今天早上，菲律賓向美國申購兩架偵察機。Voltaire Gasmin，菲律賓的國防部秘書，宣稱此項採購案為指標性的成就，並希望偵察機的數目增加，能阻止中國高動作進入大部分民眾是為是菲律賓的領土區塊。最近幾個禮拜，中國高動作進入中南海的議題受到許多關注。此外，美國急切地在不引起中國這名經濟強人憤怒的情況下，與中國的鄰近國家加強友好關係。在這此中國與其鄰近國家、以及西方國家這三方之間永不間斷的議題上，我們很期待北京對於這次的交易有何反應。
vocabulary: achievement n. 成就，成功，完成
ongoing adj. 前進的，不間斷的
transaction n. 業務，處置，交易
Ex. The poor young man is eager to become successful and rich. 那位貧窮的年輕人渴望成功變有錢。

questions.stem: What has happened in this announcement?
translation: 依上列公告內容，以下何者是目前正發生的事?
a. 中國控告美國的制裁。
b. 菲律賓向美國購買飛機。
c. 美軍抓到中國的間諜。
d. 中國入侵菲律賓。
options: (A) China brought sanctions against the United States.
(B) The Philippines bought airplanes from the US.
(C) The US military was caught spying on China.

questions.stem: What does the speaker imply about China?
translation: 有關大陸方面，文章作者的意思為何?
a. 他們會馬上入侵菲律賓。
b. 他們會與西方切斷所有關係。
c. 他們對這次的交易很不開心。
d. 他們將制裁美國。
options: (A) They will invade the Philippines immediately.
(B) They will cut all ties with the West.
(C) They will not be happy about this transaction.
(D) They will use sanctions against the US.

questions.stem: What does the speaker think will be interesting to see in the future?
translation: 文章作者認為，未來可以看到什麼樣的有趣事情?
a. 菲律賓何時成為大陸的一部分。
b. 誰會購買船隻。
c. 戰爭何時結束。
d. 大陸對於這一件採購案的反應是什麼。
options: (A) when the Philippines become a part of China
(D) what China's reaction to the purchase will be

cards.passage: Attention, bowlers. A kind-hearted customer has just turned in a grey and black backpack to the customer service counter. The backpack contains a travel book, a cellular telephone, two notebooks, and what appears to be a family-sized bag of raisins. Will the owner of the backpack please report to the customer service counter to retrieve the items? Of course, you will be asked to identify the items in the bag in detail to prove that you are the owner of the backpack. Thank you for your attention and enjoy your bowling experience.
cards.passageTranslation:
各位保齡球友請注意。有一位善心的顧客將一只灰黑色的後背包交到服務櫃。背包裡有旅遊書、手機、兩本筆記本，還有看起來像量販包的葡萄乾。若您是後背包的主人，請來服務櫃台取回。當然，我們會請您詳細地說明包包裡面的內容，以確保您是後背包的持有人。感謝您的關注，請盡情享受玩保齡球的樂趣。
遺留物品目錄
項目 附加說明 棕色背包 內容物：書本、電話、食物 黃色提包 內容物：皮夾、化妝品 男人的大衣 藍色和綠色。口袋有一包香菸 灰色背包 內容物：旅遊書、筆記本、手機
vocabulary: bowler n. 打保齡球的人
retrieve v. 重新取得，收回
prove v. 證明，證實，查驗
appear to v. 似乎(= seem to)
Ex. The victim tried to describe the robber's appearance in detail. 受害者試著詳細地敘述搶犯的面容。

questions.stem: Where does this announcement take place?
translation: 本則公告將於以下何處發佈？
a. 保齡球館。
b. 便利商店。
c. 購物廣場。
d. 棒球場 。

questions.stem: Look at the graphic. Which of the left behind items is being discussed?
translation: 請看圖表。選項中何者是討論中的遺失物？
a. 棕色背包
b. 黃色提包
c. 男人的大衣
d. 灰色背包

questions.stem: Where must the owner go to retrieve the items?
translation: 物主必須去以下何處取回遺失物品？
a. 失物招領。
b. 經理辦公室。
c. 安全櫃台。
d. 服務櫃台。

cards.passage: The following announcement is brought to you by the regional affiliate of the National Weather Service in St. Louis, Missouri. Currently, at 3:45 pm Central Standard Time, a tornado warning has been issued for the following counties: Franklin County, Jefferson County, Monroe Country, and St. Louis County. Residents in these areas can expect dangerous winds, torrential rain, and cloud-to-ground lightning strikes. Residents are advised to seek shelter underground or in a sturdy building immediately. A tornado has been reported to have touched down just outside of Union and is traveling due west at 30 kilometers per hour.
cards.passageTranslation: 下列公告由密蘇里州聖路易斯國家氣象局的區域分公司提供。目前是下午三點四十五分，中部標準時間，下列縣市已經發佈龍捲風警報：富蘭克林縣、傑佛遜縣、門羅縣和聖路易斯縣。上述地區的居民可能會面臨危險強風及暴雨，以及雲對地閃電。居民應該立即尋找地下庇護所或堅固的大樓。報導指出龍捲風已經抵達猶尼市的外圍，且以每小時三十公里往西部移動。
vocabulary: torrential adj. 猛烈的，洶湧的
immediately adv. 立即地，馬上地
strike v. 擊，打；(鐘)敲響報
sturdy adj. 健壯的，結實的
travel due west (氣象廣播用語) = travel toward the west (口) 表【向西前進】

questions.stem: What kind of an announcement is this?
translation: 本則公告所屬以下什麼類型?
a. 龍捲風警報。
b. 地震警報。
c. 暴風雨警報。
d. 冬天警報。

questions.stem: What is recommended by this report?
translation: 本則公告的建議為何?
a. 上車開遠處。
b. 尋找地下庇護所。
c. 撤離聖路易市。
d. 購買生活用品。
options: (A) Get in a car and drive far away.
(C) Evacuate the city of St. Louis.

questions.stem: What is NOT expected to happen?
translation: 上述公告中預估將發生的事情，何者為非?
a. 危險強風。
b. 暴雨。
c. 雲地間閃電。
d. 大雪。

cards.passage: Everyone. Listen up! Before we start our dive today, I just want to give you guys a quick overview of where we are going and then we'll do our buddy check and get in the water. Okay, first off, we are going to descend down to a maximum depth of 25 meters. Once everyone gets equalized, we will head over to the reef. Keep your eyes peeled for triggerfish, moray eels, and sea turtles. This should be a pretty straightforward dive, but please keep your eyes on me and watch out for the current in some places. I will be checking in with you regularly to see how much air you have. Alright, if there aren't any questions, let's go ahead and do our buddy checks. Don't forget your masks and fins!
cards.passageTranslation: 大家，請聽好。開始前，我想概要的說明今天的潛水活動，再進行潛伴檢查，然後再下水。好吧，首先，我們最深將潛至25公尺。當大家調節壓力完畢之後，我們將前往珊瑚礁。睜大眼睛注意看魨魚、海鰻以及海龜。這段潛水很輕鬆，但請緊緊地跟著我，並且注意某些地區的水流狀況。我會不時地查看你的氧氣量還剩多少。好吧，如果你沒有任何問題，我們開始互相檢查對方的設備。別忘了你的面罩以及鰭板。
vocabulary: current n. 水流，氣流，流動，電流
keep your eyes peeled for睜大眼睛
Ex. After entering the cave, keep your eyes peeled for bats flying above you.
進入山洞後，睜大眼睛看看你頭上飛的蝙蝠。
Ex. When crossing the street, don't forget to watch out for cars coming from both sides. 過馬路時，不要忘記要小心兩方的來車。

questions.stem: Who is making this announcement?
translation: 以下何者正在發佈此則公告？
a. 足球隊的教練。
b. 潛水教練。
c. 船長。
d. 擔心的顧客。
options: (A) the coach of a football team

questions.stem: How deep will they go on the dive?
translation: 他們會繼續潛水多深？
a. 30 公尺。
b. 28公尺。
c. 25 公尺。
d. 35公尺。

questions.stem: What reminder is made at the end?
translation: 以下何者事公告最後的提醒？
a. 別忘了你的設備。
b. 小心鯊魚
c. 注意你尚存的氧氣量。
d. 上升時不要憋氣。
options: (C) Keep an eye on your air.
(D) Don't hold your breath when ascending.

cards.passage: Following the closing of the Bromley branch, we can all expect some changes to occur in our department. First of all, some of the best sales reps from Bromley will be joining us here in London next Monday, and they will be forming a traveling sales team that will report back to us in London. Secondly, none of your sales positions are at risk with this merger, but there will be some casual interviews going on next week, and you will probably be asked to participate in a sales meeting or to input your ideas on the new sales model. Secondly, as I alluded to last week, after you close a sale, you need to input the data on the website. Any questions?
cards.passageTranslation:
布朗姆利分行關閉後，我們大家都預期部門中將有一些改變。首先，有幾位頂尖的布朗姆利業務人員自下禮拜一起將會加入我們在倫敦的團隊，且組成旅行業務團隊向我們回報。第二，你們不會因為這次的合併案而失去業務職位，但自下禮拜開始會舉辦一些非正式的面試，而且有可能需要你參加一或兩次業務會議，目的是把您的意見納入新的業務模式。最後，正如上禮拜提起，當你完成銷售案件後，你必須把你的資料打進網站內。有任何疑問嗎?
橡子電腦分店列表
位置 店長 狀態 布朗姆利 Marta Taylor 歇業 康沃爾 James Murphy 營業 倫敦 Eleanor Lewis 營業 曼徹斯特 Marcus Hussain 即將開幕
vocabulary: branch n. 分部，分支，支流
allude to v. 暗示，間接提到
input v. 投入將資料輸入電腦
model n. 模型，模特兒，模範，(汽車)型號

questions.stem: Look at the graphic. Which branch does the speaker belong to?
translation: 請看圖表。談話者屬於哪家分店？
A. 布朗姆利
B. 康沃爾
C. 倫敦
D. 曼徹斯特

questions.stem: What does the speaker imply about the employment status of sales people?
translation: 關於業務人員的聘僱狀況，說話者意旨為何？
a. 他們的工作有風險。
b. 他們必須採取減薪。
c. 他們的工作很安全。
d. 他們將被解雇。
options: (B) They will have to take a wage cut.

questions.stem: What is this talk about?
translation: 本段談話內容是關於以下何者？
a. 取得新公司。
b. 盛大開幕。
c. 倒閉。
d. 兩個部門的合併。
options: (A) the acquisition of a new company

cards.passage: Ladies and gentlemen, this is your captain speaking. We're going to turn the fasten seatbelt sign on for a while and ask everyone to return to their seats and fasten their seatbelts. It looks like we are going to be experiencing a little bit of turbulence as we fly through some rough air. Flight attendants, please suspend the beverage service and return immediately to your stations. Try to relax, folks. This shouldn't take too long and once we've turned the fasten seatbelt sign off; we will resume our beverage service. Thank you.
cards.passageTranslation: 各位先生女士，這裡是機長廣播。繫上安全帶的警示燈即將亮起，請大家回到座位做好，並繫上安全帶。看起來，我們即將經過一段不穩的氣流，面臨短暫的亂流。空服員們，請停止餐飲服務，並且馬上回到您的工作站。請大家放輕鬆。這次的亂流不會持續很久。當繫上安全帶的警示燈關閉時，我們會繼續提供餐飲服務。謝謝。
vocabulary: sign n. 標誌，符號，手勢
resume v. 重新開始，取回
rough adj. 粗糙的，表面不平的，未加工的
a little bit of 一點點
Ex. Just have a little bit of the cake and tell me how you find it! 就吃一點點蛋糕然後告訴你覺得如何！

questions.stem: Where does the announcement take place?
translation: 本則公告於以下何處廣播？
a. 公車上。
b. 機艙上。
c. 機場裡。
d. 火車上。

questions.stem: What does the announcer NOT ask the passengers or flight attendants to do?
translation: 廣播者不建議乘客或空服員做以下何者？
a. 打開頭上的儲物箱。
b. 返回座位。
c. 暫停供應餐飲。
d. 繫好安全帶。

questions.stem: Why does the speaker give the announcement?
translation: 廣播者為何發佈此則公告？
a. 飛機即將起飛。
b. 飛機即將降落。
c. 飛機將面臨亂流。
d. 班機延遲。
options: (A) They are going to take off.

cards.passage: Hello, everyone. Could I have your attention, please? I am pleased to introduce the newest member in our firm, Vivian Peterson. Ms. Peterson is a graduate of the Stanford School of Law and specializes in environmental policy as well as tax law and cooperate fraud. As you all know, environmental legislation is becoming more of a hot topic around the state of California, and I expect everyone who is working on the air emissions case involving Norton Manufacturing to bring Ms. Peterson up to speed immediately. Her expertise in this field could be vital to this case, so let's not waste time, people.
cards.passageTranslation: 大家好。請注意這裡？我很高興可以介紹我們事務所的新同事，Vivian Peterson。Peterson小姐畢業於斯坦福法律系，專攻環境政策、稅務法以及公司詐騙案。就如大家所知，環境法已經成為加州地區的熱門話題，我期待正在處理涉及諾頓生產公司廢棄排放案子的同仁，可以馬上帶Perterson小姐加入討論。她的專業領域對本案件極為關鍵，所以請大家可以馬上開始。
vocabulary: fraud n. 騙局，欺騙的行為，詭計，騙子
expertise n. 專門知識/技術
vital adj. 關鍵性的，極為重要的
Ex. The old farmer grows vegetables as well as flowers. 那位老農種蔬菜也種花。
lay sb off 將(人)裁員
Ex. The head office decided to lay 1000 workers off. 總部決定裁員1000名員工。

questions.stem: What was the purpose of this talk?
translation: 本次演講目的是什麼？
a. 通知員工關於新商機。
b. 公佈公司政策變更。
c. 介紹一位新員工。
d. 討論關於服裝規則。
options: (A) to notify employees of a new business opportunity
(B) to announce changes regarding office policy

questions.stem: What does the speaker imply?
translation: 以下何者是談話者所暗示的意思？
a. 加州環境法律不公平。
b. 斯坦福法律系一點都不好。
c. 事務所即將裁員。
d. Peterson小姐將是很有用的員工。
options: (A) The environmental law of California isn't justified.
(B) The Stanford School of Law isn't very good at all.
(C) The firm will be laying people off.
(D) Ms. Peterson will be a valuable employee.

questions.stem: What is NOT true about Ms. Peterson?
translation: 關於Peterson小姐，以下敘述何者為非？
a. 她畢業於斯坦福學校。
b. 她不太瞭解環境政策。
c. 她專攻於稅務法以及公司詐騙案。
d. 她將能夠協助處理諾頓公司案件。
options: (B) She doesn't know much about environmental policy.
(C) She specializes in tax law and cooperate fraud.
(D) She will be able to help in the Norton Manufacturing case.

cards.passage: Hello, you have reached the voicemail of Hiruki Tanaka, senior sales officer for Brocade Electronics. I will be out of the office from Monday, December 10th to December 15th. If you need to speak to someone about a recent order, please contact my junior sales associate, Todd Brenner at 256-546-7890. The customer service team here at Brocade is outstanding and can also help you in the event that you cannot get in contact with Todd. If you have an urgent matter, please email me at my personal email address or call me via my personal number. Please don't hesitate to call. Thank you and have a wonderful day.
cards.passageTranslation: 哈囉，這是Hiruki Tanaka 的答錄機，Brocade電子產品的資深業務主任。自星期一，12月10日至12月15日，我不會在辦公室。如果你想要討論關於最近的訂購，請聯絡我們的業務助理，Todd Brenner，電話是256-546-7890。Brocade的客服團隊是很傑出的，若連絡不到Todd，他們可以協助您。如果你有緊急事請，請寄電子郵件到我的私人電子郵件帳戶，亦可以打到我的私人電話。請不用客氣聯絡我。感謝您，祝您有美好的一天。
vocabulary: senior adj. 資深的，年長的，前輩的
electronics n. 電子設備販賣店
outstanding adj. 傑出的，未解決的
associate n. (+with) 把…聯繫在一起
personal adj. 個人的，私人的，本人的，親自的
Ex. The businessman refused the invitation and walked out of the meeting room in anger. 那位商人拒絕邀請，然後生氣地走出會議室。

questions.stem: Look at the graphic. Which week of December did Hiruki Tanaka take off from work?
translation: 請看圖表。12月的哪一周Hiruki Tanaka是休假日？
a. 第一週。
b. 第二週。
c. 第三週。
d. 第四週。

questions.stem: If you need to speak to someone about a recent order, what should you do?
translation: 若要找聯絡人討論關於最近的訂購，您應該做什麼？
a. 撥打Tanaka先生的私人電話。
b. 聯絡Todd Brenner。
c. 寄電子郵件給Tanaka 先生。
d. 等到Tanaka 先生回來。

questions.stem: What does the speaker imply at the end of the message?
translation: 說話者在最後的留言提到了什麼？
a. 只要在特殊情況打電話。
b. 不要打電話給他，寄電子郵件即可。
c. 若需要時，可以馬上打電話。
d. 他不會接電話。
options: (B) Don't call him at all; send an email.
(C) If you need to call, go right ahead.
(D) He will not have phone service.

cards.passage: Hey there, Mike. This is Tim Watley returning your call about what we covered in class today. Dr. Noel picked up where he left off at the end of the Civil War and Appomattox Court House, and continued on to cover the Lincoln assassination, as well as the beginning of Reconstruction. I think the main points that you really want to focus on in your reading are the differences in Lincoln's idea of Reconstruction vs. Johnson's views, the economic challenges faced by the South after the war ended, and the ambiguous social standing of African Americans in the South after the 13th, 14th, and 15th amendments were signed. Hope you feel better, Mike. See you soon.
cards.passageTranslation: 哈囉，Mike。我是Tim Watley ，關於今天的課程內容回電給您。Noel博士從內戰末期及阿波馬托克斯法院開始繼續討論林肯刺殺事件，以及美國重建初期。我認為最主要的問題是著重於林肯與強森總統對於重建的觀點有何不同，美國南方在戰爭結束後所面對的經濟挑戰，以及13、14、15世紀後的非裔美國人在社會上的雙重地位。Mike，祝您趕快康復，再見。
vocabulary: court n. 法院；(網球等)場地；庭院；宮廷
amendments n . (議案)修正案 focus on 專心於，集中於 (= concentrate on )
Ex. It looked verywas romantic when the leading actor focused his eyesight on the dancer under the moonlight. 當男主角的目光集中在月光下的舞者時，看起來很浪漫。

questions.stem: What can we infer about this talk?
translation: 從本段談話中，以下何者是你可以得到的推論?
a. Mike 和Tim 是同事。
b. Tim有去上課但是Mike沒有。
c. Mike 是 Tim的老闆。
d. Tim 是Mike的老師。
options: (B) Tim was in class, but Mike was not.

questions.stem: What are they studying?
translation: 以下何者是他們正在學習的內容?
a. 數學。
b. 世界二戰。
c. 美國內戰。
d. 英文。

questions.stem: What was NOT covered in class?
translation: 以下何者並非課程中所包含的內容?
a. 林肯刺殺事件。
b. 蓋茲堡演說。
c. 阿波托克斯法院 。
d. 美國重建。

cards.passage: Ladies and gentlemen, could we have your attention please? One of our passengers is hurt. He was in the bathroom just now when we were going through turbulence. The movement of the plane caused him to fall over and he has injured his ankle. It looks like quite a bad injury. This is a call for assistance: if anyone on board is a doctor, nurse, or medical student, could you please assist us in treating the injured man? He is in seat 4C towards the front of the plane. If anyone feels they are able to help please come forward now. Thank you for your cooperation and we hope you are enjoying the flight today.
cards.passageTranslation: 先生女士們，可否請您注意？我們其中一名乘客受傷。剛才當飛機通過亂流時，他在廁所裡。飛機的晃動使他跌倒而導致腳踝受傷。傷口看起來相當嚴重。我們廣播需要有人前往協助，如果機上有醫生、護士、或醫學院學生，請協助我們治療這位受傷的男子？他的座位在機艙前段的4C號。如果任何人覺得您可以幫忙救援，請立刻往前。感謝您的合作，祝您享受今天的飛行。
vocabulary: medical adj. 醫學的，內科的
on board 登上(飛機、火車等)
Ex. Many passengers on board were waving goodbye to their friends and family on the platform. 許多車上的乘客在和月台上的親友們揮手告別。

questions.stem: What kind of announcement is this?
translation: 本則公告的類型為何？
a. 亂流警告。
b. 緊急協助電話。
c. 歡迎詞。
d. 廣告。

questions.stem: Where is the man injured?
translation: 這位男子的受傷部位為以下何者？
a. 他的大腿。
b. 他的手臂。
c. 他的頭。
d. 他的小腿。

questions.stem: Look at the graphic. In which section of the plane was the man when he was injured?
translation: 請看圖表。男子受傷的時候在正在飛機的哪個區域？
A. 區域 1
B. 區域 2
C. 區域 3
D. 區域 4

cards.passage: Our final item on today's bulletin is that next month Brian Buckle from our Human Resources department will be running the London Marathon to raise money for sufferers of depression. Brian himself has been a long time sufferer of the condition, and in the past few years has partaken in several fundraising activities, including last year's Mountain Climb for Charity event. If anyone would like to donate money to Brian's cause then donations can be made online at the following web address: www.justgiving.com/brianbuckley, or to Brian in person; he will be setting up shop next to the reception desk every afternoon from 5 o'clock until 5:30 for the next three weeks to collect donations.
cards.passageTranslation: 今日佈告欄上的最後一個項目是，下個月人力資源部的同仁，Brian Buckle將為憂鬱症患者募款決定參加倫敦馬拉松大賽。Brian本身也是患病多年的患者，而且過去這幾年來，他參加很多募款活動，包含去年的登山公益活動。如果您想要捐錢給Brian的公益活動，您可以在線上捐款www.justgiving.com/brianbuckley，或親自拿給Brian。未來的三個禮拜，每天下午五點至五點半，他會在接待處旁的攤位收集募款。
vocabulary: bulletin n. 公告；(學)會報，期刊
human resource n. 人力資源
condition n. 情況，(健康)狀態，條件，病狀
partake v. 分享，分擔，(書)參與，(口)吃喝光
donation n. 捐款，捐贈物品
depression n. 沮喪，(醫)憂鬱症
in person 私下地親自地
Ex. The award winner is required to collect his prize in person. 我們要求得獎者親自來領取獎項。
Ex. Mr. Wang set up his very first trade company when he was 23. 王先生在他23歲那年成立了他的第一間貿易公司。

questions.stem: Who is the intended audience of this announcement?
translation: 本則公告針對以下那些讀者？
a. 人力資源部的全體員工。
b. 公司唯一的經理。
c. 所有的倫敦馬拉松參賽者。
d. 公司全體員工。
options: (A) All the staff in the Human Resources department.
(B) Only one manager from the company.
(D) All the staff in the company.

questions.stem: How long has Brian been suffering from depression?
translation: Brian罹患憂鬱症長達多久？
a. 好幾天。
b. 自從昨天晚上。
c. 好幾年。
d. 自從出生前。

questions.stem: What can we infer about Brian Buckle?
translation: 關於Brian Buckle，以下何者是我們可以推斷的推論？
a. 他非常喜歡室內活動。
b. 他很會交際應酬。
c. 他體力很好非常健康。
d. 他不喜歡太費力的運動。
options: (A) He likes to be indoors a lot.
(C) He is very fit and healthy.

cards.passage: Good morning. Thank you for calling Trust Bank Incorporated. Here at Trust Bank Incorporated we are proud to now be serving over one million customers in the UK for both personal and business banking purposes. Please listen carefully to the following options and choose accordingly. For card enquiries and problems press one. For queries about online banking press two. For transactions or to check your account balance press three. To speak to an advisor press four. Please note that in the interest of improving our service, calls may be recorded for quality and training purposes. Also please note that we are currently experiencing a high volume of calls, so your call may be put on hold.
cards.passageTranslation: 早安。感謝撥打安信銀行。我們很驕傲目前在英國服務的顧客，包括為了個人或商業用戶已經超過一百萬名。請仔細聆聽以下選項，根據說明選擇選項。詢問卡片及相關問題，請按一。詢問網路銀行問題，請按二。詢問交易問題或查詢您的帳戶餘額，請按三。與服務人員通話，請按四。為了改善我們的服務品質及訓練效果，我們將進行錄音。此外，請注意我們目前的來電頻繁，因此我們可能會保留您的來電。
vocabulary: transaction n. 處置，交易，買賣
be proud to+原形動詞/ of+名詞
Ex. In her speech, the Native American mentioned that she was proud to be who she is. 在她演說中，那位美國原住民提及她對自己感到很驕傲。

questions.stem: Why might the call be put on hold?
translation: 以下選項何者可能是來電會被保留的原因？
a. 所有的服務人員正在午休。
b. 大部分的員工都未受過訓練而且不專業。
c. 目前有很多人試著打電話給銀行。
d. 銀行的人手不足。
options: (A) All the advisors are currently on their lunch breaks.
(B) The staff members are mostly untrained and unprofessional.
(C) There are currently a lot of people trying to call the bank.

questions.stem: What button should you press if your bank card has stopped working?
translation: 如果你的銀行卡片的功能已經不能使用，你應該按哪一個按鍵？
a. 一。
b. 二。
c. 三。
d. 四。

questions.stem: What do we know about this bank?
translation: 我們可以得知這間銀行的相關內容？
a. 他們擁有來自全世界的客戶。
b. 他們的總部設在英國。
c. 這是一間新的銀行。
d. 他們是英國最有受歡迎的銀行之一。
options: (A) They have customers all over the world.
(B) They are based in the UK.
(D) They are one of the UK's most popular banks.

cards.passage: Northbound traffic on the M1 is currently backed up for over two miles following an incident which took place at 5:23pm today between junctions 23 and 24 in Leicestershire. A bus collided with a blue Ford Mondeo which led to a pile-up involving seven other vehicles. The road is currently closed between junctions 23 and 24, but police and ambulances are on the scene and normal service is expected to resume around 8:30 this evening. Anyone planning on travelling home on the M1 this evening is advised to seek an alternative route. Eight people have been taken to hospital to receive treatment for minor injuries as a result of the collision, however there are no reported fatalities.
cards.passageTranslation: 由於今天下午五點二十三分在Leicestershire23英哩與24英哩處發生車禍，M1往北目前的交通塞車超過兩英哩。有輛公車撞上一台藍色福特Mondeo的相撞，導致其他七部連環車禍。23英哩與24英哩的交接處目前已封閉，警車與救護車都已抵達現場。預計約今天晚上八點半才會恢復運作。任何回家必須經過M1道路的民眾，我們建議您走替代道路。因這次撞擊受輕傷的八位患者，皆已送往醫院治療，但目前尚未獲得有關造成傷亡的消息。
vocabulary: involve v. 牽涉，連累，使專注
normal adj. 普通的，一般的
alternative adj. 有選擇性的，替代的 /n. 選擇
route n. 路線，航線，途徑
fatality n. (意外)死亡，(疾病)致命
Ex. In order to drive out of the parking space, the vehicle behind him has to back up at least ten inches.
為了能將車移出停車格，他後方的那輛要倒退至少10吋。
lead to 導致 = bring about = cause
Ex. The continuous rain in the past week has led to a huge flood in the city.
過去一個星期的連日降雨造成城市大淹水。

questions.stem: What time was this traffic announcement made?
translation: 本則交通公告於幾點發佈消息？
a. 一大早。
b. 晚上八點半後。
c. 下午五點二十三分。
d. 下午五點至晚上九點之間。

questions.stem: What do we NOT know about the incident?
translation: 關於本則事故，以下何者是我們無法得知的消息？
a. 事故發生的時間。
b. 事故牽涉的人數多寡。
c. 事故發生的地點。
d. 有多少人因這次事件而傷亡。
options: (D) How many people died as a result of the incident.

questions.stem: Why is it important for people to know about this incident?
translation: 以下何者是告知民眾本事故的原因？
a. 教育人們酒駕的危險之處。
b. 藉此讓大家知道回家時，應避開M1道路。
c. 藉此大家可以拍遭破壞的車子。
d. 藉此大家可以知道購買藍色車會帶來衰運。
options: (A) To teach people about the dangers of drunk-driving.
(B) So people know to avoid taking driving home on the M1.
(C) So people can go to take photos of the damaged vehicles.
(D) So people know that buying a blue car will bring bad luck.

cards.passage: Before we start today's meeting I have a short announcement to make about Greg Bust from our IT department. Greg was playing football last night as he does every Tuesday. Not long into the game he collided with two other players and his leg was broken in two places. The other players got an ambulance there as quickly as they could and Greg was taken to hospital to be operated on. In time he should be able to make a full recovery, however there will be more operations and physical therapy in store for him over the coming months, and his road to recovery is going to be a long one. He's currently recovering at Manchester Royal Hospital and I'm sure he would appreciate visitors if anyone can spare the time.
cards.passageTranslation: 會議開始之前，我要宣布一件資訊部門的同仁Greg Bust的相關消息。昨日，Greg照慣例每個禮拜二晚上去打橄欖球。比賽進行不久後，他與其他兩位球員相撞，造成腿部兩處斷裂。其他球員馬上叫救護車，在最短的時間內將Greg送到醫院進行手術。因為即時處理他應該可以完全復原。然而，在未來的幾個月，他還要動手術以及進行物理治療，復原將會是一場漫長的路。目前，他正在曼徹斯特皇家醫院休養，我相信若有人可以撥空去探病，他一定會很感激。
vocabulary: operate v. 運作，營運，操作，動手術
therapy n. 治療，療癒，療法
recovery v. 恢復，(健康)康復
spare v. 騰出(時間，人手) ，分讓(多餘的東西)
The big vessel collided with another ship operating on the river. 那艘大船撞上另一艘在河上作業的船隻。

questions.stem: When is this announcement being made?
translation: 本則消息何時發佈?
a. 工作日開始。
b. 會議要結束時。
c. 員工午休期間。
d. 會議開始時。
options: (A) at the start of the working day
(B) at the end of a meeting
(D) at the start of a meeting

questions.stem: What do we know about Greg's injury?
translation: 關於Greg的受傷情況，以下何者是我們所得知的?
a. 這只是小傷。
b. 他的傷很嚴重。
c. 這次受傷短時間便能恢復。
d. 這次受傷會讓他再也無法工作。
options: (A) It is only a minor injury.
(C) The injury will involve a short recovery period.
(D) The injury will prevent him from ever working again.

questions.stem: When did the injury occur?
translation: 這次的受傷事件何時發生?
a. 星期三傍晚。
b. 上班前的那天早上。
c. 上個禮拜。
d. 昨天傍晚。

cards.passage: Coming to ABC this October: Dangerous Looks, a chilling new drama set in Victorian England in the heart of the Norfolk countryside. The drama follows the lives of an unhappily married couple, John and Jane Westwick. The Westwicks, bored with their lives and with each other, take in a strange visitor, who stumbled onto their property one evening after getting lost in a sudden rainstorm. This first season of the drama was aired on BBC Television in the United Kingdom in the spring of this year and received great reviews from several major critics. A second season has already been commissioned for next summer.
cards.passageTranslation: 十月份即將在ABC頻道上映的：危險的臉孔，是一部以英國維多利亞時期為背景的恐怖劇情，其拍攝地點是紐福客鄉間的中心地點。本劇情是關於一對婚姻不和的夫婦，John 與Jane Westwick。Westwick夫婦一起生活很厭倦，某天晚上一位因臨時下大雷雨而迷路的陌生人闖進他們家裡。今年春天，第一季已在英國的BBC電視台上映，且獲得一些知名評論家的優良評論。第二季已籌畫於明年夏天開拍。
vocabulary: set n. (電影)場景，(舞台)布景，一套/部/副
stumble v. 絆倒，結結巴巴，步入歧途
United Kingdom n. 大英國協，英國
air v. 廣播，播送，使通風，晾
popularity n. 普及，流行，受歡迎
Ex. After being together for more than ten years, my cousin is finally got married to her boyfriend.
for that sentence we say "get married to". "be married to" must be a present tense sentence. Ex:
My cousin is married to the most beautiful girl I have ever seen.
在一起超過十年了，我表哥妹終於要和一個我見過最美的女孩她的男友結婚。
Ex. The inbound train is about to depart on Platform 7. 往市區的火車將在七號月台出發。

questions.stem: How do the Westwicks feel towards each other?
translation: Westwick夫婦對彼此的感覺如何?
a. 他們很開心可以結婚。
b. 他們彼此對婚姻生活感到疲憊。
c. 他們互相猜忌。
d. 他們互相討厭。
options: (A) They are happy to be married to each other.
(B) They are tired of their married lives with each other.
(C) They are suspicious of each other.

questions.stem: When will the show next be aired?
translation: 這部電視劇何時會接著播出?
a. 下一個夏天。
b. 十月。
c. 春天。
d. 明天晚上。

questions.stem: What indication of the show's popularity is NOT given in the announcement?
translation: 關於該劇情的受歡迎程度，下列何者非本公告中提到的內容?
a. 第二季已經被籌畫開拍。
b. 該節目獲得很好的評價。
c. 該戲劇的主角們都有贏得獎項。
d. 該節目即將在第二個國家播放。
options: (A) A second season has already been commissioned.
(B) The show has received great reviews.
(C) The main actors in the show have both won awards.
(D) The show is about to be aired in a second country.

cards.passage: Ladies and Gentlemen, I hope you're enjoying your day so far watching your kids here at North Warwickshire Primary School for our 2013 annual school Sports Day. So far we've seen little Jonny Grimley take first place in the boys under 8's 40-metre running race, and Daisy Thornbrook is currently in the lead of the girls under 10's long jump event, earlier recording a distance of 2.63 metres. Well done to both of them! We've now reached our first intermission, so any minute now we're going to be joined on the field by the North Warwickshire High School marching band for this morning's entertainment, so make sure you stick around for that. As always, refreshments are being served in the school's reception area.
cards.passageTranslation: 各位先生女士，我希望您到目前還喜歡這一天看著您的孩子參加北霍威奇夏爾國小的2013學年度的校園運動會。截至目前為止，我們可以看到8歲以下的男生組40公尺短跑比賽中，Jonny Grimley領先。Daisy Thornbrook目前則在10歲以下女生組跳遠比賽項目領先，稍早時紀錄的距離為2.63公尺。兩位都表現的很棒！ 我們目前是第一次的中場休息。這段時間大家可以到操場觀賞北霍威奇夏爾高中樂隊的早場表演。因此，請確保你前往參觀。一如既往，學校接待處也備妥點心已供民眾享用。
vocabulary: primary adj. 主要的，基本的，初等的
intermission n. 間歇，暫停，中斷

questions.stem: Where is this event taking place?
translation: 本活動的舉辦地點在以下何處？
a. 北霍威奇夏爾高中。
b. 當地的體育館。
c. 當地的休閒活動中心。
d. 北霍威奇夏爾國小。

questions.stem: What's happening right now?
translation: 現在正發生了什麼？
a. 正在頒獎。
b. 休息時間
c. 40公尺跑步競賽。
d. 樂隊正在演奏音樂。
options: (A) the awards are being handed out
(D) a marching band is playing music

questions.stem: Who is likely to make up the majority of the audience?
translation: 以下何者可能會成為本活動的主要觀眾？
a. 學校老師。
b. 政府官員。
c. 體育星探。
d. 學生的家人。

cards.passage: Hello. You have reached the voicemail of Jean Granville, head translator at Jean Granville Translations. I will be away on vacation from Monday, February 15th to Saturday, February 20th. If you need to get in touch with me during this time you can either send me an email at jean@jeangranvilletrans.com, and I will reply when I am back at work; alternatively, my son Harry can be reached at the following number: 07835628351. Harry is my acting secretary and will be handling all my business matters while I am away. Many thanks for your call.
cards.passageTranslation: 哈囉，這是Jean Granville 的答錄機，我是珍格威爾翻譯社的社長。2月15日星期一至2月20日星期六，我在度假期間。如果你想與我聯絡，你可以寄電子郵件到jean@jeangranvilletrans.com，回來上班後，我會回覆您。或者，您可以打電話給我兒子Harry，電話號碼是07835628351。Harry是我的秘書且我不在這段期間他會協助處理所有生意。感謝您的來電。
vocabulary: reach v. 達到，伸手可及
reply v. (+to) 回覆，回答，回應
alternatively adv. 替代性地，有選擇性地
get in touch with 和…聯繫上
Ex. The secretary will have to get in touch with the designer to make another appointment for the consultation. 秘書要和設計師聯繫再約個會議時間。

questions.stem: What kind of business does Jean Granville run?
translation: 以下選項何者是Jean Granville 所從事的行業別？
a. 翻譯公司。
b. 線上購物網。
c. 違法貨幣服務。
d. 人力銀行。

questions.stem: Why has Jean recorded this message?
translation: Jean為什麼錄這個留言？
a. 她不喜歡接電話。
b. 她要大家知道她兒子的電話號碼。
c. 宣傳他的生意。
d. 以防她出去度假時，有人打給他。
options: (A) She doesn't like answering her phone.
(B) She wants people to know her son's phone number.
(D) in case people call her while she's away on vacation

questions.stem: What can we infer about Jean Granville?
translation: 關於Jean Granville，我們可以得知以下何者推論？
a. 她是很好的翻譯員。
b. 她的兒子已經大學畢業。
c. 她自己創業。
d. 她為已婚人士。
options: (A) She is a very good translator.
(B) Her son has already graduated from university.

cards.passage: Okay, everyone, that's the end of my show this evening. Tune in again tomorrow for more of Jimmy Basset's eighties classics. I've got just enough time to remind you all to come down to the Stockbridge Town Fair this Saturday, and make sure you bring your families with you because there's going to be something for everyone. We'll have clowns and amusement park rides for the kids, some live music towards the evening for the parents, we'll be judging the final round of this year's Stockbridge Vegetable of the Year competition, and of course the main event: you'll be able to see me, Jimmy Basset, riding an elephant! It's sure to be a great day, so don't miss it! I hope to see you there Saturday. Bye for now.
cards.passageTranslation:
大家好，今天晚上的節目已進入尾聲。明天請準時收聽更多關於Jimmy Basset 八零經典節目。我還有時間邀請大家參加這個禮拜六在史塔克橋旁舉行的市集活動。請要帶家人前來，因為那裡將會有很多娛樂節目。我們會有適宜小孩的小丑表演以及遊樂園。晚間有為了父母舉辦的現場音樂表演。我們也將會針對史塔克橋的年度蔬菜大賽進行最後的評審。當然，最重要的是，你將會看到我本人，Jimmy Basset，騎著大象！當天一定很好玩，千萬別錯過。希望禮拜六可以在那裡見到大家。再見！
史塔克橋城鎮市集
活動和預定活動列表
年度蔬菜大賽
遊樂園（全天開放）
Jimmy Basset的大象表演
陽光公園搖滾音樂會
vocabulary: round n. 一輪，(酒)一巡，一回合
tune in 收聽，收看某一節目
Ex. Please tune in to the PPS World News at the same time tomorrow! 請在明天同一時間收看PPS世界新聞！

questions.stem: What kind of announcement is this?
translation: 本則公告的類型為以下何者？
a. 錄音檔留言。
b. 晚餐後的演講。
c. 現場廣播廣告。
d. 自動答錄機服務。

questions.stem: Look at the graphic. What is considered to be the main event at the Stockbridge town fair?
translation: 請看圖表。以下何者被視為史塔克橋市集的主要活動？
a.年度蔬菜大賽。
b.全天開放遊樂園。
c. Jimmy Basset騎大象。
d.陽光公園搖滾音樂會。

questions.stem: What kind of radio station is this?
translation: 廣播電台為以下何種類型？
a. 當地廣播電台。
b. 線上數位廣播電台。
c. 全國性的廣播電台。
d. 亞洲語系的廣播電台。

cards.passage: We are interrupting this evening's programming to bring you a special news bulletin: Good evening everyone, sorry to interrupt your television viewing, but we have just received a report indicating that a category 2 hurricane has formed over the Atlantic Ocean just off the east coast of the United States. The storm is slowly making its way towards the shore now and is expected to hit Richmond in the early hours of the morning. We advise you to stay indoors this evening, and make sure all your doors and windows are secured. The storm should have passed by tomorrow afternoon, however in the morning we may still be experiencing strong winds. Thank you for your attention, and now back to this evening's programming.
cards.passageTranslation: 我們即將插播一則晚間特別新聞：大家晚安，抱歉打擾您收看電視，我們剛收到消息，二級龍捲風已經在美國東海岸的大西洋形成。龍捲風正緩慢地向岸邊移動，預計將在凌晨時間襲擊瑞奇蒙。我們建議大家今天晚上待在室內，並確保所有的門窗已上鎖。龍捲風預計應於明日下午經過，但早上的風速依然強勁。感謝您的收看，現在我們回到晚間新聞。
vocabulary: interrupt v. 中斷(講話)，打擾
bulletin n. 公告，(學)會報，期刊
secure v. 使安全，關緊，拘留

questions.stem: Look at the graphic. What is the current location of the hurricane?
translation: 請看圖表。颶風的當前位置是哪裡？

questions.stem: What are people NOT told to do?
translation: 下列哪一項沒有建議居民？
a. 待在屋內。
b. 關緊門。
c. 關緊窗戶。
d. 買緊急食物。

questions.stem: Where is this announcement being broadcast?
translation: 本則公告在以下何處播放？
a. 收音機。
b. 廣告板。
c. 電視上。
d. 擴音機。

cards.passage: Good evening. This is Terrance Phillips bringing you the local hourly weather forecast. The heat spell that we have been experiencing does not appear to be going away anytime soon. Yesterday afternoon, temperatures peaked at a record breaking 39 degrees Celsius. We may see a repeat of that today, so turn up that air conditioning, do what you need to do to stay cool, and remember to drink lots of water. We might see the heat taper off to the mid-30s by the end of the week, and then heavy showers are predicted for the weekend. In related news, the County Fair has announced that they intend to go ahead with their opening day this Saturday, rain or shine. The fair grounds will open to the general public at 9 in the morning, and everybody who arrives before noon will get free entry. In case the rains do come down, there will be large tent areas providing coverage and a variety of activities.
cards.passageTranslation: 晚安。這是特倫斯菲利普斯為您帶來每小時的當地天氣預測。我們經歷的熱浪似乎還會持續一段時間。昨天下午，最高溫破紀錄達到攝氏39度。 今天，溫度甚至可以再達39度， 所以，請打開冷氣，讓你保持涼爽，並記住要大量喝水。這個周末以前，我們可能會看到溫度逐漸下降維持在35度左右，然後預計週末時會有陣雨來襲。另有相關消息指出，縣博方面宣布，本星期六他們依然打算開幕，風雨無阻。展覽會場將在上午九時開放給一般民眾蒞臨參觀，中午前入場民眾將可免費入場。萬一真的下雨，會場會提供大帳篷遮雨以及各種不同的活動。

questions.stem: What will be starting this weekend?
translation: 這個週末會有什麼活動開幕？
A.年度馬拉松慢跑
B.縣市博覽會
C.炎熱的天氣
D.水上遊樂園

questions.stem: When did the temperatures reach a record high?
translation: 氣溫何時升到歷史最高溫？
A.昨天下午
B.今天下午
C.明天下午
D.本週末

questions.stem: What will happen to the weekend festivities if it rains?
translation: 假如下雨了，週末的慶典要如何應對？
A.他們會延期
B.他們會取消
C.他們會更改舉辦場地
D.他們會繼續按照計畫進行
options: (D) They will go ahead as planned.

cards.passage: Good morning everybody. I would like to give you a few reminders before we head out onto the floor today. The news this week has been reporting that this will be the wettest summer in years, so people working in outdoor supplies should make sure that all rain gear is in full stock and that additional orders are on the way. In the bedding section, I would like to remind all of the sales staff that our new policy of not letting the customers lie down on the beds is now in effect and signs have been installed. Please make a point of reminding customers if it is necessary. Finally, I would like to mention that we apologize for the slip-ups that were made on this month's paycheck. As you probably know, Mary in the payroll department is on sick leave, and Ted, her temporarily replacement, is just getting used to the new system. If you have found any discrepancies, please make a copy of your pay stub and go speak to Ted directly, in room 202, and she will get that cash to you as soon as possible. That's about all I have to say, so have a good day everybody!
cards.passageTranslation: 大家早安。在大家出門前，我有幾點件事情要提醒大家。本週新聞報告，今年將會是幾年來最潮濕的夏天，因此在戶外用品區工作的員工，應確保我們的雨具有足夠的庫存量，以供應額外增加的訂單。在寢具用品區的人員注意，我想提醒所有的銷售人員，我們的新政策規定，現在起不要讓顧客躺在展示床上，且我們也已安裝警告標示。如有必要請務必提醒顧客。最後，我想表示，公司對本月月薪的誤算深表歉意。如同你可能知道，薪資部門的瑪麗正在病假中，暫時代理職位的泰德，還在習慣新系統的運作。如果你發現任何的薪資差異，請影印你的薪資條，直接告訴202室的泰德，他將盡快以現金補給您。我要說的全部就這些了，因此祝大家有美好的一天！

questions.stem: Look at the graphic. Which department store section is NOT mentioned?
translation: 請看圖表。哪個百貨公司部門沒有提及？
A.B11
B.B12
C.B14
D.B15

questions.stem: Why were the paychecks messed up this month?
translation: 本月薪資條算錯的原因為何？
A.通常處理薪資的小姐不在。
B.新來的處裡薪資的先生病的很重。
C.銀行裡有問題
D.季節性的變動影響銷售
options: (A) The woman who normally does payroll is away.
(B) The new payroll man is really sick.
(C) There is a problem at the bank.
(D) There are seasonal changes affecting sales.

questions.stem: Which department will be affected by a new store policy?
translation: 哪一個部門會被店裡新的政策規定影響？
A. 戶外用品部
B. 廚房用具部
C. 寢具部門
D. 男士服裝部

cards.passage: Thank you for calling Trans-Continent Airlines. All of our operators are busy right now. You are currently number twelve in the queue. One of our flight specialists will be with you shortly. We would like to remind you that your question may already be answered on the FAQ section of our website, www.transcontinent.com. While you wait, we would like to take the opportunity to tell you about some of our flight upcoming flight specials. Are you planning a wedding or large family holiday? Several of our partner hotels in sunny Cancun, Mexico are currently offering unheard-of discounts. For wedding groups, bring 16 people or more, and the married couple gets a room for a week, free of charge. For business travelers, we are now offering frequent-flier deals for common routes including Los Angeles to New York and New York to Chicago. Fly return 5 times in 5 months, and your sixth flight is on us! For all passengers, don't forget to sign up for your TC Air Miles card before you fly, and you can earn one point for every kilometer of travel. This even applies to our vast network of Star-Group affiliated airlines. Please continue to hold, and an operator will be with your shortly.
cards.passageTranslation: 謝謝您來電遠洋航空公司。所有的接線專員目前皆在忙線中。您目前的等候編號為12號。我們的專員將盡快與您通話。我們想提醒您，您的問題也許可在我們網站的問與答部分找到，www.transcontinent.com。在您等待的同時，我們想藉此機會向您介紹一些我們將會推出的航班特價商品。您是否正在籌辦婚禮或家庭度假呢？幾間我們的合作酒店位於陽光明媚的坎昆，墨西哥目前推出前所未有的優惠折扣。婚禮團體，人數16人以上，新婚夫婦可享有一星期的住宿免費。對於商務旅客，我們目前推出常客優惠價，相同的航線，包括洛杉磯到紐約以及紐約到芝加哥。5個月內往返5次，第6次往返免費！對於所有的乘客，請不要忘記在出發前註冊屬於你的遠洋航空哩程卡， 每公哩的旅程，你可以得到一點 。這甚至適用於星空集團的廣大航空公司群組。請不要掛斷電話，接線專員將馬上與您通話。

questions.stem: Where does the speaker suggest that the caller should look first to find the answer to their question?
translation: 通話者建議來電者應該先去以下何處找尋他們問題的解答？
A.遠洋航空司的月刊
B.他們公司的網站
C.他們隨信寄送的傳單
D.他們的飛航常客計畫
options: (C) The flier that they sent in the mail.

questions.stem: What happens if you book 16 people or more for a wedding in Cancun?
translation: 假如你預定16人以上的坎昆婚禮行程，以下何者選項會發生？
A.婚禮新人的機票免費
B.婚禮新人一星期住宿免費
C.婚禮新人在飯店用餐免費
D.婚禮新人可獲得飛航常客的點數
options: (A) The married couple flies for free.
(B) The married couple gets a free room for a week.
(C) The married gets free meals at the hotel.
(D) The married couple gets frequent flier points.

questions.stem: What happens if you fly on one of Trans-Continent Airlines affiliated airlines?
translation: 假如你搭乘遠洋航空的相關航空公司，會有以下何者選項發生？
A.在坎昆會有折扣
B.可獲得免費的房間
C.在五個月內往返五次會有一次免費的機票
D.會獲得獎勵點數
options: (B) You can get a free room.
(C) You can get a free flight if you fly five times in five months.

cards.passage: There are a few new items that I would like to present to the board of members. The first is regarding the upcoming election, and the choice of locations for voting stations. There are three potential community halls that fall within the boundaries of our district, and all of them are available for rental and how good accessibility. The last time there was a provincial election, the Norwood Community Hall was used, but if anybody has doubts about using the same hall, then we can certainly discuss the possibility of using one of the other two. The second point that requires discussion is also related to the election. There have been some new laws in the last four years regarding campaign advertising, particularly in front of houses and small businesses. We need to choose a good way of notifying the public about these changes, and also ensuring that members of our community follow the new regulations during the campaign.
cards.passageTranslation: 我想現在向董事會委員們報告幾個新的項目。首先有關於即將舉行的選舉，還有投票場地的選擇 。我們的區域上有三種可能的社區講堂可供使用，這三個皆可以出租且交通便利。上次有個省份選舉，採用諾伍德社區會館，但如果有人對使用相同的會堂有異議，那我們當然可以再討論使用其他兩個會堂的可能性。第二點需要討論的也與選舉有關。過去四年來，有一些關於競選廣告的新定法律，特別針對住宅前及小型商業的廣告。我們需要選出一個好的方式以通知民眾這些改變，並確定我們的社區成員在選舉期間遵守新的規定。

questions.stem: What subject are both of the issues that need to be discussed?
translation: 以下何者選項是文章中需要討論的兩項議題？
A.新社區會堂的建築大樓
B.與社區的小型商業相關的規定
C.與停車場相關的法律規定
D.即將到來的選舉
options: (A) The building of a new community hall.
(B) The rules related to small businesses in the community.

questions.stem: Who will be affected by the new laws?
translation: 以下何者會受新制定的法律所影響？
A.政客與政府
B.社區會堂的持有人
C.屋主以及業主
D.選舉志工
options: (B) The owners of the community halls.

questions.stem: What is the second topic of discussion about?
translation: 以下何者是第二項的討論主題？
A.投票出席者
B.選舉廣告
C.商業經營
D.社區會堂

cards.passage: I would like to say thank you for choosing me for the 2009 Entrepreneur of the Year award. The other contestants were all worthy contenders, and I believe that each one of them deserves to stand up here as well. I certainly did not achieve this award alone. First and foremost, I must thank my partner and B-Print cofounder, Doug Thompson, who has been with me from the start. Next, I couldn't have done it without our spectacular design team, whose hard work has put the unique public image that we are all familiar with on the B-Print magazine. I would like to offer my thanks and praise to my beautiful wife, Linda, who was the person who implanted the idea for the publication in my head in the first place, has encouraged me to pursue my dreams, and has always been there when I needed her most. Last but not least, I would like to thank all of our readers and fans, without whom I would not be standing here today. Your continued patronage and support is our survival.
cards.passageTranslation: 我要感謝你們選擇我贏得2009年年度企業家獎。任何一位參賽者都是可敬的競爭對手，而我相信他們每一個也都值得站在這裡。我絕對不是唯一一位得到獎項的人。首先，我必須要感謝我的合作夥伴和B印公司的合作創辦人，道格湯普森，他從一開始就一直跟著我一起工作。接下來，要感謝我們優秀的設計團隊。他們辛勤的工作將我們熟悉的B印雜誌打造獨特的公眾形象。沒有他們，就沒有我們。我還要感謝和讚揚我美麗的妻子琳達，是她首先在我的腦海中植入出版的想法。她鼓勵我去追求自己的夢想，當我需要她的時候，她一直都在那裡。最後也最重要的，我要感謝我們所有的讀者和書迷，沒有他們，我今天就不會站在這裡。你們持續的贊助與支持，是我們雜誌生存的動力。

questions.stem: Where is the man likely speaking?
translation: 這位先生可能在以下那種場合演說？
A.在新聞上
B.在電台上
C.在雜誌會議上
D.在得獎儀式上

questions.stem: Why did the speaker receive recognition for entrepreneurship?
translation: 以下何者選項是演說者的企業身分得到認可的原因？
A.他開辦了一間編輯公司
B.他是位有名的設計師
C.他創辦了一份受歡迎的雜誌
D.他已出版了很多本書籍

questions.stem: Who gave the speaker the idea to start B-Print?
translation: 以下何者帶給演說者建立B印公司的想法？
A.道格湯普，公司合作創辦人。
B.他的設計團隊
C.他的妻子，琳達
D.他的讀者與書迷

cards.passage: There has been a recent string of car robberies on the lower east side and in Clearview neighborhood. Over a dozen cars have been reported stolen in the last three nights. At the moment, no suspects have been apprehended. Police have however created a sketch of the suspect based on a few eyewitness descriptions, which you can now see on the screen. The thief is a Caucasian man in his mid to late 30s, approximately 170-180 centimeters in height, and of stocky build. He was spotted on three separate occasions wearing blue jeans, a red parka, blue baseball hat, and sporting a moustache. The majority of the robberies have taken place in the early morning, from about four to six AM. Police are asking people in the affected neighborhoods to be on guard, make sure to lock their vehicles, and to consider purchasing theft-deterring devices such as alarms and steering wheel locks. If you ever see a car theft taking place, call 911 immediately, and try to record any details of the perpetrators appearance. Do not try intervening, as the man may be armed and dangerous.
cards.passageTranslation: 最近在克利爾維尤下東城區附近發生一連串汽車竊盜案。過去三天已經有10多輛汽車申報遺失。目前，沒有逮捕嫌疑犯。不過基於幾位目擊者的描述，警方已經有一幅嫌疑犯的素描，也就是你現在可以在螢幕上看到。小偷是個35至39歲的白人男子，身高約170-180公分、身材結實。有人看見他在三個不同的場合穿藍色牛仔褲、紅色的皮大衣、藍色棒球帽、留鬍子。大部分的劫案發生在清晨時分，大約在4點至6點之間。警方要求居住在受影響的社區的居民要保持警戒，確訂車輛上鎖，並要考慮購買防盜設備，如方向盤鎖。如果你目睹汽車竊盜發生，立即撥打 119，並試著記錄竊盜犯的外觀細節。不要試圖阻止，男子可能是具有槍械且具危險性。

questions.stem: How many cars have been stolen in the last three nights?
translation: 有多少部汽車在過去三天內被盜？
A.10部
B.12部或更多
C.30部或更多
D.100部或更多

questions.stem: How were the police able to draw a sketch of the thief?
translation: 警方如何描繪出竊盜犯的素描圖？
A.有三個人看見他偷竊車子
B.有個人抓到他要偷他的車
C.他在偷車前被補
D.他三天前就已設定警鈴
options: (A) Three people saw him stealing cars.
(B) One man caught him trying to steal his car.
(C) He was arrested before the car theft.
(D) He set off an alarm three nights ago.

questions.stem: What does the speaker advise to avoid doing?
translation: 演說者建議避免以下何者選項？
A.不要試著阻止犯罪發生
B.不要鎖車
C.不要打給警察
D.不要裝設警鈴

cards.passage: Do you experience cold sweats at night, nightmares, or have trouble falling asleep? If so, we have the solution for you. Sleep EZ is the first sleep-inducing product on the market that combines traditional Chinese and Native American herbal knowledge. Our experts have created a unique combination of natural ingredients that have been used for centuries in Asia and North America. Sleep EZ is available in either tea or pill form, but no matter which option suits you, both are 100% organic and chemical free. Users report no side effects whatsoever, aside from an excellent and uninterrupted night of sleep. Waking up the next morning, you will feel alert, rested, and ready for a new day. Sleep EZ is available at your local health food store, or you can call now for delivery. If you purchase a set of three boxes, we will even include a fourth one free! The set is only $39.95, plus tax and delivery.
cards.passageTranslation:
你有夜間出冷汗、作惡夢、或失眠的經驗嗎？如果是這樣，我們有解決方法。EZ安眠錠是市面上第一顆誘導睡眠的產品，結合傳統漢方與北美原住民的草藥知識。我們的研究專家創造一種獨特的天然成分組合，這些天然成份已經在亞洲和北美洲使用了幾百年之久。EZ安眠錠可泡成茶水或以藥丸服用，但無論你適用哪一種形式，兩者皆是百分百有機且無化學成份。用戶回報除了熟睡及一覺到天明，沒有任何副作用產生。第二天早上醒來，你會感到精神抖擻、充分休息、且準備好要迎接新的一天。EZ安眠錠可在當地的健康食品商店購買，也可以打電話宅配。如果您購買一組三盒裝，我們會多送第四盒免費！一組只有39.95美元，外加稅金與宅配費用。
諾伍德藥局&健康產品
商店部門目錄 1. 感冒與流感藥物 3. 藥用化妝品 2. 純天然失眠療法 4. 腹瀉、便秘、及其他

questions.stem: Look at the graphic. In which section of the shop might this product be found?
translation: 請看圖表。此項產品可能會在店內哪個部門找到？
A. 部門1
B. 部門2
C. 部門3
D. 部門4

questions.stem: What options are offered when you purchase Sleep EZ?
translation: 選購EZ安眠錠時，顧客可有以下何者選擇？
A. 一般型或強效型。
B. 有機的或非有機。
C. 漢方或北美原住民藥方。
D. 茶或藥丸。

questions.stem: According to the advertisement, what do users say about the product?
translation: 根據廣告內容，使用者對商品的意見為何？
A. 只有些許的副作用
B. 他們晚上沒有醒來
C. 他們對折扣很滿意
D. 他們使用時覺得很天然
options: (A) There are only a few side effects.
(B) They don't wake up during the night.
(C) They are satisfied with the discount.
(D) They feel very natural when they use it.

cards.passage:
Ladies and gentlemen, this is your captain speaking. Please return to your seats and fasten your seatbelts, as we are preparing for landing. All trays should be locked and chairs should be in an upright position. Please return all of your headsets to the airlines staff. Please turn off all electronic devices, including mobile phones, laptops, and MP3 players, as they may interfere with our radio signals. Please do not turn on your phones until we have landed and your have exited the aircraft into the arrival terminal. Please ensure that all of your luggage is properly stored in the overhead compartments. If you have any difficulty closing the compartment doors, please buzz one of our staff to come assist you. It is currently 15 degrees and rainy in Vancouver, so we may undergo some turbulence as we descend. Upon landing, please remain seated and do not unfasten your seatbelt until the plane has come to a complete stop.
In the arrivals terminal, please follow signs for transfer or immigration and baggage. If you are unsure of where to go, please consult the staff at one of the airport information booths. Thank you.
cards.passageTranslation:
各位女士、先生，這裡是機長報告。我們正準備著陸，請您回到座位上並繫好安全帶。所有的托盤應收好，椅子應該立起成垂直位置。請將你的耳機交還給飛航工作人員。請關閉所有的電子設備，包括行動電話、筆記本電腦以及MP3播放器，這些儀器可能會干擾我們的無線電信號。飛機著陸、你離開機艙、抵達入境航廈後，再開啟你的手機。請確保您所有的行李都安放在上方的行李廂內。如果你有關閉廂門的困難，請按鈕，機上任一位工作人員將前來協助您。溫哥華目前溫度15度有雨，因此我們下降時可能會遇到亂流。著陸後，請繼續坐在座椅上，直到飛機已經完全停止，再解開安全帶 。
在入境航廈，請遵照指示轉機或入關及提領行李。如果您不確定要去哪裡， 請於機場資訊中心洽詢工作人員。謝謝您。
溫哥華平均天氣條件：十一月
白天平均氣溫：10℃
平均降雨量：200毫米（一年的最高）

questions.stem: Where can this announcement be heard?
translation: 在以下何地可以應到這一則廣播？
A.在機場的入境航廈。
B.在機場的出境航廈。
C.在機場外面
D.在飛機上

questions.stem: What should you do if you can't fit your bag into the overhead compartment?
translation: 假如你無法將行李放進上方的行李艙內，那你應該要怎麼做？
A.放在你前方座椅下方
B.請其中一位飛航工作人員來幫助你
C.再用力推
D.撐到飛機抵達
options: (A) Place it under the seat in front of you.
(B) Get one of the flight attendants to help you.
(D) Hang on to it until you arrive.

questions.stem: Look at the graphic. How is the weather in Vancouver at the time of the announcement compared to the average for that time of year?
translation: 請看圖表。溫哥華的每年平均天氣及公布時的天氣，相較之下如何？
A. 比平常溫暖和潮濕。
B. 比平常冷和潮濕。
C. 比平常溫暖，降雨量正常。
D. 溫度及降雨量都正常。
options: (A) It is warmer and wetter than usual.
(B) It is colder and wetter than usual.
(C) It is warmer than usual and precipitation is normal.
(D) It is the normal temperature and level of precipitation.

cards.passage: It is my honor to stand on this stage today to congratulate Sean and Lisa on this celebratory occasion. I have been colleagues with Sean for almost five years, and have seen his company transform from a small independent business run out of his parents' basement to one of the leading firms in Seattle. Before that Sean and I were roommates in University, where we partied, as well as studied very hard together. It was actually in the first year that we were living together that I first met Lisa, his new girlfriend. He had met her on campus, waiting in line for a coffee. She had only arrived to the States from Korea weeks earlier, but was an eager student and had a passion for enterprise. Sean was already familiar with Korean culture, having taught there for a year before he started his Master's. I knew right from the start that Sean and Lisa were meant to be together. They were one of those couples that everybody likes to be around, always pleasant, always poking fun of each other, and always smiling. Thirteen years later, little has changed in that regard. I thought they'd never get around to it, but finally they are tying the knot, and I am so pleased to be here with them as they begin a new phase of their life together.
