cards.passageTranslation: 我很榮幸在今天這個喜慶的日子，站在台上祝賀尚恩和麗莎。我和尚恩當同事已經五年，看著他的公司從位於他父母的地下室裡一個小型的一人公司變為西雅圖屬一屬二的公司之一。以前在大學時，尚恩和我是室友，我們一起參加派對，一起認真念書。事實上，在我們住在一起的第一年，也是我第一次遇見他那時的新女友麗莎。他在校園裡見過她排隊買咖啡。那時她剛從韓國抵達美國幾個星期。她是位求知欲旺盛的學生，且很有企業心。在尚恩攻讀碩士學位以前，他曾在韓國任教一年且很熟悉韓國的文化。我一開始就知道尚恩和麗莎註定會在一起。他們是一對人人喜愛的情侶，總是令人覺得愉悅，總是愛逗對方，總是面帶微笑。十三年後，這方面並沒有多大變化。我以為他們會永遠維持約會關係，但最終他們還是結婚了。在他們開始人生新的階段時 ，我很高興在這裡為他們倆人見證 。

questions.stem: What celebration is the speaker introducing?
translation: 以下何者選項是演說者介紹的慶祝活動？
A.尚恩與麗莎的婚禮
B.尚恩與麗莎的13年紀念日
C.尚恩的生日派對
D.尚恩與麗莎的工作派對

questions.stem: Where did Sean and Lisa meet?
translation: 尚恩與麗莎在哪裡認識？
A.在她的家鄉，韓國。
B.在他們的大學裡
C.他們是總部裡的商務夥伴
D.透過一位共同的友人認識
options: (A) In Korea, where she came from.
(C) They were business partners in a leading firm.

questions.stem: When did the speaker first meet Lisa?
translation: 演說者何時第一次遇見麗莎？
A.在今晚的慶祝活動上
B.約在5年前
C.約在10年前
D.大約在尚恩第一次遇見她的那時
options: (D) Around the time when Sean first met her.

cards.passage: Attention all passengers. Thank you for using the Kaohsiung MRT. We would like to remind all passengers that there will be some changes in service for the World Games, which will commence next week. Daytime services will be increased, with trains departing every 2-3 minutes. Trains will also be running an hour later every night. The new World Games Station will be open on the red line, within close proximity of the Kaohsiung National Stadium, where the games will take place. Due to an increased volume in commuters, we are asking that passengers do not linger in high traffic areas or stand in any of the entrance or exit areas, particularly at the World Games Station. We also like to remind all passengers that eating, drinking, or chewing gum & betel are not permitted on the MRT. Please remember to take care of your belongings. Thank you, and have a nice day!
cards.passageTranslation: 所有乘客請注意。感謝您搭乘高雄捷運。我們想提醒所有乘客，由於世界運動會將在下週開幕，因此我們的服務將有一些改變。日間服務的車輛班次將會增加，列車每隔2-3分鐘就有一班。 列車時間每晚也將多延長一個小時。捷運的紅線將開放新的世運站，可步行至奧運會舉行的高雄國家體育館。由於乘客量增加，我們要求乘客不要在人潮來往區域停留，或站在出入口，特別是世運站。我們也要提醒所有乘客，捷運站內不可飲食、咀嚼口香糖與檳榔。請小心隨身財物。謝謝你，祝你有個愉快的一天！

questions.stem: When are the World Games in Kaohsiung starting?
translation: 高雄的世運會何時開幕？
A.他們上週已經開幕
B.他們今天開幕
C.他們2、3天會開幕
D.他們下星期會開幕

questions.stem: Where should people avoid lingering?
translation: 人們應避免在何處停留？
A.在世運會上
B.在高雄國家體運館
C.在捷運站旁的公園裡
D.在捷運站的人潮來往區
options: (C) In the parks outside the MRT stations.
(D) In busy areas of the MRT station.

questions.stem: What will happen to the train service?
translation: 列車服務會有何改變？
A.會有較多的班次，且行駛時間會比較晚。
B.會有較多的班次，且會開得較快。
C.列車班次相同，但會有較多的捷運站。
D.列車班次相同，但行駛時間會較早。
options: (A) There will be more trains, and they will run later.
(B) There will be more trains, and they will drive faster.
(C) There will be the same number of trains, but more stations.
(D) There will be the same number of trains, but they will run earlier.

cards.passage: According to the Small Business Administration, new private sector jobs have been created in the United States. Many people plan to start or join a small business. There are some traps to avoid if you are interested in starting your business. First, exposing yourself to financial stress is not necessary. It can be costly. Second, you must have specific goals in mind. Set regular goals before you start. Third, if you fail, don't be afraid and frustrated. It is possible to fail before you are successful. Fortunately, fewer new businesses fail than succeed. Starting you own business is difficult, but keeping it viable is even harder. Look before you leap.
cards.passageTranslation:
根據小型企業管理局，在美國許私人部門創造很多就業機會。很多人計劃開始或加入一個小公司。有一些陷阱可以避免，如果你對個人事業有興趣。首先，讓自己承受財務壓力是沒有必要的。它可能會花很多錢。其次，你必須有特定目標的想法。設定目標，然後再開始進行。第三，如果你失敗了，千萬不要害怕和沮喪。成功之前失敗是有可能發生的。幸運的是，新企業成功比失敗的機率大。開始你自己的生意很困難，但是讓它上軌道更是難上加難。請三思而後行。
商業相關最新文章
1. 在開始自己的小生意時應避免的事。
2. 如何為您的新生意獲得資金。
3. 創業：優點和缺點
4. 為什麼為大型的傳統公司工作是明智選擇？

questions.stem: Look at the graphic. Which article might this excerpt come from?
translation: 請看圖表。 這篇文章可能摘錄於以下哪一篇文章？

questions.stem: What does the speaker think of starting a new business?
translation: 說話者對於開始個人事業感覺如何？
(A) 很困難但保證會成功。
(B) 很困難，但可行。
(C) 太冒險所以不明智。
(D) 只適用於某些類型的商務人士。
options: (A) It is difficult but you are guaranteed to succeed.
(C) It is too risky to be advisable.
(D) It is only suitable for some kinds of businesspeople.

questions.stem: What is important to do if people want to start their own businesses?
translation: 如果人們想自己創業，最重要的是什麼？
(A) 首先要放棄工作。
(B) 要上些課程。
(C) 要設定一些目標。
(D) 用低利率貸款。
options: (D) To take out a loan with low interest rates.

cards.passage: Before we begin our tour, I would like to give you a brief summary of the city of Vancouver. It is one of the most famous and beautiful cities in the world. Although the city itself only has a population of 600,000, making it the eighth largest in Canada, Greater Vancouver is the third largest metropolitan center by population in Canada. The incredible scenery, the mild climate, and the convenient transportation are just some of the reasons why thousands of tourists pay a visit every year. Every season offers different activities, from skiing at nearby Whistler in the winter to gorgeous beaches in the summer.
cards.passageTranslation:
開始我們的旅行之前，我想告知您溫哥華市的簡報。它是世上最有名和美麗的城市。儘管人口僅60萬(讓它成為加拿大的第八大城市)，大溫哥華區在人口上是加拿大的第三大市中心。令人難以置信的美麗景色，溫和的氣候，便捷的交通都是吸引成千上萬遊客每年參觀的原因。每個季節提供不同的活動，從冬季在附近的惠斯勒滑雪，到夏天去美麗的海灘。
加拿大城市依人口排序*
1. a
2. 蒙特利爾
3. b
4. 渥太華
5. 卡爾加里
6. 埃德蒙頓
7. 魁北克
8. c
9. 漢密爾頓
10. d
*以大都會區計算

questions.stem: What is Vancouver known for?
translation: 溫哥華最著名的是什麼？
(A)它的大豪宅。
(B)當地生意。
(C)當地風景。
(D)悠久歷史。

questions.stem: Look at the graphic. Where should Vancouver be found?
translation: 請看圖表。 溫哥華的位置應該在哪裡？
(A) a
(B) b
(C) c
(D) d

questions.stem: What is not mentioned as a reason to visit?
translation: 以下選項何者不是內文中提到拜訪的原因？
(A) 夏天去海灘。
(B) 冬天活動。
(C) 容易使用的大眾交通工具。
(D) 舒適的酒吧和咖啡館。
options: (A) Going to the beach in summer.

cards.passage: If you are constantly tossing and turning at night, or think that you have a sleep disorder, there is a good chance that you are wrong. A lot of people who can't get enough shut-eye at night are the victims of their own poor habits. Here are some changes that you could make to improve your sleep at night. First, beware of how much caffeine you are consuming and at what time. Some people lose their tolerance to caffeine as they get older. Second, keep TVs and other bright screens out of the bedroom. Nothing is worse for your sleep than staring at a bright screen right before you try to fall asleep. Third, keep regular sleeping times. If your body gets used to a routine, it will know when to fall asleep. Last, avoid consuming alcohol, which can result in a poor quality of sleep, as well as sleeping pills, which can be addictive and harmful in the long run.
cards.passageTranslation:
得到足夠睡眠的人是他們自己不良習慣的受害者。 你可以做這些改變，以改善你晚上的睡眠。 首先，注意你在什麼時間攝取了多少咖啡因。 有些人變老後就失去對咖啡因的耐度。 第二，讓電視和其他明亮螢幕遠離臥室。當你想試著入睡時，沒有什麼比在睡覺前盯著一個明亮的螢幕更糟糕了。 第三，保持規律的睡眠時間。 如果你的身體習慣了一個慣例，它會知道什麼時候入睡。 最後，避免飲酒，這可能導致睡眠品質差，也要避免安眠藥，從長遠來看會讓人成癮且有害。
disorder (n.) 障礙
victim (n.)受害者
tolerance (n.)忍耐力
consume (v.)消耗、花費
routine (n.)常規、慣例
pill (n.) 藥片

questions.stem: Which of the following would the speaker agree with?
translation: 說話者會同意以下哪一項？
(A) 在我們的社會中有很高比例的人患有睡眠障礙。
(B) 很認為他們有睡眠障礙的人實際上沒有。
(C) 治療真正的睡眠障礙是一件簡單的事情。
(D) 「睡眠障礙」這個用法應該改為「睡眠疾病」。
options: (A) There is a high percentage of people in our society with sleep disorders.
(B) Many people who think they have a sleep disorder actually don't.
(C) Treating genuine sleep disorders is a simple thing to do.
(D) The term "sleep disorder" ought to be changed to "sleep disease."

questions.stem: What is the key to improving one's sleep at night?
translation: 以下選項何者是改善一個人晚上睡眠的關鍵點？
(A) 改變日常習慣。
(B) 吃安眠藥。
(C) 咨詢睡眠醫生。
(D) 完全停止咖啡因。

questions.stem: Which piece of advice is not given?
translation: 以下選項何者不是內文中提供的建議？
(A) 不要在床上看著你的智慧型手機。
(B) 不要喝太多酒。
(C) 每天晚上在同一時間睡覺。
(D) 睡在較柔軟的床墊上。
解析:
談話結尾提到是睡眠專家。
options: (A) Don't look at your smartphone in bed.
(C) Go to sleep at the same time every night.
(D) Sleep on a softer bed mattress.

cards.passage: Welcome to Mr. Brown's retirement party. Mr. Brown has been with the Smart Company for over twenty-five years. We have very much appreciated his conscientious attitude. Mr. Brown graduated from Harvard University, but he is very humble. Even though he has a wealth of knowledge and an excellent educational background, he still works very hard. For example, he has won many important contracts for the company because he never stops trying. Mr. Brown is hardly ever late for work. This is the kind of attitude that we can learn from and respect. Mr. Brown will move to New York next month. We are certain he will have a pleasant retirement because of all the plans he has made. Let's give him a big round of applause once again!
cards.passageTranslation:
歡迎參加布朗先生的退休晚會。布朗先生已經在本公司任職超過25年。他認真謹慎的工作態度，讓我們非常欣賞。布朗先生畢業於哈佛，但他卻非常謙虛。即使他擁有豐富的知識和教育背景，他仍然努力學習。舉例而言，他曾替公司簽下很多重要合約，替公司帶來許多利潤。布朗先生幾乎不遲到，也很少早退。這樣的工作態度值得我們學習和景仰。之後，他將搬到美國紐約生活。我們相信他的退休生涯一定很愉快，因為他的退休計畫。讓我們以熱烈的掌聲祝福他。
retirement (n.) 退休
Harvard (n.) 哈佛
immigrant (n.) 移民

questions.stem: What is the purpose of this gathering?
translation: 以下選項何者是這次聚會的目的？
(A) 祝賀說話者25歲的兒子考上一所好大學
(B) 反映公司前任CEO布朗先生的生活。
(C) 歡迎最近的哈佛畢業生加入團隊。
(D) 慶祝一個成就卓越員工的職業生涯
解析：
這次為了慶祝布朗先生要退休了，並告知他未來發展。
options: (A) to say congratulations to the speaker's 25-year-old son for getting into a good university
(B) to reflect on the life of the company's former CEO, Mr. Brown
(C) to welcome a recent Harvard graduate to the team
(D) to celebrate the career of an accomplished employee

questions.stem: Which of the following adjectives does not describe Mr. Brown?
translation: 下列形容詞何者不能用來描述布朗先生？
(A) 準時。
(B) 愛自誇的。
(C) 勤勞的。
(D) 溫順的。

questions.stem: What will audience members do immediately after this talk?
translation: 這次發言後，觀眾會立即做什麼？
(A) 為布朗先生祈禱。
(B) 輪流和布朗先生握手。
(C) 拍手。
(D) 互相打招呼。
options: (A) Say a prayer for Mr. Brown.
(B) Shake Mr. Brown's hand in turn.

cards.passage: Since you are all graduating next month, I would like to give you some advice on employment. Graduates are finding it more and more difficult to find employment. In 2009, unemployment hit a record 5.94 percent. Fortunately, the government is now aiming for full employment; hence, the situation is getting better. Before you try to get a job, you should know what is important to you. What is the industry's future? Or the average salary? Also, never forget the importance of doing well in an interview. Don't even consider wearing casual clothing to a formal interview. Moreover, some candidates don't understand the company well, and don't get through the interview procedure as a result. Be prepared and you will succeed.
cards.passageTranslation:
因為你們下個月將畢業，我將給你們一些就業建議。許多畢業生發現找工作越來越難。 2009年六月，失業率已創紀錄到5.94％。幸運的是，政府的目標是到達充分就業。因此，情況正在好轉。找到一份工作時，你應該知道什麼對你很重要。產業的未來是什麼？或者是平均薪水？還有，永遠不要忘記在面試中表現良好的重要性完全不要考慮穿休閒服裝去參加正式面試。此外，一些面試者並不了解公司，所以最後沒有通過面試程序。 準備好，你才會成功。
employment (n.)就業
government (n.)政府
hence (adv.)因此
candidate (n.) 求職者

questions.stem: Who is listening to this talk?
translation: 誰在聽這一段談話？
(A) 一間公司中的兼職員工。
(B) 一群高年級的學生。
(C) 一整間的大學授。
(D) 產業專家的聽眾。
解析：
本談話主要與就業有關。教授給學生一些建議，對將來找工作時，要注意什麼事情，因此選項 (B) 為正確解答。
options: (A) Some part-time employees in a company.
(C) A room full of university professors.

questions.stem: What can we infer about the speaker?
translation: 我們可以推斷有關說話者的什麼？
(A) 他認為高失業率和應徵者在面試中表現不好之間存在著相關性。
(B) 他認為政府沒有履行其對應失業率上升的責任。
(C) 他認為在這個年代，在工作面試穿非正式服裝並不是什麼大不了的事。
(D) 他認為他的國家充分就業將在2009年實現。
解析：
persuade (v.)說服
importance(n.)重要性
options: (A) He thinks there is a correlation between high unemployment rates and candidates doing poorly in interviews.
(B) He thinks the government is failing in its responsibility to combat rising unemployment rates.
(C) He thinks that in this day and age, it's no longer such a big deal to wear informal attire at a job interview.
(D) He thinks that full employment in his nation will be achieved by the year 2009.

questions.stem: What is not mentioned as a way to succeed in a job interview?
translation: 下面哪一項成功面試的方法沒有提到？
(A) 穿著合宜。
(B) 了解該公司。
(C) 準時出現。
(D) 充分準備。

cards.passage: Welcome to the Castle Hotel, the town's first international hotel. You can enjoy fine dining in our restaurants. We have a Japanese restaurant, Chinese restaurant, and Italian restaurant all located on the second floor. If you want to enjoy a drink, don't miss the Happy Bar on the first level. Also, our business center is located on the third floor, across from the Winter Cafe. And you can enjoy your night in one of our comfortable guest rooms. If you want to order some food or drinks, just dial five on your room telephone. If you have any other questions, please dial eight to speak to the front desk.
cards.passageTranslation:
歡迎來到城堡旅館。這是鎮上第一家國際旅館。您可以享受我們的餐廳美食。日本餐廳，中式餐廳，和義大利餐廳都位於二樓。如果你要小酌一番，不要錯過一樓的快樂吧。此外，商務中心位於三樓咖啡廳，就在冬季咖啡廳對面。享受你的夜晚在我們舒適的客房。如果您想訂餐點或飲料，請在房間直撥分機5。如果您有任何疑問，請直撥分機號碼8，通知櫃台。
locate (vt.) 位於
sip (n.)啜飲
moreover (adv.)再者
dial (v.)撥打

questions.stem: Where are the restaurants?
translation: 餐廳位於哪裡？
(A) 咖啡廳對面。
(B) 在一樓
(C) 在地下室。
(D) 在二樓。
解析：開始幾句就提到餐廳位於二樓。

questions.stem: What should a guest do if he or she has any problems?
translation: 如果客人有問題，他/她應該如何做呢？
(A) 叫客房服務
(B) 用房內電話撥分機號碼 3。
(C) 用房內電話撥分機號碼8。
(D) 記下來。
解析：
內容結尾有提到一些分機的功能，(C) 的敘述更為貼切，故為較佳解答。

questions.stem: Where would a meeting be held?
translation: 會議可能會在哪裡舉行？
(A)在地下室。
(B)在一樓。
(C)在二樓。
(D)在三樓。
解析：
basement (n.) 地下室

cards.passage: This is Betty on Happy Hour's morning show, Famous Movies, and I will be your host for the next hour. I hope you will enjoy my program. What kind of movies do you like? Funny, romantic, or horror? I will introduce some popular and interesting films to you that will be in theaters this weekend. The first is "Pirates of the Caribbean: On Stranger Tides." Johnny Depp returns as Captain Jack. This time he crosses paths with a woman with whom he shares a mysterious past. He wants to know whether the woman is using him or loves him. The film is a true adventure. If you like this type of film, don't miss it
cards.passageTranslation: 這是貝蒂在歡樂時光早晨，電影強檔，接下來一個小時我會為你主持。希望你能喜歡我的節目。你喜歡什麼樣的電影？搞笑，浪漫，或恐怖片？我將介紹一些熱門和有趣的影片給你。它們將在本週末上映。第一部片是 「加勒比海盜：幽靈船。」傑克船長。這一次他和女子穿越過去，女子和他分享神秘的過去。他想知道這位女子是否利用他或者深愛著他。這是真實冒險故事。如果你喜歡這種類型的電影，不要錯過喔。

questions.stem: Who is the speaker?
translation: 以下何者是說話者？
(A) 廣播節目或電視主持人。
(B) 新聞主播。
(C) 女演員。
(D) 電影導演。

questions.stem: What will the speaker likely discuss next?
translation: 以下選項者是說話者接下來可能會討論的項目？
(A) 不同的頭條。
(B) 不同類型的娛樂。
(C) 不同的電影。
(D) 不同的演員。

questions.stem: What type of film is being discussed?
translation: 以下的電影類型何者正在討論中？
(A) 動作/冒險片。
(B) 恐怖片。
(C) 喜劇片。
(D) 愛情片。
解析：
provide (v.) 提供

cards.passage: Good evening! Welcome to Summer's. I hope you are having a fine shopping experience. Be advised that there will be a massive clearance sale taking place at 9 o'clock. The sale only lasts ten minutes. I repeat. Only 10 minutes. All blazers, jackets and coats will be 30% off. You can buy flats, sneakers, sandals, pumps and boots for up to $50 off. All pajamas, underwear, and socks will be 50% off. Moreover, suits and suitcases will be marked at 30 to 40% off. The current time is 8:55, so you only have five minutes until the sale begins. You must get in line at one of the checkout counters before the sale ends to get the deal. We will have staff in place at each line to monitor who gets in line on time. Thanks, and enjoy your day.
cards.passageTranslation:
晚安！歡迎來到夏日。我希望您逛街逛得愉快。請注意九點鐘將舉行大型的清倉大拍賣。拍賣會只有十分鐘。重覆，只有十分鐘。所有的西裝外套、夾克和大衣都將打七折。平底鞋、慢跑鞋、涼鞋、高跟鞋與靴子，最高可以優待50元。所有的睡衣、內衣、襪子都將打五折。此外，西裝與手提箱將標價六到七折折。現在時間是8：55，到拍賣開始只有五分鐘。 您必須在拍賣結束前在其中一個結帳櫃檯排隊才能獲得折扣。 每一個櫃檯都有工作人員監看，看誰在時間內排隊。 感謝，好好享受您的一天。我們5分鐘內將要開始大拍賣。享受購物時光喔。
clearance (n.) 清倉
flats (n.) 平底鞋
sneakers (n.)慢跑鞋
sandals (n.)涼鞋
pumps (n.) 高跟鞋
pajamas (n.)睡衣

questions.stem: What kind of products does this store specialize in?
translation: 以下選項何者是這家店專賣的產品？
(A) 鞋子。
(B) 睡衣。
(C) 運動衣。
(D) 一般衣物。

questions.stem: At what time will the massive clearance sale end?
translation: 這個大規模的清倉拍賣幾點結束？
解析：
hold (v.) 舉行
9點開始，9點10分結束，而且是晚上。

questions.stem: Who will be able to purchase the discounted merchandise?
translation: 以下何者能購買打折商品？
(A) 任何在9:00之後進入商店的人。
(B) 任何在9:10之前拿著他們想購買的商品排隊的人。
(C) 任何在9:00~9:10完成他們的商品付款的人。
(D) 任何在9:10之前抵達櫃檯的人。
options: (A) Anybody who enters the store after 9 o'clock.
(B) Anybody who gets in line with merchandise they want to purchase before 9:10.
(C) Anybody who pays for their merchandise between 9:00 and 9:10.
(D) Anybody who reaches the cash register before 9:00.

cards.passage: Credit card fraud is becoming less common in our society thanks to major credit card providers being more vigilant and offering better fraud protection. Instead of just requiring signatures, many cards now come equipped with an internal chip and require a password to be used. Credit card providers send regular emails to users regarding any suspicious activity, such as unusual large purchases, or purchases attempts in unusual locations. Often times, the card company may even freeze the account in such cases, until the users calls in to verify. Signing in to online accounts requires safe passwords that are long and include letters, numerals, and punctuation points, and you may have to answer some obscure personal questions as a form of verification.
cards.passageTranslation:
由於主要的信用卡提供商越來越有警覺心，且採取更好的詐欺保護措施，信用卡欺詐在我們的社會越來越不常見。現在許多卡片備有內部晶片又需要使用密碼，而不是簽名而已。 信用卡供應商偵測到任何可疑活動時會定期向用戶發送電郵通知，例如不尋常的大額購買或在不尋常的地點購物。很多時候，信用卡公司甚至可能在這種情況下凍結帳戶，直到用戶打電話進行驗證。登錄線上帳戶需要又長又包含字母、數字和標點符號的安全密碼，您可能還必須回答一些晦澀的個人問題作為一種驗證的方式。
使用者名稱 密碼 AshleyBrown ashr55k11kih7kk10 VKembel111 YoullNeverGuessMyPassword Nickenstein !nicknicknick1981_!! Andysmith99 never.forget

questions.stem: What is the main idea of the talk?
translation: 以下選項何者是此段談話的主旨？
(A) 信用卡欺詐越來越嚴重
(B) 信用卡公司正在反擊信用卡欺詐和並獲得勝利。
(C) 信用卡公司通過各種措施已經完全消滅信用卡欺詐。
(D) 因為網路，信用卡欺詐正變得不那麼常見。
options: (A) Credit card fraud is getting increasingly worse.
(B) Credit card companies are fighting back against credit card fraud and winning.
(C) Credit card companies have totally eliminated credit card fraud through various measures.
(D) Credit card fraud is becoming less common thanks to the Internet.

questions.stem: According to the speaker, what might a credit card provider do if there is a strange purchase on your account?
translation: 根據說話者，如果您的帳戶有一項異常性購買紀錄，以下選項何者是信用卡供應商可能會做的事情？
(A) 寄電子郵件或打電話給您。
(B) 寄電子郵件或凍結您的帳戶。
(C) 打電話給您或凍結您的帳戶。
(D) 打電話給您或取消您的帳戶。
options: (B) Email you or freeze your account.
(C) Call you or freeze your account.
(D) Call you or cancel your account.

questions.stem: Look at the graphic. Whose password would be considered safe, as described in this talk?
translation: 請看圖表。如本談話中所描述的，誰的密碼被認為是安全的？
(A)AshleyBrown
(B)VKembel111
(C)nickenstein
(D)Andysmith99

cards.passage: Attention shoppers. A silver Toyota car with the license plate number AB1111 is parked in front of the bookstore. Would you please promptly move your car? It is inconvenient for people to walk by. The car will be towed away in five minutes if the driver doesn't move it. Sorry for the interruption. If you have any parking problems, please come to the information center. Thank you for your cooperation.
cards.passageTranslation:
各位顧客請注意。停書店前面，車牌號碼AB1111的銀色TOYOTA。請您立即把車移開。已經造成行人的不方便。如果駕駛者不去處理，這台車五分鐘內將被拖吊。對於中斷各位購物深感抱歉。如果您有任何停車問題，請到服務中心。謝謝您的合作。
promptly (adv.)即刻地
inconvenient (adj.)不便的
interruption(n.)中斷

questions.stem: What is this announcement mainly about?
translation: 這項公告與什麼有關？
(A) 違規停車。
(B) 遺失的車。
(C) 車禍。
(D) 一輛擋道路的車。
options: (D) A car that is blocking the road.

questions.stem: Where is the announcement being made?
translation: 公示在哪裡發布呢？
(A) 在一家超市。
(B) 在一間餐廳。
(C) 在一個書店。
(D) 在一間動物園。

questions.stem: What should the driver do immediately?
translation: 以下選項何者是駕駛應該馬上要做的事？
(A) 到他或她的車那邊。
(B) 到保全櫃檯。
(C) 打電話至服務中心。
(D) 到服務中心。
解析：
tow(v.) 拖吊
options: (A) Go to his or her vehicle.

cards.passage: Hello, and thank you for listening to the automated traffic conditions report for the city of Calgary. Our reports are brought to you exclusively on 88.5 fm and are updated every hour, on the hour, based on our video and helicopter traffic monitoring personnel. Today, August 10th, at 5pm, there are traffic blockages on 34th West Avenue, from 89th street all the way to Anthony Hendry Drive. There appears to be a three-car collision on the North Saskatchewan Bridge that is affecting the flow of traffic in both directions. Drivers are advised to use the 21st avenue bridge as an alternative route, and to avoid 24th West Avenue altogether. Traffic in and out of downtown Calgary is normal for this time of the early evening, as in slow but steady. Construction on the Yellowhead Highway heading north out of the city limits, mostly around the Suncorp Plant, is also slowing down passage time. However, with limited other route options for residents of northern suburbs, drivers are asked to proceed with caution, and obey any signs or warnings given by the road maintenance crew.
cards.passageTranslation: 您好，謝謝您收聽卡爾加里市的自動路況報導。我們為您帶來的播報只有在調頻88.5頻道，每小時、整點的依我們的攝影機和直昇機路況監控人員回報更新。今天是八月十日，下午五點，在第34西大道有交通阻塞，一路由第89街堵到安東尼亨利道。看來是有一起三輛汽車的碰撞發生在北薩斯喀徹溫橋而影響到雙向車流。建議駕駛人利用第21大道橋作為替代路線，總之要避開第24西大道。出入卡爾加里市中心的車流緩慢但穩定以目前傍晚時分來說仍然正常。在黃頂公路北向離開市區有工程進行，大約在大陽企業工廠附近，也使通行時間變慢。然而，北部郊區的居民由於其他路線選擇有限，駕駛人請務必小心通行，並遵守道路維護人員所給予的訊號或警告。
vocabulary: 2. exclusively adv. 專門地；獨佔地
4. monitor n. 監視器/ v. 監控
Ex. The nurse monitored the patient's condition carefully.
護士很細心地監察病人的狀況。
Ex. The collision between the ships was caused by fog.
船隻相撞事件因霧造成
10. route n. 路線/ v. 給...定路線
12. caution n. 小心；警告/ v. 警告
Ex. Dad always drives with caution. 爸爸開車一直十分小心

questions.stem: What is causing delays at the moment on 34th West Avenue?
translation: 是什麼造成目前在第34西大街的延誤？
a. 橋上的一起事故。
b. 尖峰時段的車流。
c. 施工。
d. 替代道路封閉。

questions.stem: Which of the following is not true about this report?
translation: 關於該報導下列何者非真？
a. 這是在收音機上。
b. 每小時更新。
c. 播報員在直昇機上。
d. 它報導整個卡爾加里市的交通狀況。
options: (C) The speaker is in a helicopter.
(D) It reports traffic conditions across the city of Calgary.

questions.stem: What should you do if you live in a small town north of the city?
translation: 如果你是住在該市北方的一個小鎮時應該怎麼辦？
a. 利用其他道路回家。
b. 避開黃頂公路。
c. 小心開車回家。
d. 等到施工結束。
options: (A) Use other routes to get home.

cards.passage: Good morning students, professors and visitors to the University of Lethbridge. This is the Dean of Arts and Humanities. I would like to apologize for this brief interruption of your studies to bring you a few important announcements. First and foremost, I would like to welcome any freshmen students, and offer my sincerest thanks for choosing this academic institution to prepare for your careers. For returning students, I would like to welcome you back, and to wish you the best progress in your educational pursuits. Secondly, I'd like to call attention to the opening of our university campus' brand new Rutherford Library, which is located northwest of the Student's Union Building, just adjacent to the Natural Sciences building. The library is a masterpiece in design, and will be housing our university's largest collection of printed materials to date. Inter-library transfers will allow students to request books from any of the other libraries. Last but not least, I want to point out that a handful of new scholarships have been added to the already plentiful list up for grabs at the University of Lethbridge. Updated pamphlets listing all the scholarships and their specific requirements are available from the blue bins located in high-traffic areas throughout the campus.
cards.passageTranslation: 萊橋大學的各位同學、教授以及來賓們大家早安。我是藝術與人文學院的院長。很抱歉為了作幾個重要的宣佈而短暫中斷各位的學習。首先也是最首要的，我要歡迎每一位新生，衷心感謝你選擇了這所學術機構來為你的生涯作準備。對於舊生，我要歡迎各位回到學校來，並祝你學業突飛猛進。其次，我想請大家注意我們大學校園全新落成的魯瑟福特圖書館，它座落在學生會大樓的西北方，緊臨著自然科學大樓。這間圖書館有大師級的設計，且將會收藏本校至今所收集的大量印刷品。館際流通將可讓學生們從其他的圖書館借閱書籍。最後但並非最不重要的，我要強調有少數的新設獎學金已被加進原本就很豐富的萊橋大學獎學金清單中供大家爭取。列出所有獎學金以及其具體申請標準的最新小冊子可以在設於全校園中最多人出入處的藍色箱子拿到。
vocabulary: 3. interruption n. 中止；阻礙；打擾
Ex. I am tired of his endless interruptions.
4. academic adj. 學術的/ n. 學者
5. institution n. 制度；機構；建立
Ex. The National Day was celebrated throughout the country.
Ex. The teacher distributed the handouts to the pupils.

questions.stem: Why does the Dean begin her announcement by apologizing?
translation: 為什麼院長以致歉開頭？
a. 因為將會很長。
b. 因為那是在上課時間。
c. 因為宣佈很罕見。
d. 因為她所說的事可能會困擾某些人。
options: (A) Because it will be pretty long.
(B) Because it is during class time.
(C) Because it is uncommon to make announcements.
(D) Because what she is saying might bother some people.

questions.stem: What new building has just opened on campus?
translation: 校園裏什麼新建築物剛剛落成？
a. 通閱部門。
b. 藝術與人文大樓。
c. 魯瑟福特圖書館。
d. 發送獎學金資訊的藍色箱子。
options: (D) Blue bins for distributing scholarship info.

questions.stem: Where are the blue bins located?
translation: 藍色箱子放置於何處？
a. 往來繁忙之處。
b. 新圖書館內。
c. 校園裏的每一處。
d. 獎學金辦公室。

cards.passage: Thank you for purchasing the Nortek PictureFix 11.2 photo editing software package and welcome to the user's guide. The first step to properly installing the software is to double click on the "Install PictureFix" icon located in the finder window of the provided disc. A window should pop up asking you to register the software. It is imperative that you do this before proceeding, to ensure that your purchase is associated with your name, and so that you can obtain a user's code, which is necessary for any assistance by phone or online in the case of troubleshooting. Once you click on 'Yes, I want to register', you will be directed to the Nortek website. There you will be asked to enter your product pin number, which is located on the box, and to create a 6-8-digit user password. Please follow all further directions given on the website. Once your registration is complete, your user code will be sent to the e-mail that you have provided. Returning to the original window, enter this code into the blank space and press 'register user code'. If the code is not recognized, please contact one of our live help agents in the customer support section of Nortek.com.
cards.passageTranslation: 感謝您購買諾得科技修圖大師11.2版照片編輯套裝軟體並歡迎來到使用說明。正確安裝本軟體的第一步是在位於打開隨附光碟的檔案視窗中的"安裝修圖大師"圖示上點二下。應會彈出一個視窗要您為軟體註冊。在你繼續安裝前這是必要的步驟，以確保您購買的軟體與您的名字聯結在一起，這樣您才能取得一個使用者代碼，它在任何以電話或線上協助作疑難解決時是必須用到的。一旦您點下'是的，我要註冊'，您會被導引到諾得科技網站。您會被要求輸入您的個人識別號碼，它位於盒子上，然後建立一個6到8位數的使用者密碼。請按照網站上所有的後續指示。一旦您註冊完成，您的使用者代碼會被寄到您所留的電子信箱。回到原來的視窗，在空格裏輸入這個代碼並按下'註冊使用者代碼'。如果該代碼不被承認，請與我們Nortek.com網站的客戶服務區裏的線上協助人員聯絡。
vocabulary: Ex. He spent all morning editing the book.
他整個上午都在編輯那本書。
5. imperative adj. 必要的；命令式的n. 必要的事；命令
Ex. It is imperative to act now. 現在必須有所行動。
7. associate v. 聯想；使結合/ n.夥伴；有關聯的事物/ adj. 夥伴的；有關聯的
Ex. He failed to obtain a scholarship. 他沒有獲得獎學金。
9. necessary adj. 必要的/ n. 必要品
12. section n. 部分；地區/ v. 把...分成段

questions.stem: Why do you need to register this software?
translation: 為什麼你必須註冊該軟體？
a. 因為不作是違法的。
b. 如此才能取得如果需要幫助時要用的代碼。
c. 如此該照片編輯軟體才能正確的執行。
d. 因為線上註冊是最簡便的方式。
options: (A) Because it is illegal not to.
(B) So that you can get a code for getting help if needed.
(C) So that the photo editing software performs correctly.
(D) Because online registration is the easiest way.

questions.stem: What information will you need handy when registering on the website?
translation: 當在網站上註冊時你會需要什麼有用的資訊？
a. 安裝程序時所提供的代碼。
b. 由電子郵件寄給你的代碼。
c. 你的密碼。
d. 盒子上的個人識別號碼。
options: (A) The code provided in the installation process.
(B) The code they sent to you by e-mail.
(D) The pin number from the box.

questions.stem: In which case is it indicated you should get live support?
translation: 在哪種情況顯示你應該要求線上協助？
a. 如果盒子上沒有個人識別號碼。
b. 如果你沒有收到電子郵件。
c. 如果他們提供的代碼不能用。
d. 如果你的密碼不被承認。
options: (A) If the box doesn't have a pin number.
(B) If you fail to receive an e-mail.
(C) If the code they provide doesn't work.
(D) If your password is not recognized.

cards.passage: Dear Sundisk employees. This is a notification regarding the new job opening for the position of Regional Supervisor. The suitable candidate must be prepared to handle a high-volume workload that will require extensive travel, strong focus and attention to detail, and a willingness to identify problematic obstacles and overcome them in any way possible. As regional manager, the qualified individual would be in charge of overseeing citywide distribution, and would report directly to the VP of Sales and Marketing. This is a salary position that comes with full benefits, including dental, medical, and 2 weeks of paid holidays per quarter. Applications should be made directly to the VP of Sales and Marketing, whose office is #301 in the east wing. A full CV, cover letter explaining your intended supervising strategy, and three professional references are expected. Additionally, any shortlisted candidates will be subjected to an intensive interview, in which they will be expected to give a minimum 30-minuted presentation highlighting their experience, skills, and ideas. Best of luck to all of those interested!
cards.passageTranslation:
親愛的山迪斯克的員工們。這則通告是有關於區域督導這個新職缺。合適的應試者必須有能應付大量工作負荷的準備，那會需要經常出差、對細節有優秀的專注力及注意力，並有找出有不確定障礙且盡一切可能將它克服的意願。做為區域經理人，符合資格的人將會負責監督整個城市的銷售額，並直接對業務行銷副總報告。這是一個有薪附帶包含牙齒、醫療以及每季兩週帶薪休假的完成福利的職位。有意者逕向業務行銷副總提出申請，他的辦公室在東側301室。需附上一份完整履歷表、說明你欲採取之管理策略的求職信，以及三封專業推薦函。另外，最後階段之應試者將受到緊湊的面試，當中應試者需做至少三十分鐘的簡報突顯自己的經歷、技能與理念。這些有意應試者祝你們好運！
Email 附件：
附件1：履歷
附件2：申請書
附件3：求職信
附件4：專業推薦信
所有的附件已被掃描病毒，且安全可開啟。
vocabulary: 2. regard v. 與...有關；把...看作；注重/ n.注重；關係
Ex. In regard to his suggestions, we shall discuss them fully.
關於他的建議，我們將充分地討論。
4. extensive adj. 廣泛的；大量的
Ex. The storm caused extensive damage. 風暴造成了巨大的損害。
7. intend v. 想要；打算；意指
Ex. What do you intend to do today? 你今天打算做什麼?
10. references n. 提及；參考；推薦人
11. intensive adj. 加強的；密集的
12. highlight v. 使顯著；照亮/ adj.最突出的部分

questions.stem: Who should candidates apply to?
translation: 應試者要向誰報名？
a. 人力資源辦公室。
b. 該部門主管。
c. 在301室的區域督導。
d. 將來會成為他們的經理的人。
options: (D) The person who would be their future manager.

questions.stem: Look at the graphic. Which attachment is not necessary in this person's application dossier?
translation: 請見圖表。那一項附件不是這位申請人應徵檔案中所必須包含的？
a. 附件1。
b. 附件2。
c. 附件3。
d. 附件4。

questions.stem: Which of the following might be considered a challenge of the position?
translation: 下列何者可能被認為是該職位的挑戰？
a. 牙科保險。
b. 完整福利。
c. 克服障礙。
d. 帶薪休假。

cards.passage: This is Janet Fielding reporting for the Channel 7 News. Hot off the press is the public announcement made only 15 minutes ago that Queen Elizabeth will be doing a tour of a handful of the commonwealth nations. She discussed her plans in detail to a select group of local and international journalists. Apparently, she has been planning this for some time now. She will begin her tour in Sydney, Australia, where she will make a public appearance at the Sydney Opera House. Next, she will call in to Auckland, New Zealand, before heading to the Western Hemisphere. Specific cities for the North American portion of her visit have yet to be confirmed, but rumors are flying that New York, Boston, Washington D.C., San Francisco, Toronto, Calgary, and Vancouver are all likely stopovers. All in all, her journey is expected to last 6 weeks, and she will have a team of bodyguards escorting her at all times. We are now going live to see what the people are saying on site, at the Buckingham Palace.
cards.passageTranslation:
我是第七新聞頻道的珍娜費爾汀。媒體頭條新聞是15分鐘前才剛公佈的伊麗莎白女王即將巡迴訪問數個聯邦國家。她與一群經過挑選的本土與國際記者詳述她的計畫。顯然的，她已如此計畫有段時日。她的巡迴由澳洲的雪梨開始，在雪梨歌劇院她會有一場公開露面。接下來，在前往西新罕布夏前她會停留紐西蘭的奧克蘭。她明確會訪問的北美城市尚待確認，但傳聞甚霄雲上說可能中途停留的有紐約、波士頓、華盛頓特區、舊金山、多倫多、考格利，以及溫哥華。總的來說，她的行程預期會持續六週，隨時會有一個貼身護衛小組保護。我們現在連線到白金漢宮現場看看人們怎麼說。
皇后巡迴訪問的參訪點
1. 雪梨，澳洲(已確認) 2. 奧克蘭，紐西蘭 3. 華盛頓D.C. (尚未確認) 4. 舊金山 (尚未確認)
vocabulary: 3. apparently adv. 顯然地；表面上
4. appearance n. 外觀；出現；現象
6. portion n. 部分；(食物)一份/ v.把...分成多份
Ex. He was really hungry, so he ordered two portions of roast duck.
他真的很餓，於是叫了兩份烤鴨。
Ex. Stock market prices tumbled after rumors of a rise in interest rates.
謠傳利率上升之後，股票市場價格猛跌。
10. escort n.護衛(者)/ v.護衛；護送
Ex. I'm going to escort her home. 我打算護送她回家。

questions.stem: When did the Queen first publicize that she will do a tour of the commonwealth?
translation: 女王何時首次公開她將要巡迴拜訪數個國家？
a. 有好一段時間。
b. 15分鐘前。
c. 她現在正在宣佈。
d. 沒有提到。
options: (C) She is making the announcement right now.

questions.stem: Look at the graphic. What is the status of the second stop?
translation: 請見圖表。第二站的狀態為何？
a. 已確認。
b. 尚未確認。
c. 已取消。
d. 已暫停。

questions.stem: How long will the Queen be on the road?
translation: 女王要出訪多久？
a. 她很快就會離開。
b. 少於一個月。
c. 大約六週。
d. 至少一年。

cards.passage: I'd like you to all welcome Ben Yakota to our small merchandising team. Ben will be replacing Tiffany as the product specialist for the duration of her maternity leave, which should last approximately 1 year. You may have already met Ben last week while Tiffany was mentoring him and showing him the ropes around here. If not, please take a moment to introduce yourself to him at some point today since, as you are all aware, we work together closely as a team at Lantech Merchandising. Ben is no stranger to the industry, either. He carries with him over a decade of experience in product analysis, so he merely needs to familiarize himself with the ins and outs of our particular items. If you feel that you have any useful tips or information that you can impart on him regarding our line of digital products, please feel free to do so. And now, if you can all spare a few more seconds, Ben would like to give you all a brief self-introduction and let you know what is strong points are in this line of work.
cards.passageTranslation: 我想請大家歡迎橫田班加入我們的商品採購小組。班在蒂芬妮請育嬰假期間將會代替她擔任產品專用一職，為期大約一年。你們在上禮拜當緹芬妮帶他熟悉業務時應該已經認識了。如果還沒有，請今天找個時間向他自我介紹一下，因為如大家都已體認到的，在聯科採購團隊裏我們要的是一起緊密的團隊工作。班對這個產業也並不陌生。他有十年以上的產品分析經驗，因此他幾乎不需要使自己再去熟悉我們特有產品的裏外細節。如果你覺得自己有任何關於我們的數位產品線的有益訣竅或資訊可以告訴他，請不必客氣。現在，如果大家能夠再挪幾秒的時間，班想要給大家一個簡短的自我介紹並讓大家了解他在這個工作的強項。
vocabulary: Ex. Either you pull your weight or we replace you.
要麼你盡心盡力,否則我們就把你替換掉。
3. maternity leave 產假/ maternity n.母性/ a.產婦的
Ex. He had no news to impart. 他沒有什麼消息可透露。
8. spare v. 分出；免去；節約/ a.多餘的；節約的；n. 備用品
Ex. Can you spare me a few minutes? 你可否挪出幾分鐘時間嗎?
10. temporary adj. 臨時的/ n. 臨時工或事物

questions.stem: Which of the following is true about the Lantech merchandising team?
translation: 關於聯科採購團隊下列何者為真？
a. 員工們獨立作業。
b. 他們主要負責家用產品。
c. 成員有數位。
d. 他們不給育嬰假。
options: (B) They deal mainly with home appliances.

questions.stem: What will Ben do once this speaker finishes her announcement?
translation: 說話者宣佈結束後班會做什麼？
a. 開始他的訓練。
b. 結束被緹芬妮的指導。
c. 告訴大家更多關於自己的事。
d. 介紹他對公司的計劃。
options: (D) Introduce his plans for the company.

questions.stem: How would you describe Ben's new position?
translation: 班的新職位該如何形容？
a. 暫時的。
b. 臨時的。
c. 永久的。
d. 可取代的。

cards.passage: Gone are the days of driving to the corner video shop to browse through movies, only to find out that the one you were looking for is not available. Now, with Pay-Per-Watch, you can do this from the comfort of your home. Simply log on to our site, www.payperwatch.ca, and browse movie titles by genre, starring actors, producers, or top-watched. Users are even able to create lists of favorites, and then browse recommended movies based on what those with similar preferences are watching. Order movies with the simple click of a button, and the DVD will be in your mailbox within 4 hours, or your rental is free. When you are finished watching flicks, toss them back in your local mailbox in the pre-paid envelope that is provided, no postage necessary! Last but not least, we give a full guarantee that every film listed on our site shall be available at any time, 24 hours a day, with no exceptions. Please note; these regulations apply for any addresses within 5km of a Pay-Per-Watch outlet. Those outside of the range will be subject to a delivery fee. For more information, please visit our website today, and utilize the 'store-finder' function.
cards.passageTranslation:
只為了一部想看的而開車去街角錄影帶店租片子卻發現已租完了的年代已經過去了。現在，有了「隨看隨付」，你舒適的在家裏就可以做同樣的事。僅只要登入我們的網站www.payperwatch.ca，就能依類型、主角、製片商，或是最多人觀賞來瀏覽電影片名。使用者甚至能夠建立喜愛清單，然後可以瀏覽根據有相近觀賞偏好的人現在正在看什麼而推薦的電影。要訂DVD只要點一下按鈕，四小時內就會送到你信箱裏，否則免租金。當你看完了電影，把它放入回郵信封丟進你當地的郵筒，不需要付郵資！最後但非不重要的是，我們完全保證每一部列在我們網站上的片子一天24小時任何時候都租得到，沒有例外。請注意；這些規定適用於離「隨看隨付」五公里內的任何地址。超過這個範圍的地址將須付運費。欲知道更多訊息請今天就上我們的網站利用 '找尋門市'功能。
即付即看電影頻道為你推薦以下電影列表：
客戶找上門
全面啟動
失去
沉默是金
殺戮時刻
遊戲開始
vocabulary: 2. base n.基礎/ v. 以...為基地/ a.基本的
Ex. Our company's base is in Taipei, but we have branches all over the island.
我們公司的總部在臺北,但是全島都有分公司。
6. necessary adj. 必要的/ n. 必需品
7. range n. 排；幅度/ v. 排列；把...分類
Ex. The houses are all sold out within this price range.
在這個價位範圍之內的房子皆全數售完。
Ex. The prices for steel are subject to change.
鋼材價格隨時可能有變動。
10. function n. 功能；職責/ v.運行

questions.stem: Which of the following guarantees is not made?
translation: 下列何者並未保證？.
a. 所有列出的電影都租得到。
b. 電影會在四小時或更短時間內送到。
c. 任何時候都可以下訂單。
d. 一律免運費。
options: (A) All the movies listed will be available.
(B) The movie will arrive in 4 hours or less.
(C) You can place orders at any time.

questions.stem: How can you find out if your house is near a Pay-Per-Watch outlet?
translation: 如何才能夠得知自己的房子是否靠近「隨看隨付」門市？
a. 直接打電話。
b. 使用線上找尋門市服務。
c. 試訂片子，看看是否在四小時或更短時間那送到。
d. 僅須按一下按鈕。
options: (C) Try ordering, and see if it arrives in 4 hours or less.

questions.stem: Look at the graphic. How was this list compiled by Pay-Per-Watch?
translation: 請見圖表。即付即看電影頻道如何編輯出這張表單？
a. 分析使用者最喜愛的演員。
b. 根據哪一部電影是最多人觀賞的。
c. 根據使用者的所在位置。
d. 來自喜好相似的使用者。
options: (A) It analyzed the user's favorite actors.
(B) It is based on which movies are most watched.
(C) It is based on the user's location.
(D) It comes from users with similar preferences.

cards.passage: Attention everybody. As you all know, we are gathered here today to celebrate the birth of my daughter Cindy and her husband Ted's first child. The fact that I am now officially a grandmother definitely hasn't sunk in yet! I would like to extend my deepest congratulations, and wish them the best of luck on their new family. I would also like to take the opportunity to cordially invite each and every one of you to another celebration, which I hope none of you have forgotten about! Next Monday is the 50th birthday of yours truly. Two milestones in one year! I'll be celebrating in my favorite manner, with an afternoon picnic at Borden Park. We will meet in the same place we always do: at the barbecue section just next to the kiddie pools. As per usual, each family is expected to bring whatever foods and snacks they desire, to be shared with everyone. I hope to see you all there! Now that I got that out there, let's turn our attention back to the lovely young couple!
cards.passageTranslation: 各位注意。如你們全體所知道的，我們今天齊聚在一起慶祝我女兒莘蒂與她先生泰德的小孩的誕生。事實上我還沒清楚地會意到現在我正式當了祖母了！我要表達我最深的祝賀並祝福他們的新家庭好運。我也要利用這個機會誠摯的邀請你們每一位來參加另一個我希望你們還沒有人已經忘了的慶祝會！下禮拜一是你們真誠的朋友-我的50歲生日。一年內兩個重要事件！我將以我最喜歡的方式慶祝，在柏頓公園辦一場午後聚餐。我們在老地方見面：就在兒童游泳池旁的烤肉區。如往常的，希望每一個家庭帶任何自己想要的食物跟零食來和大家分享。我希望可以在那見到大家！我說完了，讓我們把注意力轉回到這對可愛的夫妻！
vocabulary: 1. gather v. 聚集；收集/ n. 聚集
Ex. Those who are going camping, please gather at the gate.
要去露營的人請在大門口集合。
3. officially adv. 官方地,正式地
Ex. He seized the occasion to invite her home for dinner.
他抓住機會邀請她回家裡吃飯。
9. manner n. 方式；態度；禮貌
10. desire v. 渴望/ n. 渴望(之人或事) ；情慾
Ex. I have no desire to discuss the question. 我不想討論這個問題。
11. take place v. 發生；舉行
12. baby shower n. 新生兒派對

questions.stem: Who is the speaker?
translation: 致詞者是何人？
a. 莘蒂的母親。
b. 莘蒂的祖母。
c. 泰德的母親。
d. 泰德的祖母。

questions.stem: What are the two 'milestones' that have happened this year?
translation: 今年裡發生的兩個重要事件是？
a. 她生了小嬰兒並且結婚了。
b. 她的女兒生了小嬰兒並且結婚了。
c. 她當了祖母而且這是她的50歲生日。
d. 這是她的50歲生日而且她的兒子的太太生了小嬰兒。
options: (A) She had a baby and she got married.
(B) Her daughter had a baby and got married.
(C) She became a grandmother and it's her 50th birthday.
(D) It's her 50th birthday and her son's wife had a baby.

questions.stem: What event is taking place at the moment?
translation: 當下正在舉行什麼活動？
a. 結婚送禮會。
b. 歡迎寶寶派對。
c. 新娘送禮會。
d. 生日派對。

cards.passage: Following a series of complaints, we have recently been shadowing some of your phone calls, and we have determined that we need to discuss your telemarketing approach. Some customers have complained that you seem to move away from the questions posed by the survey, and stray into the realm of personal conversation. While we do encourage some small talk when initiating the phone call, our training was pretty clear in indicating that once the receiver of the call has agreed to participate in the survey, the dialogue should be strictly down to business. When we listened in on a bunch of your calls, which, as you are aware of, is periodically done for all of our telemarketers, we took note that you enquired about the participant's marital status and age - both topics that were not included anywhere on the survey. While some of the participants reacted positively to the questions you posed, others were indeed offended, and went out of their way to phone in and file a complaint. In the future, we would insist that beyond the light small talk when attempting to convince people to take the survey, you do not bridge the personal boundary in your discussion.
cards.passageTranslation: 在接到一連串的抱怨後，我們最近開始追蹤你撥打的電話，我們認為有必要討論一下你的電話行市調方式。有顧客抱怨你似乎偏離問卷設所提的問題而離題到私領域的對話。雖然我們的確鼓勵在電話一開頭時可稍作閒聊，但我們的訓練很明確的指示一旦受話者同意參與問卷調查時，對話就必須言歸正傳。在我們聽過一些你的電話後，如你所了解的這是定期性會對我們所有的電訪員進行的，我們注意到你詢問了受訪者的婚姻狀況與年齡，這兩個話題完全不在問卷上。雖然一些受訪者正面的回應了你所提的問題，但其他人則確實覺得被冒犯了而直接來電投訴。以後，我們仍會堅持在嘗試說服人做問卷調查時的輕度閒談之外，你不得在談話中連結到私領域。
vocabulary: 1. shadow n. 陰暗處；影子；徵兆/ v. 盯梢；遮蔽；預示
Ex. The study has determined that this factory is producing too many toxic gases.
研究發現這間工廠製造過多的有毒氣體。
3. survey v. 俯視；考察/ n.調查；檢視
Ex. My parents always encouraged me to speak English.
我的父母總是鼓勵我講英語。
8. participant n. 參與者；參與的
Ex. He has convinced me of his innocence. 他使我相信他是無辜的。

questions.stem: How is the speaker going to deal with the complaints?
translation: 說話者將要如何處理這些抱怨？
a. 他會開除這名員工。
b. 該名電話市調員必須向提出抱怨的人道歉。
c. 這次只是警告該名員工。
d. 該員工須再次完成訓練。
options: (A) He will lay the worker off.
(B) The telemarketer must apologize to the people who complained.
(C) This time he is just warning the staff member.
(D) The employee must go through training again.

questions.stem: What did the telemarketer ask about that was inappropriate?
translation: 該電話市調員問了什麼不恰當的問題？
a. 對方的年齡以及是否已婚。
b. 喜歡做什麼消遣。
c. 關於問卷調查的個人看法。
d. 對方的年薪。
options: (A) How old they were, and if they were married.
(B) What they like to do for pleasure.
(C) What they personally think about the survey.

questions.stem: How should the telemarketer begin every phone call?
translation: 電話市調員的每通電話應如何起頭？
a. 僅限於問卷的問題。
b. 不拘形式的閒聊。
c. 詢問對方年齡。
d. 向對方解說該問卷。
options: (D) By telling them about the survey.

cards.passage: If reelected as Mayor of Summersville, then I promise to act according to the wishes of the majority of the population. Based on the input that you, the citizens that I represent, have expressed to me tonight, I can clearly see that there are some serious changes that need to be made in your neighborhood. Crime levels are unacceptably high, and acts of public vandalism continue to be out of control. In my previous term, which is soon coming to an end, I have lived up to my promise of improving local educational standards. According to the most recent statewide examinations, our junior and senior high students have indeed demonstrated a rise in test scores, and I believe that this is directly related to the additional funding that my administration team has contributed to the educational institutions of this state. It is my belief that with improved education, crime levels will go down as a direct result, but this just takes times. Please ignore the allegations of the other parties that I have reduced funding to the police department. Reelect me, and I guarantee that the temporary rise in crime recently will in fact go down.
cards.passageTranslation: 若再次當選夏日村的鎮長，那麼我保證會依照全部居民的多數意願做事。根據你們，我所代表的居民們，今晚所向我表達的意見，我可以清楚地了解到在你們的鄰里仍有一些重要的改變必須進行。犯罪率高得無法接受，而且毀損公物的行為持續失去控制。在我即將結束的上一任期中，我已實踐了我的改善在地教育標準的承諾。根據最近的全州性測驗，我們的國中跟高中生在測驗成績上的確已展現出提昇，我相信這與我的行政團隊對本州教育機構的額外經費之努力有直接相關。我的信念是教育改善的直接結果是犯罪率會下降，但這需要時間。請不要理會其他對手的聲稱說我刪減警察局的經費。讓我再次當選，我保證最近暫時性升高的犯罪率一定會下降。
vocabulary: 2. input n. 投入；輸入/ v.輸入
3. express v.表達；快遞/ n.快遞/ a. 高速的；明確的
Ex. It is better to express your anger rather than bottle it up.
生氣寧可發洩出來而不要悶在肚內。
5. vandalism n. 故意破壞公物的行為
6. previous adj. 先前的/ ad.在先
9. demonstrate v. 證明；示範；示威
Ex. We must not ignore the tide of popular opinion.
我們切不可忽視輿論的傾向。
Ex. Steps must be taken to reduce the problem to manageable proportions.
必須採取措施將問題縮小到可控制的範圍。

questions.stem: Who is the person that is speaking?
translation: 說話者為何人？
a. 政治人物。
b. 律師。
c. 商人。
d. 公司的領導者。

questions.stem: What community service did some people say that he has given less money to?
translation: 有些人說他給予何種公共服務較少的錢？
a. 醫院。
b. 學校。
c. 警察局。
d. 監獄。

questions.stem: What positive change does he claim that he made in the last term?
translation: 他聲稱在上個任期內作了那種良性的改變？
a. 學校測驗成績提升。
b. 街頭犯罪下降。
c. 公共毀損增加。
d. 人們更快樂。
options: (B) Crime on the streets is down.

cards.passage: The U of C Hospital's department of hospitality is currently seeking part time and full time employees. Positions include cooks, waiters, dishwashers, and cleaners in the cafeteria, as well as food deliverers for patients in the hospital's various wards. Experience in hospitality is an asset, but not required. Preference will be given to individuals with greater availability, especially those who are able to do the night shift. Full time positions operate according to a ten days on, 4 days off schedule, while part time positions may vary. Application forms are available from the hospital's main information counter on the first floor, the Student's Union Office in the Campus Central building, or online at www.UofCHospital.com/hospitality. Applications must be submitted in person, along with a resume, to the Office of Human Resources, room #212, at the U of C Hospital.
cards.passageTranslation: C城大學內設醫院的餐飲部目前正在徵求兼職與全職員工。職缺包括廚工、服務員、洗碗工、自助餐廳清潔工，以及醫院眾多病房的送餐員。有餐飲部工作經驗者佳，但非必要。配合度高者優先錄取，尤其能輪夜班者。全職職缺依做十天休四天之班表出勤，兼職者則可能有不同。應徵表索取地點為醫院一樓中央服務台、校園中央大樓的學生會辦公室，或上網址www.UofCHospital.com/hospitality下載。應徵表連同履歷表必須親自送交至C大醫院212室人力資源辦公室。
vocabulary: Ex. He has studied the cultures of various Western countries.
他研究了各西方國家的文化。
5. ward n.病房；區；保護；監禁/ v. 避開
Ex. His chief asset is his winning smile.
他的主要資本是那迷人的微笑。
7. preference n. 偏愛(事物或人) ；優先(權);
8. individual adj. 個別的；特有的/ n. 個體
9. shift n. 輪班；變動/ v. 轉移；變動
10. operate v. 運作；營運；動手術
11. submit v. 使服從；提交；忍受
Ex. They put up posters all around the town advertising the circus.
他們在鎮上四處張貼海報為馬戲團作宣傳。
1F: 自助餐廳、門診掛號區、服務台
2F: 急診病房、人力資源辦公室

questions.stem: Which of the following jobs is not being advertised?
translation: 下列哪一個工作沒有被刊登出來？
a. 護士。
b. 送餐員。
c. 廚工。
d. 服務員。

questions.stem: Look at the graphic. Which floor should applicants go to in order to drop off their resumes?
translation: 請看圖表。申請人應該去哪一層樓投履歷表？
a. 1樓
b. 2樓
c. 3樓
d. 4樓

questions.stem: For the full time position, what happens after you work 10 days in a row?
translation: 關於全職的職位，連續上班十天以後會怎麼樣？
a. 可休一天假。
b. 可休四天假。
c. 可得到獎金。
d. 拿到薪水。

cards.passage: Welcome to all domestic and international visitors at the Pocahontas Cable Car Station. Due to heavy crowds today, we are asking that you pay close attention to the following directions. As you approach the ticket booths on the lower floor, you will notice that there are three separate lineups. Parties with children under the age of 5, senior citizens, and handicapped or injured passengers should use the lineup on the far left. The lineup at the center is for officially registered tour groups with more than 8 members, tour guides included. All other passengers should wait in the lineup at the right. As a reminder, guests staying at the Pocahontas Cabin Resort are entitled to a 15% discount on all cable car tickets. Proof of your stay, such as a room key or hotel receipt, must be presented. Enjoy your ride today!
cards.passageTranslation: 歡迎來到波卡洪塔斯纜車站的所有國內外遊客。由於今日人潮眾多，我們要請您特別注意以下的指示。當您前往下層的售票亭時，您將會注意到那裏分別設有三條等待線。攜有五歲以下孩童、老人、身心障礙或行動不便遊客應利用最左側等待線。位於中間的等待線提供給經正式登記八人以上含導遊之旅行團。其他所有遊客應在右側等待線等候。提醒您，住宿波卡洪塔斯木屋渡假村之來賓享可享纜車票一律85折。您必須出示例如房間鑰匙或旅館收據作為您的住宿證明。請盡情享受今日的旅程！
vocabulary: 2. crowd n. 人群； 一堆/ v. 擠滿(+with)
3. approach v. 接近；著手處理/ n. 接近；方法
4. booth n. 攤(子)；小房間；電話亭
5. separate adj. 分隔；區分；分居
Ex. Men and women have to change in separate rooms.
男女在不同的房間換衣服。
7. handicapped adj. 障礙/ v. 妨礙
Ex. They are raising funds for handicapped children.
他們為殘疾兒童募集資金。
8. officially ad. 官方地；正式地
Ex. Prisoners are entitled to apply for parole.
10. present adj. 出席的；現在的/ n. 現在； 禮物/ v. 贈送
11. address n. 地址；演說/ v. 致詞；稱呼

questions.stem: Which topic is not addressed in the announcement?
translation: 哪一個主題沒有在廣播裏被提到？
a. 折扣。
b. 今天天氣。
c. 如何排隊。
d. 人群。

questions.stem: Where should a teenage couple get in line for the cable car?
translation: 青少年情侶應該在那一列排隊搭纜車？
a. 外面。
b. 最左邊。
c. 中間。
d. 右邊。

questions.stem: When is this announcement being made?
translation: 這則廣播是何時播的？
a. 夏天。
b. 週末。
c. 早上晚一點的時候。
d. 人潮較多的時候。

cards.passage: Before we enter the laboratory, there are a few safety precautions that must be taken. All visitors must wear rubber gloves. This is to prevent any foreign dirt or bacteria from being introduced into the lab, but also to protect visitors from hurting themselves by touching any dangerous liquids that may have been spilled on the surfaces of the laboratory. Safety goggles must also be worn, to protect the eyes from any splashing that may occur, as well as gases that could be harmful to the eyes. There are larger masks provided for those wearing glasses. Finally, we ask that all visitors turn off their mobile phones and lower the volume of their voices as they walk through the lab, so as not to bother or distract the scientists at work.
cards.passageTranslation: 在我們進到實驗室以前，有幾個安全預防措施必須作。所有訪客必須戴上橡膠手套。這是為了預防任何外來的污物或細菌被帶進實驗室，但也是為了避免訪客接觸到可能已經溢出到實驗室地上的任何危險液體而傷害自己。安全護目鏡也必須戴上以防護眼睛不會受到有可能發生的任何液體潑濺的傷害，氣體也同樣的可對眼睛造成傷害。有大型面罩提供給戴護目鏡的訪客使用。最後，我們要求所有訪客在參觀實驗室時關閉您的手機並且降低說話音量，這樣才不會讓工作中的科學家受到打擾或分心。
vocabulary: Ex. We have taken necessary precautions against fire.
我們已採取必要的防火措施。
3. rubber n. 橡膠/adj. 橡膠的/ v. 用橡膠製造
5. bacteria n. 細菌(複數) *bacterium n.細菌(複數)
6. liquid n. 液體/ adj. 液體的；清澈的；不固定的
7. spill v. 溢出；洩密/ n. 溢出；跌下
Ex. I spilled my coffee all over the floor.
我的咖啡灑的滿地都是。
8. goggle(s) n. (複)護目鏡/v. 轉動眼睛
10. distract v. 轉移；使分心；困擾
Ex. The noise distracted him from his reading.
喧鬧聲使他不能安心讀書。
11. chemical adj. 化學的/n. 化學製品

questions.stem: What type of experiments might be done in this laboratory?
translation: 這個實驗室可能是作什麼類型的實驗？
a. 化學的。
b. 數學的。
c. 社會性的。
d. 電氣的。

questions.stem: Which safety precaution is not required?
translation: 哪一種安全預防措施並未要求？
a. 護目鏡。
b. 橡膠手套。
c. 鞋套。
d. 降低說話音量。

questions.stem: What happens if a phone rings inside the lab?
translation: 如果在實驗室內電話響了會怎樣？
a. 科學家可能會受到打擾。.
b. 那個人就得離開。
c. 實驗可能會失敗。
d. 電話可能會不能用。
options: (B) The person would have to leave.

cards.passage: On behalf of Marvin Toys Incorporated, I would like to issue the following public apology. When the Desert Beast boy's action figure was released in the summer of 2011, there were complaints from various communities of Middle-Eastern origin. They argued that the voice of the talking monster doll was purposely rendered with an Arabic accent, and found this offensive. Marvin Toys had no intention to cause offense with the doll, nor did we mean to imply any sort of connection between the monster and people from that part of the world. As of yesterday, the toy has been taken off the shelves nationwide, and will be replaced by a similar action figure with a neutral English accent. We sincerely apologize for any harm caused, and hope that affected communities will forgive and forget.
cards.passageTranslation: 本人謹代表馬文玩具公司發布以下之公開道歉聲明。當沙漠野獸這款男孩人形玩偶於2011年夏天上市時，有來自於許多中東裔社群的抗議。他們認為這個會說話的怪物玩偶的聲音是刻意做成帶有阿拉伯口音，因而感覺受辱。馬文玩具公司沒有以該玩偶造成反感的意圖，亦無暗示怪物與世界上這個地區的人之間有任何的關聯性。因此昨天該玩具已全國性的下架，並且將會被更換為帶有中性英語口音的人偶。我們誠摯的為所造成的任何傷害而致歉，並期盼受影響的社群能原諒與淡忘。
vocabulary: 3. release v. 釋放；放鬆 ；發行
Ex. The prisoner was questioned before his release.
囚犯被釋放之前受到了審問。
4. render v. 描繪；使得；給予；放棄
5. accent n.口音；語調 ；重音/v. 強調；重讀
6. offensive adj. 冒犯的；進攻性的/ n. 進攻
Ex. Her silence implied consent. 她的沈默意味著同意。
10. exhaust v. 用完; 使精疲力盡；排出/ n. 排出
11. mock v. 嘲弄；模仿/ adj. 假的
Ex. He was accused of murder. 有人指控他謀殺。

questions.stem: How did some Middle-Eastern communities feel about the toy?
translation: 一些中東裔社群對於這個玩具感覺如何？
a. 受侮辱的。
b. 興奮的。
c. 精疲力盡的。
d. 不受打擾的。

questions.stem: What will be changed about the Desert Beast in the future?
translation: 未來沙漠野獸將會有什麼改變？
a. 它的語音腔調。
b. 中東的衣著。
c. 名字。
d. 性別。

questions.stem: What is the tone of the speaker's apology?
translation: 致歉者的說話口吻如何？
a. 誠懇的。
b. 嘲弄的。
c. 傷人的。
d. 指責的。

cards.passage: Allow me to show you some of the advanced features of this tablet. First, note that there are mini cameras on both the front and backsides, helping users to take photos of themselves as well as scenes in front of them. The camera on the screen side is also ideal for video conversations. Second, feel how light it is. This is one of the thinnest tablets on the market, weighing less than 800 grams. Last but not least, the case that is included can be bent upright to form a stand - perfect for using the tablet on a counter or other flat surfaces. Please feel free to take a few minutes to navigate the desktop. All the apps you see are pre-loaded on the tablet. If you have any questions whatsoever, my name is Mike. Give me a holler if you need me.
cards.passageTranslation: 請容我為您介紹這部平板電腦的一些先進的功能。首先，注意在前方與後方配備有迷你相機，可幫助使用者為他們自己自拍以及拍攝眼前的景象。位於螢幕側的相機也十分適合用來作視訊通話。其次，感覺一下它有多輕。這是市面上最薄的平板之一，重量少於800克。最後也很重要的是，附在裏頭的皮套可以往上被折成一個立架 - 非常適合用來在長桌或其他平面上使用平板電腦。請任意花上幾分鐘時間操作一下桌面。所有您所見到的應用軟體全都預載於平板中。如果您有任何問題，我的名字是麥可。有任何問題就喊我過來。
vocabulary: Ex. They allow their children to run wild.
他們任憑孩子到處亂跑。
2. advance v./n. 推進；提升；預付
3. tablet n. 小塊 ； 藥片； 平板電腦
4. upright adj. 正直的；直立的/ adv.垂直地/ n. 垂直/ v. 使豎立
6. surface n. 表面；外觀/ adj. 表面的/v. 出現；浮出水面
Ex. The pebble made a ripple on the surface of the lake.
小石子在湖面上激起一個漣漪。
7. navigate v. 駕駛； 航行
Ex. He navigated the ship to a safe port.
他將船駛進一個安全的港口。
9. built-in adj. 嵌入的； 固定的
11. perfect adj. 完美的/v. 使…完美

questions.stem: Where might the speaker be employed?
translation: 說話者可能受雇於何處？
a. 電器商店。
b. 傢具店。
c. 工業庫房。
d. 影帶出租店。

questions.stem: Which of the following is not included on this tablet?
translation: 以下何者未包括在內？
a. 免費軟體。
b. 皮套。
c. 兩部內建相機。
d. 長桌。

questions.stem: The salesman says that the screen side camera is perfect for which of the following activities?
translation: 銷售員說螢幕側的相機十分適合用在下列哪一個活動？
a. 自拍。
b. 視訊通話。
c. 在平面上打字。
d. 拍攝美麗的景色。

cards.passage: Hello. This is a message for Mr. And Mrs. Anderson. This is Ned Riopel, your landlord. We have received complaints about bedbugs from other tenants in the building this month. Whether you have them in your apartment or not, we will be doing a spray of the entire building this Sunday from 1-3 in the afternoon. No one is allowed to be in the building at that time, and I would suggest that you take your dog, Shi-lo out with you at that time as well. It should be safe to return to your apartment two hours after the spraying is finished. The sprayers will be using pesticides that could be dangerous to plants, so they advise that you cover all plants and fish tanks, and don't leave any food out in the open on that day. If you have any questions about the spraying, don't hesitate to call me on my cell at 980-8873.
cards.passageTranslation:
你好！這是給安德森夫婦的留言。我是奈得o瑞歐佩，你們的房東。這個月我們從大樓其他房客那接到關於有臭蟲的抱怨。無論你們的公寓內有無該問題，這個星期日的下午從一點到三點我們將要對整棟大樓進行噴藥。屆時不得有任何人留在大樓內，並且我會建議你們把你們的狗西蘿也一起帶離開。噴藥結束的兩個小時後回到你們的公寓應該是安全的。噴灑的人會使用可能對植物有害的殺蟲劑，所以他們建議你可以將所有的盆栽和魚缸覆蓋住，而且當天不要將任何食物露天放置。若你有任何關於噴藥的疑問，請儘管撥我的手機980-8873找我。
警告！
今天實施噴藥，3月12日，星期日
下午1-3點
若要進入請您自擔風險
vocabulary: 3. tenant n. 房客/ v. 租賃
Ex. This house is tenanted by an immigrant from Asia.
這所房屋為一個來自亞洲的移民所租住。
4. spray n. 噴霧(液)/v. 噴灑
Ex. He sprayed water on the flowers in the morning.
5. entire adj. 全部的；連續的/ n. 全部；整體
8. advise v. 勸告；建議；通知
Ex. Her father advised her to keep her distance from that fellow.
她父親勸她和那傢伙保持距離。
9. tank n. 櫃；箱；坦克/ v. 把...貯放在櫃(或罐)內

questions.stem: What part of the building will be affected?
translation: 大樓的哪部分會有影響？
a. 地面樓層
b. 一樓
c. 三樓
d. 整棟大樓

questions.stem: Look at the graphic. Which of the following is true?
translation: 請見圖表。 以下選項何者正確？
a.人們在指定時間內不可進入大樓，但動物可以。
b. 只有老人和兒童不該在指定的時間內進入大樓內。
c. 人們在指定的時間內只能短暫進入建築物。
d.任何人或動物在指定時間內都不該待在大樓內。
options: (A) People cannot enter the building at the indicated time but animals can.
(B) Only elderly people and children should not enter the building at the indicated time.
(C) People can only enter the building briefly at the indicated time.
(D) No people or animals should be in the building at the indicated time.

questions.stem: Which is not mentioned as being affected by pesticides?
translation: 哪一個未被提到會受殺蟲劑影響？
a. 動物。
b. 植物。
c. 人。
d. 服飾。

cards.passage: I'd like to direct everybody's attention to page 4 of the handout. In the second paragraph, you'll notice some highlighted areas. These are the most recent modifications to the wording on the welcome page of our website. The changes will go live this afternoon at 4pm sharp. I want everybody to take a few minutes to review them carefully, and make sure that there are not any typos or false information. It has already been pointed out that the wording in the third highlighted sentence is a little awkward. We will be rewording the phrase "Empire Tech is the best technical institute in the land" to "Empire Tech is New Zealand's premier institute of information technology." Any other suggestions are welcome.
cards.passageTranslation: 我想請大家注意講義的第四頁。在第二段你會發現一些被標示出來的地方。這些是對我們網站上歡迎網頁措詞的最新修改。變動後的部份會在今天下午四點準時上線。我要每一個人花幾分鐘時間仔細的檢討，確保沒有任何的錯字或錯誤資訊。被標示出句子的第三個的用語被指為有一些不通順。我們將會把"帝國科技是國內最佳技術學院"的措辭改為"帝國科技是紐西蘭的第一大資訊科技學院"。歡迎提出任何其他的建議。
vocabulary: 3. highlight v. 強調；照亮/ n. 最明亮(突出)的部分
Ex. The plan requires some modifications.
5. typo n. 打字排印錯誤
6. awkward adj. 尷尬的；笨拙的；棘手的
7. empire n. 帝國；大企業；君權
Ex. When did the empire begin to wane?
那個帝國何時開始衰落的?
8. institute n. 協會；學校 ；原則
9. premier n. 首相/adj. 首要的；最早的
Ex. He was appointed as the new premier.

questions.stem: What is being modified?
translation: 什麼作了修改？
a. 公司政策。
b. 網站上的措詞。
c. 學院文宣上的說明。
d. 技術契約上的細部細節。
options: (B) The choice of words on a website.
(C) The description in an institute's brochure.
(D) The fine details of a technological contract.

questions.stem: What are those in attendance asked to check for?
translation: 這些出席者被要求要檢查什麼？
a. 拼字錯誤。
b. 不當設計。
c. 沒有押韻的字。
d. 更好的廣告詞。

questions.stem: What will happen once they are finished the work?
translation: 他們完成這個工作以後接著會如何？
a. 書會被出版。
b. 著作會被用電子郵件發出。
c. 文字會被刪除。
d. 網站會被更新。
options: (B) The writing will be sent by e-mail.

cards.passage: I want to take this opportunity to thank you all for unanimously electing me as the union representative for the Callingwood branch of ETS Transportation. I whole-heartedly accept the position and promise to do my best to represent the rights of every single one of the employees at Callingwood ETS, from the drivers and mechanics to the bus cleaners and janitors. I plan to continue from where your last representative, Carol Stein, left off for her maternity leave. Before she left, Carol allowed me to shadow her for several months, and I have learned the ins and outs of the position and developed important acquaintances within the union council. I promise to listen to all of your needs, and make them heard, where they need to be heard!
cards.passageTranslation: 我想藉這個機會感謝大家一致票選我擔任ETS運輸公司卡林伍德分公司的工會代表。我衷心的接受這個職務並承諾盡我最大努力來代表ETS卡林伍德從司機和技工到巴士清潔員與清潔工的每一位員工的權力。我計畫從你們的上一位代表卡蘿斯坦請產假時尚未完成的工作接手繼續。在她離職前，卡蘿讓我跟著她數個月，我已熟悉了這個職務的來龍去脈而且在工會理事會中結識了重要的熟人。我承諾會傾聽你們的需要並讓它在對的地方被對的人知道!
vocabulary: 2. unanimously adv. 無異議地；全體一致地
3. elect v. 選舉；選擇/ n. 選定的/ n. 被選定的人
Ex. It turned out that she was elected by a unanimous vote.
4. union n. 結合；工會 ；聯邦
6. promise n. 承諾；希望/ v. 承諾；答應
Ex. You must live up to your promise. 你必須實踐自己的諾言。
8. maternity leave 產假 *maternity n. 母性；產婦的
Ex. She has many acquaintances in the business community.
12. pass away 停止；去世；消磨(時間等)

questions.stem: Who is the speaker addressing?
translation: 演說者在對誰致詞？
a. 工會理事會。
b. 運輸部門的經理。
c. 公司的員工。
d. 一般大眾。
options: (B) The managers of a transportation department.
(C) The staff members of a company.

questions.stem: Who does the speaker plan to stand up for?
translation: 演說者計畫要替誰發聲？
a. 主要是司機。
b. 每位乘客。
c. 所有的員工。
d. 他的熟識者。

questions.stem: What happened to the last union representative?
translation: 上一位工會代表怎麼了？
a. 她過世了。
b. 她要生寶寶了。
c. 她在渡假。
d. 她被免除該職務了。
options: (D) She got fired from the position.

cards.passage: First and foremost we'd like to thank you for taking the time to hear our loan proposal this morning. We are sure you will agree that this idea is bound to be a great success. According to statistics published by the city of Perth, Australia, the number of Asian tourists visiting our city has increased by more than 200% in the last decade. Furthermore, increasing numbers of Asian migrants are choosing Perth over more international cities such as Sydney and Melbourne as their place of residence. So far, Perth lacks a shop selling pearl milk tea, a Taiwanese drink that is enormously popular across Asia. The drink is also becoming very popular among non-Asian consumers in Western countries. Therefore, we would like to apply for a $30,000 loan to open up Perth's first pearl milk teashop.
cards.passageTranslation: 首先我們要感謝您今天早上花時間聽取我們的貸款計劃。我們有把握您會認同這個計劃肯定會是個大成功。根據澳洲珀斯市所公佈的統計數據，造訪本市的亞裔觀光客在過去十年內成長超過百分之兩百。此外，持續增加的亞裔移民人口選擇珀斯市作為居住地而未選擇像是雪梨和墨爾本這樣較國際化的城市。截至目前為止，珀斯市並沒有賣珍珠奶茶的商店，它是一種紅遍亞洲的臺灣飲料。這個飲料在西方國家的非亞裔消費者中也變得非常受歡迎。因此，我們想申請貸款3萬元開設珀斯市的第一家珍珠奶茶店。
vocabulary: 1. proposal n. 提出；建議 ；求婚
Ex. He made no comments on our proposal.
他對我們的提案沒有作評論。
2. bound adj. 必然的；極可能的；被縛住的；裝訂好的
3. statistic a. 統計(上)的/n. 統計數值
6. pearl n. 珍珠；傑出典型/ v. 用珍珠裝飾
Ex. The government is going to lower the tariff on imported cars.
政府打算降低進口汽車的關稅。
10. community n. 社區；共同體 ；一致
Ex. Large numbers of birds migrate south every winter.
每年冬季大量的鳥類遷徙南方。

questions.stem: What is this person applying to do?
translation: 這個人要申請什麼？
a. 開茶店的執照。
b. 借款來創業。
c. 學做珍珠奶茶的配方。
d. 進口珍珠做珍珠奶茶。
options: (A) Get a license to open a teashop.
(B) Borrow money to start a business.
(C) Learn recipes for pearl milk tea.
(D) Import pearls for making pearl milk tea.

questions.stem: What would be new about this shop?
translation: 這家店有何創新之舉？
a. 西方人從未嘗試過珍珠奶茶。
b. 澳洲還沒有珍珠奶茶。
c. 會是這座城市中此類商店中第一家。
d. 在澳洲的亞裔社群從未嘗試過珍珠奶茶。
options: (A) Westerners have never tried pearl milk tea.
(B) Australia doesn't have pearl milk tea yet.
(C) It would be the first shop of its kind in that city.
(D) The Asian community in Australia has never tried pearl milk tea.

questions.stem: Look at the graphic. In which part of Australia is the speaker hoping to open a shop?
translation: 請看圖表 。發言者希望在澳洲哪一區開店？
a. 區域1
b. 區域2
c. 區域3
d. 區域4

cards.passage: Before we finalize your hot tub rental payment, I need to explain a few important details regarding our insurance policy. Insurance is non-optional on all rentals. A flat rate deposit of $100 covers all scratches, cracks, or other minor marks associated with normal usage. The policy does not cover any damage caused directly by misuse of the hot tub, including turning the jets on before the water level is high enough, exceeding the maximum capacity of 1200 pounds, or approximately 8 averaged-sized adults, or accidents caused under the influence of alcohol. When the hot tub is returned, 75% of the deposit will be returned to the customer, minus the cost of any non-covered damage. One of our employees will now have a close look at the tub with you to record its current condition.
cards.passageTranslation: 在我們算好你的按摩浴缸的租金以前，我必須解釋幾項關於我們的保險單的重要細節。全部的租賃都必須強制保險。固定收取押金100元擔保全部的刮痕、裂痕或其他正常使用所造成的微小痕跡。保單不承保任何非正常使用浴缸所造成的損壞，包括在水位夠高前便開啟噴射功能、超過1200磅的最大承重，相當於八名一般體型的成人、在受酒精影響下所造成的意外等。歸還浴缸時，會退還七成五的保證金給顧客，並扣除任何非擔保內損壞的費用。有一名我們的員工現在會和你一起仔細的檢查浴缸並紀錄下它的現況。
vocabulary: Ex. The professor does not approve of the government's foreign policy.
那位教授不贊成政府的外交政策。
3. optional adj. 非必須的；可選擇的
4. scratch v. 抓；刮；亂劃/ n. 抓痕；亂塗
5. minor adj. 不重要的；較少的；未成年的/n. 未成年人
6. misuse v./n. 誤用；濫用 ；虐待
Ex. It is wrong to misuse our natural resources.
濫用我們的自然資源是不對的。
7. hot tub n. 熱水澡盆
8. exceed v. 超過; 勝過
9. maximum adj. 最大(多)的；頂點的/n. 最大量；頂點
10. capacity n. 容量；能力；資格
11. influence n. 影響(人或事物) ；作用/ v. 影響
Ex. I don't want to influence you. You must decide for yourself.
我不想影響你。你必須自行決定。

questions.stem: What would happen if too many people went in the hot tub and it broke?
translation: 如果太多人進到浴缸而弄壞它時會怎樣？
a. 顧客會損失他們的保證金。
b. 顧客會必須買一個新按摩浴缸。
c. 公司會馬上修理。
d. 公司會取消該保單。
options: (A) The customer would lose their deposit.
(B) The customer would have to buy a new hot tub.
(C) The company would fix it immediately.
(D) The company would cancel the insurance policy.

questions.stem: How much money can you get back if the hot tub is undamaged?
translation: 如果按摩浴缸沒有損壞的話能夠拿回多少錢？
a. 拿不回來。

questions.stem: How do they know the hot tub wasn't damaged before you rented it?
translation: 他們如何知道按摩浴缸在出租給你前是完好的？
a. 他們信任你。
b. 在你離開前有一名員工會作檢查。
c. 一開始就替它照相。
d. 按摩浴缸全都是嶄新的。
options: (B) An employee checks it before you go.
(C) Photos are taken of it first.
(D) The hot tubs are all brand new.

cards.passage: Thank you for choosing the DIY Photostation to print your photos today. Please listen carefully to the following choices. Press 1 to upload your photos with a USB memory stick. Press 2 to upload them from the Internet. Press 3 to edit previously uploaded photos. Once your photos have been uploaded, please follow the directions on the screen to select photo size, glossy or matte, and border or borderless. Once your order is ready, press the 'Print Now' button and choose a method of payment. After your payment is processed, the photos will begin to print. Waiting time is approximately 15 seconds per photo.
cards.passageTranslation: 感謝您今天選用自助照片列印站來列印您的照片。請注意聆聽以下的選項。欲用USB隨身碟上傳您的照片請按1。欲從網際網路上傳照片請按2。欲編輯之前上傳好的照片請按3。一旦您的照片上傳完成後，請按照畫面上的指示選擇照片大小、亮面或霧面、有邊或無邊。您的指示完成後，按下'馬上列印' 鈕並選擇付款方式。在收到您的付款後，照片便會開始列印。等待時間約為每張照片15秒。
vocabulary: 1. following adj. 接著的；其次的；下面的/n. 追隨者；下列事物
Ex. Some of these points will be elaborated in the following chapter.
其中幾點將在下一章作詳細闡述。
4. direction n. 方向；指導；趨勢
5. glossy adj. 光滑的；浮誇的
Ex. She has glossy black hair.
她有著烏黑發亮的頭髮。
10. approximately adv. 大概; 近乎
請耐心等候，收取訂單請勿離開。

questions.stem: Which of the following is not mentioned?
translation: 下列何者沒被提到？
a. 如何付照片的錢。
b. 照片列印站的位置。
c. 列印的等待時間。
d. 如何列印照片。
options: (A) How to pay for your photos.
(B) The location of the photo station.

questions.stem: Which option is not available for loading your photos?
translation: 何者非載入照片的選項之一？
a. USB隨身碟。
b. 網路。
c. 使用先前已上傳的照片。
d. 在相片庫中找照片。
options: (D) Finding photos in a photo bank.

questions.stem: Look at the graphic. How long will this person need to wait for his or her photos to print?
translation: 請見圖表。照片完成列印需要等待多久的時間？
a. 一秒。
c. 一分鐘。
d. 10 分鐘。

cards.passage: Thank you for purchasing the G12 Bicycle GPS System. The G12 Bicycle GPS System comes with a 2-year manufacturer's warranty. The warranty covers all damage and malfunctions related to normal usage. However, the warranty does not cover any damage related to accidents or crashes of the bicycle, nor does it cover theft. In order to activate the warranty, the product must be registered. You can do this by calling our toll-free number, 1-888-GPS-BIKE. When you make the call, please have the serial number from the inside cover of your G12 Bicycle GPS System box, as well as the receipt and warranty form from your purchase. The warranty is only valid from the date of purchase.
cards.passageTranslation:
感謝您購買G12自行車衛星定位系統。本G12自行車衛星定位系統有兩年原廠保固。保固範圍為正常使用相關的一切損壞和故障。然而保固範圍不包括自行車意外或車禍有關的損壞，亦不包含失竊。為啟動保固，本產品須經註冊。您可以撥打我們的免付費專線 1-888-GPS-BIKE進行註冊。當您撥打時，請準備好你的產品盒子內的序號，以及您購買時的收據跟保證書。本保固僅自購買日起有效。
G12自行車GPS系統
型號＃399871
序號：AG33839981010
出廠年份：2016年
製造地點：韓國釜山
vocabulary: 2. warranty n. 保固；擔保；認可
3. malfunctions n. 故障/v. 發生故障
4. related to 與...有關；與...是親戚
Ex. I am related to her by marriage.
Ex. We started early in order to arrive before dark.
為了在天黑前到達，我們很早就動身了。
6. activate v. 使活起來；使活潑
7. register v. 登記; 顯示/n. 登記；收銀機
8. toll-free adj./adv. 不用付費的(地)
9. receipt n. 收據；接到/v. 出收據；承認收到

questions.stem: How can you activate the warranty on the G12 Bicycle GPS System?
translation: 你要如何啟動G12自行車衛星定位系統的保固？
a. 用電話。
b. 用電子郵件。
c. 本人親自辦理。
d. 用傳真。

questions.stem: Look at the graphic. Which piece of information will the caller need to have on his or her person when calling to register the product?
translation: 請見圖表。打電話去註冊商品時，致電者手中需要有以下何項資料？
d. 韓國釜山

questions.stem: Which of these problems would be covered by the warranty?
translation: 下列何者在保固範圍內？
a. 第一次使用它就故障。
b. 你發生意外造成它損壞。
c. 你的自行車失竊了。
d. 產品兩年半後壞了。
options: (A) The product malfunctions the first time you try it.
(B) You have an accident and it's broken.

cards.passage: Hello new employees and welcome to your first day of the training seminar. Over the course of the next three days, you are going to be introduced to HYP's entire line of products, sales strategies, monthly targets, and sales processes. This training session is informal and I don't want to do all the talking, so please don't hesitate to ask questions or make comments at any time. You will all be working together closely on the same sales team once the seminar is complete; therefore it is to your advantage to get to know one another quickly. Without further ado, let's get down to business. Please click on the 'Getting Started' tab on your screens and read the introduction to our company carefully.
cards.passageTranslation: 各位新進員工們，歡迎參加你們首日的訓練講習。在接下來三天的課程裏，會向各位介紹HYP的整個產品線、銷售策略、每月目標、銷售流程等。這個訓練講習是不拘形式的而且我不希望都是我在講話，所以請儘管隨時發問或提出意見。講習結束後你們全都會在同一個銷售團隊一起緊密合作；因此盡快互相認識對自己有利。言歸正傳，讓我們直接進入主題。請點一下你畫面上的'開始'頁標並仔細閱讀我們的公司介紹。
vocabulary: 2. target n. 目標/v. 把...作為目標
3. process n. 過程；程序/adj. 處理過的/v. 加工；處理
Ex. The car is in the process of being repaired. 那車正在修理中。
4. session n. 會議；(授課活動等的)時間
7. comment n. 意見；註釋/v. 註釋；評論
Ex. The child made a very intelligent comment.
那孩子作了很有見地的評論。

questions.stem: What is true about the listeners?
translation: 關於聽眾何者為真？
a. 他們全是業務經理。
b. 他們全都剛開始一份新工作。
c. 他們多數人正在做年度檢討。
d. 他們僅有部份的人將得到這份工作。
options: (B) They have all just started a new job.
(C) Most of them are doing an annual review.
(D) Only some of them will get the job.

questions.stem: How does the speaker plan to make the seminar more informal?
translation: 演講者計畫如何使這個講習更不拘形式？
a. 鼓勵提問題和意見。
b. 讓員工穿著休閒。
c. 不對他們考試。
d. 講很多笑話。
options: (B) By letting the staff members dress casually.
(C) By not giving them a test.

questions.stem: What to the staff members have in front of them?
translation: 這些員工面前有什麼東西？
a. 研討會冊子。
b. 裝了文件的檔案夾。
c. 電腦螢幕。
d. 在電視上播放的簡介影帶。

cards.passage: In breaking news, the provincial government has just announced that the PST, or Provincial Sales Tax on Prince Edward Island will be increased from 8% to 10% as of January first of next year. These changes will make our province's sales taxes the highest in the nation, along with the neighboring province of Nova Scotia. When added to the nationwide GST, or Goods and Services Tax, this means that citizens of Prince Edward Island will be paying a total of 15% tax on all purchases in the province. There are expected to be rallies against the increased tax proposal this Saturday in Charlottetown.
cards.passageTranslation: 新聞快報，地方政府剛剛宣佈愛德華王子島的地營稅，即地方性營業稅將會在明年一月一日由百分之八提高到百分之十。這些改變將使本省之營業稅與臨近的新斯科舍省一起成為全國最高。若加上全國性商服稅，即商品銷售與服務稅，這意味著愛德華王子島的居民在本省內的一切購物將會一共付上百分之十五的稅。本週六在夏洛特頓預期將會有集會抗議該增稅案。
vocabulary: 1. breaking news即時新聞；突發新聞
2. provincial adj. 省的；鄉氣的；樸素的/n.地方居民；粗野的人
5. along with 與...在一起；在...以外
Ex. She is so critical that nobody can get along with her.
她很愛挑剔，沒有人能和她相處得來。
7. rally v. 集合；團結；恢復；嘲弄/n. 集合；大會
8. proposal n. 建議；計劃；求婚
Ex. Hundreds of people took to the street to protest against police brutality.
數百名群眾上街抗議警察暴行。

questions.stem: When will the tax increase be taking place?
translation: 增稅何時會開始實施？
a. 本週六。
b. 三個月內。
c. 一月一日。
d. 已經實施了。

questions.stem: Why will there be rallies?
translation: 為何將有集會？
a. 有些人對增稅感到憤怒。
b. 該省的領袖將要演講。
c. 地營稅官員將負責收稅。
d. 人們從新斯科舍來到這抗議。
options: (A) Some people are angry about the rising taxes.
(B) The leader of the province is giving a speech.
(C) The PST officials will be collecting the taxes.
(D) People are arriving from Nova Scotia to protest.

questions.stem: How much is the GST, or Goods and Services Tax, that people pay across the country?
translation: 全國的人都要付多少的商服稅，即商品銷售與服務稅？

cards.passage: Hi, this is Tracy Astle calling for Nelson Fernandez, manager of The Paint Spot. I'd like to file a complaint about the paint job that was done in my studio apartment yesterday, March 27th. I wasn't home at the time of the painting, as I had informed you would be the case, but I did provide a very detailed diagram of which walls were to be painted in which colors. The painters basically got it all wrong. According to the diagram, the ceiling was supposed to be painted off-white, but the painters did it in gray. The main walls, which were supposed to be gray, were in fact done in baby blue. Please call me back as soon as possible to arrange a time for repainting.
cards.passageTranslation: 你好，我是崔西o艾斯托要找漆斑公司的經理，尼爾森o費南德滋。我想要申訴有關昨天三月27日在我的套房公寓所作的油漆工程。油漆時我並不在家，就如同我已經告訴過你的狀況一樣，但是我有提供一份畫有哪面牆要漆哪種顏色的極詳盡圖面。油漆工人基本上全都弄錯了。依照那張圖，天花板應該被漆成灰白色，但是工人漆成了灰色。中間的牆壁本來該是灰色，事實上卻漆成了淡藍色。請儘速回電給我安排時間重新漆過。
vocabulary: Ex. Only a few of my friends were informed about it.
這件事只有我的幾個朋友知道。
3. detailed a. 詳細的；精細的
Ex. John gave us a detailed account of his plan.
約翰詳盡的說明他的計畫。
4. diagram n. 圖表/v 圖示
6. be supposed to 應該；可以
Ex. You're not supposed to smoke in here.
7. off-white n. 略帶灰(或黃)色的白色/adj. 黃白色的; 灰白色的

questions.stem: Where might this message have been left?
translation: 這則訊息可能在何處留的？
a. 語音信箱。
b. 電視上。
c. 當面。
d. 線上聊天。

questions.stem: What is the main complaint about the painters?
translation: 有關油漆工人的的主要申訴為何？
a. 他們漆錯牆。
b. 他們留下一堆爛攤子。
c. 他們把錯的漆弄掉。
d. 他們用錯顏色。
options: (C) They took the wrong paint off.

questions.stem: What had Tracy Astle given to The Paint Spot beforehand?
translation: 崔西o艾斯托事先給了漆斑公司什麼東西？
a. 單人套房的圖面。
b. 灰白色跟灰色的漆。
c. 一個敘述該工程的pdf檔。
d. 憤怒的申訴。
options: (C) A pdf file describing the job.

cards.passage: Do you suffer from aching muscles? Six out of ten office workers report a stiff neck and shoulders or other back problems. Sitting in one position throughout the day can be very tough on the body. Fortunately, Earth Therapeutics has the product you have been waiting for. Our Anti-Stress Massage Lotion contains a new formula that has been optimized for relieving muscle cramping. A natural blend of chamomile and lavender provides a relaxing aroma to help soothe the mind. Anti-Stress Massage Lotion can be self applied to anywhere on the body that is sore. Frequent massage breaks are recommended for promoting health and well-being.
cards.passageTranslation: 您在為肌肉酸痛所苦嗎？十分之六的辦公室上班族有脖子與肩膀僵硬或其他背部毛病。以一種姿勢坐上一整天對身體是非常嚴苛的負擔。幸好，大地療癒學公司有您一直在等待的產品。我們的抗壓按摩乳液含有強化舒緩肌肉痙攣的新配方。甘菊與薰衣草的天然混合物散發一股緩和的芳香幫助平靜心靈。抗壓按摩乳液可自行塗抹在身體任何酸痛部位。建議您經常按摩休息以促進身心健康。
vocabulary: Ex. I often suffer from unaccountable headaches.
3. stiff adj. 硬的；不自然的;
5. therapeutics n. 療法(單複數同型)
6. formula n. 公式；慣例；配方
Ex. The formula of the medicine is still a secret.
7. optimize v. 持樂觀態度；使完美
8. cramp n. 抽筋；鐵夾鉗；約束/v. 用夾鉗夾緊；限制/adj. 受限制的
Ex. Massaging your leg will ease the cramp.
9. lavender n. 薰衣草；淡紫色/adj. 淡紫色的
Ex. A hot cloth pressed against your jaw will usually soothe a toothache.
把熱毛巾放在下巴上通常能緩解牙痛。

questions.stem: What is said about 60% of office workers?
translation: 關於百分之六十的辦公室上班族說了些什麼？
a. 他們使用這個產品。
b. 患有肌肉酸痛。
c. 為頭痛所苦。
d. 他們工作壓力大。

questions.stem: Which adjective would best describe this product?
translation: 用哪個形容詞描述這個產品最貼切？
a. 平靜的
b. 分心的
c. 煩躁的
d. 不幸的

questions.stem: Where might Anti-Stress Massage Lotion be available for purchase?
translation: 哪裡可能買得到抗壓按摩乳液？
a. 醫院的自助餐廳。
b. 藥房。
c. 電器行。
d. 辦公室。

cards.passage: In the latest news, Taiwanese passport-holders have been placed on the special list of nationals who don't require visas to enter the United States of America for tourism or business. Tourists and business travelers from Taiwan can now enter the US for a period of up to 90 days without a visa. Citizens of Taiwan only need to fill out the I-94W form online and pay a registration fee of 14 US dollars at least three days before their arrival date in the US. In the case of multiple visits to the US, the form is valid for up to two years. Visitors to the US still need a passport that is valid for at least six months, and return flights out of the US.
cards.passageTranslation: 最新消息，臺灣護照持有人已被列在特定國家公民名單上而可免簽證入境美國從事觀光或商務。來自臺灣的觀光客和商務旅行人士現在可免簽證入境美國最多達90天。臺灣公民只需要在其抵達美國之日以前至少三天於網路上填妥I-94W表並支付14美金的註冊費。需多次前往美國者，該表之有效期間最多兩年。觀光客前往美國仍須有效期間至少為六個月之護照以及離開美國之回程機票。
vocabulary: Ex. By the end of this year, the world population will go up to seven billion. 今年底前，全球人口總數會高達70億之多。
Ex. We play golf at least twice a week.
我們一星期至少打兩次高爾夫球。
6. multiple adj. 複合的；多樣的
7. valid n. 有效的；合法的
Ex. The ticket is valid for one month.

questions.stem: What major change is mentioned?
translation: 文中提到的重大改變是什麼？
a. 美國人現在可以到臺灣旅行。
b. 美國人需要簽證才能造訪臺灣。
c. 美國簽證現在貴了美金14元。
d. 臺灣人去美國不需要簽證。
options: (A) Americans can now travel to Taiwan.
(B) People from the US need visas to visit Taiwan.
(C) Visas to the US are 14$ more expensive now.
(D) Taiwanese don't need a visa for the US.

questions.stem: What do travelers need to do three days before they arrive?
translation: 旅客在抵達以前的三天需要做什麼？
a. 填妥I-94W表。
b. 準備一本有效護照。
c. 出示回程機票。
d. 預定旅館。

questions.stem: How long can visitors come for?
translation: 觀光客最長可停留多久？
a. 最多90日。
b. 只有三天。
d. 並未說明。

cards.passage: Dear shoppers. Please pay attention to the following announcement. The customer cars with the following license plates have been found parked in the mall employee parking area: VHY 822, FGG 119, and AWM 666. The employee car lot is currently at its capacity, and these cars need to be moved immediately to provide space for workers to park. If you are the owner of one of these vehicles, please return to your car within five minutes or it will be towed. If you cannot make it within five minutes, please inform one of our information desk workers at the kiosk outside of the food court on the first floor. Thank you.
cards.passageTranslation: 親愛的購物來賓。請您注意以下的廣播。以下車牌號碼： VHY 822、 FGG 119,以及AWM666的來賓汽車被發現停放在購物中心員工停車區。目前員工停車場已滿，因此上述汽車必須立即移走以便工作人員停車。若您是上述車牌號碼之車主，請於五分鐘內回到您的汽車否則它將會被拖吊。如果您無法於五分鐘內趕到，請通知我們在一樓美食廣場外服務台的任何一位工作人員。
vocabulary: 1. license plate n. 汽車牌照
2. capacity n. 容量；生產力； 能力；地位
Ex. He has a great capacity for learning languages.
Ex. They got off immediately after lunch.
他們吃過午飯馬上就動身了。
4. vehicle n. 運載工具；手段

questions.stem: What is the main point of this announcement?
translation: 這則廣播的重點為何？
a. 為了讓某些車輛被拖吊。
b. 為了讓工作人員知道現在有空位了。
c. 為了通知購物顧客停車場的所在地。
d. 為了請某些車主把他們的車子移走。
options: (B) To let the workers know the spaces are free now.
(C) To inform shoppers of the location of the parking lot.
(D) To tell the owners of some vehicles to move their cars.

questions.stem: What should they do if they can't make it in five minutes?
translation: 如果他們無法在五分鐘內趕到他們該怎麼辦？
a. 他們必須繳罰單。
b. 他們必須付錢給拖吊車司機。
c. 他們應該通知服務台的工作人員。
d. 他們不可以再回到購物中心來。
options: (B) They should pay money to the tow truck driver.
(C) They should inform the workers at the info kiosk.
(D) They should not return to the mall again.

questions.stem: Which of the following is true about the employee parking lot?
translation: 下列有關於員工停車場何者為真？
a. 它位於美食廣場外。
b. 它目前是停滿的。
c. 它通常停不滿。
d. 它有無限量的停車位。
options: (A) It's located outside of the food court.

cards.passage: Good afternoon art enthusiasts and visitors to the Taipei Gallery of Modern Art. A black leather briefcase has been found on the third floor, at the entrance to the contemporary art exhibit. The briefcase has the initials H.M. sewn on the top near the handle. We would ask that the owner come to the lost and found desk located on the main floor behind the escalators to the basement. When the owner comes to claim the briefcase, he or she will be asked to identify the contents. If nobody claims the briefcase within an hour, we will open it to look for any personal identification that can help us to determine who the owner is.
cards.passageTranslation: 台北當代藝術館的藝術愛好者和來賓午安。在三樓當代藝術展廳的入口處有拾獲一只黑色的皮革公事包。公事包上靠近提把處縫有字母H.M.的縮寫。請失主到一樓通往地下室電扶梯後方的遺失物招領櫃台認領。失主前來認領時會被要求指認出內容物。若一小時內無人認領公事包，我們會將它打開以尋找任何可供判斷失主的個人身份證件。
vocabulary: 2. contemporary adj. 當代的/n. 同時代的人或物
Ex. This play is the image of contemporary urban life.
這個劇本是當代城市生活的生動寫照。
4. exhibit v. 展示；顯出/n. 展示品
5. initial adj. 最初的/n. 起首字母/v. 草簽
Ex. His initial reaction was one of shock.
7. identify v. 識別；確認；發現
8. identification n. 識別；身分證明；認同
9. determine v. 決定；確定；判決
