cards.passage:
Notice to Security Staff:
New Regulations for Receiving Deliveries
Due to the recent theft issues, and a need for increased security in our facility, the following modifications will be made to our delivery receiving procedures, ___(13)___ immediately:
1. The outer door to the delivery-receiving hallway is to remain locked at all times.
2. Deliverymen must use the buzzer and face the camera before being buzzed in, even if the door is opened by ___(14)___ person leaving or entering the building before them.
3. Upon being buzzed in, all deliverymen must show valid ID and sign in to the visitor's log, even if they have made deliveries in the past.
4. A security officer must then personally escort the deliveryman/men to the delivery receiving area.
5. For deliveries that require going in and out of the building several times, one security officer must guard the door at all times. ___(15)___ If two security guards are not available at the time of delivery, the deliveryman must wait.
No exceptions to these regulations will be ___(16)___.
cards.passageTranslation:
守衛人員通告:
新收貨規定
因為近來之竊盜問題以及增加我們設施的保安需要，我們的收貨程序將作下列修正，立即生效。
1. 通往收貨通道的外側門隨時保持上鎖。
2. 送貨員進入前必須按電鈴並面對鏡頭，即使門已經被之前其他進出大樓的人所開啟。
3. 在進入後，所有送貨員必須立即出示有效身分證件並於訪客紀錄簿簽到，即使是過去曾來送貨過。
4. 一名守衛幹部必須陪同該送貨人員至收貨區。
5. 對於需要多次進出大樓的貨物，當另一人在陪同送貨員進出時，一名守衛幹部必須一直看守著門。另外送貨員進入和離開時須有人陪同。如果送貨時兩個守衛沒有空，送貨員必須等待。
上述規定不得有任何例外。
vocabulary: 1. modification n. 修正；修改；型式改變；變體

Summary of Research Findings: Caffeine Study
Research conducted by: Dr. Ryan Raslow and Dr. Abda Zalmanowitz
Period of Study: Jan. 1, 2007 to Jan. 1, 2008
Study Subjects: 60 subjects, ranging in age from 60-75
Study Method: 60 subjects between the ages of 60-75 years were monitored for the ___(5)___ of 1 year to determine the effects of coffee consumption. Subjects were divided into 3 categories:
20 who never drank coffee of other caffeinated beverages for ___(6)___ of their lives
20 who drank moderate amounts of coffee or other caffeinated beverages (defined as 1-2 cups per day)
20 who drank large amounts of coffee or other caffeinated beverages (defined as 3 or more cups per day).
Conclusions of Study: Subjects who drank moderate or large amounts of coffee displayed a decreased frequency of diseases such diabetes. ___(7)___
On the negative side, coffee drinkers displayed a greater frequency of osteoporosis and other bone diseases, stained teeth, and patients in category 3 in particular ___(8)___ of insomnia and sleeping problems.
cards.passageTranslation:
研究發現摘要：咖啡因研究
研究實施人：Ryan Raslow博士與Abda Zalmanowitz博士
研究期間：2007年1月1日至 2008年1月1日
研究對象：60位實驗對象，年齡範圍從60到75歲
研究方法：60位年齡介於60到75歲間實驗對象被持續監測一年以確定飲用咖啡的影響。實驗對象被分為三類型：
20人生命中大多數時間未曾飲用過咖啡或其他含咖啡因飲料
20人適度的飲用過咖啡或其他含咖啡因飲料(定義為每日1到2杯)
20人大量的飲用過咖啡或其他含咖啡因飲料 (定義為每日3杯或更多).
研究結論：實驗對象適度或大量飲用咖啡顯示如糖尿病一類的疾病發生率降低。再者，有喝咖啡的對象顯現短期記憶力的加強，尤其是第二類型的人。
負面部份，喝咖啡者顯現出較高的骨質疏鬆和其他骨骼疾病、牙漬發生率，而且特別是第三類型裏的患者抱怨有失眠等睡眠上的問題。

Sounder and BTS Announce Merger Discussions
Online audio distribution giants, Sounder and Banded, announced yesterday that they have entered ___(1)___ discussions, which if successful, could merge two of the largest online music distributers in the world.
Sources have reported that the transaction could ___(2)___ an estimated $20 billion dollars, based on the approximate values of each company. Some speculate the recent discussions have been sparked by a recent trend in the world of online music distribution where competition is fierce.
It is yet to be announced when the discussions will come to a close, ___(3)___ more importantly, what adjustments the two companies will be discussing. What many people will be interested to see, in the event of a merger, is how the company structures will change, particularly at the highest levels of each respective organization.
In regards to company shares, Eric Gustafsson, CEO of Sounder said, "It is our true belief that the merger of these two highly successful companies will create something the world of music has needed for a long time. ___(4)___ In this way, listeners all over the world can get everything they need in one place, and musicians can be heard without having to deal with major record labels or other middlemen."
cards.passageTranslation:
Sounder 與BTS 宣佈合併商討案
網路音樂發行巨擘Sounder與Banded公司昨天宣佈他們已經進入討論，如果順利的話，世界上最大的兩家網路音樂發行公司將可能會合併。內部來源指出，以兩間公司的略估價值分別計算的話，這筆交易估計可能高達兩百億美金。有人推測近期的商談是受到最近網路音樂發行界的激烈競爭所導致。
這起對談何時會有結論還有待商榷，或更重要的是，這兩家公司會討論的調整方案為何，不過許多人會有興趣知道的是在這起合併案中，公司的架構會如何變更，尤其在這兩個機構的最高層。關於公司市佔率部分，Sounder公司執行長Eric Gustafsson說：「我們確信這兩家極為成功的公司合併案將會產生音樂界長久所需。我們希望提供一個更為寬廣、一應俱全的平台讓世界各地的音樂人不用跟大唱片公司打交道就都可以被聽見。」

MEMORANDUM
FROM: Head of Security
TO: Board of Directors
SUBJECT: Pass Code Security
Over the past couple of weeks, it has come to my attention that several security breaches ___(5)___ involving lost or stolen security passwords. It is imperative that employees keep their nametags with their security digital pass codes on them at all times to prevent having to manually enter in their pass codes in locations, such as highly trafficked entrances where bystanders can easily access their information if they are not keeping a watchful eye on the situation.
It is my understanding that each employee has been given a nametag with the ___(6)___ purpose of phasing out the old manual entry system.
Therefore, in the best interest ___(7)___ the company, it is my opinion that employees who forget their nametags must be reprimanded or fined to limit the amount of man-hours my people over here in security are being forced to put in as a result of their negligence.
We should focus on more pertinent issues involving cyber security, and each extra hour my employees have to spend on the clock is costing you money. ___(8)___
Thanks for assisting me on this issue and good day.
cards.passageTranslation:
備忘錄
寄件者：安全主任
收件者：董事會
主旨：通行密碼安全性
過去幾週，我注意到發生了數起涉及安全密碼遺失或失竊的安全漏洞。員工必須隨時將他們的識別證連同他們的安全數位密碼帶在身上，以避免在人來人往的入口處得以人工方式輸入密碼，像是，在那裡他們如果沒有提高警覺的話旁人可以輕易的得到他們的資訊。
據我了解，每一位員工一張識別證的明確目的就是要汰除舊有的人工輸入系統。因此，為了公司的最佳利益著想，我的看法是訓斥或罰款忘記帶識別證的員工，以降低安全室人員因為他們的疏失而被迫增加工作量。我們應該關注更多涉及網絡安全的相關問題，且我的員工的每個加班時間都要花費你的錢。 換言之，處理這類情形正在耗盡我們的時間。
謝謝您對這件事的協助，並祝你有個美好的一天。

cards.passage:
THE PROFIT WEEKLY TRIBUNE
September 10-17, 2010
Author: Jenny Chen
How to enter into the fast-paced world of the sharing economy
With an influx of social media apps that make communication easier than ever, and an ___(9)___ common opinion that owning property, such as houses and cars, is becoming more burdensome, it is no wonder that more and more people are getting involved in what has come to be known as the "sharing economy".
How to get started? Well, that honestly may have to begin with the way you look at the traditional world of transactions. ___(10)___, let's take look at a hotel chain, such as Vacation Inn.
It is a commonly known brand name that people trust, and their positive reputation has been built after years of friendly service. In the sharing economy, you are not going to be dealing with a company, but rather another person, whose reputation may or may not be well documented. ___(11)___ However, this element of surprise doesn't come without some drawbacks.
My advice is that if you have property that you ___(12)___ to rent out, first make sure that you are insured and that you have done some research into the people that you are doing business with. It may seem obvious, but in the fast paced world we live in today, not everything or everyone is as appealing as they may seem on the screens of our smart phones.
cards.passageTranslation:
利訊每週論壇
2010年9月10-17日
作者：Jenny Chen
如何進入這個步調快速的經濟共享世界
隨著社交媒體軟體的湧入，使得溝通變得無以倫比的便利，而且持續增加的大眾認為擁有房子和汽車這樣的資產逐漸成為一種累贅，難怪有越來越多的人涉入被稱作「經濟共享」的活動之中。
要如何開始呢？老實說，那可能得從你看待傳統交易世界的方式開始。譬如，我們拿連鎖旅館Vacation Inn.來舉例。這是一個受大眾信賴的知名品牌，多年的親切服務後，他們已經建立起正面的聲譽。在共享經濟中，你將不需和公司打交道，而是跟另一個人，這個人的聲譽可能有或可能沒有完整的紀錄。正是這樣的差異性，這種更個人並人性化的局面是許多人所喜愛的，不過它也有缺點。
我的建議是，如果你有想要出租的資產，首先要確定你有保險並且已經對你要交易的對象做了一番深入調查。這或許顯而易見，不過步調快速的現代世界中，不是每件事或每個人看起來就像智慧手機的螢幕上所呈現出來的樣子。
vocabulary: ex. Before I became a real estate agent, I was involved in the import industry.

deal with 與…打交道、處理

我們來打電話給除蟲公司處理蟑螂問題吧。

1. Can I hire a tutor for just one week?
It is our company policy that tutors must be hired and paid for at least one month at a time. ___(13)___ For example, a tutor hired for a full year might charge a monthly rate of $400, versus $500 per month for the same tutor who has only been hired for six months. If you are unsatisfied with the tutor, we ___(16)___ that you contact one of our representatives rather than dealing with the tutor directly. Our representatives will take note of the complaint and speak to the tutor. They will also assist you in finding a new tutor, if that is what you wish to do.

cards.passageTranslation:
常見問答
1. 我可以只請一個星期的家教嗎？
我們公司的規定，僱用家教一次至少要一個月。家教僱用得越久，你每月學費就會越低。例如，僱用一整年的家教可能每月收取400元的費用，而只僱用相同家教六個月則可能每月收取500元。 這些數字僅是舉例並不反映實際價格，各種因素決定你需支付的費用。
2. 你們的家教能教多種科目，還是他們各有專攻的領域？
那要視家教而定。當你在瀏覽家教的簡介時(看這裡)，你會在網頁上看到他們所專精的領域。
3. 我的小孩和你們的家教在一起安全嗎？
我們所有的家教都經過嚴格的安全篩選、健康檢查，以及通過了由州政府的強制性認證程序以保證他們的資格是合法的。
4. 如果我不滿意這位家教該怎麼辦？
如果你不滿意這名家教，我們建議你與我們業務代表聯絡，而不要直接與家教討論。業務人員會記下申訴內容再跟這名家教溝通。如果你想要，他們還會協助你找另一名新家教。

cards.passage:
Interoffice Memo
Hey guys, the holiday season is almost here, and that means that scheduling around this time can get a little complicated. I just wanted to remind everyone that if you plan on taking extended leave over Thanksgiving or Christmas, I’ll need at least two weeks advance notice, but do know that your leave request will only be granted if you have someone cover your shifts. This goes for everyone at the restaurant, cooks and servers alike. Leave forms are located in my office next to the time cards on the bulletin board. You MUST fill in the days you intend to take off and the name of the person who will be taking your shift. Both parties must sign the leave form, or else it is invalid. As an incentive, those of you who would like to pick up a few hours over the holidays will be paid time and a half on the day before Thanksgiving and on Christmas Eve. The restaurant will be closed on Thanksgiving Day and Christmas Day, so enjoy the time with your families. If you have any questions, consider me at your disposal.
-Thomas Barnes
cards.passageTranslation:
內部通知
各位同仁大家好，轉眼間假期即將到來，這也意味著班表調度會變得較複雜。
在此我想提醒各位，如果你打算於感恩節或是聖誕節間請長假的話，請至少提早兩周通知，另外再提醒一點：請假一定需要有人替補才會被允許。以上規定適用於餐廳所有同仁，包括內場以及外場。請假單就放在我辦公室佈告欄上打卡單的旁邊。請確實填寫請假日期以及代班的同仁姓名。注意！你們兩位都需在請假單上簽名，否則申請無效。為了獎勵假期間工作的同仁，感恩節與聖誕節前一天起時薪將調高1.5倍。餐廳將於感恩節與聖誕節當天休館，祝福各位同仁有個美好的假期。如有任何問題，請與我聯絡。
Thomas Barnes上
vocabulary: shift n. 輪班，轉移，轉變
invalid adj. 病弱的，供病人使用的
disposal n. 處置，處理；配置

------------------------------------------------------------------- Wanted: A good home for a great dog! Name: Rover Hendrix
Age: 7 (in human years)
Breed: Beagle
Colour: Mostly white, with black and brown patches. Rover Hendrix has been part of our family since he was just six weeks old. He is a wonderful, loyal dog and also a great friend. Unfortunately, he will not be able to remain in our family for much longer. My husband's company is relocating him to Japan, so we will be moving there in September. We're very excited and it's a fantastic professional opportunity for Joe. We looked into the logistics of taking our dog with us, and with all things considered we've decided it just isn't viable. We'll be very sad to leave our beautiful Rover Hendrix. We feel that the best we can do for him is to find him a nice new home.
Rover Hendrix is in excellent health and has no special dietary needs. He is well-trained and well-groomed. He enjoys ball games and walks in the countryside. If you are interested in blessing your home by adopting this wonderful dog then we would very much like to meet you. Please call Joseph Tillman on 07582674925 or Andrea Geoffrey on 07817532476 or email us at jpt52@gmail.com to arrange a meeting. ------------------------------------------------------------------- To: jpt52@gmail.com
From: pdigglywizzle@gmail.com
Sent: Mon, Jul 27, 2012 at 2:41 PM
Subject: A home for Rover Hendrix Dear Joseph and Andrea, My name is Patrick McGranaghan. I've just tried calling you both but there was no answer, so I hope this email reaches you. For a while I have been thinking about getting a dog. When I saw your advert in the newspaper I realized that now is the right time. I live alone in a bright, spacious flat in the center of Birmingham. I understand that maybe a flat in the city is perhaps not the ideal home you have in mind for your dog (who you said likes the countryside) but rest assured, I love dogs and I've had a lot of experience looking after them since I was a small boy growing up in Ireland. I would like to meet you and your dog if you're interested. My mobile number is 07369836175. I hope to hear from you soon. Best regards,
Patrick McGranaghan

4. 聯絡方式限留電話號碼。網站近期被垃圾郵件攻擊，因此這是保護您個人資訊。 ---------------------------------------------- 徵求啟事：.想為一隻很棒的狗找戶好人家！ 名字： Rover Hendrix
年齡： 七歲 (換算成人類年齡)
品種： 米格魯(小獵犬)
顏色： 大部分是白色，有黑色跟棕色斑點。 Rover Hendrix從他還只有六個禮拜大開始就已經是我們家的一員。他是一隻很不錯、忠心的狗，也是位很棒的朋友。遺憾的是，他沒辦法留在我們家裡更久。我的丈夫的公司要他遷調到日本去，所以我們九月就要搬到那去。我們非常興奮，這對Joe來說是對他事業上非常好的一個機會。我們研究了把狗一起帶去的細節，在做了全盤考量後我們最後認為這實在是不可行的。要離開我們漂亮的Rover Hendrix我們會非常的難過。我們覺得能為他做的就是替他找到一個很好的新家。
Rover Hendrix非常健康而且沒有特殊的飲食需求。他訓練得很好並且整理得非常乾淨。他喜歡玩球和在郊外走動。如果你有想用認養這隻超棒的狗來為你家帶來好運，那我們會非常樂意和你見面。請撥07582674925聯絡Joseph Tillman，或是07817532476找Andrea Geoffrey，也可以寄電子郵件到jpt52@gmail.com和我們安排碰面。 ---------------------------------------------- 收件人： jpt52@gmail.com
寄件人： pdigglywizzle@gmail.com
寄件日期： 星期一，七月 27日， 2012年 下午2:41
主旨： Rover Hendrix的好歸宿 親愛的 Josep和Andrea， 我的名字是Patrick McGranaghan。我剛剛試著打電話給你們兩個可是沒有回應，希望這封信可以到你們手上。 我考慮要養一隻狗已經有段時間了，當我在報紙上看到你們的廣告時，我認為現在正是時候。我獨自一人住在伯明罕市中心的一間明亮、寬敞的公寓。我知道或許一間在都市裡的公寓可能不會是你們心目中最適合你們的狗的家(你說過牠喜歡郊外)，可是請你放心，我愛狗而且從我還是個在愛爾蘭長大的小男孩時就有很豐富的照顧狗的經驗。 如果你願意的話，我十分樂意與你們還有你們的狗見面。我的行動電話號碼是07369836175。我希望很快會聽到你的消息 誠摯的問候，
Patrick Mcgranaghan 重要單字

cards.passage:
Seeking alternative psychological help
By: jimmy_d_2 Apr 21, 2012
About six months ago I started to feel very depressed after my wife left me and ran away with another man. I immediately sought the help of my doctor, who prescribed me 50mg of Sertraline (a pill to treat depression), per day. My name was also put on a waiting list to receive psychological help from a professional. I have been meeting with a psychologist for two hours every week for over four months now.
I have experienced no major side effects from my medication, and my psychologist and I get on well during our meetings, but the emotional pain I experience on a daily basis is still as severe as it was six months ago. Even if I come out of a session with my psychologist feeling like we made some positive progress, I often very quickly start to feel horribly depressed again. I don’t know what to do. I still haven’t returned to work yet, which is a problem because while my boss is sympathetic, I know he won’t hold my position for me forever.
If anyone out there knows of any alternative treatments for depression which I haven’t tried yet, please write to me on this forum. I’m open to all suggestions.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
5 comments
doctor_everyman Apr 22, 2012
I have been working as a psychologist for over eight years and I have treated numerous cases such as yours. Let me start by offering you my most sincere sympathies for your hardship.
The problem with cases such as yours is that your depression does not lie in your imagination. It is born out of a very real, very painful event. Therefore you have to allow time for the pain to pass. In the meantime it sounds like you are doing all the right things.
Firstly, regarding your medication: Sertraline is a drug which I am very familiar with, so I would advise you to keep taking it. It will help you to keep functioning on a day-to-day basis.
Secondly, keep up your appointments with your psychologist. Even if they only offer you very momentary relief from your pain, it is vital that you allow yourself an arena in which you can regularly express your pain to someone who will listen and who is trained to help.
Again, you’re doing all the right things, but unfortunately there are no easy answers here. Ultimately you need time to come to terms with what has happened to you.
cards.passageTranslation:
尋求其他方的心理協助方法
作者：jimmy_d_2 四月21日，2012年
大約六個月前，我太太離開我跟另一個男人私奔了之後，我開始覺得非常的沮喪。我立刻向我的醫生尋求協助，他開給我50毫克的Sertraline (一種治療憂鬱症的藥)，每天服用一次。我的名字還被放上了需要專業人員的心理協助的等待名單。我每個禮拜花兩個小時看心理醫師，到現在已經超過四個月了。
我的藥物並沒有讓我感覺到太大的副作用，而且我的心理醫師和我在面談過程中相處融洽，可是我日復一日的感情傷痛還是跟六個月前一樣的強烈。即便是我完成了一個我的心理醫師覺得我們有滿正面的進展的療程，我還是常常很快又開始覺得非常沮喪。我不知該如何是好。我還是沒辦法回去工作，而這是個問題，因為就算我的老闆很同情，我知道他也沒辦法一直保留著我的職缺。
如果有任何人知道有什麼我還沒嘗試過的其他憂鬱症治療方法，請在這個討論版留言給我。我很樂意接受各種的建議。
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
5則留言
doctor_everyman 四月22日，2012年
我當心理醫師已經超過八年，治療過無數像你這樣的案例。我先為你的苦楚向你致上我最真誠的同情。
像你這樣的案例問題是出在你的憂鬱症並非來自你的想象。它是產自非常真實、痛苦的事件。因此你必須用時間來撫平傷痛。現在這聽起來你正在做的似乎都是正確的。
首先，關於你吃的藥：Sertraline是我非常熟悉的ㄧ種藥物，因此我會建議你繼續服用。它可以幫助你維持正常的日常生活。
其次，繼續和你的心理醫師見面。就算他們只能非常短暫的紓解你的傷痛，但是讓你自己有一個場所可以經常向願意傾聽又受過援助訓練的人述說你的痛楚是極為重要的。
再次強調，你在做的都是正確的，但遺憾的是這個問題沒有簡單的解決方法。基本上你需要時間來接受發生在你身上的事情。
vocabulary: alternative adj. 替代的，供選擇的
momentary adj. 短暫的，瞬間的
arena n. (周圍有觀眾席的)競技場
ultimately adv. 最終地，終極地

questions.stem: How did the patient's medication make him feel?
translation: 這位患者的藥讓他覺得如何？
a. 使他忘記他的痛苦。
b. 讓他每天昏昏欲睡。
c. 讓他忘掉他的太太。
d. 並未讓他覺得有任何不同。
options: (A) It made him forget about his pain.
(B) It made him drowsy on a regular basis.
(C) It made him forget about his wife.
(D) It didn't make him feel any different.

questions.stem: What is the patient's current job status?
translation: 這位患者目前的工作狀態是如何？
a. 他每天去上班。
b. 他的工作還在。
c. 他六個月前丟了工作。
d. 他想辭職。
options: (A) He is going to work every day.
(C) He lost his job six months ago.
(D) He wants to quit his job.

questions.stem: What kind of website is this?
translation: 這是什麼樣的網站？
a. 搜尋引擎。
b. 一個醫生的個人網站。
c. 離婚男子的討論區。
d. 醫療援助的討論區。

questions.stem: What does the doctor advise the patient to do?
translation: 這位醫生建議該患者做什麼事？
a. 趕快找個新太太。
b. 繼續接受治療。
c. 停止服用他的藥。
d. 找新的醫生。

questions.stem: How do we know that the patient can trust this doctor?
translation: 我們如何知道該患者可以信任這位醫生？
a. 該醫生有很豐富的治療類似患者的經驗。
b. 該醫生以前服用過相同的藥。
c. 該醫生的太太最近離開了他。
d. 該醫生以前治療過這名患者。
options: (A) The doctor has a lot of experience treating similar patients.
(B) The doctor himself has taken the same medication before.
(C) The doctor's wife recently left him.
(D) The doctor has treated this patient before.

cards.passage:
LinkedIn Messages
+New Message
Cute Dots Clothing
Dear Cute Dots Clothing,
I’m trying to order some baby clothing from your website, but it doesn’t seem to be working right now. I completed all the order info and entered my credit card information, but the screen kept freezing at that point. Can I just send you my order directly on here? The details are as follows:
1 x item #5562 (boy’s monster truck tee size S)
1 x item #8544 (boy’s dino tank top size S)
1 x item #1430 (girl’s ballerina outfit color burgundy size M)
Total cost (including taxes and shipping):€45.64
Please charge this order to my visa card:
card number: 4520 0220 9829 0001
exp: 03/2019
security code: 456
Shipping address:
Natalia Demir
Ebusuud Street 183 Sirkeci, Eminonu Fatih, Istanbul 34210, Turkey
If there’s anything else you need from me, please let me know.
Kind regards,
Natalia Demir
--------------------------------------------------
To: Natalia Demir (natcandygirl@gmail.com)
From: LinkedIn Legal (no-reply@linkein.com)
Subject: Critical Information about Your LinkedIn Account
Sent: Dec. 1, 2004 at 09:31 AM
Dear LinkedIn account user,
This is an official notice pertaining to a recent data breach on LinkeIn’s back end servers. The breach occurred on November 27, 2004. Only a small number of LinkedIn accounts have been hacked, so yours may not have been, but it is still necessary for all our users to be aware of the possibility.
WHAT HAPPENED?
We have recently become aware that data was stolen from our back end server and made available in an Internet forum for hackers on November 27, 2004. The stolen data includes personal email addresses, usernames, and passwords.
WHAT ARE WE DOING TO FIX IT?
We believe that the persons responsible for the data breach were located in Belgium, but we have yet to confirm this. We are currently working with local authorities to resolve the matter. We have also invalidated all passwords to accounts that have been affected. Therefore, if you find that you are unable to log in to your account, it means that your account may have been jeopardized.
WHAT CAN YOU DO FOR NOW?
We recommend that if your password for LinkedIn is the same as the one for any other online accounts, you should change them all at once. If hackers have obtained your password, they may attempt to access your other online accounts for the purpose of fraud or identity theft.
FOR MORE INFORMATION
For further information, contact our Data Security and Protection Team at security@LinkedIn.com.
Do not reply to this email.
-------------------------------------------------- To: reportfalsecharges@visa.com
From: Natalia Demir (natcandygirl@gmail.com)
Subject: Proof that my account was jeopardized
Sent: Dec. 1, 2004 at 01:22 PM
Dear Sir or Madam,
This morning I received a warning about a data breach from LinkedIn.com, as attached. In the message, it was indicated that any person who is unable to log in to his or her account may have had data stolen. Indeed, when I tried to log in to my account, I was unable to do so.
Recalling that I had recently shared my credit card details with another LinkedIn user in a private message, I called the visa hotline at once, and you guys cancelled my card. However, upon inspection of my account purchase history online, I have found that the hackers seem to have already used my card to make approximately $14,000 in purchases in the last two days. I am certain those aren’t my purchases because I haven’t even used my card in the last week, and I would certainly be aware if I spent $14,000!
I called in again, and the agent asked me to send in any evidence I have to support my case, which is what I am doing right now.
What is the next step? Should I call you guys again, or will you contact me with an update of the situation?
Thanks for your kind assistance.
Natalia Demir

1件＃8544（男童恐龍坦克上衣尺寸S）
1件＃1430（女童芭蕾舞服裝，顏色酒紅尺寸M） 總價（含稅和運費）：€45.64 此訂單請直接由我的Visa卡支付： 卡號：4520022098290001
到期日：03/2019
安全碼：456 郵寄地址：
Natalia Demir
34210土耳其伊斯坦堡，Eminonu Fatih，Sirkeci區， Ebusuud街183號 如果有其他需要我補充的，請讓我知道。 衷心的感謝， Natalia Demir
收件人：Natalia Demir（natcandygirl@gmail.com）
寄件人：LinkedIn法律團隊（no-reply@linkein.com）
主旨：關於您LinkedIn帳戶的重要信息
寄件時間：2004年12月1日，在上午09時31分 親愛的LinkedIn用戶， 這是有關LinkeIn後端伺服器最近資料被盜用的官方通知。盜用事件於2004年11月27日發生，只有少數的LinkedIn帳戶被入侵，所以您的可能沒有被盜用，但我們所有的用戶還是有必要注意被盜用的可能性。
發生了什麼事？ 最近，我們意識到數據在2004年11月27日從我們後端的伺服器被盜，然後提供給網絡論壇上的駭客，資料包括個人電子郵件地址，用戶名和密碼。 我們目前的處理方法是？ 我們認為該盜用數據的首腦在比利時，但我們還沒有證實這一點。目前我們正與地方當局合作解決此事。所有受影響的帳戶密碼將失效。因此，如果您發現帳戶無法登錄，那就表示您的帳戶可能已被盜用。 您現在可以做什麼？ 我們建議，如果您LinkedIn的密碼和其他線上帳戶的密碼一樣，您現在應該應立即更換那些密碼。如果駭客已獲得您的密碼，他們可能會嘗試登入您的其他線上帳戶，進行欺詐或身份盜竊。 更多資訊 欲了解更多資訊，請聯繫我們的數據安全和專利保護團隊security@LinkedIn.com。 請不要回覆此郵件。
收件人：reportfalsecharges@visa.com
寄件者：Natalia Demir（natcandygirl@gmail.com）
主旨：我的帳戶已被盜用的證明
寄件時間：2004年12月1日下午1點22 親愛的女士先生， 今天早上我收到一封有關LinkedIn.com資料洩露的警告，如附件。在郵件中指出，若無法登錄帳戶可能是資料被盜。果然，我試圖登錄我的帳戶時，即無法登入。 我想到我最近將我的信用卡資料，以私人訊息提供給另一個LinkedIn的用戶。我已立刻打電話給信用卡公司服務專線，你們也取消了我的卡片。但是，在我線上檢查帳戶的購買歷史記錄時，發現駭客似乎已經盜用了我的卡，在過去兩天購買約$14,000 。我很確定這些都不是我買的，因為我這週還沒有用過我的卡，而且我若花了$14,000，我肯定會知道！ 我立即撥打電話，接線人員要我寄可以支持我說法的任何佐證資料，這就是我現在正在處理的事。 下一個步驟是什麼？我需要再撥電話給你們嗎？還是您們會跟我聯繫提供最新狀況？ 感謝您的熱心協助。 Natalia Demir
vocabulary: authority n. 官方，當局，權威人士
jeopardize v. 使瀕臨危險境地，冒...風險
breach n. (對法律)破壞，違反；(對權利)侵害

questions.stem: Why did Natalia Demir send her personal information, including name, address, and credit card number in a private message on LinkedIn?
translation: 為什麼Natalia Demir在LinkedIn私人信息中寄出她的個人資料，包括姓名、地址、和信用卡號？
A. 她想確認她剛在網上訂購的嬰兒服裝訂單。
B. 她試著在網上訂購嬰兒服裝時，網站建議她通過電子郵件寄發訂單。
C. 該網站的訂單表格不能正常運作，所以她決定用私人訊息寄出她的訂單。
D. 她想要針對訂單做細微的調整，所以她覺得最好的辦法是直接傳訊息給那家童裝公司。
options: (A) She wanted to confirm an order for baby clothing that she had just made online.
(B) When she tried to order some baby clothes online, the website suggested that she send in the order by email.
(C) The website order form wasn't functioning properly so she decided to send in her order by PM.
(D) She wanted to make some minor changes to her order so she thought the best course of action was to message the baby clothing company directly.

questions.stem: At first, how did Ms. Demir know that her account had probably been hacked?

A. 來自no-reply@linkein.com寄來的電子郵件上闡明此問題。
B. 當她登入到她的LinkedIn帳戶上，有資訊消失了。
C. 她收到來自LinkedIn法律團隊打來的電話。
D. 她無法用她的密碼登入網站。
options: (A) This was said directly in the email from no-reply@linkein.com.
(B) When she logged into her LinkedIn account, something was missing.
(C) She received a phone call from the LinkedIn legal team.
(D) She was unable to log in with her password.

questions.stem: What was her immediate course of action?
translation: 她立即採取了什麼行動？
A.她打電話取消她的信用卡。
B.她關閉了她的LinkedIn帳戶。
C.她寄發電子郵件給LinkedIn。
D.她試圖找出誰駭入她的帳戶。
options: (A) She called visa to cancel her credit card.
(B) She closed down her LinkedIn account.
(C) She sent an email to LinkedIn.
(D) She tried to figure out who had hacked her account.

questions.stem: What was her second finding that made it more certain her account had been hacked?
translation: 以下選項何者是她更加肯定帳戶遭到駭客攻擊的第二個發現？
A.她的銀行帳戶沒有剩下任何錢。
B.她接到一封駭客寄來的奇怪訊息。
C.她的信用卡不能用了。
D.她的帳戶有莫明的交易記錄。
options: (A) There were no more funds remaining in her bank account.
(B) She received a strange message from the hackers.
(C) Her credit card didn't work anymore.
(D) There were mysterious charges on her account transaction record.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of the Ms. Demir's email to reportfalsecharges@visa.com?
translation: 以下何者是Demir女士寄給reportfalsecharges@visa.com的主要目的？
A. 提供LinkedIn發出的詐欺警告的副本。

D. 要求註銷所有近期的帳單費用。
options: (A) To provide a copy of the fraud alert from LinkedIn.
(B) To inform Visa that her account had been hacked.
(C) To ask Visa to cancel her credit card.
(D) To ask for all recent charges to be reversed.

Madrid Today

Editor

Two years experience in a media-related position.
News Desk Rewriter
Must be/have:
Native English speaker;
Master’s degree in a media related discipline;
Diploma in Spanish as a Foreign Language Certificate level C2 or equivalent;
Extensive knowledge of the politics of modern day Spain;
Two years of experience in a media-related position.
Madrid Today’s standard hours of work are Monday to Friday 9am to 5pm for all positions. All applicants must be prepared to work overtime hours.
If you wish to apply please send you resume to Huan Sanchez at wanhuan@gmail.com. Only candidates selected for interview will be contacted.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
To: wanhuan@gmail.com
From: daniellegarlitz@hotmail.com
Sent: Wed, Mar 21, 2012 at 9:56 AM
Subject: Application for position of News Desk Rewriter at Madrid Today
Dear Huan Sanchez,
I wish to apply for the position of News Desk Rewriter at Madrid Today.
My name is Danielle Garlitz. I am 30 years old and I am currently working as an English teacher in Madrid. I also do occasional freelance translation work. I returned to my native Spain two years ago in the hope of improving my Spanish. I was born in Madrid and raised here for ten years. When I was ten years old my family moved to England where I lived for the next eighteen years. Therefore, English was in fact not originally my native language; however I do now consider it to be my first language. I feel that my Spanish is now fluent, and just last month I passed level C2 of the Diploma of Spanish as a Foreign Language exam. I realise that you require an English native speaker, which strictly speaking I am not. I wanted to mention this to you now to avoid any misunderstandings later on.
Attached to this email is my resume documenting all of my relevant qualifications and experience. You’ll find that apart from the aforementioned language discrepancy I am more than qualified for this position.
I would like to thank you in advance for taking the time to consider my application, and I hope to hear from you soon.
Yours sincerely,
Danielle Garlitz

收件人： wanhuan@gmail.com
寄件人： daniellegarlitz@hotmail.com
寄件日期： 星期三，三月21日，2012年 上午9:56
主旨： 應徵今日馬德里報社的新聞編譯職缺
致Huan Sanchez，
我希望應徵今日馬德里報社的新聞編譯一職。
我的名字是Danielle Garlitz。我今年30歲，目前在馬德里當英文老師。我閒暇時還兼差做翻譯工作。兩年前我回到我的出生地西班牙，希望能夠提升我的西班牙語能力。我在馬德里土生土長住了十年。我十歲的時候我的家人搬到了英國，接下來我在那裡住了十八年。因此，其實英語本來不是我的母語；可是那現在是我的母語。我覺得我的西班牙語現在很流利，上個月我才剛通過西班牙語文能力測驗的高級檢定(C2)。我知道你要找母語為英語的人，嚴格來說我並不算是。我想先跟你說明這點免得之後有任何的誤會。
附在這封電子郵件上的是我所有的相關資格跟經歷的履歷文件。你會發現我除了上述的語言資格不符以外，我非常夠資格擔任這個職位。
我要先謝謝你花時間考量我的應徵函，希望能盡快聽到您的回覆。
誠摯的，
Danielle Garlitz

(1)___________ I will be traveling with quite a large group of friends -ten in total including myself- and it would be preferable if we could all stay in the room for the duration of the trip. If the cabin were to be available, what would the price be per person? (2)___________ Also, is there a bathroom in the cabin? (3)___________ I also noticed on your website that you could help us procure back-country hiking permits as well. (4)___________ My friends and I are particularly keen on doing the Bear River trail, but if you had any other suggestions, we would gladly be open to consideration. That’s all for now; I look forward to your response. Thank you for your time.
Thanks,
Alexandra
收件者： CanyonMaster@gmail.com
寄件者：Smurf90210@hotmail.com
cards.passageTranslation:
寄送時間：2013年6月14日 上午11點23分
主題：訂房預約
親愛的卡皮歐先生您好：
我叫Alexandra Roach。我想請問6月27至29日的週末期間飯店是否仍有空房？如果沒有的話，我們能將行程延至7月4至6日或是7月11至13日，不過希望前者的時間為佳。從貴網站得知飯店裡有空間較大、可容納10人的獨立小木屋，請問此房間在上述的日期裡是否有空位？我會和一大群朋友，包含自己一共10人一起旅行，我們希望旅行期間大家都能入宿同一間房間。假設上面提到的大房間有空位的話，請問每個人的平均費用為何呢？另外，想請問房間內是否有獨立衛浴，還是我們需要到旅館主棟共用衛浴設備呢？我也看見貴旅館可協助我們申辦鄉間健行許可證。我和一些朋友特別想到熊谷河步道走走，若您有其他建議，歡迎提供我們參考。目前問題如上，靜待您的回覆，感謝您的閱讀。
感謝
Alexandra

cards.passage:
Rick, there seems to be a problem with our WiFi again. Could you come upstairs and have a look? Rick Notley 2:19 p.m.
Hi, Andrea. I’m out of office ATM. How urgent is it? Andrea Belmont 2:22 p.m.
Quite. We need to get an important notice uploaded to our site ASAP. Rick Notley 2:23 p.m.
Try this for now: turn off the router and unplug all the cables for 10 seconds. Then plug the cables back in and start it up again. Wait until the green light stops flashing and that might do the trick. Rick Notley 2:33 p.m.
Any luck? Andrea Belmont 2:36 p.m.
Negative. Rick Notley 2:36 p.m.
OK. I can be back there in 15. Andrea Belmont 2:37 p.m.
Thanks Rick. You are our hero.
Andrea Belmont 下午2:12
cards.passageTranslation:
Rick，我們的無線網絡似乎有點問題。你能上樓來看看嗎？ Rick Notley 下午2:19
嗨，Andrea。我目前不在辦公室。有多緊急呢？ Andrea Belmont 下午2:22
很急。我們需要盡快上傳一個重要的公告到網站上。 Rick Notley 下午2:23
現在先試試看：關掉網路轉接器的電源並拔下所有線路後等10秒。將線路都插回去後，再啟動一次。等到綠色指示燈停止閃爍時可能就好了。 Rick Notley 下午2:33
有用嗎? Andrea Belmont 下午2:36
沒有. Rick Notley 下午2:36
好吧。我15分鐘內會回去。 Andrea Belmont 下午2:37
謝謝Rick。你救了我一命。

(D) Andrea didn't follow his instructions correctly.

cards.passage: Are you a hard-working, self-motivated professional? Do you thrive in a creative, team-oriented environment? If so, Falcon Incorporated might just be the place for you. Here at Falcon, our principal function is programming apps for Apple and Android products. We are currently looking for talented graphic designers to help us create some fresh, unique icons, background patterns, and logos. Our apps incorporate a multitude of design styles and themes, so there is a lot of room for self-expression. All applicants must be proficient in Adobe Illustrator CS6 and Dreamweaver CS6. If this job appeals to you, please send your resume to gopherdude634@hotmail.com. Thanks for your time and consideration. Talk to you soon!
cards.passageTranslation: 你具有認真工作又積極進取的特質嗎？你喜歡在充滿創意和團隊精神的工作環境嗎？如果你的答案都是肯定的，那法肯公司就是你的最佳選擇。在法肯公司，我們主要的工作內容是設計Apple與Android系列產品的應用程式。目前我們徵求有才華的平面設計師加入我們的團隊，協助我們來創造一些新穎且獨一無二的圖像、背景花樣以及商標。我們的應用程式涵蓋了各式各樣的設計風格與不同主題，在這裡你有很大的自由創作空間。所有應徵者須使用Adobe Illustrator Cs6與Dreamweaver Cs6。如果你對這份工作有興趣，請將履歷寄至gopherdude634@hotmail.com。感謝閱讀，靜待你的來信！
vocabulary: motivate v. 給予動機，激發
thrive v. 繁榮，興旺，茂盛
incorporate v. 使合併，包含，加上
principal adj. 主要的，首要的
pattern n. 模式，花樣，圖式

cards.passage: Every spring in Manitoba, Canada, people from all over the world travel to the Interlake region to witness tens of thousands of red-sided garter snakes congregate in limestone caves to mate. The male garter snakes, which are harmless to humans, writhe amongst one another in an attempt to find a suitable mate, and sometimes form what is called a ‘mating-ball’, where so many snakes get knotted together, they simply roll around in a ball. Considering how cold the winter is in Canada, it may come as a surprise that the largest gathering of cold-blooded reptiles occurs in a region that is partially frozen for half the year, but there’s a reason for that. The limestone caves in which the snakes seek shelter provide excellent protection for the garter snakes and allows them to descend deep beneath the frozen surface during the winter. When the snakes resurface in the spring to mate, the marshy environment surrounding the caves is a perfect place for the garter snakes to feed on a plethora of frogs. The Canadian government has taken steps to protect the snakes and their habitat, and because the garter snakes are harmless, the yearly congregation in Manitoba makes for a perfect opportunity for the young and old alike to create a lasting memory with one of nature’s most commonly, and perhaps unduly, feared reptiles, the snake.
cards.passageTranslation: 每到春天，來自世界各地的人們都會前往加拿大曼尼托巴的Interlake地區，一同見證成千上萬的紅邊無毒小蛇聚集在石灰岩洞裡交配。無害的雄性紅邊無毒小蛇在洞裡鑽來鑽去，尋找適合的另一半。在這蠕動的過程中，小蛇一條接著一條交捲，形成所謂的「交配球」。雖說加拿大的寒冬是出了名的嚴酷，但以下的消息一定會更讓你吃驚－這些冷血爬蟲類最大的聚集活動竟是發生於一個常年結冰的區域！小蛇棲息的石灰岩洞讓牠們可以在冬天鑽進地表深處，成為最完美的庇護所。每到春天牠們重出地表進行交配時，岩洞附近的沼澤更有大量的青蛙讓牠們捕食。加拿大政府目前已採取行動保護小蛇以及牠們的棲息地。更因為這些小蛇無毒，每年春天這個蛇類聚集的自然現象提供年輕人和老人一個良好的教育機會，讓他們重新認識這些被過度害怕的無毒爬蟲類。

questions.stem: What would be an appropriate title for this article?
translation: 下列何項標題最適合以上文章？
a. 壯觀景象－大量蛇類聚集於曼尼托巴省
b. 曼尼托巴的冬天棲息地
c. 加拿大的蛇類
d. 加拿大發現危險蛇類

questions.stem: How do red-garter snakes survive the winter in Manitoba?
translation: 紅邊無毒小蛇如何在曼尼托巴的嚴冬生存？
a. 蛇類無法生存於曼尼托巴
b. 科學家將牠們移至溫暖處
c. 他們能適應雪中的生活
d. 他們棲息於地底深處的石灰岩洞中
options: (B) Scientists catch them and put them in warm places.
(C) They have adapted to live in snow.
(D) They live deep beneath the ground in limestone caves.

cards.passage:
Extract from transcript of recorded conversation, July 6, 2014, 2:15pm
Customer Service Adviser: David DAVID: Sorry sir, I’m afraid we can’t issue new account numbers or passwords over the phone or by email. We can only send them by post. CUSTOMER: Okay, no problem. You can send them to the address I gave you earlier. If my new account details don’t work when I try to login then what should I do? DAVID: Why wouldn’t they work? CUSTOMER: Well, this is actually the second time I’ve requested a new account number and password. The first time it didn’t work when I tried to login. DAVID: Oh. Then you must have typed them in wrong. CUSTOMER: Excuse me? DAVID: Look, if we issue a new account number and password then it definitely will work. The only reason for it not working is if you type it in wrong. CUSTOMER: But isn’t it possible that there’s a fault with the system?
DAVID: Okay, here’s what you should do if the new account details don’t work. Call one of your friends and invite them round to your house so they can type them in for you.
-------------------------------------------------------------- 24 Lancaster Road
Market Houghton
Hinkton
Warwickshire
CV12 0FQ July 7th, 2014 To whom it may concern, My name is Chad Kroeger. I am a long time customer of Sahara. I have been buying products from your online store for several years now and I have always been very happy with the service. Recently, having not used Sahara for a few months, I forgot my account number and password, and so I had to order new ones. After I received my new details, I attempted to use them to login but they didn’t work. I then phoned your customer service desk to order a second set of new details, and this time I was treated rather rudely by one of your customer service advisers. He agreed to send me more new login details, but then when I asked him what I should do if they didn’t work again he accused me of typing them in wrong the first time. He then told me that next time I should find someone else to type for me. I felt this to be an insult to my intelligence. Also, the point of a customer service helpdesk should be to help customers, and I found this adviser to be completely unhelpful. Again, I would like to express that up until now I have always been happy with the service offered by Sahara. I just wanted to make you aware of this problem so that you can deal with the guilty party accordingly. The customer service adviser’s name was David. From his accent I would guess he’s from Newcastle. Yours sincerely,
Chad Kroeger -------------------------------------------------------------- Customer Service Adviser Name Number of complaints in the last year Number of positive comments in the last year Sheila Gray 2 4 David Alton 7 1 Simon Chen 1 5 *During each employee’s annual review, the number of that employee’s positive comments in the last year will be subtracted from the number of complaints in the last year. If the remaining number is below zero, that employee will get a 5% raise. If the number is 0-5, no change will be made to that employee’s pay rate. If the number is above 5, that employee will receive a warning, and if the number is 8 or above, the result will be immediate termination of employment.
cards.passageTranslation:
Sahara 公司顧客服務部
節錄自對話錄音的文字記錄，七月6日，2014年，下午2:15
客戶服務顧問：David DAVID：先生我很抱歉，恐怕我們沒辦法在電話上或透過電子郵件核發新的帳號或密碼。我們只可以用郵寄的方式。 顧客：好吧，沒關係。你可以把他們寄到我稍早給你的地址去。如果當我嘗試登入時我的新帳號沒辦法使用，我該怎麼辦？ DAVID： 怎麼可能會沒辦法使用？ CUSTOMER：好吧，其實這已經是我第二次申請新的帳號跟密碼了。我第一次試嘗試登入時它沒辦法用。 DAVID：喔。那你一定是打錯了。 顧客：你這話什麼意思？ DAVID：你聽我說，假如我們核發一組新的帳號跟密碼，那它就一定可以使用。如果它沒辦法使用的話，唯一的原因就是你把它打錯了。 顧客：可是難道沒有可能是系統有誤嗎？
DAVID：好吧，如果新的帳號不能用的話你可以這麼做。打電話給你的一位朋友並邀請他們到你家來，這樣他們就可以幫你輸入資訊。
---------------------------------------------------------------------------- 24 Lancaster Road
Market Houghton
Hinkton
Warwickshire
CV12 0FQ 七月7日，2014年 敬啟者， 我的名字是Chad Kroeger。我是Sahara的老主顧。我在你們的網路商店購買產品已經有好幾年了，我一直非常滿意你們的服務。 最近，因為已經好幾個月沒有上Sahara，我忘了我的帳號號碼跟密碼，所以我得申請一個新的。我收到我的新帳號資料後，我嘗試用它們來登入但是沒有成功。然後我打電話給你們的顧客服務中心申請第二組新的帳號資料，而這次我卻被你們其中一位顧客服務顧問非常沒有禮貌的對待。他答應寄更多新的登入資料給我，可是當我問他如果它們又不能用時我該怎麼辦時，他竟然指控我第一次是資料輸入錯了。然後他說我下一次應該找個人幫我輸入。我覺得這是在侮辱我的智商。還有，顧客服務中心的目的應該是在幫助顧客，而我認為這位顧問是完全幫不上忙。 再次的，我要說的是直到現在我一直都很滿意Sahara所提供的服務。我只是想讓你們注意到這個問題，這樣你們才能夠相應處理有錯的一方。那位顧客服務顧問的名字是David。從他的口音我猜他是來自Newcastle。 您誠摯的，
Chad Kroeger -------------------------- 客服人員姓名 去年被檢舉的數量 去年的正面評價 Sheila Gray 2 4 David Alton 7 1 Simon Chen 1 5 * 在員工年度視察中，該名職員去年度收到檢舉數量減於正面評價數量。假如餘數為負，該名員工將會加薪百分之五。假如餘數介於0至5之間，該名員工薪水不變。假如餘數大於5，該員工將會收到警告；假如餘數大於8，該員工將會被立即停職。
vocabulary: extract v. 抽出，提取，設法得到
issue v. 發行，發布，核發

cards.passage:
We are seeking contributions for next month’s employee newsletter. The topic of the month will be “Making the best of your 2-hour lunch break.” Is anybody interested in making a submission?
Seva Chari (9:15)
I usually just use the lunch break to eat my lunch and then take a nap
Armand Brown (9:22)
That could still work, though. If you just focused on how important it is for you to get a mid-day rest to revitalize yourself and be more efficient in the afternoon, that would be fine!
Seva Chari (9:25)
I was half joking, but let me think about it.
Armand Brown (10:40)
Anybody else?
Courtney Love (10:48)
I’ve really been enjoying the yoga class offered by the company. I’d love to submit something about that.
Armand Brown (10:52)
That sounds wonderful, Courtney.
Courtney Love (10:55)
Is there a minimum length for the article?
Armand Brown (10:57)
400-600 words would be ideal. We will also shoot a photo or two to go along with the article, but you don’t need to worry about that.
Armand Brown: (11:42)
We were aiming for three articles. So far just Courtney. I guess I should also mention, contributing to our monthly newsletter looks pretty good on your year-end evaluation!
Seva Chari (11:55)
I guess I could be up for it after all.
Armand Brown（8:05）
cards.passageTranslation:
我們正在尋求下月員工新聞報的投稿。主題是「利用2小時午休時間的最佳方法。」有人有感興趣投稿嗎？ Seva Chari（9:15）
我通常只利用午休來吃午餐，然後午睡... Armand Brown（9:22）
這其實也可以。如果你的重點在討論中午休息以 振奮精神，讓下午更有效率的重要性，就行得通！ Seva Chari（9:25）
我只是半開玩笑，但讓我想想。 Armand Brown（10:40）
還有其他人嗎？ Courtney Love（10:48）
我很喜歡公司提供的瑜伽課程。我願意寫這一類的文章。 Armand Brown（10:52）
這聽起來很棒，Courtney。 Courtney Love（10:55）
文章最短要多少字？ Armand Brown（10時57分）
400-600字比較理想。我們還會拍攝一、兩張照片配合文章，但你不需要擔心這個。 Armand Brown:（11:42）
我們目標是三篇文章。到目前為止，只有Courtney。我想我應該說清楚，對我們的每月員工新聞報有貢獻的人，年終考核上會看起來不錯！ Seva Chari（11:55）
我想我其實也可以投稿。 重要單字
contribution n. 貢獻，投稿
newsletter n. 時事通訊
submission n. 屈服，投降，柔順
revitalize v. 始恢復生氣，使復活
efficient adj. 有效率的
submit v. 使屈服，提交，呈遞
minimum adj. 最小量的
evaluation n. 估計，評估

cards.passage:
To: Parker Poag, Design Coordinator
From: Carl Perkins
Date: February 24th, 2018
Sub: Microsoft Product Training
Dear Parker,
I recently had the opportunity to attend a three-day Microsoft Office training and certification course in Los Angeles, and I think it would be a very beneficial undertaking for all of the employees here at Hamm & Webb to attend.
The training program that I completed offered instruction in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint. (1) _____________ The course is run by a group called Academy Software Consultants from Sherman Oaks, California, which is about thirty minutes outside of Los Angeles. The course costs $250 dollars per person, but a cooperative group discount is available for 4-6 people at $200 dollars a head. (2) _____________ Upon completion of the course, each person will receive a professional certificate issued by Microsoft.
As you know, the firm will be upgrading its systems in March. Therefore, I think it is imperative to familiarize ourselves with the interface of each of these programs. (3) _____________ Since I have already completed the course, I would be happy to brief the rest of the design team and field any questions that they may have. (4) _____________ Thank you for your time and consideration, and let me know what you think.
Sincerely,
Carl Perkins
寄送至：Parker Poag, Design Coordinator
cards.passageTranslation:
寄送自：Carl Perkins
日期：2018年2月24日
主題：Microsoft產品訓練
Parker您好：
近日我有機會到洛杉磯參與為期三天的微軟辦公軟體訓練與認證，而我認為如果Hamm & Webb全體員工都能參加此課程，必定受益良多。
我所參與的訓練包含了Word、Excel、和PowerPoint簡報的課程。此訓練是由一處位於加州雪曼歐克斯名叫Academy Software Consultants的機構所舉辦，這個機構距離洛杉磯市30分鐘車程。課程費用每人美金250元，公司企業4至6人一組可享優惠200元美金。訓練結束後，每人可得到一張微軟公司頒予的證書。如同您所知道的，公司將於三月更新作業系統，因此我認為我們必須熟悉此軟體的操作介面，讓我們在競爭激烈的市場中保持優勢。我非常樂意與設計團隊分享我的課程訓練經驗，同時回答任何相關的問題。
感謝您的閱讀，靜待您的回應。
Carl Perkins 敬上
vocabulary: imperative adj. 緊急的，重要的，命令的

cards.passage:
Burger Cook-Off for City Harvest
When: Saturday, June 14, 2014
Where: The Foundry
Come out and join us for some good ole fun while you taste and judge all the different takes on the classic hamburger. The chefs will be starting to cook at 12:00pm. It will cost $25 at the door and all the proceeds will go to City Harvest. We will also give all the leftovers from that day to the families from the communities that City Harvest helps out. City Harvest will also invite some of the families from the communities they help to come join the festivities. We hope this cook-off will bring more awareness to our cause and will continue to end hunger in New York City.

cards.passage:
United Paws for a United World
Come to our fundraiser. Eat dinner with us. Have a good time.
When? Sunday, March 19th, 1996
What time? 7:30 p.m.
Where? Pete's Diner
What address? 78 Pinstripe Avenue
What city? Christchurch, NZ 3839
What for? United Paws for a United World is a charity based in Christchurch, New Zealand, that raises money for nonprofit organizations all over New Zealand. We sponsor organizations in Christchurch, Wellington, Auckland, and Hamilton. These organizations train guide dogs to assist disabled and autistic children and elderly adults with disabilities.
Where do I come in? We want you to dine with us at Pete's Diner this Sunday, at 7:30 p.m. 20% of earnings in the restaurant will go toward this worthwhile cause. Come support United Paws for a United World and its associated organizations!
Who do I contact? You can contact Sherry at 64 3 354 8484 for information about the event. You can also email Roberta: rsummers@upuw.org. For those who want to make reservations, email Roberta, or call Dan at 64 3 354 9201. For those with parties of five or more who want to make reservations, email Roberta, or call Troy 64 3 353 0145.
What if I don't have time? If you don't have time this Sunday, you can still help out! For information about donations, visit our website at http://www.upuw.org. You can also get ahold of Thomas, our fundraising coordinator, at 64 3 354 9320.
We hope to see you there!
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
To: rsummers@upuw.org
From: ontherocks74@hotmail.com
Date: Monday, March 20th, 1996
Time: 10:30 a.m.
Subject: Future Events
Dear Roberta,
My friend showed me the United Paws for a United World flier this morning, and I'm really sad that I missed it. I didn't catch sight of the flier previously. If I had known, I definitely would have attended with my friends and family.
My grandmother, who has epilepsy, is currently being sponsored by the Happy Day Animal Foundation in Christchurch. This organization gets money from United Paws for a United World every month.
Because I missed the event, I was wondering if there were any events in the near future. It could be a dinner event, or any other sort of fundraising event. If not, could you guide me through the donation page on your website? I'm not that great with computers, sorry.
I absolutely adore dogs, and I love my grandmother to death, which is why I'm so happy to learn about organizations that include them both. I have one last question. Do you know if there are any work opportunities at your charity or any associated organizations this summer? School is out in early June, and my niece, who absolutely worships dogs, would love to help out.
Thanks for all your time. I'm bummed that I missed this one!
Best regards,
Julie Wilson
cards.passageTranslation:
爪子大團結，團結你和我
快來我們的募捐。與一起我們吃晚餐，盡情玩樂。
何日？1996年3月19日星期日
何時？下午七時三十 分
何地？Pete’s Diner
何地？ Pinstripe大道78號
城市？3839紐西蘭基督城
為了什麼？爪子大團結，團結你和我是一家總部位於紐西蘭基督城的慈善機構，為紐西蘭各地非營利機構籌集資金。我們贊助基督城，惠靈頓，奧克蘭和漢密爾頓的機構。這些機構訓練導盲犬協助殘障人士及患有自閉症的兒童和無能力行為的老人。
何處參加？我們希望您這個星期天晚上7:30在彼得餐館與我們共進晚餐。餐廳20％的盈收將會用在這項有意義的事情上。趕快來支持為統一世界的團結爪子及其相關組織！
與誰聯繫？您可以撥打6433548484，聯繫Sherry有關該活動的訊息。您也可以發送電子郵件給Roberta：rsummers@upuw.org。想訂位的人，請寄電子郵件給Roberta，或致電Dan：64 3 354 9201。五位以上的團體想訂位，請寄電子郵件給Roberta，或致電Troy：64 3 353 0145。
如果沒有時間怎麼辦？如果您這個星期天沒有時間，您仍然可以幫得上忙！有關捐贈資訊，請造訪我們的網站http://www.upuw.org。您也可以聯絡我們籌款專員Thomas：6433549320。
希望到時見！
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
收件者：rsummers@upuw.org
寄件者：ontherocks74@hotmail.com
寄送日期：1996年3月20日 星期一
寄送時間：上午10:30
主旨：未來的活動
親愛的Roberta，
我朋友今天早上給我看了為爪子大團結，團結你和我的傳單，我真的很難過我錯過了。我之前沒有注意到傳單。如果我早知道，我一定會帶著我的朋友和家人參加。
我有癲癇的祖母，目前正接受基督城開心時光動物基金會的贊助。該組織每月會從爪子大團結，團結你和我得到錢。
因為我錯過了這次的活動，我想知道不久的將來會不會有其他的活動。有可能是晚餐活動，或其他任何類型的籌款活動。如果沒有，你能指引我到您網站上的捐款頁面嗎？不好意思，我對電腦不太行。
我非常愛狗，而且超級愛我的奶奶，這是為什麼我很樂於了解關於他們兩個的機構。我還有最後一個問題。您知道您們機構或任何相關機構這個夏天這有任何工作機會嗎？學校六月初就放假了，而我超愛狗的侄女很想幫忙。
感謝您的時間。我很難過我錯過了這一次活動！
最誠摰的，
Julie Wilson
vocabulary: autistic adj. 自我中心的，孤僻的
attend v. 出席，參加；前往；照料
sponsor v. 資助，為…做證人

cards.passage: Last week, something very rare happened in Sarasota, Florida. A special flower named titan arum, native to Sumatra, bloomed in the botanical gardens. Titan arum, also known the name ‘corpse flower’ because of its horrible smell, usually lie dormant for up to ten years and then bloom for a mere 48 hours. For the short time it is in bloom, dung beetles and flies love its rotting flesh smell so much that they gorge themselves digging their way through it until they are satisfied. When they are finished they fly away carrying the pollen to pollinate the other flowers. To prevent self-pollination, the female flowers usually open up first and a couple of days later the male flowers will open up. When the flower dies, a corm will keep it alive by storing energy for the plant. The corm will also lie dormant for about four months and then start storing energy again for the plant. This plant knows how to take it easy. So, if you ever find yourself in Sarasota, Florida or walking through the rainforests of Sumatra, be on the lookout for the titan arum.
cards.passageTranslation: 上週，在佛羅里達州的薩洛索塔發生了一件非常罕見的事。名為titan arum的花原產於蘇門答臘島一種特殊的花，在植物園開了花。titan arum，又稱“屍花”，因為它散發著惡臭，通常休眠長達十年，然後僅僅綻放48小時。在短暫的開花期，堆糞蟲和蒼蠅太喜歡它腐敗的氣味，以至於牠們狼吞虎嚥狂吃，直到牠們滿足為止。吃完後牠們飛走時就會將花粉授粉給其他的花朵。為了防止自行授粉，雌花通常先開，幾天後雄花才會開花。當花死了，球莖會儲存能量繼續活著。球莖也會休眠四個月左右，然後再重新開始儲存能量。這種植物知道如何悠哉過活。所以，如果你發現自己在佛羅里達州的薩洛索塔或在步行蘇門達臘的熱帶雨林，記得找一找這朵titan arum(屍花)的蹤跡。
vocabulary: dormant n. 睡著的，冬眠的，靜止的

questions.stem: What is an appropriate title for this article?
translation: 以下標題何者適合這篇文章？
a. 陽光之州。
b. 植物園。現在開放！
c. 最稀有的事。
d. 前來參觀蘇門答臘。

questions.stem: Which of the following is true about the titan arum?
translation: 關於titan arum(屍花)的敘述已下列何者正確？
a. 它擁有最美麗的氣味。
b. 它原產於蘇門答臘。
c. 它喜歡自花授粉。
d. 它原產於佛羅里達州的薩洛索塔。
options: (A) It has the most beautiful smell.
(D) It is native to Sarasota, Florida.

questions.stem: How long will the flower bloom?
translation: 此花會綻放的花期多長？
a. 它會綻放48小時。
b. 它會綻放10年。
c. 它會綻放4個月。
d. 只有幾個星期。
options: (D) Only for a couple of weeks.

questions.stem: Can readers go see the titan arum mentioned in the article in bloom now?
translation: 讀者現在可以去看在文章中提及的titan arum(屍花)開花嗎？
a. 當然。它每10個小時開花。
b. 大概不會。約一個星期前就已經開花了。
c. 不會，他們已經把它移回蘇門答臘。
d. 是的，科學家們想出了一個讓它的花期更長的方法。
options: (A) Of course. It blooms every 10 hours.
(B) Probably not. The flower opened up about a week ago.
(C) No, they already moved it back to Sumatra.
(D) Yes, the scientists figured out a way to make it bloom for longer.

cards.passage:
TO: Cassandra Jackson, Accounting Supervisor
FROM: Peter Fernando, Manager
DATE: Wednesday, April 28, 2003
SUBJECT: File cabinets must be reorganized by Monday
Mrs. Jackson, the big guy Mr. Marks keeps asking me whether or not those file cabinets have been reorganized yet. He doesn't like to be kept waiting. Just to remind you, we want to color code all of the folders by Monday morning. Therefore, this task should be completed today, tomorrow, or Friday.
Blue labels should be used for all 2001 transactions. Orange labels should be used for all 2002 transactions. Pink labels should be used for all of the 2003 transactions thus far. The transactions that occurred before 2001 don't need to be organized, but they should be pushed to the back of the cabinets.
It's imperative that this is done by Monday. You must ask all of the staff working in your department to take some time out of their schedules, today or tomorrow, to do it. It should only take a couple of hours. I've done a similar task before, and I recommend just putting all of the necessary files out on those big tables near the water cooler first. Then, pile them up into the correct categories and add labels. It shouldn't be too hard.
Again, we need this done by Monday. We don't work on weekends, so that doesn't leave much time. Please ask everyone in your department to contribute some time and effort.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
TO: Sasha Wells, Manager of Inventory
FROM: Cassandra Jackson, Accounting Supervisor
DATE: Wednesday, April 28, 2003
SUBJECT: The Labels Are Still Needed
Ms. Wells, Mr. Fernando asked me about reorganizing the file cabinets earlier today. We still need those color-coding labels. He wants us to reorganize all of the file cabinets by Monday morning. This was the boss's request originally, not just his.
We need 2,000 of each color: blue, orange, and pink. You told me that you put the order in over a week ago, which means they should have arrived. If they have arrived, bring them over to our department as soon as you can. We need to get started on this task today or tomorrow. We can put it off until Friday at the latest, but it would stress everyone out to try to complete the task in one day. The end of the month is especially tiring for us.
It also might be a good idea to order additional color-coding labels, just so this doesn't happen again in the future. Mr. Fernando told me a couple weeks ago that we should use a new color for each year. The labels aren't expensive, so you can just order 2,000 of each primary color, aside from the colors we already have.
I appreciate your time.
cards.passageTranslation:
收件者：會計主管Cassandra Jackson
寄件者：經理Peter Fernando
日期： 2003年4月28日星期三
主旨：文件櫃必須在週一前重新整理
傑克森太太，老闆馬克思先生一直問我文件櫃整理好了沒。他不喜歡下屬動作太慢。只是要提醒你，我們要在星期一早上前把所有文件夾用不同的顏色標記。因此，這份工作需要在今天、明天，或者週五前要完成。
藍色標籤應被用於標示2001年所有的交易。橘色標籤應被用於標示2002年的所有的交易。粉紅色標籤應被用於2003年迄今所有的交易。 2001年之前發生的交易並不需要整理，但應該推到櫃子的最裡面。
這件工作務必要在週一之前完成。您必須要求在你部門工作的所有員工從他們的行程中排出一些時間(今天或明天)來做這件事。它應該只需要花幾個小時。我以前做過類似工作，我建議先把所有必要的文件放在靠近水冷器的大桌子上。然後，把它們依正確的類別堆起來和貼標籤。應該不會太難。
再說一次，我們需要在週一前完成。我們週末不上班，所以沒剩多少時間。請要求你部門中的每個員工都要花些時間與努力。
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
收件者：庫存經理Sasha Wells
寄件者：會計主管Cassandra Jackson
日期： 2003年4月28日星期三
主題：我們仍然需要標籤
威爾斯女士，
Fernando先生今天早些問我有關於重新整理文件櫃的事。我們仍然需要那些彩色編碼標籤。他希望我們在星期一早上以前重新整理所有的文件櫃。這不但是他的要求也是老闆本來的要求。
我們每種顏色需要2000張：藍色、橘色，和粉紅色。你說一個多星期前就訂貨了，這表示現在應該已經到貨了。如果貨到了，請盡快拿到我們部門。我們今天或明天就需要開始執行這項工作。我們最晚可以拖到星期五，但每個人都要趕著在一天內完成。對我們來說月底又特別累人。
訂購額外的彩色編碼標籤也是個好主意，這樣以後就不會再發生一樣的狀況。Fernando先生幾個星期前告訴我，我們應該每年用一種新的顏色。標籤不貴，因此除了我們已經有的顏色，基本色的標籤可以再各訂2,000張。
謝謝你的寶貴時間。
vocabulary: reorganize v. 改組，改編，重新制定
code n. 法典，法規；代碼，密碼
imperative adj. 必要的，緊急的，命令式的
contribute v. 捐款，捐獻；貢獻

questions.stem: What should be done with all of the transactions from the year 2000?
translation: 2000年所有的交易應該要怎麼處理？
a. 他們應該被標記為藍色。
b. 他們應該被移動到文件櫃的裡面。
c. 他們應該被標記為粉紅色。
d. 他們應放在靠近水冷器的大桌子上。
options: (B) They should be moved to the rear side of the file cabinets.
(D) They should be put on the big tables near the water cooler.

questions.stem: Excluding today, how many working days does Mrs. Jackson have left to complete the task?
translation: 除了今天之外， 傑克森太太還有幾天可以完成此工作？
a. 三天。
b. 兩天。
c. 五天。
d. 四天。

questions.stem: How does Mrs. Jackson react to the memo?
translation: 傑克森太太對於備忘錄如何反應？
a. 她另一個備忘錄回Peter Fernando先生。
b. 她發出了一份備忘錄給老闆。
c. 她發出了一份備忘錄給威爾斯小姐。
d. 她發出了一份備忘錄給她所有的員工。
options: (A) She replies to Mr. Fernando with another memo.
(B) She sends a memo to the boss.
(C) She sends a memo to Ms. Wells.
(D) She sends a memo to all of her staff.

questions.stem: What additional request does Mrs. Jackson make?
translation: 傑克森太太額外提出的要求為以下何者？
a. 請威爾斯小姐未來幫忙整理文件櫃。
b. 購買多一點相同顏色的標籤。
c. 購買一些不同顏色的標籤。
d. 下一次各種顏色的標籤訂購2,000張以上。
options: (A) For Ms. Wells to help organize the file cabinets in the future.
(B) To buy some extra labels of the same color.
(C) To purchase some different colored labels.
(D) To order over 2,000 labels of each color next time.

questions.stem: Who initially requested that the file cabinets be reorganized?
translation: 最初是誰所要求重新整理文件櫃？
a. Fernando先生。
b. Jackson太太
c. Wells小姐。
d. Marks先生。

cards.passage:
Jonathan, we need you to come in as soon as possible. It's kind of an emergency. I tried calling but there was no answer Jonathan Slazinsky 19:28
Sorry, I'm in a noisy place. Can't really take calls right now. What's up? Amber Lane 19:29
You know Armand, the regular who always gets the triple venti caramel macchiato? He tripped on the curb in front of the entrance. He split his forehead open and he's bleeding profusely. Jonathan Slazinsky 19:30
Did you call an ambulance? Amber Lane 19:32
Of course. It's on the way. But he's quite angry and threatening to sue. I'm not sure what to say. Jonathan Slazinsky 19:33
I'll be there in 20. Put up the closed sign and ask any other customers already sitting to leave. If they seem annoyed, give them a free drink voucher. Refrain from discussing any legal matters with Armand. I'll take care of that. Amber Lane 19:35
Got it. Ambulance arrived. Gotta go.
Amber Lane 19:15
cards.passageTranslation:
Jonathan，我們需要你立刻過來。這件事頗緊急的。我試著撥打電話給你但都無人回應。
Jonathan Slazinsky 19:28
不好意思，我正在一個吵雜的地方。現在真的無法回電。怎麼了？ Amber Lane 19:29
你知道Armand，總是喝三倍法式焦糖瑪奇朵的常客嗎？他被門口的階梯絆倒。磕破了額頭並大量出血。 Jonathan Slazinsky 19:30
你有叫救護車了嗎？
Amber Lane 19:32
當然有。救護車正在路上。但他相當地生氣，並威脅要提出告訴。我不確定要怎麼回答。 Jonathan Slazinsky 19:33
我會在二十分鐘後抵達。放上關門標誌並請剩餘已就座的顧客們離開。如果他們生氣，給他們一張免費的飲料兌換券。避免和Armand討論任何法律事件。我會負責處理。 Amber Lane 19:35
收到。救護車已抵達。該走了。

questions.stem: What kind of incident are the two people discussing?
translation: 以下選項何者是這兩人在討論的意外事件？
a. 在停車場有一場車禍事故
b. 有一位員工受傷
c. 有一位顧客在門外跌倒
d. 有一位律師正在控告這間咖啡店
options: (A) There was a car accident in the parking lot.
(D) A lawyer is suing the cafe.

questions.stem: Which of the following does Mr. Slazinsky NOT advise Ms. Lane to do?
translation: 下面哪一件事是Slazinsky先生沒有建議Lane小姐去做的？
a. 和Armand討論法律相關事宜
b. 先將咖啡店關門
c. 叫救護車
d. 要求在咖啡店內的所有客人離開
options: (D) Ask all the customers in the shop to leave.

cards.passage:
To: Wedding Coordinator, Tallulah Flowers
From: Anastasia Archibald
Sent: May 17, 2014, 9:46
Subject: Wedding Venue
Dear Mrs. Flowers,
My name is Anastasia Archibald. I am very delighted to be sending you this email regarding my fabulous upcoming wedding. For as long as I can remember, I have always wanted to get married at the Biltmore Estate. This is a very special place for my family and I. I have looked at all the venues on the estate and of course my first choice is the Biltmore House and Gardens. Money is no object. I only want the finest, so I am willing to pay to get the venue I want. The dates that we have selected to hopefully get married on are July 17, 18, 24, or 25 of 2015. Please let me know as soon as possible if any of these dates are available.
Sincerely,
Anastasia Archibald
cards.passageTranslation:
收件者：婚禮承辦員，Tallulah Flowers
寄件者：Anastasia Archibald
發送時間：2014年5月17日，9:46
主題：婚宴場地
親愛的佛洛爾太太你好，
我的名字是Anastasia Archibald。我很高興能寄信給您說明我即將到來的婚禮。從我有記憶以來，我一直想在畢爾特摩爾莊園結婚。這對我和我的家人來說是很特殊的地方。我看了看莊園裡所有的場地，當然我的第一選擇是畢爾特摩爾的主屋及花園。錢不是問題。我只想要最好的，所以我願意付錢得到我想要的場地。我們希望結婚的日期是2015年7月17、18、24或25日。請盡快通知我這些日期是否還可預訂。
誠摯的，
Anastasia Archibald
vocabulary: venue n. (事件，行動等)集合地，發生地

questions.stem: Which of the following is NOT true?
translation: 下列哪項不正確？
a. Anastasia Archibald要結婚了。
b. Anastasia Archibald願意支付任何費用。
c. Anastasia Archibald住在畢爾特摩爾莊園。
d. Anastasia Archibald想盡快得到答覆。
options: (B) Anastasia Archibald is willing to pay anything for the venue.
(C) Anastasia Archibald lives at the Biltmore Estate.
(D) Anastasia Archibald wants a reply as soon as possible.

questions.stem: Who will be replying to this email?
translation: 以下何者將會回覆此郵件？
a. 沒有人會回覆。
b. Tallulah Flowers.
c. 畢爾特摩爾莊園.
d. Anastasia Archibald.

cards.passage: Recently, Kenyans have learned how dancing can be beneficial for their country. A woman named Sudha Kheterpal wondered if she could take the energy she produced while performing her music and make it into an inexpensive usable energy source. (1)___________ With the help of a product designer, Sian Simpson, she has been able to create a prototype music shaker named ‘Spark’. (2)___________ If shaken for 12 minutes it will produce an hour’s worth of light. (3)___________ With 75% of the country without electricity, this new invention will be beneficial and cheap for most Kenyans. (4)___________ It has already been distributed among some of the people to help them walk home in the dark or read at night. It can also charge a phone! With the help of people like you, we can get this useful invention to more than just a few people in one area. If you would like to help make a change in someone’s life, you can go to Sudha Kheterpal’s kick starter page “Shake Your Power” to donate money. Someday we hope to make Spark available in shops across Kenya and the world! Go out and shake up your life!
cards.passageTranslation: 近日，肯亞人了解到跳舞如何幫助他們的國家。一位名叫Sudha Kheterpal的女子想知道她是否將她在表演音樂時所產生的能量轉變為便宜又可用的能源。在產品設計師Sian Simpson的幫助下，她已經創立一個名為「Spark」的音樂搖動器的原型。如果搖動了12分鐘就能產生一個小時的光線。這相當於六十瓦特的電量。在全國75％的地區無電可用的情況下，這一項新發明對大多數的肯亞人來說不但有益處且也很便宜。這些電力已被分配給一些人，來幫助他們摸黑走路回家或在晚上看書。也可以用來幫手機充電！有像你這樣的人們的幫助，我們可以讓這個有用的發明傳出去。如果您願意幫助改變一個人的生活，你可以捐款至Sudha Kheterpa的首發網頁“搖擺你的力量”。有一天，我們希望能在肯尼和世界各地的商店都買得到Spark！走出去，搖動你的生活！
vocabulary: distribute v. 分發，發配；分布

questions.stem: Can you buy the shaker in stores around the world?
translation: 你可以世界各地的商店買這個搖動器嗎？
a. 你只能在肯亞買到。
b. 您可以在任何一間Wal-Mart買到。
c. 你只能在網路上買到。
d. 不行，它還只是一個原型。
options: (A) You can only buy them in Kenya.
(B) You can get it at any Wal-Mart.
(C) You can only buy them online.
(D) No, it is just a prototype.

questions.stem: What exactly is Spark?
translation: Spark到底是什麼？
a. 一個在搖動時可以產生能量的設備。
b. 一個為肯亞的窮人籌集資金的團體。
c. 一種使用低能量電池的燈光。
d. 一種跳舞時會發光的新手機。
options: (A) A device that can produce energy when shaken.
(B) A group that raises money for impoverished people in Kenya.
(C) A light that uses low-energy batteries.
(D) A new kind of phone that makes light when you dance.

questions.stem: In which of the positions marked (1), (2), (3), and (4) does the following sentence best belong? "This is equivalent to 60 watts of energy."
translation: 以下句子最適合放在空格(1), (2), (3), (4)的哪個位置？
『這相當於六十瓦特的電量。』

Dear Trippy Store,
It's Monday morning and I just realized that I never received a confirmation email for the order I placed on Friday afternoon. My order number is 888373611-br and the total after discount and taxes came to AUD 3207.90. We've never had a problem ordering from you guys in the past, and there is no major rush on this order, so please let me know once you figure out whether the order was received or if I should place it again. We love your Persian theme line of bedspreads and pillowcases, as they are a perfect match for our resort's theme.
If it's not too late, I'd actually like to add one more item to the order. We'd also like 10 of the 4 x 2 meter Persian carpets with the burgundy background (part # TG-UU6). We've considered them many times in the past but were always reluctant due to the price. We've finally decided to give them a try but only in our VIP suites.
Looking forward to your reply,
Sheryl Crow
Purchasing manager,
Persia Resort, Brisbane
------------------------------------------------ MESSAGES
Message for: Sheryl Crow
Date: Tuesday, June 21, 2016
Time: 9:22 A.M.
Caller: Diane Kesler
Callback number: +65 8873-9881
Message: Mrs. Kesler called from Trippy Store in Singapore. First, she said that it was a long weekend there, so they were off on Friday and yesterday. That's why there was no confirmation sent out for your order.
Second, she indicated that their supplier has just recently decided to discontinue their entire line of Persian-themed products, which included the bedspreads, pillowcases, and carpets that you were hoping to order. She said that they were literally informed about this last week and haven't had a chance to update their online catalogue yet.
She said they realize that we may want to order identical products because we have already ordered these previously and we surely want all the rooms in our resort to match. Therefore, she is going to contact the manufacturer directly to see if they are still producing these designs. If they aren't, she indicated she would go out of her way to find another supplier that offers similar products.
Finally, she mentioned that the desert-theme wall tapestries are still in stock and wants to know if you'd like those delivered ASAP, or if you want to wait until she can confirm the situation with the Persian line of products.

親愛的 Trippy 商店，
現在是星期一早上而我才剛發現到我還未收到星期五下午所訂購商品的通知信。我的訂單編號是888373611-br，且總金額在折扣及稅後是3207.90澳幣。 我們以前和你們訂購商品時，從未出現過問題，這筆訂單並不急迫，但請你們一確定訂單是否收到時，讓我們知道或是我應不應該再訂購一次。我們熱愛妳們的Persian 主題的系列床罩及枕頭，和我們度假中心的主題非常合適。 如果還不太遲得話，我其實想要再訂單上再增加一則項目。我們也想加訂10張4 x 2 公尺長，有法國勃艮地背景的Persian 毯子 (編號# TG-UU6)。我們之前曾多次考慮過，但總由於價格而遲遲不願訂購。我們最後終於決定只在我們的總統套房中試用看看。 期待你的回音，
Sheryl Crow
採購經理，
布里斯本的Persia度假中心 訊息
訊息收件人：Sheryl Crow
寄件日期：20160621，星期二
寄件時間：上午9點22分
訊息寄件人： Diane Kesler
回撥電話： +65 8873-9881
訊息內容：新加坡Trippy商店的Kesler小姐來電。首先，她提到之前週末有長假，所以他們星期五及昨天休息。這就是為何你還沒收到訂單確認信。
第二，她表示，她們的供應商近期決定要停產所有Persian主題產品，包含床罩，枕頭及你想加訂的毯子。她說他們上禮拜已確實通知過這件事，但還沒來得及更新網站上的目錄。
她說她明白我們可能會想要訂購同樣的商品，因為我們之前已訂購過，且我們肯定想要我們度假中心所有的房間都能互相搭配。因此，她將會直接和製造商聯繫，看使否能繼續生產這些設計商品。如果無法，她表示她將會儘她最大努力來找尋其他是否有提供相似產品的供應商。 最後，她提到沙漠主題的牆壁繡帷依舊還有庫存，並想知道你是否想要他們立刻寄出這些商品，或是你想要等到她確認Persian產線之產品狀況後再決定。 重要單字

cards.passage:
Help Wanted at Top Secret Investigations
Position available: Private Investigator
Are you always questioning people around you when something happens on the news or in your own neighborhood? Do you find yourself always watching crime solving shows? Do people always tell you that you are too nosy? Do you find yourself creeping around taking pictures of people and things?
Well, look no further! Welcome to your new job opportunity! We are hiring professional private investigators at Top Secret Investigations. You don't need any experience to apply because we will put you through our six-months training course to get you ready for some real life investigations. You could possibly be involved with matrimonial investigations, missing persons, identity theft, corporate or commercial investigations, accident investigations, evidence gathering and much more! You can be a real life Sherlock Holmes.
Please bring a resume and background check to the interview.
Contact us at topsecretuk@gmail.com or call us at 020 7070 5426 to set up your interview.
cards.passageTranslation:
機密調查徵信社誠徵助手
職缺：私家偵探
當新聞報導或你家附近有事發生時，你是否總是在質疑你周圍的人呢？你是否發現自己總是看破案的節目？人們是否總是告訴你，你太愛管閒事？你是否發現自己會偷拍周圍的人、事物的照片？
好了，不用再找了！歡迎你的新工作吧！我們機密調查徵信社正在招募專業的私家偵探。你不需要任何經驗，因為我們會讓你參加為期六個月的培訓課程，讓你準備好調查真實生活發生的事件。你可能會接觸婚姻徵信，失蹤人口，身份盜竊，企業或商業調查，事故調查，蒐證以及更多更多的調查案件！你可以成為現實生活中的福爾摩斯。
請攜帶履歷和背景調查報告來面試。
經由topsecretuk@gmail.com聯繫我們或致電02070705426安排你的面試。
vocabulary: creep v. 爬行，緩慢地前進
matrimonial adj. 婚姻的，夫婦的
identity theft n. 身分竊盜
corporate adj. 法人(組織)的，公司的

cards.passage:
Why haven't we received the desktop order from Telus through the automated ordering system yet?
Teresa Chen (12:19)
I was on the verge of making the sale, but now they've received a better offer from our competitor. I'm afraid we might lose the sale.
Danny Ticker (12:26)
That is unacceptable. We can't afford to lose this customer. What do you need to make it happen? Teresa Chen (12:30)
The bottom line is that I need to offer them a lower price. They've had a slow year and are experiencing major budget constraints.
Sonja Metcalf (12:40)
I don't think we can budge on the price. We've already gone lower than we normally do.
Danny Ticker (12:48)
Is there some kind of freebie we can offer them?
Teresa Chen (12:56)
I don't think they care about freebies.
Danny Ticker (1: 06)
Even season tickets for the Warriors home games? We've got five left.
Teresa Chen (1:10)
I've already tried. Sonja, are you positive we can't go just a little lower? The competitor's price is only 3% lower than ours. But we stand to lose tens of thousands per year if we part ways with this client.
Sonja Metcalf (1: 19)
Listen, here's what I can do. I've just talked to my boss, and she's agreed to let us go down another 5% but that's it. Any lower than that and we won't even be making enough to cover our base production and shipping costs.
Danny Ticker (12:13)
cards.passageTranslation:
為什麼我們還沒收到Telus藉由自動訂購系統所填的桌上型電腦的訂購單呢？
Teresa Chen (12:19)
我快到議價階段，但現在他們從我們的競爭對手那邊得到更好的報價。恐怕我們會輸掉這筆訂單。 Danny Ticker (12:26)
這無法接受。我們承受不起失去這位客戶。你需要什麼來讓這筆訂單達成？ Teresa Chen (12:30)
底線是：我需要提供他們更低的報價。他們今年的獲利較低，公司預算因而受限。 Sonja Metcalf (12:40)
我不認為我們還能再降低報價。我們已經提出比平常還低的價格了。
Danny Ticker (12:48)
有任何我們可以提供給他們的贈品嗎？
Teresa Chen (12:56)
我不覺得他們在乎贈品。
Danny Ticker (1:06)
即便是勇士隊主場賽的季票？我們還剩五張。
Teresa Chen (1:10)
我已經試過了。Sonja，你確定我們無法再降低一點價格嗎？對手的出價只比我們低3%而已。且如果我們停止和客戶議價的話，我們將即可能失去每年上萬元的訂單。
Sonja Metcalf (1: 19)
聽著，這是我能做的。我已直接和我的老闆談，她已同意讓我們再降低5%的價格，但這是底限了。再低會甚至讓我們無法負荷基本生產及運送的成本。

cards.passageTranslation:
在隆斯頓電訊中心開始你的第一份工作吧！ 2008年10月26日東部時區上午6:43發佈
隆斯頓電訊中心是一間發展中的電話中心，有最新的設備和一個優秀的團隊。我們的辦公大樓位於紐澤西州普林斯頓，在Lowe街和第三大道的交叉口。工作時間從週一至週五，上午8:30至下午5:30。我們一個小時支付10.5美金，這和紐澤西州大多數電訊中心相比是相當高的薪資。 我們正在尋找外向及能積極為我們的客戶提供優質的服務的人。您必須喜歡配戴耳機，也需要具備基本的電腦技能。您的打字速度每分鐘至少30個字以上。電話通常為2至3分鐘，一般我們的員工每個小時會接15通電話。這些數字可能會依一天不同的時段而不同。辦公室的氣氛通常很活潑但步調快。 除了週一到週五白天，我們也有週末夜班。星期六和星期天我們晚上10:00 PM到早上5:30 營業。因為這個職缺的來電數較少，這每小時您的時薪9美元。 這個職缺馬上就可以應徵。現在就申請！
回覆
*透過電子郵件回覆：d7xcl-683829838@job.craigslist.org 工作公告 #8871

寄件者：hansenjeremy83@yahoo.com
主旨：Re：在Langston電話中心開始你的職業生涯吧！

- 公認的學士學位。
- 在我的大學生涯中成績優秀。
- 在知名連鎖超商獲得管理經驗。 我期望能夠得到你們的回信！ 真誠的，
Jeremy Hansen 重要單字

d. 四天後。

cards.passage:
For general information: internationalinfo@srartstudio.com --------------------------------------------------------------- To: internationalstudio@srartstudio.com
From: beatricegustav1990@skovdeuni.se
Date: August 12, 2012
Time: 12:08 AM
Subject: Questions Hello, My name is Beatrice Gustav. I live in Sweden. I'd like to rent a studio from November 1, 2012 until August 31, 2013. However, I'm going to visit London for one month, from March 15 until April 15. Do I have to pay for the studio while I'm gone? Is there a chance I can sublet the studio? I've already talked with some of my friends in France about this, and they are willing to stay there for that time and pay the fee. I also wanted to know if the darkroom is open 24/7. I like to work in the evening and develop my film at night. During my last residency, at a studio in Sweden, I was given a key to access the darkroom at night. Would the situation be similar here? I talked with my German friend, and he said that he was able to get funding from your studio two years ago. On your website it says this isn't possible. Have you recently changed your policy? If it isn't possible to get funding, can you recommend some outside sources that provide funding for international artists? A prompt reply would be greatly appreciated, because I'm debating about whether to choose Seine River Art Studio or a different place. Best,
Beatrice Gustav
--------------------------------------------------------------- www.seineriverart.com/FAQ.html
FAQ
Q: Does your studio have free WiFi?
A: Yes, free Wifi is available throughout the studio, including all of the private and shared studios, dormitories, and private rooms. The password will be provided upon your arrival.
Q: Can I bring guests to my room?
A: Unfortunately, we do not allow any guests to enter the studio unless there is a special event. This includes all private rooms. Rooms or dormitory beds also may not be rented out to other people by their occupants. This is strictly forbidden.
Q: Why do you no longer provide funding to international residents?
A: International funding was cut cancel last year due to a large increase in applications from abroad. We apologize for any inconvenience.
cards.passageTranslation:
國際藝術家的住所 在法國巴黎的塞納河藝術工作室，提供國際藝術家體驗巴黎同時琢磨技巧以及發展事業的機會。 塞納河藝術工作室靠近藝術大學，將帶給每一位藝術家認識工作室外的其他學生及藝術家的機會。最初，工作室是一間宿舍。由212間房間組成，其中50間為私人工作室，40間為大型共用工作室。100間私人及共用的客房可供藝術家過夜。除了70間客房提供給本地藝術家，我們可以容納多達30個國際藝術家。 整個工作室都可連線上網。裡面有一個展演用的寬敞展覽大廳，還有一個暗室，和幾個供陳列作品的畫廊。常有短期課程可供藝術家上課進修。還有很多來訪的大學講師，當地博物館負責人和知名評論家。 最短居留期為四個月，最長為兩年。此規則適用於所有本地與國際藝術家。今年接受申請的截止日期為2012年10月14日。不像本地藝術家，國際藝術家沒有塞納河藝術工作室的資金援助，如果想節省成本，就必須另尋他處。 以電子郵件的方式聯絡較佳。 租用工作室的相關資訊請至：internationalstudio@srartstudio.com
一般資訊請至：internationalinfo@srartstudio.com ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- 收件者：internationalstudio@srartstudio.com
寄件者：beatricegustav1990@skovdeuni.se
寄件日期：2012年8月12日
件件時間：上午12:08
主旨：問題 您好， 我的名字是Beatrice Gustav，我住在瑞典。我2012年11月1日至2013年8月31日想租一間工作室。但是，在3月15日至4月15日期間我會在倫敦待一個月，我不在的期間也需要付工作室的費用嗎？可以轉租工作室給別人嗎？我已經和一些在法國朋友談過了，他們願意待在那裡並支付費用。 我也想知道，暗房是否一天24小時都開放。我喜歡晚上工作沖洗底片。我上次入住一間在瑞典的工作室，他們給我一把鑰匙可以晚上去暗房工作。請問這裡也是嗎？ 我跟我的德國朋友聊過，他說兩年前他從您們的工作室得到補助款，但您們的網站上卻說這不行。是您們最近改變政策了嗎？如果無法獲得補助，您能推薦一些資助國際藝術家的資源嗎？ 我對您們迅速的回覆不勝感激。因為我在考慮是否要選擇塞納河藝術工作室或另一個不同的工作室。 誠摯的，
Beatrice Gustav www.seineriverart.com/FAQ.html
問答集
問：你的工作室有無線網路(Wifi)嗎？
答：是的，免費的無線網路涵蓋整間工作室的範圍，包括個人房及公用套房、宿舍及私人房間。到達時才提供密碼。
問：我可以帶客人回房間嗎？
答：不幸地，除非有特殊活動，否則攜帶任何客人回房都是不允許的。這項規定適用於所有的個人房。房間內的床位或宿舍床位也不得轉租他人使用。這點嚴厲禁止。
問：為何你不再贊助國際住客？
答：因為海外的申請大量增加，因此國際贊助金去年被刪除。我們為您的不便感到抱歉。
vocabulary: internet access n. 網路使用

questions.stem: What is different for local and international artists?
translation: 本地和國際藝術家有什麼不同？
a. 本地藝術家的截止日期早於國際藝術家。
b. 工作室可容納比本地藝術家更多的國際藝術家。
c. 本地藝術家的居住時間必須比國際藝術家長。
d. 國際藝術家無法獲得工作室的財務資助。
options: (A) The deadline for local artists is sooner than it is for international artists.
(B) The studio can accommodate more international artists than local artists.
(C) Local artists must stay longer than international artists.
(D) International artists cannot get financial aid from the studio.

questions.stem: What must an international artist who wants to reside at the studio do?

c. 10月14日之後申請。

options: (D) Call the studio before emailing them.

questions.stem: Omitting the time she will be in London, about how many months does Beatrice plan to stay in the studio?

(B) Whether her German friend would like the studio or not.

questions.stem: Which of Beatrice's questions is answered on the FAQ page?

options: (A) Is there a chance I can sublet the studio?

cards.passage:
Open House!

We have a beautiful home in a modern and safe area that has just come onto the market. The asking price is $650,000. The home sits on a 1/2 acre of land.
