cards.passage:
HOME | ABOUT | BLOG | NEWS | CONTACT
Corner Business Solutions are custom designed to help customers implement effective solutions for operational excellence, business intelligence, and risk management. Download this PDF file to see a list of companies that we have worked with to achieve success. The list is only a small portion of our client base, since many are not listed due to confidentiality issues.
So how can Corner Business Solutions help your enterprise? Here is a short list that is just a sample of the many areas that we can provide valuable assistance:
Customer Relations
Market Analysis
Enterprise Resource Acquisition
Human Capital Management
Database Review
Supply Chain Management
Advertising
Procurement
To show our commitment to potential clients, we are also offering this free Enterprise Self Analysis program. Click here to complete a brief online survey. Once you submit the resume, you will automatically receive an email detailing areas that your enterprise could be improved, and how we can help.
To: colin_farrow@htma.com
From: survey@cornerbusinesssolutions.com
Date: 7/24/2014
Subject: Your Survey Results
Dear Mr. Farrow,
First and foremost, we would like to extend our gratitude to you for taking the time out of your busy schedule to peruse our website and complete the first step in our free Enterprise Self Analysis program, the online survey.
Based on the answers that you provided, here is what we know about you:
Areas that you are thriving:
employee satisfaction
production efficiency
Areas that you have room for improvement;
product range
adapting to market trends
We feel that your company knows what it is good at, and focuses on that. This is a recipe for stability. However, if you are looking to take things to a new level, it is time for you to expand your product range and adapt to ever-changing market trends. Times are changing quickly, and your customers are getting a little bored.
Here at Corner we specialize in product range expansion and market analysis, among many other things. We would like to discuss more with you how we can help to grow your business and double your profits in less than a year, guaranteed. We prefer face-to-face meetups and would be happy to send a representative to meet with you for a free consultation at your convenience. We will be contacting you in the next 24 hours using the phone number that you provided in the survey.
We look forward to cooperating with you!
Matt Freeman
Owner, Corner Business Solutions
www.corner-business-solutions.com
HOME | ABOUT | BLOG | NEWS | CONTACT
cards.passageTranslation:
角落商業諮詢量身訂做為客戶的經營成效、商業情報、風險管理執行有效用的解決辦法。請下載這份圖檔看看因我們的協助而成功的公司。這份列表只是我們客戶群的一小部分，許多公司因為資料保密未列入表中。
角落商業諮詢如何能幫助您的企業呢？以下簡短列舉我們能提供專業協助的領域。
顧客關係
市場分析
企業資源的取得
人資管理
資料庫檢查
供應鏈管理
廣告
採購
為了顯現我們對潛在客戶的承諾，我們也提供這項免費的企業自我分析計畫。請點擊Here完成簡短的線上調查。一但您將履歷送件，你會收到一封自動回覆的電子郵件，列表您的企業可以改善的領域細項，以及我們如何提供協助。 寄件人：colin_farrow@htma.com
收件人：survey@cornerbusinesssolutions.com
日期：7/24/2014
主題：線上調查結果
親愛的Farrow先生：
最首要也最重要，我們要感謝您在忙碌的時間撥空細讀網站，完成我們免費的企業自我分析計畫的第一步---線上調查表。
根據您所提供的答案，以下是我們對你的了解：
成功的領域：
員工滿意度
生產效能
可改善的領域：
產品類別
對市場潮流的適應力
我們認為您的公司明瞭其擅長的領域，且也專注其中。這是事業穩定的方針。然而，假如你想要將提升到新的層級，那麼擴展產品類別來適應這瞬息萬變的市場潮流的的時機已到。時代快速變更，您的客戶已經覺得有點乏味。
在所有領域中，角落商業諮詢對擴展產品類別及市場分析最為專精。我們想要與您討論我們如何能協助您的公司，在一年之內將公司利潤翻倍，這點我們能掛保證。我們比較喜歡面對面的會議，因此我們很樂意請業務代表在您方便的時間免費諮詢。我們會在接下來24小時內用您在調查表裡提供的電話與您聯絡。
我們期待與您共事！
Matt Freeman
角落商業諮詢，公司老闆

questions.stem: What does Corner Business Solutions do?
translation: 以下選項何者是角落商業諮詢的工作範圍？
a. 販售各種有用的產品。
b. 協助企業加強效率最大化及增加最多的利潤。
c. 為公司雇用及管理新任員工。
d. 協助人們創業。
解析：根據第一篇第一句可知角落商業的工作範圍在於輔導企業強化管理及生產。故選項(B)為正解。
options: (A) Sell a wide range of useful products.
(B) Help enterprises to maximize efficiency and profit.
(C) Hire and manage new staff members for companies.
(D) Assist people to establish new businesses.

questions.stem: Why does Corner only list a small number of their clients in the downloadable file?
translation: 在下載的檔案中，這間公司只有列舉少數的客戶的原因為何？
a. 僅僅因為列表過長。
b. PDF檔有大小尺寸的限制。
c. 有些客戶不想要被公開。
d. 他們不想要網頁過長。
解析：根據第一篇第一段「…since many are not listed due to confidentiality issues」可知選項(C)為正解。
options: (A) The list is simply too long.
(B) The PDF file has size restraints.
(C) Some of their clients don't want to be listed publically.
(D) They don't want this web page to be too long.

questions.stem: Who is Colin Farrow, most likely?
translation: Colin Farrow最有可能是以下何者？
a. 銀行家
b. 監護人
c. 寄養家庭工作人員
d. 企業家
解析：根據第二篇第一段可推斷，會向角落企業尋求協助的人應該是公司的負責人。

questions.stem: Which of the following is not a purpose of the Enterprise Self Analysis program?
translation: 以下選項何者並非企業自我分析計畫的目的？
a. 決定公司的長處為何。
b. 決定公司的弱點為何。
c. 鼓勵公司支持角落商業所提供的服務。
d. 計算公司的淨利。
解析：根據第二篇文章中線上調查的結果，可發現這個計畫會列舉公司專長的領域，可加強的領域，以及延攬該公司使用角落商業所提供的服務，故可知選項(D)並非角落商業的服務內容。
options: (A) To determine strengths in a company.
(B) To determine weaknesses in a company.
(C) To encourage companies to enlist Corner's services.
(D) To calculate a company's net profits.

questions.stem: What advice is given to Colin Farrow?
translation: 以下選項何者是提供給Colin Farrow的建議？
a. 更加有效率。
b. 雇用更多員工。
c. 將員工照顧得更好。
d. 販售各種不同的產品。
解析：根據第二篇文章的第一段，角落提供的建議為「it is time for you to expand your product range」。故選項(D)為正解。
options: (C) To take better care of staff.
(D) To sell a wider variety of products.

cards.passage:
I already sent you an email two days ago but haven’t yet heard back from you. Did you receive my first message?
As I mentioned before, I recently purchased an annual membership for the Commonwealth Sport & Fitness Center for a fee of 249.99. My membership number is 1387181 and attached you can find a scanned copy of my card.
Due to unforeseen circumstances, i.e. a recent promotion, I am going to be extremely occupied for the next year. Previously I finished work early enough to take advantage of your facilities on weekday evenings, but I’m afraid that now I am going to be stuck at the office until well past your Fitness Center’s closing time of 8 PM. Furthermore, I am frequently going to be out of town on weekend business trips, meaning that I also won’t be able to access your facilities on Saturdays and Sundays.
The woman at your front desk already informed me that I am unable to get a refund, but she suggested that I might get in touch with you. I was wondering if you could make an exception to your policy given the unexpected nature of my situation.
Thank you in advance for your kind understanding.
Best regards,
Neil Wu
Mobile: 555-910-2227
Work: 555-345-6789 #3838
Commonwealth Sport & Fitness Center
Cardholder: Neil Wu
Membership Number: 1387181
Description: This card entitles the above person only to unlimited use of the public facilities at the Commonwealth Sport and Fitness Center, including exercise rooms, swimming pool, tennis and badminton courts, and rock climbing facility. There are no refunds for this card after the 10-day trial period.
Expiry Date: April 2, 2013
To: neilwu@cold.com From: wendybrown@book.com Date: April 28, 2011 Subject: Re_Membership refund request Dear Mr. Wu,
I apologize for the late reply on what I realize is a very important matter. I have just returned from a temporary leave for medical reasons. However, unfortunately, the fact remains that we will be unable to refund your annual membership.
At the time of purchase of your annual membership, which, according to our records, was on April 2, 2011, you signed a contract. Clause 7 on the contract clearly indicates our refund policy, and here is a direct quote of the relevant statement:
“Annual memberships are subject to a 10 day trial period. Should you decide to cancel your membership before closing time on the tenth day of your trial period, you must do so in person with one of our customer service representatives.”
Our sales representative confirmed that when the conversation between you and her regarding your initial refund request transpired, three days had already passed since the end of your trial period. Regretfully, there are no exceptions to this clause, no matter how extreme or unexpected they are.
However, I am pleased to inform you that our facilities management board has recently decided to extend our weekday opening hours to 9:30 PM. Weekend opening hours will remain the same. I truly hope that this means you will still be able to make sufficient use of your membership.
Sincerely,
Wendy Brown
Sales and Marketing Manager
收信人：wendybrown@book.com
cards.passageTranslation:
寄件人：neilwu@cold.com
日期：2011年4月20日
標題：請求會員退費
親愛的Brown女士：
兩天前我已經寄了一封電子郵件，但尚未收到你的回音。請問你收到我第一封訊息了嗎？ 正如我先前提到，我近期申購了卡曼運動健身中心的年度會員資格，費用為249.99美金。我的會員編號是1387181，你可以在附件中看到卡片的掃描檔。
由於一些未預期的狀況，像是近期的職位升遷，我明年的工作會非常忙碌。之前，我的下班時間早，平常日晚上可以去你的中心，但現在我恐怕一直到你們8點關門前都還卡在公司。我周末常出城洽公，也就是說我也沒辦法在星期六日去運動中心。 櫃台的女士已經告知我無法退費，但她建議我和你聯絡。我想知道你是否可以考量我這始料未及的情況而為我破例，。 先感謝您善心地體諒。 感謝，
Neil Wu
手機: 555-910-2227
工作: 555-345-6789 #3838
卡曼運動健身中心
持卡人：Neil Wu
會員編號：1387181
資格細節：卡片上述持有人有權利無限使用卡曼運動健身中心的公共設施，包括健身房、游泳池、網球及羽球場、與攀岩設施。本卡在10天試用期後不得退費。
過期日期：2013年4月2日
To: neilwu@cold.com From: wendybrown@book.com Date: April 28, 2011 日期：2011年4月20日
標題：請求會員退費
吳先生您好：
我很抱歉我太晚回覆這件大事。我因為醫療問題才剛回到工作崗位。但我很抱歉，我們無法幫你退款。 根據公司紀錄你在2011年4月2日購買年度會員資格時曾簽了一紙合約。合約第七條指出我們的退款規定，以下是相關敘述的引條。 「年度會員在試用10天後生效」。你應當在試用期的第十天前取消會員資格，你必須親自和我們的客服代表會面一次。 我們的客服代表確認您第一次的申請退款的面談時，已經超過試用期三天了。我很抱歉，不論是多誇張或出人預料之外的事，我們都無法為你破例。 然而，我很高興知會你，我們的設施管理部門近期決定增加開放天數以及開放時間到晚間9點30分。周末會維持開店時間。周末上班時間依然相同。我真地希望這項改變意味你將可以善用你的會員權益。
真誠的，
Wendy Brown
營銷經理，

questions.stem: What do we know about Mr. Wu's current work situation?
translation: 以下選項關於吳先生目前的工作狀況何者正確？
（Ａ）他最近當上公司的董事長。
（Ｂ）他之前不知道他將會有升遷機會。
（Ｃ）他再一年就可以升遷。
（Ｄ）他因為工作的關係，最近會搬出城區。
解析：
第一段Due to unforeseen circumstances, i.e. a recent promotion, I am going to be extremely occupied for the next year.，故選（B）。
refund (n)退款
The stingy man tried to get a refund even though he had worn the shirt already.
即使襯衫已經穿過，這個小氣鬼仍試圖想要退錢。
options: (A) He recently became the president of his company.
(B) He didn't know that he was going to get a promotion.
(C) He is going to get a promotion in one year.
(D) He is soon moving out of town for work reasons.

questions.stem: What is the purpose of Mr. Wu's email?
translation: 以下選項何者是吳先生寄發這封電子郵件的目的？
（Ａ）要求Wendy偏離公司政策。
（Ｂ）詢問Wendy相關政策的內容。
（Ｃ）要求Wendy改變公司政策。
（Ｄ）通知Wendy公司政策並不公平。
解析：
最後一段提到I was wondering if you could make an exception to your policy given the unexpected nature of my situation.故（A）是答案。
options: (A) To ask Wendy Brown to deviate from the center's policy.
(B) To ask Wendy Brown what exactly the relevant policy is.
(C) To ask Wendy Brown to change the center's policy.
(D) To inform Wendy Brown that the center's policy is unfair.

questions.stem: Why was Wendy Brown's response delayed?
translation: 以下選項何者是Wendy Brown回覆晚到的原因？
（Ａ）她忘記回覆信件。
（Ｂ）她有事在忙。
（Ｃ）她生病請假。
（Ｄ）她那時在度假中。
解析：回信中的第一段I have just returned from a temporary leave for medical reasons.，故選項(C)。

questions.stem: On what day did Mr. Wu first try to get a refund for his annual membership?
translation: 吳先生哪一天要求年度會員退費？

questions.stem: There is one mistake on the membership card. Where is it found?
translation: 會員卡上有一個錯誤。以下選項何者為會員卡片上的錯誤訊息？
（Ａ）持卡人姓名。
（Ｂ）會員編號。
（Ｃ）資格敘述。
（Ｄ）到期日。

cards.passage:
Rapid weight gain is a common issue that is frequently reported by office workers in their first year of such employment. (1) _____________ In fact, the problem is not exclusively related to office workers, but to any kind of workers who find themselves sitting for long periods of time throughout their working day, including drivers, accountants, software designers, and so on. The problem is also particularly common when employees were previously used to being on their feet more or working jobs/enjoying lifestyles that included more daily physical activity. (2) _____________
It is difficult to counter this phenomenon, but by no means impossible. (3) _____________ Workers ought to stand up and stretch once every 20 minutes. Another useful tip is to take advantage of exercise or sport classes offered by your company during lunch, other breaks, or before and after working hours. If no such programs are offered, do exercise of your own during these times. (4) _____________ Finally, try to be more active at the weekend or other days off, such as holidays, to make up for all the sitting time.
cards.passageTranslation:
體重快速增加是第一年上任的辦公室職員最常通報的議題。事實上，問題並不限於辦公室職員，而是其他任何一種工作要久坐的員工也有，包括司機、會計、軟體設計師等等。員工們之前很習慣走動或做一些包含每日身體活動的生活型態時，這個問題也特別常見。
要逆轉這個現象很困難，但絕非不可能。員工應該每20分鐘就要起身走走或拉拉筋骨。另一項有用的秘訣是善用公司午餐時間、其他休息時間、上班前或下班後所提供的運動課程。假如公司沒有提供這種課程，在這些休息時間自己做運動。即使是15分鐘的輕便散步也比甚麼都不做來得好。最後，嘗試在周末或國定假日之類的放假日，多去走走來彌補這些坐著的時間。

questions.stem: What is the main idea of the article?
translation: 這篇文章的主旨為何?
A.假如你的工作要久坐，基本上要避免體重快速增加是不可能的。
B.所有的辦公室職員每個20分鐘都應該要站起來拉拉筋骨。
C.許多新任的員工一開始體重都會增加，但要逆轉是可能的。
D.假如你是辦公室職員，食用健康的食物是避免體重增加最好的方式。
解析：
第一段第一句的主題句Rapid weight gain is a common issue that is frequently reported by office workers in their first year of such employment。故選(C)。
options: (A) It is basically impossible to avoid putting on weight rapidly if you have a job that involves sitting a lot.
(B) All office workers should stand and stretch once every 20 minutes.
(C) Many recruits in new positions gain weight at first, but it is possible to counteract this.
(D) Eating healthy food is the best way to avoid gaining weight if you are an office worker.

questions.stem: Who would be more likely to suffer from rapid weight gain?
translation: 以下選項何者的體重較有可能會快速增加?
（Ａ）一位在公司工作超過20年的經理。
（Ｂ）一位之前在餐廳當過服務生的員工。
（Ｃ）一位下班時會去爬山的新任員工。
（Ｄ）一位參加公司提供的體能活動課程的員工。
解析：
第一段最後一句The problem is also particularly common when employees were previously used to being on their feet more or working jobs/enjoying lifestyles that included more daily physical activity，故選(B)。
options: (A) A manager who has been with the company for 20 years.
(B) An employee whose last job was being a waiter in a restaurant.
(C) A new recruit who takes advantage of his time off by hiking.
(D) A worker who takes advantage of physical activity programs offered by the company.

questions.stem: In which of the positions marked (1), (2), (3), and (4) does the following sentence best belong? "Even a casual 15-minute stroll is better than nothing."
translation: 以下句子放入文章標記的(1), (2), (3),(4)的空格，最為合適？
「即使是15分鐘的輕便散步也比甚麼都不做來得好。」

cards.passage:
to: Nicholas@me.com {Nicholas Vernon}
date: Sat, Sep 3, 2016 at 10:40 PM
subject: An invitation from AskingAmericas AskingAmericans
Dear Nicholas,
Closing:
Sept. 5 or until we reach out target number of participants. This survey is NOT mobile compatible. You will receive:
$10 off your next purchase at City Super Length:
approximately 10 minutes.
Please note, the survey may be hosted by one of our partners and may look a little different from our usual surveys. However, as per our strict privacy policy, your responses to survey questions are combined with those of other participants and are tabulated only in the aggregate. Your answers will therefore remain entirely confidential and your identity will always remain anonymous.
Click here to take the survey now.
from: Nicholas@me.com {Nicholas Vernon}
to: Shannon Friedmont {AskingAmericans@confirmit.com}
date: Sat, Sep 3, 2016 at 11:42 PM
subject: Comments regarding program
Dear Ms. Friendmont,
I have been participating in your “survey for rewards” program for the last year and I have always highly enjoyed this unique program. I like helping your guys do surveys, and I love getting discounts, so it is a win-win situation!
However, recently I have noticed a few issues that I thought I should bring to your attention. First, the estimated length of the surveys has been way off lately. Sometimes it says that it will only take 10 minutes but I require 20 or more. Other times, it says it will take half an hour and I’m done in 10.
Secondly, on a recent survey I received and completed on September 3, I would have liked to know before starting the survey that a video component would be required. If I had known that I would have to record myself, I wouldn’t have agreed to take the survey because I don’t liked being filmed. I had no choice but to quit the survey halfway through, which was a waste of my time.
As a long-term participant, I trust that you will take my suggestions seriously.
Thanks and regards,
Nicholas Memorandum
To all survey program managers and staff,
After receiving complaints from several survey participants on the same couple of issues in the last few months, we’ve decided to make the following changes:
From now on, individual survey teams will not be in charge of coming up with the estimated survey length that is included in every survey notification email. Participants have been complaining that some surveys take way longer than indicated, which others take less time. This is likely because different teams have different ways of guessing the average person’s time needed. We will now have a separate unit whose task is to determine the length for all surveys. Therefore, you no longer need to try to calculate this. If your survey contains any required sound or video recording on the part of participants, this must be mentioned in the survey introduction that is sent out to potential participants. We will now have a survey maximum length of 60 questions. The previous maximum of 100 was simply too much, and far too few of the participants were making it all the way through some of those longer ones. If you have any questions about the above changes, please contact Shannon at ext #45.
寄件人：Shannon Friedmont {AskingAmericans@confirmit.com}
收件人：Nicholas@me.com {Nicholas Vernon}
cards.passageTranslation:
日期：2016年9月3日星期六10:40 PM
主題：AskingAmericas邀請您 AskingAmericans
親愛的Nicholas：
截止時間：
直到我們收到預定的人數前，或9月5日截止。這份市調與手機系統不相容。 你將會收到：
下次在City Super購買抵用10元。 長度：
大約10分鐘。
請注意，這份市調由我們的夥伴企業製作，與我們常做的市調稍有不同。然而，根據我們嚴守的隱私權法規，你對市調問題的回答將與其他參與者的回答彙整再一起製作成表格。因此您的回答依然是機密，而您的身分將永遠是匿名顯示。
請點擊here，開始進行市調。
寄件人：Nicholas@me.com {Nicholas Vernon}
收件人：Shannon Friedmont {AskingAmericans@confirmit.com}
日期：2016年9月3日星期六11:42 PM
主題：對於市調計畫的意見
親愛的Friendmont小姐：
我參與你們公司的「市調拿獎品」已經一年了，我一直以來都很喜歡這個特別的計畫項目。我喜歡幫你們回答市調問題，我也喜歡拿折扣，因此這真是一個雙贏的情況！
但是，最近我發現幾點問題，我想我應該讓你們知道。首先，近期的市調長度並不正確。有時上面說整份只花10分鐘，但我卻花20分鐘或更長的時間。有幾次，上面說要花半小時，我卻10分鐘就做完了。
第二點，近期一份市調中，我在9月3日收到並完成市調，我想在市調開始前先知道會不會需要錄影。假如我先知道我要錄自己，我就不會同意進行這份市調，因為我不喜歡被錄影。我沒有辦法只好做到一半就先放棄整份市調，這很浪費我的時間。
身為一名長期的市調參與者，我相信你們會認真看待我的建議。
謝謝，祝您安好
Nicholas 記事摘要
致所有的市調計畫的經理及職員們：
過去這幾個月來，我們收到好幾封抱怨信件講述幾個相同的問題，我們決定做出以下幾點變更：
從現在開始，各個市調小組不再負責預估每一封市調通知信中的市調長度。參與市調的民眾抱怨有些市調比預期時間長，而有些卻比較短。這有可能是因為不同小組猜測一般民眾所需要的參與時間長度不一。我們現在分化一個單位來決定所有市調長度。因此，你們不再需要計算每份市調的長度。 假如你的市調問題包括任何需要參與者的音檔及錄影，必須在寄送給潛在參與者的介紹文中先行說明。 我們現在的市調最大長度為60題。先前最長100題的長度過長，能夠完成長篇市調的參與民眾過少。
如對以上變更有任何疑問，請聯繫Shannon分機45。 重要單字
closing n. 關閉，截止，結尾
approximately adv. 大約地
participant n. 參與人士
compatible adj. 相容的，可容的
host v. 作為主人招待
combine v. 合併，結合
tabulate v. 列表顯示，把…製成表
aggregate n. 聚集，總計達
confidential adj. 機密的，秘密的
identity n. 身分
anonymous adj. 匿名的
regarding prep. 與…有關
estimate v. 估計，預估
film v. 把…拍成電影
issue n. 爭論，爭議
in charge of 負責任
notification n. 通知，通告
recording n. 紀錄，錄音，綠影
calculate v. 計算，估計
determine v. 決定，使下決心
potential adj. 可能的，潛在的
maximum adj. 最大量的
app=application n. 應用程式
reveal v. 顯示
consistent adj. 前後一致的，與…符合的
streamline v. 使簡化，使有效率；使合理化
mandatory adj. 命令的，強制的
indicate v. 指出，指名
shorten v. 變短

questions.stem: How does this survey program work?
translation: 這項市調計畫如何進行？
a. 志願參與市調的民眾可收到如折扣之類的好處。
b. 用電子郵件進行市調的參與民眾可得到現金。

d. 這是一個民眾可匿名進行市調的地方。
options: (A) Participants who volunteer to take surveys receive benefits such as discounts.
(B) People get paid cash to take surveys by email.
(C) It's a mobile app for companies to find participants for their surveys.
(D) It's a place where people can go to anonymously take surveys.

options: (A) Participants will be paid on time.

questions.stem: What part of the first email did Nicholas take issue with?

questions.stem: What change was made by AskingAmericans that wasn't brought up by Nicholas?
translation: AskingAmericans這間公司所採用的變更項目中，何者並非Nicholas提出的部分？

cards.passage:
January 12, 2000
Dear Glenora Community Residents,
As you may already be aware from recent media reports, a proposal has been passed to conduct major renovations on the National Museum of Aviation over the next 3 years. The first phase of construction is set to begin this spring once the snow has melted.
Out of respect and consideration to all Glenora Community residents living within three city blocks of the National Museum of Aviation, we are sending you this advance warning regarding the possible effects the renovations may have on the community.
To minimize noise disturbances to local families, all construction work will be restricted to the hours of 9am to 5pm, with no renovations taking place on weekends or holidays. The first block of Glenora Avenue leading away from the museum entrance may be closed for periods lasting no more than 20 minutes due to the passage of vehicles carrying large loads. A minimum 3-day advance notice will be given for parked cars to vacate the street, and people driving at the time are recommended to use 89th street as an alternative route when the road is closed.
If there are any other anticipated effects on local residents, we will notify you as the renovations progress.
We would like to extend you personal thanks for your understanding, and we hope that you share our joy and excitement for the end result of a new and improved National Museum of Aviation in the community!
Warm regards,
Jeffrey Lee
General Manager of the National Museum of Aviation
一月 12, 2000
cards.passageTranslation:
親愛的格林諾拉社區居民們，
從最近的媒體報導上您可能已知悉，有一個在接下來的三年要對國立航空博物館進行大整修的提案業已通過。第一階段的施工預定在今年春天一旦雪融化後動工。
基於對住在國立航空博物館的三個市街區內全體格林諾拉社區居民們的尊重和關心，我們寄給您這個有關於整修可能對社區造成潛在影響的提前通知。
為了使對當地家庭的噪音打擾減至最低，所有施工工程會被限制在早上九點至下午五點的時段，週末或假日不進行整修。從博物館入口通往格林諾拉大道的第一個街區可能會被封閉，期間持續不超過20分鐘，因為有運送大型裝載的車輛通行。會給至少三天的提前通知好讓停放的車輛自該街道淨空，當道路封閉時建議屆時駕駛人利用第89街作為替代路線。
若有任何其他預期會對當地居民造成的影響，我們會隨整修進度隨時通知您。
對於您的諒解我們想對您表達個人的感謝，我們盼望您能分享我們對於完工後社區裏會有一個嶄新與提昇的國立航空博物館的喜悅和興奮。
熱誠的問候，
傑弗瑞·李
國立航空博物館總經理
vocabulary: proposal n. (建議)提出；提案；求婚
vacate v. 撤出；取消；撤退
anticipated adj. 預期的；預料的
regarding prep. 關於；就…而論 Ex. I’m calling regarding your application to our doctoral program. 我打電話來是關於你申請我們的博士課程

questions.stem: What exactly is this letter?

d. 住在離博物館三個街區內的人。
options: (A) All recent visitors to the museum.
(B) Everybody who lives in the Glenora Community.
(D) People living within 3 blocks of the museum.

questions.stem: When do people have to move their cars from Glenora Avenue?
translation: 人們何時需要把他們的車子從格林諾拉大道移走？

options: (A) When any large trucks use it.
(C) For the duration of the next 3 years.
(D) When they receive notice to do so.

cards.passage:
From: Kelly Savage
Sent: April 29th, 16:39
Subject: My proposal for the lecture series Dear Gertrude Blomgren, I am the human resources manager at the Customer Service Center for San Diego Airlines, member of the Capital Airlines Alliance, in San Diego, California. I have held this position for a period of 17 years. I would like to propose a lecture entitled “Recognition: the Key to Effective Management”. Here is a brief outline of my lecture: Recognition: the Key to Effective Management by Kelly Savage 5 minutes: Engage the audience by asking them with a show of hands if they feel that their hard work is not recognized by their manager on a daily basis. Proceed by sharing a personal story about a previous manager who always showed recognition to his employees, and in turn gained the respect and trust of each one of them. 25 minutes: Outline the main types of recognition, and how they are effective. Provide examples for each one. Verbal Recognition: Telling employees to their faces that you appreciate their efforts. Written Recognition: Showing your staff that you notice, whether by e-mail, letter, holiday card, or by a simple note on their desk. Recognition awards: Nominating or choosing employees for various awards on a regular basis, and making sure to spread the recognition around to where it is needed. Getting feedback: Letting your employees know that their voices are heard as well. Treating your staff: A simple complimentary coffee, donut, or lunch down the street can go a long way in the manner your employees look up to you. 5 minutes: Summarize the positive effects that showing recognition to staff can have on a business, including increased productivity, higher quality of output, and improved worker’s satisfaction.
Capital Airlines Alliance lecture series
List of speakers
Speaker Presentation Title
Kelly Savage Recognition: the Key to Effective Management Rick Martin Balancing Employee Scheduling Hours Sinead Martinez A Battle of Personalities: Dealing with Conflict in the Workplace Lester Arnold Employee Abuse: What to do When Your Manager is Harassing You
cards.passageTranslation:
管理技巧系列演講： 誠徵演講提案 今年的頂尖航空聯盟系列演講的主題將與“管理技巧”有關。任何與管理理論、計畫、組織、人力運用、人力資源等相關的題材都會被認為切題。個人經驗格外感謝。 系列演講活動將從今年9月1日到5日在麻薩諸塞州，波士頓艾羅賽航空公司總部的大會議廳舉行。所有受雇於北美頂尖航空聯盟旗下航空公司的人士將受邀出席，而且這些公司被要求挑選數名員工出席該系列演講，所有費用公司負擔。正常出席人數會介於300至500間。 活動企劃目前正在廣納講座提案。在您的提案裡頭，我們希望有您的演說以及全部相關聯絡資訊的詳細摘要。請列上您的職稱、公司名、地址。個別講座應持續35分鐘，以及額外留10分鐘留給聽眾提問。 所有提案請以電子郵件寄到lecture_series@capitalalliance.net。只接受在五月 15日前寄出的提案。 請將提案寫給格特魯德·布洛姆格倫並且以 “聯盟講座提案”作為電子郵件主旨。請將您的摘要限制在250字內。 ---------------------------------------------------------------- 收件人: lecture_series@capitalalliance.net
寄件人: Kelly Savage
發送日期:4月29日16:39
主旨: 對於系列演講我的提案 親愛的Gertrude Blomgren： 我是聖地牙哥航空公司客服中心的人力資源經理，本公司位於加州的聖地牙哥，是頂尖航空聯盟的成員。我已擔任這個職位有17年的時間。我想提報一個標題為「認同感：達成有效管理的關鍵」的演講。這是我的演講簡要大綱： 認同感：達成有效管理的關鍵 講者：Kelly Savage 5分鐘：透過舉手詢問聽眾是否覺得自己每天的努力工作並未被主管認同來吸引聽眾。接著繼續分享一則個人的故事是有關於一位前任經理總是對他的員工展現認同感，因而獲得所有人之信任與敬重的回報。 25分鐘：概述認同的主要類型，以及它們是如何的有效。對各種類型舉例。 口頭認同：當著員工的面告訴他們你重視他們的付出。 書面認同：告訴你的員工你注意到了，不管是用發電子郵件、寫信、寄賀卡，或者是區區一張留在他們桌上的紙條。 獎勵認同：固定性的提名或挑選員工獲得各種獎勵，務必要將認同感散播到需要它之處。
款待你的員工：單純的請他們喝杯咖啡、吃甜甜圈，或者到街上吃個午餐，可在某種程度上對員工對你的尊敬有\所幫助。 5分鐘：總結對員工表現出認同感可以對公司造成的正面影響包括有：增加生產力、更高的產出品質，以及增進工作人員的滿意度。
頂尖航空聯盟演講系列
演講者名單
演講者 演講主題
Kelly Savage 認同感：達成有效管理的關鍵 Rick Martin 平均分配員工的工時 Sinead Martinez 人格大戰：處理工作場所發生的衝突 Lester Arnold 員工屈辱：當經理騷擾你，該怎麼做 重要單字片語： relevant adj. 相關的 conference n. 會議 headquarter n. 總部 expense n.花費 abstract v. 使…抽象化；抽取/adj. 抽象的 allot v. (透過權力)分派；分配 limit v. 限制 entitle v. 授予…名稱；(書)定名… basis n. 基礎； proceed v. 前進 outline v. 顯示…輪廓/n. 大綱；概要 verbal adj. 口頭的 feedback n. 回應 recognition n. 認得；辨識；承認；認可 nominate v. 提名 summarize v. 記憶； productivity n. 生產力 complimentary adj. 稱讚的；會說恭維話的 output n. 輸出 range from A to B 範圍從…到… Ex. Our company’s investments range from the building industry to retail businesses. 公司的投資範圍從建築業到零售業都有。 look up to 崇拜；尊敬 Ex. The soldiers all look up to the general. 士兵們都很崇拜那位將軍。 in turn 依次；輪到 Ex. The applicants were summoned in turn to see the interviewer. 申請人依序被召見會見面試者。

cards.passage:
All the best,
Vera Prefontaine General Contract This contract between AMSO (henceforth referred to as ‘the contractor’) and Destiny Pharmaceuticals Inc. (henceforth referred to as ‘the company’) shall go into effect on the date of signing, and shall remain binding until 5 years after the date of signing by the contractor. The contractor agrees that any company or product information shared by the company shall remain confidential. No information can be shared with the public or any third party companies without prior written consent. The contractor may not disclose any information about the company to the media, nor can the contractor announce or otherwise make it publically known that the contractor has entered into a formal agreement with the company to perform consultation services. Upon receipt of payments, the contractor agrees to issue invoices and mail them to the company. They should be received no later than 1 month (30 days) after the payments have been made. Upon completion of the 1-year consultation service for registration of pharmaceutical products in Venezuela, the contractor agrees to destroy all documents received from the company during the term of service. Failure to abide by any of the above points will be brought before a court of law in the company’s country, Australia. Signature of the contractor: ___________________________________
Date: ___________________________________
Signature of the company: ___________________________________
Date: ___________________________________ ---------------------------------------------------------------
Dear Vera Prefontaine, Upon reviewing the contract, I have a few concerns that I’d like to address, as listed below: AMSO cannot agree to a contract period of 5 years. Since the agreed upon term of consultation service is only 1 year, the confidentiality agreement shall be in place for no longer than 2 years. A 5-year period is simply unreasonable. Since AMSO is located in Venezuela, which is reputed for its slow mailing times, it may take more than 30 days for invoices to be mailed to Australia. Please adjust the wording in point #3 to say “60 days”. Since the location of the consultation service is in Venezuela, not Australia, any breaches of contract should be dealt with in Venezuela. Please adjust point #5. Once the above-mentioned issues have been corrected, we will be pleased to sign the contract with Destiny Pharmaceuticals Inc. Thank you kindly, and we look forward to your speedy reply. Marcos Atencio
cards.passageTranslation:
親愛的Marcos Atenci： 請您查照隨信所附是我們在電話會議中所討論的合約。您審閱過後煩請簽名並將它傳真回來給我。若您有任何顧慮請務必讓我知道。 祝您一切順利，
Vera Prefontaine 附件： 承攬合約 本合約經AMSO (下稱 ‘承攬人’) 與命運製藥股份有限公司(下稱 ‘本公司’) 雙方合意自簽約日起生效並且自承攬人簽約日後5年仍具約束力。 承攬人同意由本公司所分享之任何公司或產品資訊應為保密。未先經書面同意不得將任何資訊與大眾或第三方公司分享。 承攬人不得向媒體揭露 任何有關本公司之資訊，承攬人亦不得公開或以任何方式使公眾得知承攬人已與本公司簽訂正式協議履行顧問服務。 承攬人同意在收到款項後，開立並郵寄發票予本公司。發票應於款項給付後不遲於一個月（30日）內寄達。 在針對委內瑞拉藥品登記之一年顧問服務期滿後，承攬人同意銷毀服務期間自本公司取得之所有文件。 未能遵守以上任何要點時將於本公司所在國澳大利亞之法院進行訴訟。 承攬人簽名: ___________________________________
日期: ___________________________________
本公司簽名: ___________________________________
日期: ___________________________________ ------------------------------------------------------------- 親愛的Vera Prefontaine：
在審閱過這份合約以後，我有幾個顧慮想提出來，敬列如下： AMSO無法同意合約期間為5年。 既然雙方合意的顧問服務期限僅有1年，那麼適當的保密條款應當不長於2年。5年的期間完全不合理。 因為AMSO係位在委內瑞拉， 該國的郵遞速度是出了名的緩慢，因此要將發票郵寄到澳大利亞可能要花30日以上。煩請調整第三點的用語改「60日」。 因為顧問服務的發生地是在委內瑞拉而非澳大利亞，因此任何的違約應當在委內瑞拉處理。煩請調整第五點。 一旦上述問題均已更正後，我們會十分樂意與命運製藥股份有限簽訂該合約。 衷心的向您致謝，我們期待您的迅速回覆。 Marcos Atenci 重要單字片語： contract n. 合約 contractor n. 立約人；承包商 binding adj. 有約束力的；連結的 henceforth adv. 從今以後 confidential adj. 私下的；祕密的 breaches n. 違反；破壞(法律, 約束) disclose v. 包含； otherwise adv. 否則 consultation n. 協商會；諮詢；接受診療 adjust v. 調整 pharmaceutical n. 製藥的；藥物的 invoice n. 發票 abide by v. 遵守(規則, 法令) in place 在…適當的地方 Ex. My father is crazy about having everything in place. 我父親很熱衷於每件東都要各就各位這件事。 prior to 在…之前； Ex. Prior to the Civil War, slavery still existed in America . 在內戰發生之前，美國依然採用奴隸制度。

questions.stem: Which issue is not mentioned by Marcos Atencio?

options: (A) The location for going to court due to a breach.

questions.stem: If the changes are made according to Marcos Atencio's requests, what will he do next?

options: (B) Sign the contract and fax it back.
(C) Sent the contract to Vera Prefontaine by email.

questions.stem: What does Destiny Pharmaceuticals Inc. probably need AMSO's help with?
translation: 命運製藥股份有限可能需要AMSO公司在哪方面的協助？
a. 藥品登記以便在委內瑞拉銷售。
b. 在澳大利亞全國各處蓋學校。
c. 在歐洲訓練護士。
d. 發展國際貿易。
options: (A) Registering medicine for sales in Venezuela.
(B) Building schools across the country of Australia.

cards.passage:
I’m afraid I need to cancel our appointment next week. Could we reschedule to the afternoon of the 20th? Enrique Iglesias 11:55 a.m.
I’m sorry, I think you have the wrong person. Diane Christensen 12:02 p.m.
It’s me, Diane Simmons! You called me yesterday to book an appointment for a consultation. Enrique Iglesias 12:22 p.m.
My apologies. Your name is coming up as “Diane Christensen” on my phone. Diane Christensen 12:30 a.m.
That’s my maiden name. I sometimes still go by it. Enrique Iglesias 12:40 p.m.
Oh! Sorry, Diane. I had no idea! Regarding the rescheduling, I may need to shift my schedule around a little. I’ll get back to you and let you know. Diane Christensen 12:45 p.m.
Thanks. Enrique Iglesias 1:27 p.m.
OK, should be fine. Does 2:30 work for you?
Diane Christensen 11:17 a.m.
cards.passageTranslation:
我恐怕要取消下周的會面。我們可以再安排到20號下午？ Enrique Iglesias 11:55 a.m.
對不起，我想你找錯人了。 Diane Christensen 12:02 p.m.
是我，Diane Simmons！你昨天打給我預定諮詢時間。 Enrique Iglesias 12:22 p.m.
我很抱歉。你在我電話上出現的名字是Diane Christensen。 Diane Christensen 12:30 a.m.
那是我未婚前的名字。我有時候依然會用這個名字。 Enrique Iglesias 12:40 p.m.
噢！對不起，Diane。我不知道！有關這次改期，我可能需要再微調我的行程。我會再打給你，再讓你知道。 Diane Christensen 12:45 p.m.
謝謝。 Enrique Iglesias 1:27 p.m.
OK，應該沒問題。2點半可以嗎？

questions.stem: What does Diane mean by "I sometimes still go by it"?

a. 她有時會購買商品。

c. 她有時會使用她的舊姓Christensen。
d. 她有時會使用她的舊姓Simmons。
options: (B) She has a maid named Diane Christensen.
(C) She still sometimes uses her old surname, Christensen.
(D) She still sometimes uses her old surname, Simmons.

questions.stem: What do we know about Enrique Iglesias?
translation: 關於Enrique Iglesias的敘述，何者正確？
a. 他想要換Diane預約時間。
b. 他20日那天沒有排行程。
c. 他20日那天已有計畫，但是可以變更。
d. 他無法變更20日那天的計畫。
options: (A) He wants to reschedule his appointment with Diane.
(B) He had nothing on his schedule for the 20th.
(C) He had plans on the 20th but was able to change them.
(D) He wasn't able to change his plans on the 20th.

cards.passage:
www.redsparrow.com/courier_service
Red Sparrow Buses Courier Service FAQ
Where should I go to have my package shipped? All major Red Sparrow bus terminals have a separate counter for shipping packages. To find the nearest location to you, click here.
What are the hours of operation? Opening hours of bus terminals vary by location, but most major terminals are open 24 hours a day, 365 days a year.
Do you offer a wrapping service, or should I wrap my package by myself? We sell three different sizes of boxes, which are available at all bus terminals. You are also free to wrap your package on your own. Please note that for all packages that will be crossing the US/Canada border, an inspection of the contents is required by one of our officers at the bus terminal prior to sealing the package.
Which items cannot be shipped with the Red Sparrow courier service? Any illegal items, live animals, perishable foods, cigarettes, alcohol, and liquids over the volume of 500ml cannot be shipped.
If the bus is full of passengers, is there any chance there will not be enough space to ship my package? Since we have separate compartments for non-passenger parcels, we guarantee that there will always be space for your package!

商品訂購單

紅雀巴士快遞服務常見問答集
我要上哪去寄我的包裹？所有主要的紅雀巴士轉運站都有個別的櫃台供寄送包裹。要找尋離你最近的地點按這裡。
營業時間是幾點？巴士轉運站的開始營業時間因地點而不同，但多數主要的轉運站是全年無休的。
你們有提供包裝服務嗎，或者我應該要自己包好我的包裹？在所有的巴士轉運站我們有銷售三種不同尺寸的箱子。你也可以自行打包你的包裹。請注意所有會越過美國／加拿大邊界的包裹，在封箱以前必須經巴士轉運站一位我們的主管查驗內容物。
什麼物品不可以用紅雀巴士快遞服務寄送？任何違法物品、活體動物、易腐敗食物、香煙、酒，以及液體超過500毫升的量者無法運送。
如果巴士載滿乘客，有可能會沒有足夠空間來運送我的包裹嗎？因為我們有個別的隔間給非乘客包裹，我們保證永遠都會有空間留給您的包裹！
vocabulary: terminal n. 總站；航空站/ adj. 末端的；期末的；終點的
operation n. 操作；經營；(醫學)手術
vary v. 使…不同；使…多樣化
compartment n. 劃分；隔間；(火車)客房
guarantee v. 保證/n.保證物；保證人
prior to 先於…；在…之前 Ex. The red team arrived at the finish line prior to sunset. 紅隊在日落前抵達終點線。

cards.passage:
Welcome to the Montgomery Symphony Hall’s 24th monthly Symphony Under the Stars!
Tonight’s Performances
6:30-7:00 Seating time (Musical background performed by Roger Simmons on the cello)
7:00-7:10 Greetings and Introduction by Mayor Kelsey Grant
7:10-7:30 Chinese Youth Erhu Orchestra performs “Floating to the East”
7:30-8:30 Montgomery Symphony’s “Under the Stars” Part 1
8:30-8:50 Intermission
8:50-10:00 Montgomery Symphony’s “Under the Stars” Part 2
Cocktails, wine, and other light refreshments are served in the lobby from 6:00 to 6:45 and 8:30 to 8:50.
About the “Symphony Under the Stars”
The Symphony Under the Stars was dreamt up by Montgomery Hall’s founder and chairwoman, Kylie R. Montgomery over 5 years ago. She envisioned a traditional symphony orchestra performance into a post-modern setting: under an indoor sky of stars. After several years of planning and construction of an artificial starry sky, her “Symphony Under the Stars” dream finally came into being. The Symphony Under the Stars has been praised for its creativity, uniqueness, and aesthetic magnificence. The false sky’s setting is the perfect complement to the award winning Montgomery Symphony’s versatile and inspiring “Under the Stars” musical performances.
The Montgomery Symphony Hall was opened to the public in November of 2007. Since its inception, it has come to be regarded as one of the finest performance spaces in Western Europe. With a total seating capacity of 1466, it is also one of the largest.
Please enjoy the show tonight, and we look forward to seeing you again many times in the future!
cards.passageTranslation:
歡迎來到蒙哥馬利交響音樂廳的第24次的每月一次星夜交響曲!
今晚演奏
6:30-7:00 入座(背景音樂由大提琴手羅傑·西蒙斯演奏)
7:00-7:10 市長凱爾西·葛蘭特開場致詞
7:10-7:30 中國少年二胡管弦樂團演奏“向東漂逝”
7:30-8:30 蒙哥馬利交響樂團的“星夜” 第一部
8:30-8:50 中場
8:50-10:00 蒙哥馬利交響樂團的“星夜” 第二部
雞尾酒、紅酒，和其他輕食由6:00 到 6:45 以及 8:30 到 8:50 供應於大廳
關於 “星夜交響曲”
星夜交響曲是由蒙哥馬利音樂廳的創辦人及女董事長，凱莉·R·蒙哥馬利在五年前發想的。她想像一個傳統的交響樂管弦樂團搭配一個後現代的佈景：在室內的滿天星斗下。經過了數年籌劃打造出一個人造的閃耀星空，她的“星夜交響曲”夢想終於實現。星夜交響曲的創造性、獨特性以及壯麗的美感而倍受讚譽。那人造星空佈景是獲獎無數的蒙哥馬利交響樂團其多才多藝與激勵人心的“星夜交響曲”音樂演奏的完美搭配。
蒙哥馬利交響音樂廳對外開放於2007年十一月。自此時起，它已被公認為西歐最佳的演奏場所。擁有總共1466個座位的它也是其中容納量最大的。
請您慢慢欣賞今晚的演奏，我們期待在未來能經常再見到您！
vocabulary: refreshment n. 恢復精神提神物茶點
artificial adj. 人工的人造的
aesthetic adj. 美學的/ n. 審美觀
regard A as B(動詞片語) 將A視為B Ex. After renting the apartment for so many years, the tenant regards it as his own property. 租公寓這麼多年後，房客將公寓當作自己的。

cards.passage:
David Sultan (15:13)
James, I need to ask a favor of you. Are you in the office right now?
James Hussain (15:20)
Afraid not. I'm having a meeting with one of my clients in a cafe.
David Sultan (15:29)
Any idea who might be in the office right now?
James Hussain (15:34)
If I were you, I'd try Cassia. She's usually around.
David Sultan (15:35)
Hi Cassia. I've added you to the chat because I need somebody who's at the office right now. Are you?
Cassia Samara (15:46)
Hi Mr. Sultan. Hope you are enjoying Brussels. What can I do for you?
David Sultan (15:50)
I've got a message from Eni Gas and Power. They need a reading from our gas meter to provide an accurate bill. Do you know where the meter is?
Cassia Samara (15:56)
No idea.
James Hussain (15:57)
Cassia, it's a little box on the side wall in the supply room on the third floor.
Cassia Samara (16:12)
OK, I'm there now. How do I open this thing?
James Hussain (16:14)
There should be a little plastic key hanging on the side.
Cassia Samara (16:15)
Got it! So, Mr. Sultan, what numbers do you need?
David Sultan (16:19)
Well, you should see four little dials. I just need to know the number on each one of them, from left to right.
Cassia Samara (16:20)
OK, here they are: 4-4-1-9. Is that it?
David Sultan (16:20)
That's it. You are a savior, Cassia!
Cassia Samara (16:21)
It's nothing, really!
David Sultan (15:13)
cards.passageTranslation:
James，我需要請你幫的大忙。你現在在辦公室嗎？
James Hussain (15:20)
恐怕沒有。我正在咖啡廳和我的客戶開會。
David Sultan (15:29)
知道有任何人現在在辦公室？
James Hussain (15:34)
假如我是你，我會試試看Cassia。她通常都會在。
David Sultan (15:35)
嗨Cassia。我把你加進對話中了，因為我需要有人現在待在辦公室裡。你在辦公室嗎？
Cassia Samara (15:46)
嗨，Sultan先生。希望你喜歡布魯塞爾。我能為你做什麼？
David Sultan (15:50)
我收到一封艾尼瓦斯能源公司的訊息。他們需要查看我們的瓦斯表才能寄正確帳單。你知道瓦斯表在哪裡嗎？
Cassia Samara (15:56)
不知道。
James Hussain (15:57)
Cassia，瓦斯表在三樓用品室邊牆上的小盒子。
Cassia Samara (16:12)
OK，我現在過去看。這個盒子怎麼開？
James Hussain (16:14)
旁邊應該掛著一副小小的塑膠鑰匙。
Cassia Samara (16:15)
看到了！那麼Sultan先生，你需要的號碼是哪一組？
David Sultan (16:19)
好吧，你應該會看到四個小指針。我只需要知道從左到右每一個數字。
Cassia Samara (16:20)
OK，數字是4-4-1-9。是這個嗎？
David Sultan (16:20)
就是這個。你救了我一命，Cassia！
Cassia Samara (16:21)
這真的是小事！

cards.passage:
Investing Tips for Dummies: Mutual Funds
So you’ve finally decided to do something with your savings, instead of just letting them sit there accumulating minimal interest from your bank. Purchasing mutual funds are a simple and great option, especially for investing newbies. However, there are many misconceptions about mutual funds. (1)__________ Below, we try to clarify some of these false ideas, and provide a guide for first-time mutual fund investors.
Consider more than just the performance of the mutual fund in the past. Great performance in the past does not necessarily guarantee success in the future. (2)__________
Many other factors contribute to the success of your mutual fund investment. These may include the age and size of the fund, sales fees, the fund’s risk level, and changes in the way the fund works. (3)__________ Make sure to ask a lot of questions about all these things when inquiring about your mutual fund.
Be informed about how your mutual fund investment will affect your tax bill. Purchasing funds at different times of the year can have different effects on the amount of taxes you pay on them.
Awareness of all the fees and expenses associated with your mutual funds is very important. Avoid unpleasant surprises down the road, and find out everything you can about future fees.
Determine how big of a risk you are prepared to make. Generally, less volatile mutual funds have lower but steadying growth rates. More volatile funds involve a greater risk but can produce more dramatic results. (4)__________ Past performance cannot guarantee the future path of a mutual fund, but it can help you to determine how volatile the fund is.
Ask about any recent changes in how the fund is operated. Recent changes can have a huge impact on the future direction of a fund.
For a more in-depth discussion on how mutual funds actually work, please see “Investing Tips for Dummies: Mutual Funds Part 2.”
cards.passageTranslation:
傻瓜投資術：共同基金
你終於決定了要用你的積蓄來做點什麼，而不是就讓它擺在你的銀行裏累積微薄的利息。購買共同基金是個簡單又極佳的選擇，尤其是對投資新手們。然而，有許多關於共同基金的錯誤的觀念。以下，我們嘗試釐清部份的這些不正確想法，並且提供指引給初次投資共同基金的人。
不要僅只考量共同基金過去的績效。過去優異的表現並不必然保證在未來可成功獲利。如果有那麼簡單，所有投資人早已是百萬富翁了。
你的共同基金能成功獲利是許多其他因素所貢獻的。這可能包括了基金有多久和多少，銷售費、基金風險等級，基金運作方式的改變等。當在洽購基金時務必要問許多與此有關的問題。
知悉你的共同基金投資將會如何影響你的稅單。在一年的不同時間購買基金可能對你花在它們上面的稅金總額有不同的影響。
對和你的共同基金有關連的所有費用與開銷有所認識是非常重要的。避免將來發生令人不愉快的意外，並盡你可能的了解未來的費用。
決定自己可以承受多大的風險。通常，波動較少的共同基金有較低但穩定的成長率。波動越大的基金意味更大的風險但可產生更戲劇性的結果。共同基金過去的績效無法保證它未來的移動軌道，但能幫助你判斷基金波動性如何。
詢問關於基金的運作方式最近有無任何的變動。最近的變動可對未來基金的走向產生巨大影響。
關於共同基金實際上是如何管理的更深入探討，請看 “傻瓜投資術：共同基金 第二集”
vocabulary: saving n. 挽救；節儉/ adj. 補救的；節省的
risk n. 風險/ v. 冒…的風險
associated adj. 關聯的組合的
volatile adj. (液體) 已揮發的易變的易發作的
involve v. 牽涉連累包含
find out (動詞片語) 找出發現查明
instead of 代替 Ex. Instead of traveling abroad, Jamie decided to spend her vacation in the south. Jamie決定去南部度假，沒有出國去。

b. 這說明了該基金的波動性如何。
c. 這說明了你可賺到多少錢。
d. 這說明了該基金是否值得。
options: (A) It tells you if the fund will do well in the future.
(B) It tells you how volatile a fund is.
(C) It tells you how much money you can make.
(D) It tells you if this mutual fund is worth it or not.

questions.stem: Which of the following may be affected by your investment?

b. 你的人脈。
c. 你的稅金。
d. 你的信賴關係。

questions.stem: What question is likely answered in Part 2 of this guide?
translation: 哪一個問題有可能會在本指南的第二部中解答？
a. 什麼造成共同基金上下波動？
b. 誰創造出共同基金？
c. 哪家銀行有最棒的共同基金？
d. 如果我買了一支共同基金究竟可以賺多少錢？
options: (A) What causes a mutual fund to go up and down?
(C) Which banks offer the best mutual funds?
(D) Exactly how much money will I make if I get a mutual fund?

cards.passage:
www.roommatesforyou.com/ads
Reply to any of the ads below by hitting the ‘Quick Reply’ option.
Ad #3451
Ad Title: Responsible female roommate needed for short-term stay
Location: Near Pont Des Arts Bridge
Content:
I’m looking for a temporary roommate to help cover rental fees while my fiance is doing a 6-month international law internship in Portugal. The exact dates are March 1st to August 31st. He is actually leaving on February 24th, so you are welcome to move in a few days earlier with no additional charge.
The monthly rental fee is 400 Euros. Included in that is your own private bedroom with a miniature balcony that has a view of the River Seine in the distance. The room is small but sufficient for one person. Despite its size, it has ample closet space and a comfy double bed. Shared facilities include a large living room with flat screen television, a stereo system, bathroom with shower and small bathtub, washing machine, and a space-efficient kitchen that includes a compact refrigerator, stove, toaster over, and espresso machine.
In a nutshell, the room is a steal of a deal for students or travelers looking set up base in Paris for a while. Here’s the catch: I am a bit of a night owl. I’m quiet and respectful, but I am a freelance writer and do most of my work at night. Furthermore, I am a pet lover, and you will be sharing space with a cat, turtle, 17 tropical fish, and 3 hamsters. Ideally, I need somebody who doesn’t mind feeding the animals when I make small trips out of town.
---------------------------------------
Quick Reply
To: ad #3451
From: Marc Beaudoin
Replier’s contact information: Y.Beau388@hotmail.com.fr
Content:
To the writer of ad #3451,
Please allow me to introduce myself. My name is Marc Beaudoin. I am 27-year-old studio photographer and make-up artist. I realized that the title of your ad clearly indicates you are seeking a female roommate. However, I beg you to read on, as I sincerely feel you may reconsider.
Like yourself, I am engaged, and my partner Tim is a writer like you. At the moment, he is working on his masterpiece, a travel fiction piece, in Morocco, and I am patiently awaiting his return at the end of summer. We sold our apartment to fund our working projects, however, and I am looking for temporary lodging until he returns and we buy a new place.
Not only am I an ex-pet shop worker who is accustomed to cleaning up after animals, but I am also a deep sleeper and don’t mind a flat mate who stays up late. Last but not least, my studio is walking distance from the Pont Des Arts Bridge, so the location is ideal for me.
My only qualm is this: I wouldn’t be ready to pay the first month’s rent until the end of March, since the funds from our apartment sale are still being processed. Would you require any kind of deposit?
Thanks, and I look forward to your reply.
www.roommatesforyou.com/ads
cards.passageTranslation:
請點「快速回覆」的選項來回應以下任一則廣告。
廣告 #3451
廣告標題：徵求需要短期住宿的有責任心女性室友
地點：靠近藝術橋
內容：
我正在徵求一名暫時性的室友，在我的未婚夫去葡萄牙六個月從事國際法律實習工作時幫忙分攤房租。確切日期是三月一日至八月三十一日。事實上他要在二月二十四日離開，所以歡迎妳提早幾天搬進來不額外收費。
房租每月是400歐元。包括在內的是你自己有一間附帶遠處有賽納河景的迷你陽台的私人臥室。房間是小但足夠一個人住。僅管它的空間小，裡頭有足夠的衣櫥空間和一張舒適的雙人床。共用的設施包括一間有平面電視的客廳、一台音響、附淋浴跟小澡缸的浴室、洗衣機，以及一間麻雀雖小五臟俱全，裡頭有一台小冰箱、火爐、烤麵包機跟濃縮咖啡機的廚房。
以一個丁點大的居住空間而言，這間房間對於想要在巴黎有個暫時落腳處的學生或旅行者是個相當划算的選擇。重點來了：我算是個夜貓子。我安靜且尊重別人，不過我是個自由作家而且我大多數的工作是在晚上作。還有，我是寵物愛好者，因此妳會和一隻貓、烏龜，17條熱帶魚，以及3隻倉鼠分享空間。理想上，我需要的是當我出門作短途旅行時不介意替我餵這些動物的人。
--------------------------------------------------------------
快速回覆
收件人：廣告 #3451
寄件人：馬克·布多昂
回覆者聯絡資訊： Y.Beau388@hotmail.com.fr
內容：
致廣告 #3451的作者，
請容我自我介紹。我的名字是馬克•畢優定 。我是27歲的工作室攝影師以及彩妝造型師。我明白您的廣告標題清楚地寫著妳要找一個女性室友。可是，我懇請您繼續讀下去，因為我誠摯的覺得您可能會重新考慮。
像您一樣，我訂婚了，而且我的伴侶堤姆像您一樣是名作家。目前，他正在摩洛哥撰寫他的精心傑作，一本小品旅遊小說，而我則正耐心的在等待他夏天結束後回來。我們賣掉了公寓來籌措正在進行中的計畫的經費，不管怎樣，我正在找個暫住的地方一直到他回來並且我們買了新住所為止。我不僅是個慣於幫動物們處理善後的前寵物店員工，我還是個很好睡而且不介意室友無趣又晚睡的人。最後很重要的一點是，我的攝影工作室在離藝術橋走路可到的距離，所以這個地點很適合我。
我唯一的擔心是：我一直到三月底都將會沒辦法付頭一個月的房租，因為我們公寓賣掉的錢還在處理中。您有任何的押金要求嗎？
謝謝，我期待您的答覆。
vocabulary: ample adj. 充裕的；豐富的
nutshell n. 堅果外殼；極小的房屋/容器
miniature adj. 迷小的；袖珍的
qualm n. 一陣暈眩；噁心不適
despite 儘管 Ex. He went to work anyways despite his serious illness. 儘管生重病，他仍然去上班。
be accustomed to (形容詞片語) 習慣於 Ex. I’m accustomed to the hot weather in Taiwan. 我已經習慣台灣炎熱的天氣。
a steal of a deal (常用語) 相當划算 Ex. This facial scrub is such a steal of a deal. 這個臉部磨砂膏相當划算。

cards.passage:
Grant Application to the City of Johannesburg
Organization Name: Helping Hands of Jo’burg
Date of Application: December 14, 2007
Total Amount Requested: R200,000
Objective Statement: Partnership of non-profit organizations seeking a grant from the City of Johannesburg Government for public housing project.
Project Description: Helping Hands of Jo’burg is proposing a 2-year project entitled “Construction Training to Empower the Poor”. As the name suggests, we intend to establish camps that will train impoverished individuals in basic housing construction techniques. The camps will be created, managed, and taught 100% by volunteers.
Target Participants: We are seeking to train individuals from the ages of 16-28 who have dropped out of or never completed high school. Preference will be given to those living in the city’s slums.
Intended Distribution of funds:
Administration: R40,000
Marketing and advertising: R50,000
Construction materials (including uniforms for participants): R80,000
Miscellaneous expenses: R30,000
Expected Results: Participants will learn hands-on techniques in construction; skills that may later be used directly to improve their own communities. The program also promotes compassion, solidarity, and the bettering of humanity.
Contact Person: Wayne Sassame
Address: #34, Campbell Street, Johannesburg, South Africa
Phone: 11 445 8891
---------------------------------------------
January 02, 2008
Dear Wayne Sassame,
First of all, I would like to offer my sincerest thanks to you and the organization that you represent. The proposed project “Construction Training to Empower the Poor” sounds like it would be of great benefit to our community.
However, for the time being, I cannot process your application. There are a few requirements that have not yet been filled, as well as a few issues on your application form, as follows:
Missing requirements:
The credit card that you have provided for the application fee of R100 appears to be expired. Please provide a valid form of payment.
We need an official address for the organization “Helping Hands of Jo’burg”, as well as documentation proving official NGO (non-governmental organization) status.
Issues with the application
We need a more detailed breakdown of your budget. For example, it is not sufficient to simply say “administration fees”.
R30,000 for ‘Miscellaneous Fees’ sounds like a lot. Please explain further.
Once you have these issues cleared up, we will be able to process your application for official consideration.
Thank you for your cooperation,
Selby Ritter
Representative for the Grant Office of the City of Johannesburg
cards.passageTranslation:
約翰尼斯堡市補助金申請
機構名稱：約堡援手
申請日期：十二月 14, 2007
需求總額：200,000 蘭特
目的說明：非營利性組織夥伴尋求約翰尼斯堡市政府資助公共住宅計畫。
計畫內容：約堡援手提出一個名為“賦予貧寒者建築培訓”的兩年期計畫。如同名稱所給人的聯想，我們打算成立一個訓練營培養窮困的人基礎的房屋建築技巧。該訓練營將百分之百由義工創立、管理及傳授。
目標參與者：我們試圖訓練年齡從16到28歲的已輟學或未曾就學者。將由那些住在市內貧民區者優先。
未來經費分配：
行政費：40,000 蘭特
行銷與廣告費：50,000 蘭特
建築材料費（包含給參與者的制服）：80,000 蘭特
其他費用： 30,000 蘭特
預期成果：參與者將學會實用的建築技巧；一些或許之後可直接運用在改善他們自己社區的技能。這個計畫同時也提倡憐憫、團結，以及提昇人性。
聯絡人：偉恩·薩森
地址：#34, 坎貝爾街，約翰尼斯堡，南非共和國
電話：11 445 8891
------------------------------------------------
一月二日， 2008
親愛的偉恩·薩森，
首先，我想對您以及您所代表的組織致上我最誠摯感謝。貴提案“賦予貧寒者建築培訓”計畫聽起來對我們社區似乎會是相當大的助益。
然而，就目前而言我無法處理您的申請。您有以下幾項必要資料尚未填妥和申請表上有幾點問題：
欠缺必要資料
您提供作為支付申請費100蘭特的信用卡似乎是失效了。請您提供有效的支付方式。
我們需要 “約堡援手”這個組織的正式地址，以及證明為正式NGO（非政府組織）身份的文件。
申請表有問題
我們需要一份您預算更詳細的細目。例如，單只說明“行政費用”並不夠充分。
‘其他費用’要30,000蘭特聽起來似乎很多。請進一步解釋。
一旦您將這些問題解決後，我們就能夠對您的申請書進行正式考量。
謝謝您的合作，
賽爾比·瑞特
約翰尼斯堡市補助金辦公室辦事代表
vocabulary: entitle v. 授予…名稱；(書)定名…
empower v. 授與…資格或權力
impoverished adj. 赤貧的；被用盡的
individual n. 個別；個體/adj. 個別的；每個的
miscellaneous adj. 各式各樣的；混雜的
solidarity n. 團結一致；團結公會
drop out (動詞片語) 脫離

questions.stem: What will happen if Helping Hands of Jo'burg can satisfy all the missing requirements?
translation: 如果約堡援手能夠補足所有欠缺的必要資料的話會發生什麼事？

d. 他們將取得正式非政府組織身份。
options: (A) They will get a grant of R200,000.
(B) The application will be officially processed.
(C) They will have to get funding elsewhere.
(D) They will achieve official NGO status.

cards.passage:
To: madrashotel@yahoo.com.in
Date sent: Mar. 11, 2011
From: Rahil Rakesh
Subject: Hotel Cancellation
To whom it may concern,
I'd like to cancel my reservation for 3 nights at the Madras Hotel, checking in on March 13 and checking out on March 16. My booking was for a single room at the rate of 1000 rupees per night. I apologize for the short notice, but my trip to Chennai has been postponed indefinitely. Once it is rescheduled, I will make sure to make a reservation again at the Madras Hotel. Your hotel came highly recommended when I conducted an online search for accommodation in Chennai.
My reservation was made through the Indian online booking system IndiaRooms.com. According to the cancellation policy on the website, I will lose my 10% deposit for the total stay, which I fully understand and accept. However, since I have notified you more than 24 hours before my intended stay, there should be no further charges from your establishment. Can you please confirm that this is the case?
Thank you in advance, and I look forward to seeing you once my business plans in Chennai materialize.
Yours truly,
Rahil Rakesh
收件人: madrashotel@yahoo.com.in
cards.passageTranslation:
發送日期: 三月 11, 2011
寄件人: 拉希爾·拉克什
主旨: 退訂旅館
敬啟者,
我想要取消在馬德拉斯飯店住宿3晚的訂房，入住是三月13日退房是三月16日。我訂的是一間單人房一晚1000盧比。我很抱歉這麼短的時間才通知，但是我去清奈的行程已無限期延後。一旦它重新排定後，我一定會再次跟馬德拉斯飯店訂房。當我在網路上搜尋欽奈的住宿的時候，發現你們的飯店被高度推薦。
我是透過印度網路訂房系統IndiaRooms.com訂房的。根據網站上的取消訂房規定，我會損失全部住宿期間的保證金的10%，對此我完全理解和接受。不過，既然我已在預計住宿前超過24小時以上通知你們，你們退訂成立時應該不會有其他的費用才對。能請您確認是否是這樣嗎？
在此先謝謝您，我期待一旦我的清奈商務計劃成行時能夠見到您。
您誠摯的，
拉希爾·拉克什
vocabulary: check out (動詞片語) (旅館)退房
rupee n. 盧比(印度等國使用的貨幣)

cards.passage:
Human Resources Department of Northgate Mall
Official Warning Form
Recipient of Warning: Sylvia Klein
Job Title: Painter and repairperson
Department: Painting and Mall Mural Maintenance
Reports to: Ken Christensen
Job Title: Supervisor, Painting and Mall Mural Maintenance
Warning given on: February 11, 2000
Warning Type: Second (final)
Warning Method: In person by Human Resources Staff Member in a private meeting with the employee
Details:
Following complaints to Human Resources by Sylvia's coworkers, a full investigation was made. It was found that Sylvia was regularly sleeping on the job in the basement painting supplies room, taking extended breaks, talking on her phone on the job, and being intentionally confrontational with other staff members. According to the staff members, supervisor Ken Christensen seems to be neglecting the problem and has not done anything about it since they discussed the issues with him. Consequently, they came to Human Resources to file a complaint.
Description of previous warnings:
A similar warning was documented and given to Sylvia on October 12th, 1999. According to the warning report, there was also an incident in which Sylvia swore at another staff member.
Recommended future actions:
The employee is aware that failure to remedy the above-mentioned issues will result in termination of employment. A follow-up investigation is to be made by Human Resources in one month's time. An investigation into Ken Christensen's competency as supervisor is also recommended.
cards.passageTranslation:
諾斯格購物中心人力資源部門
正式警告單
收件人：西爾維亞．克萊因
職位：油漆暨維修人員
部門：繪畫及購物中心的壁畫維護部門
呈報於：肯．克里斯特森
職位名稱：主任，繪畫及購物中心壁畫維護
警告日期：2000年2月11號
警告類別：第二級（最終警告）
警告途徑：人力資源職員與僱員在非公開會議討論
詳細說明：
Sylvia的同事投訴人力資源部，經由充分調查後發現，Sylvia經常在工作時間睡在位於地下室的繪畫用品室，延長休息時間，或在工作時間打電話，並故意和其他工作人員對峙。根據工作人員，主管肯．克里斯特森似乎忽略這個問題，自從他們與肯討論這個問題起就沒有採取任何行動。因此，他們來人力資源部門投訴。
先前的警告說明：
類似的警告以登記入案，並於1999年10月12日交付于Sylvia。根據報告，也有Sylvia辱罵另一名工作人員的事件。
建議行動：
未能解決上述問題的員工，將終止僱傭合約。在接下來一個月內，人力資源部門會有後續調查。也建議調查主管肯．克里斯特森的管理能力。

questions.stem: What will happen if Sylvia Klein keeps sleeping on the job?
translation: 如果西爾維亞．克萊繼續在工作時間睡覺，以下何事將會發生？
a. 她的同事們會告訴他們的上司。
b. 她將獲得第三類（最後）警告。
c. 她將被解僱。
d. 她將被轉移到一個新的部門。
options: (A) Her coworkers will tell their supervisor.
(B) She will get a third (final) warning.
(D) She will be transferred to a new department.

questions.stem: How will Human Resources check up on her?
translation: 人力資源部門將如何審查她的情況？
a. 他們將在繪畫用品室安裝攝影機。
b. 他們將在一個月內審查她的情況。
c. 他們將重新採訪她。
d. 他們會要求肯．克里斯特森報告情況。
options: (A) They will install cameras in the painting supplies room.
(B) They will check out the situation in one month.
(D) They will ask for a report from Ken Christensen.

questions.stem: Why might Ken Christensen be blamed for the situation?

cards.passage:
Review of “Stranded Love”
Reviewer name: Jamie Cheng
Review Date: August 12, 2009
For more reviews by Jamie Cheng, click HERE.
This knee-slapping romantic-comedy is quickly becoming one of the biggest hits of the summer film release season. T-Bone (played by Samuel R. Jones) and Connie (Nancy Friedman), a truly unlikely couple, are stuck together on a small tropical island after a devastating typhoon strikes the coast. They undergo a series of failed attempts at trying to get back to the mainland. This is no sappy romance, however, nor is it a tearjerker. It is a testament to the compatibility of truly incompatible people.
“Stranded Love” is not just another predictable chick-flick, as the name might suggest. Any guys that appreciate fine scenery, a well thought-up plot, deep characters, and even a little dirty humor will fully enjoy this one as well. See it while it is still at the theatres! I give it 4.5 stars.
cards.passageTranslation:
影評「擱淺的愛」
影評家：陳．潔米
評論日期：2009年8月12日
更多由Jamie Cheng的電影評論，請點擊這裡。
這部令人拍案叫絕的愛情喜劇片正迅速成為今夏上映電影中的大熱門。 T骨（由山繆爾．瓊斯飾）和康妮（南茜．弗里德曼），兩個性格迥異的人，在毀滅性的強颱侵襲海岸後，一起被困在熱帶小島上。他們試著要回到大陸上，卻經歷了一連串失敗。然而，這是傻氣的浪漫故事，也不是催人淚下的情節。這考驗一對不容彼此的男女要和諧共存。
“擱淺的愛”，不同於電影名稱，它不是一部可輕易預測結局的浪漫電影。若你要欣賞優美的景色，又想要觀看精彩的故事情節，有深度的角色，甚至帶點黃腔的電影，你會喜歡這部電影。去電影院看看吧！我給它4.5顆星。
vocabulary: hits n. 熱門；紅極一時的
attempt n.嘗試；企圖 /v. 試圖去
dirty humor n. 帶點色情的笑話
chick-flick n. 電影= movie= film
incompatible adj. 不相容的；不能和諧共存的

questions.stem: What exactly is this piece of writing?
translation: 這篇文章為以下何種類別？
a. 電影網站上的影評。
b. 報告中的一則書評。
c. 在雜誌的戲劇表演評論。
d. 在雜誌上的紀錄片評論。
options: (A) A movie review on a website.
(B) A book review in a paper.
(C) A play review in a journal.
(D) A documentary review in a magazine.

questions.stem: Why will guys like it too?

c. 因為它是有趣的且有很好的故事情節。
d. 因為他們的約會對象會很感激他們帶女孩子們去看。
options: (A) Because the main actress is very attractive.
(C) Because it is funny and has a good storyline.
(D) Because their dates will be thankful they took them to see it.

cards.passage:
Bart Simpson (13:11)
Christina, we've decided to postpone your upcoming feature piece on rising unemployment rates in Glenwood district until further notice.
Christina Arden (13:19)
Really? But I'm close to finishing it, and I've been working really hard on it.
Bart Simpson (13:19)
We know that. But there are too many time-dependent articles that need to go out now or never, whereas your story isn't going to change in the next month or longer. We've got the Olympics coming up, lots of big stories coming out of the Middle East, the mayoral election, and so on. Plus, I need you working specifically on a mayoral story more than anything else right now. You'll be partnered up with Ben Thomas. I'm adding him to the chat right now.
Christina Arden (13:56)
All right.
Bart Simpson (13:59)
Ben, I've just informed Christina that the two of you will be working together on an important piece. We're looking at a two-page feature on the controversy surrounding the mayor's ties to Spruce Global, the logging company that has been accused of overlogging in Alaska.
Ben Thomas (14:01)
I assume I will be handling the research end of it and Christina will be doing the writing?
Christina Arden (14:03)
Actually, I've got some important connections for this story. I'd like to be more involved on the research end of things for this one.
Bart Simpson (14: 12)
Honestly, I couldn't care less who does what here. I just want the story submitted to the editors by Friday at 8 AM.
Christina Arden (14:15)
What's the word count?
Bart Simpson (14: 19)
4500 and not a word less or more.
Bart Simpson (13:11)
cards.passageTranslation:
Christina，我們已經決定延後發表你那篇有關格蘭伍德區失業率上升的特別報導，直至另行通知。
Christina Arden (13:19)
真的嗎？但我快完成了，我一直努力在做。
Bart Simpson (13:19)
我們知道。但有太多機不可失的時事文章要發表，反之你的報導短期內並不會有變化。我們有即將到來的奧運會、從中東發生的大事件、市長選舉等等。另外，現在最重要的，我需要你特別專注在市長的報導。你會和Ben Thomas搭檔，我現在就把他加入聊天群組。
Christina Arden (13:56)
好的。
Bart Simpson (13:59)
Ben，我剛告訴Christina說你們兩個會一起合作一篇重要的報導。我們要做一份兩頁報導市長與雲杉全球公司的爭議，該伐木公司被控告在阿拉斯加過度砍伐的新聞。
Ben Thomas (14:01)
我猜想我會處理研究的部分，而Christina會負責寫作？
Christina Arden (14:03)
其實我已經有這篇報導的一些重要聯繫。我想更多地參與研究的部分。
Bart Simpson (14: 12)
說實話，我一點也不在乎誰做什麼。我只想在星期五上午8時把報導交給編輯。
Christina Arden (14:15)
字數多少？
Bart Simpson (14: 19)
4500，不多不少。

questions.stem: Why has Christina Arden's article on rising unemployment rates in Glenwood district been postponed?
translation: 為什麼Christina Arden關於格蘭伍德區失業率上升的文章被延期？
a. 其他文章需儘早發表。
b. 她的動作太慢。
c. Bart Simpson 認為它是一個不重要的話題。
d. 這個話題將在下個月或幾個月?有重大變更。
options: (A) Other articles need to be published sooner.
(B) She isn't finishing it fast enough.
(C) Bart Simpson thinks it's not an important enough topic.
(D) This topic is going to change a lot in the next month or months.

questions.stem: Why does Christina Arden want to help do the research required for this piece?
translation: Christina Arden為什麼要幫忙這篇文章所需的研究？
a. 她厭倦只有寫作，所以她希望更多地參與研究部分。
b. 她懷疑Ben Thomas的寫作能力。
c. 她已經認識能提供有關這篇文章的信息的一些人。
d. 她期望擴展她的新聞技能。
options: (A) She is tired of only writing so she wants to be more involved in the research end of it.
(B) She has doubt in Ben Thomas' ability to write.
(C) She already knows some people that can provide information pertaining to this article.
(D) She is looking to expand her set of journalistic skills.

questions.stem: What role does Bart Simpson assign to Christina Arden and Ben Thomas for this task?
translation: Bart Simpson派給Christina Arden和Ben Thomas在這個任務中是什麼角色？
a. 他要Christina Arden寫作，Ben Thomas做研究。

options: (A) He wants Christina Arden to write and Ben Thomas to do the research.
(B) He wants Ben Thomas to write and Christina Arden to do the research.
(C) He wants both Christina Arden and Ben Thomas to help with both research and writing.
(D) He doesn't care which aspect of the task each person works on.

questions.stem: How long does Bart Simpson want the mayoral article to be?

c. 多於4500字。
d. 至少4500字。

cards.passage:
To: All Volunteers
From: Catherine Jackson
Date: June 11, 2004
Subject: New Punch Clock
To all volunteers,
As you may or may not have already noticed, we have installed a new punch clock in the entrance to the Grandin Care Center for the Mentally and Physically Disabled. All full-time and part-time volunteers are now asked to punch in and out from all of their shifts. (1) _____________ You will note there is a rack containing individual time cards for each volunteer. The first half of each month is on the pink side of the card, and the second half on the blue side. (2) _____________ Simply insert the card into the machine, and it should automatically fill in the current date and time. If you forget to punch in or out of a shift, please have one of the senior staff members write in the time by hand and sign the correction. (3) _____________ You don't need to punch in and out for breaks. (4) _____________
The reason we have put this system in place is to keep an accurate record of volunteer attendance. Perfect attendance records will be rewarded on a monthly and annual basis with small gifts, and an excellent record over the duration of your volunteer period will enhance your likelihood of receiving a positive reference from the Grandin Care Center for the Mentally and Physically Disabled.
If you have any questions, don't hesitate to ask me in private.
Sincerely,
Catherine Jackson
Volunteer Coordinator
Grandin Care Center for the Mentally and Physically Disabled
cards.passageTranslation:
收件人：所有的志願者
寄件人：凱瑟琳．傑克遜
日期：2004年6月11日
主題：新式打卡鐘
所有的志工敬啟：
你可能或還沒注意到，我們已經在弱智及傷殘人士的格蘭丁護理中心的入口處安裝了一個新的打卡鐘。所有全職及兼職的志工現在被要求上班前後都要打卡。你會注意到有一個架子上裝了每位志工的卡單。前半個月是粉紅色那面，而後半個月則為藍色。請務必在正確的那一面打卡。僅需將卡插入機器內，卡鐘會自動填上當日的日期和時間。如果你忘了打卡，請資深的工作人員寫上時間及簽名。您休息時間不需打卡。
我們之所以會執行這個制度，是要準確的記錄志工的出缺席。全勤記錄每個月及每年都會有小禮物以資鼓勵。志工期間的優越紀錄會更有可能接受格蘭丁弱智及傷殘人士護理中心的推薦資格。
如果您有任何問題，盡請私下與我洽詢。
誠摯的，
凱瑟琳．傑克遜
志工協調員
格蘭丁弱智及傷殘人士護理中心
vocabulary: disabled adj. 有障礙的；有缺陷的
shift n. 換班/v. 變動；轉移
mentally 心智的；精神上的；心理的
physically 身體的；外在的；生理的
hesitate v. 懷疑；猶疑；遲疑
in private (副詞片語) 私人地 Ex. Please ask Mrs. Jones to come to my office later. I need to speak to her about her new contract in private. 請告知瓊斯太太等下來我的辦公室。我需要私下和她談談她的合約。

Dear Mr. Wang,
I would like to apply for the position of account manager at Singapore Tech in Singapore. As you can see from my attached resume, I have extensive experience with this role, having been an account manager at Syncrude in Kuala Lumpur for nearly a decade.
In my time as an account manager, I have developed a vast network of Southeast Asia regional contacts, and while I am not based in Singapore, I visit the city at least a dozen times a year for business and consider it my second home. If offered a position with Singapore Tech, I would be more than happy to relocate to Singapore and would not expect any kind of relocation compensation.
I believe that with my set of capabilities, including an advanced command of the English language, strong leadership skills, regional and industry knowledge, and the ability to influence others, I would be a valuable asset to your team.

questions.stem: Which of the following is not included in Hester Lee's application submission?

questions.stem: If Hester Lee gets offered a position at Singpaore Tech, what does she expect?

questions.stem: Why was Marc Wang surprised that Hester Lee applied in the way that she did?

options: (A) They have met before, so he thought she could have just called him.
(B) Marc Wang is used to receiving applications by phone, not in writing.
(C) March Wang thinks that resume applications are too formal.

questions.stem: What is the final result?

cards.passage:
NOTICE TO ALL PATIENTS
Due to the increasing costs of dental products and supplies in Auckland, coupled with inflation and rising business rental fees in the downtown area, the White Teeth Private Dental & Orthodontic Clinic will be making some adjustments to our pay rates for regular teeth cleaning, cavity filling, and maintenance of braces in the coming new year. Most changes will take go into effect on January 15th. If you require more specific information about the expected new prices, or have any questions or concerns about your account at White Teeth, please speak with one of our receptionists at the front desk.
cards.passageTranslation:
所有患者請注意以下事項
由於奧克蘭的牙科產品及耗材的成本增加，再加上通貨膨脹及市區經營及租賃費用漲價，亮齒及矯正牙科將於明年度調整以下服務費用：定期牙齒清潔，齲齒填補，及牙套維護。大多數更改將於1月15日開始生效。如果您對新的價格，或您在診所的服務有任何問題或疑慮，或您需要更具體的訊息，請與我們櫃檯聯絡。
vocabulary: dental adj. 牙齒的；牙科的/ n. 齒音
couple with (動詞片語) 連結；與…聯繫 Ex. These cheese is delicious when coupled with red wine. 每每提到美國的性醜聞，前任總統的名字總會和李文斯基聯想在一起。

questions.stem: Where might this notice be seen?
translation: 你可以在以下何處看到這一張通知單？
a. 牙醫雜誌。
b. 在診所裡牙齒清潔的診療室中。
c. 在當地報紙的健康專欄中。
d. 在公立醫院的齒列矯正的手術等候區。
options: (B) In one of the teeth cleaning rooms at the clinic.
(C) In the health section of a local newspaper.
(D) In a public hospital's orthodontic surgery waiting area.

questions.stem: Which reason is not cited for the cost increase?
translation: 以下何者並非文章列出的成本增加原因？
a. 城市的通膨率。
b. 耗材變得更加昂貴。
c. 診所租用的費用越來越高。
d. 牙科的工作人員要求更高的工資。
options: (C) The fees for renting the clinic are getting higher.
(D) The dental staff members are requesting better wages.

cards.passage:
To: frankensteinL@email.com
From: delmontesash@here.com
Sent: Today 9:11am
Subject: Request for product catalogue
Dear Frank Lloyd,
My name is Sasha Delmonte. I made your acquaintance at the National Home & Office Appliance Trade Fair last week. I'm sure you met dozens of people from the industry that day, but you may remember that I was the one wearing a baby blue blazer, which you complimented me on. I got your contact info from your business card, which, by the way, I must say has an excellent design. Who made them up for you?
As you might recall, I expressed interest in your company's line of china teapots, saucers, and teacups. I believe you mentioned that you had run out of your chinaware product list that day, so I was wondering if you could fax one to me ASAP? The reason we need it quickly is because I'd like to order some products for a formal afternoon tea that our company is holding next week. We will be entertaining a number of important personalities, including two councilors, not to mention our own company's CEO. It is our primary desire to leave a lasting impression on all those in attendance, so we will be serving nothing but the finest selection of Chinese and Ceylon teas, as well as high grade Kona coffee from Hawaii. Now we just need equally high-quality paraphernalia to serve them in.
Our fax number is (283) 332-8888. I look forward to seeing what you have to offer.
Yours truly,
Sasha Delmonte
-----------------------------------------------------
Attention: Sasha Delmonte Page 1 of 6
Fax received from: Oxford Fine Dining Ware
Number of pages 6
Dear Sasha,
On pages 2 through 4 of this fax you will find our full line of tea and coffee chinaware and other porcelain products complete with photographs. On pages five and six I also took the liberty of including some other coffee and tea-serving devices that I feel may be appropriate for your upcoming event.
I would like to draw your attention to a few items that I personally feel would be particularly useful for your upcoming event. The Bodom tea-press (page 5) is a hot new item that people enjoy because you can actually watch the tea brewing through the glass panels, and it comes in a variety of traditional porcelain designs. The Kolkata series of matching mugs and saucers (page 2) also combine traditional colonial elegance with modern features such as magnetic placers that prevent spills when the cup is bumped.
Please fill out the order form at the bottom of each sheet and fax it back to me. There is a column for quantity, and please note that a discount of 10% is applied for quantities of 10 or more of any individual item. All the items listed are available at the moment, and our orders normally ship in 48 hours or less, Monday through Saturday.
By the way, thanks for the compliment! I had the cards made at Peacock Print Shop on 54th and Elm St.
Thanks again, and we look forward to filling your order.
Sincerely,
Frank Lloyd
收件人: frankensteinL@email.com
寄件人: delmontesash@here.com
cards.passageTranslation:
發送: 今日上午 9:11
主旨: 索取產品型錄
親愛的法蘭克．勞埃德,
我的名字叫薩莎．德爾蒙。我是在上禮拜的全國家居及辦公用品貿易博覽會上與你認識的。我相信你當天一定認識了不少來自業界的人，但你可能還記得我是那個穿著淡藍色運動上衣被你稱讚的人。我從你的名片上得到你的聯絡資訊，說到這，我得說那名片的設計真棒。是誰幫你做的呢？
你可能還記得，我對你公司的瓷茶壺、茶碟跟茶杯產品表示感興趣。我相信你那天說過你的瓷器產品目錄發完了，因此我想你是否可以儘快傳真一份給我？我們立即需要它的原因是我想要為我們公司下禮拜要舉辦的正式下午茶會訂購一些產品。我們將要招待一些重要人士，包括了兩位議員，更別說還有我們公司的營運長。在所有出席貴賓心中留下永恆的印象是我們的首要要求，所以我們將不但只會供應最精選的中國跟斯里蘭卡茶，還有來自夏威夷的高級柯納咖啡。現在我們只需要同樣高品質的器具來把它們送上桌。
我們的傳真電話是(283) 332-8888。我期待看到你所能提供的產品。
此致,
薩莎．德爾蒙
---------------------------------------------------------------
傳真收件人: 薩莎．德爾蒙 頁 1 之 6
傳真發件人: 奧斯福爾精品餐具
總頁數 6
親愛的薩莎．德爾蒙,
在這份傳真的第2到第4頁你可以找到我們全系列附帶有照片的茶跟咖啡瓷器及其他瓷器。在第5和第6頁我還自作主張附上一些其他我覺適合你近期活動裡用來上咖啡和茶的器具。
我想提請您注意幾樣我個人覺得會對你近期活動格外有用的產品。波登壓濾茶壺(頁 5)是一個大家喜愛的熱門新產品，因為你可以實際上透過玻璃看到茶的沖泡，而且它有各種傳統瓷器設計。加爾各答系列的咖啡杯、杯碟對組還結合了傳統殖民時期的優雅與像是可防止杯子被碰到時溢出的磁性置杯架這樣的現代功能。
請填妥每一張傳真下面的訂購表格並將它傳真回來給我。有一欄填數量的部分，請注意任何單項產品數量為10個或以上者可有10%的折扣。所有列在上面的品項現在都有貨，正常我們的訂單在48小時或更短時間內可出貨，從週一到週六。
對了，謝謝你的讚美！我的名片是在54街跟榆樹街口的孔雀印刷店作的。
再次感謝，我們期待能滿足您的訂單。
誠摯的,
法蘭克．勞埃德
vocabulary: acquaintance n. 熟識的人；與(人)相識
blazer n. 色彩鮮艷的運動上衣
councilor n. 委員；顧問；議員
compliment n. 讚美；道賀 /adj.恭維的
paraphernalia n. 隨身用具；器材
porcelain n. 用具；(總稱)瓷器
glass panel n. 玻璃面板
column n. 圓柱物；(報紙, 雜誌) 專欄
ASAP = as soon as possible 盡可能的快
apply for (動詞片語) 申請… Ex. After working for two more years, I plan to apply for graduate school. 在工作兩年後，我打算申請研究所。
up for (介係詞片語) 打算 Ex. The holiday house on the beach is up for sale. 海邊的度假屋要出售。
run out of (動詞片語) 用光；用盡 Ex. Soon we will be running out of our savings. 很快我們就會花完存款了。
a variety of (名詞片語) 各式各樣的 Ex. This online store offers a variety of snacks and crackers. 線上商店提供各式各樣的點心和餅乾。
fill out (動詞片語) 填寫(表格) Ex. To apply for a new passport, first you need to fill out Forms I-115 and N94. 要申請一本新護照，首先你要先填寫表格I-115及N94。
at the moment (時間副詞) 在…這一刻 means “currently”, “presently” “right now” Ex. At the moment, I am too busy to reply to all my e-mails. 在這一個感動的時刻，我最想給你一個大大的擁抱。
dozens of= many 很多 (dozen 原意為一打;12個) Ex. We are expecting dozens of journalists to show up at the event. 我們期望有很多記者會來這個活動。

Details: I have tried repeatedly to log in to my Drop-Share-Box and keep getting the message “The user name or password you have entered is incorrect.” However, I just registered for the account last week, and I am 100% certain that I am using the right username and password, because I always use the same ones. I have paid a lot of money for your “Professional 200GB Account”, so I hope that this issue can be cleared as soon as possible. Please e-mail me the information about how to access my account at nicholasvernon@extramail.com. I have files in the clouds on my account that I need to access with my smartphone as soon as possible. Thanks. To: nicholasvernon@extramail.com
From: autoreply@dropsharebox.com
Date: Wed. Sept. 16, 2012, 8:57am
Subject: Automatic Reply Dear nicholasvernon, This is an automatic reply from dropsharebox.net. Please do not reply to this message. We have received your message regarding your difficulty logging in. Please be informed that due to a virus affecting the Drop-Share-Box network, all passwords have been reset. NONE OF YOUR FILES HAVE BEEN JEOPARDIZED. All of them remain in the clouds as they were prior to the event. New passwords will be automatically e-mailed to account holders over the next 6 hours. If you do not receive your new password by Thursday, September 17 at 8am Eastern Standard Time, please contact our security office at 1-888-981-8271. Once you have received your new password, please use it login. If you wish to change the new password, you can do so by updating the password field in the ‘other options’ section located on your homepage. Using your previous password is acceptable. However, for the sake of security, we recommend that you choose a unique password that you have never used before, and one that is different from what you normally use for online accounts. We apologize for any temporary inconveniences this has caused, and look forward to your continued use of Drop-Share-Box in the future! Sincerely,
The Drop-Share-Box Team
cards.passageTranslation:
www.dropsharebox.net/loginpage.html 歡迎來到隨手分享盒，在 “雲端”分享你的多媒體檔案的最佳線上網站。 別還想著用電子郵件來寄大型檔案或是嘗試用傳輸線來同步你所有的裝置了。現在就隨手分享它們！目前免費提供3GB的空間！ 登入：
使用者帳號： nicholasvernon
密碼：************* 您所輸入的使用者帳號或密碼不正確。 若您無法登入您的帳號，請利用以下的表單與我們網站的資安人員聯繫。 使用者帳號： nicholasvernon
詳情：我重複嘗試登入到我的隨手分享盒但一直收到“您所輸入的使用者帳號或密碼不正” 的訊息。可是我上禮拜才剛註冊這個帳號，而且我百分之百確定我用的是正確的使用者帳號跟密碼，因為我一直是用一樣的。我花了很多錢用你們的“200GB專業級帳戶”，所以我希望這個問題可以儘速釐清。請將如何存取我的帳號的資訊寄到我的電子郵件nicholasvernon@extramail.com。我迫切需要用我的智慧手機存取雲端上我的帳號裡的檔案。謝謝。 --------------------------------------------- 收件人: nicholasvernon@extramail.com
寄件人: autoreply@dropsharebox.com
日期: Wed. Sept. 16, 2012, 8:57am
主旨: 自動回覆 親愛的 nicholasvernon, 這是發自dropsharebox.net的系統自動回覆。請勿回覆本訊息。 我們已收到您的有關於登入障礙的訊息。 敬告您由於有病毒侵襲隨手分享盒網路，所有的密碼已被重置。您的檔案未受波及。全數檔案仍舊保留於雲端與狀況發生前一樣。 在接下來的六個小時新的密碼將會自動被以電子郵件寄給帳號所有人。若到星期四，九月17日，東部標準時間上午八點，您仍未收到你的新密碼，請撥1-888-981-8271聯絡我們的資安辦公室。 一旦您收到新的密碼，請用它來登入。如果您欲更改新密碼可在您的網頁上的‘其他選項’部份的密碼欄位中更新。可以使用您先前的密碼。不過為了確保安全，我們建議您選用以前未曾使用過的獨特密碼，且該密碼與您平常用的網路帳號不同。 我們為所造成的任何暫時不便致上歉意，並希望您未來繼續使用隨手分享盒！ 誠摯的,
隨手分享盒團隊 重要單字片語： multimedia n. 多媒體 sync= synchronize 同時發生；使同步 security n. 安全性 representative n. 業務代表 temporary adj. 暫時的 available adj. 可利用的；(人/物)有空的 automatic adj. 自動的 repeatedly adv. 重複地 access v. 進入/n. 進入的途徑 acceptable adj. 可接受的 jeopardized adj. 危及；冒…的危險 updating adj. 可更新的 recommend v. 推薦；介紹；勸告 unique adj. 獨特的 Eastern Standard Time n. 東部標準時間 inconvenience n. 不便之處；打擾；麻煩 log in (動詞片語) 登入 Be/get in touch with 保持聯絡 Ex. After so many years, some of my high school classmates are still in touch with our old homeroom teacher. 過了這麼多年，我有些高中同學還與那時的導師保持聯絡。 for the sake of +N 因為…原因 means ‘for the benefit of/to help” Ex. The teacher speaks slowly for the sake of the slower students. 她留在加拿大的原因是要找一個比較好的工作。

cards.passage:
October 17, 2006
Dear Mr. Cohan,
After several months of careful consideration, I have decided to resign from my position of coordinator of logistics at Super Cola Drinks Manufacturing. After serving more than five years with the company, I feel obliged to explain my decision to you in detail.
When I was promoted to the position in the summer of 2004, there were certain verbal promises that were made that have not been kept. First of all, it was discussed that I would be receiving a raise after my first year of holding the new position. However, two years have now passed, and no such raises have been mentioned. When I brought it up with my immediate supervisor, he said that he would take it up with those in charge, but nothing ever came of it.
Secondly, the logistics department of Super Cola Drinks Manufacturing is constantly understaffed, and the bulk of the weight of this problem always falls on my shoulders. I have filed several official requests for new staff, but upper management always replies with a generic explanation that budget cuts do not allow for any new hiring. When you seek to fill my position, you may be surprised to find that you will need to hire at least two people to take on the workload that I have been handling on my own.
Out of respect for you and the company, and to preserve my own reputation, I am giving 4-week notice, which is two weeks more than what is officially required.
Sincerely,
Louis Bates
----------------------------------------------
October 19, 2006
Dear Louis,
It was with shock and embarrassment on our company's behalf that I read your formal letter, which was handed to me by my secretary yesterday afternoon.
Not only have we become close friends since we first met at Super Cola, but we have also casually discussed your grievances over drinks in the past. I knew you were unsatisfied about some things, but I had no idea that you were thinking about quitting because of them.
Therefore, as your friend and coworker, I would ask you to hold off on your decision, if only for a week. Let me try to pull a few strings with upper management and try to get you that long awaited raise and some new staff. I won't mention that you are thinking of quitting, yet. I'm sorry I didn't do anything for you earlier, but you understand as well as I do how hectic things have been around here.
If after one week I can't convince them, then I will fully understand if you want to go forward with your resignation. What do you say, old pal? One last chance?
Let me know ASAP how to proceed.
Dan Cohan
十月 17, 2006
cards.passageTranslation:
親愛的科翰先生，
經過幾個月的仔細考慮後，我已決定辭去我在超級可樂飲料製造公司的物流協調師一職。在公司服務超過五年後，我覺得不得不向您仔細解釋自己的決定。
當我2004夏天年被拔擢到這個職位的時候，有被給過某些口頭承諾但迄未兌現。首先，說好的是我到新職位一年後會給我加薪。然而到現在已兩年過去了，加薪的事從沒被提起過。當我向我的中階主管提起這件事時，他說他會往上向負責的人反應，但從未有回音。
其次，超級可樂飲料製造公司的物流部經常的人手不足，而這個問題的重擔總是落在我肩膀上。我已提出過數次正式的人力請求，但是管理高層總是以預算縮減人事凍結的制式說明回覆。當您找人來填補我的職缺時，你可能會驚訝的發現到你至少得要僱用兩個人才能夠勝任一直是我自己一個人在處理的工作量。
基於對您及公司的尊重，且為維護我自己的名聲，我提前四週預告離職，較法定要求的要多兩個禮拜。
誠摯的,
路易斯•貝滋
---------------------------------------------------------
十月 19, 2006
親愛的路易斯，
你的正式信在昨天下午經由我的秘書交給我，讀過後我為公司感到震驚與慚愧。
自我們初次在超級可樂相識起不僅是變成了親近的朋友，而且在過去我們還偶爾談論你對於飲料的不滿。我知道你對一些事感到不滿，但我沒想到你會因之而考慮辭職。
因此，身為你的朋友和同事，我想請你暫緩你的決定，就算僅只有一個禮拜而已。讓我試著動用關係跟管理高層運作一下，設法要到你等待已久的加薪跟新人力。我還不會提你考慮要離職的事。我很抱歉我沒有早一點為你做點什麼事，但你和我一樣的了解這裡事情有多麼的忙亂。
如果一個禮拜後我無法說服他們，若你決定辭職那麼我會完全理解。你說怎樣，老朋友？給最後一次機會？
請儘速讓我知道接下來該如何作。
丹•科翰
vocabulary: supervisor n. 監督人；指導員或老師；
resign v.辭職 /resignation n. 辭職
manufacturing n. 製造業/ adj. 製造的；製造業的
logistics n. 物流；算術運算
grievance n. 委屈；不滿；牢騷
generic adj. 通用的；總稱的；一般的
preserve v. 保留；保存；防腐
bull n. 大塊；容積；大多數/ adj. 大量的
upper adj. (地位, 等級)較高的；(地點, 位置)上面的
hold off (動詞片語) 拖延
first of all adv. 首先
out of respect 出於尊重
in detail adv. 細節上地
bring up (動詞片語) 提出
take on (動詞片語) 承擔 Ex. Since his wife passed away, he has taken on the responsibility of taking care of their children. 自從他太太過世後，他便擔起照顧孩子們的責任。
pull a few strings (常用語) means “take advantage of your connections” Ex. I pulled a few strings and was able to get us on the VIP list! 我靠一點關係才能讓我們在VIP清單！
take it up with sb. 開始與…交往；與某人提起... Ex. Don’t worry about these problems. I will take them up with the boss. 別擔心問題。我會和老闆提起。
in charge (介係詞片語) 負責… Ex. I’d like to talk to the person in charge because our waiter is being rude to us. 我想和負責人說話，因為我的服務生對我十分無禮。
as well as 和…一樣 Ex. Linda, as well as my little sister, wants to help plan the whole wedding. Linda和我最小的妹妹都想幫忙籌畫整個婚禮。

c. 他是丹·科翰的朋友。

(B) He has worked at the company for more than 5 years.

(B) Because he thought Louis got the raise.
