options: (A) He will pull out some old papers.
(B) He will try to bribe upper management.
(C) He will use his connections to make things happen.
(D) He will tie up the missing pieces in the request.

questions.stem: What excuse does Dan give for not helping his friend earlier?
translation: 丹沒有早一點幫忙他朋友的理由是什麼？

b. 他說公司很慚愧。
c. 他說不知道要如何幫忙。
d. 他說他一直都太忙。
options: (A) He says his requests were unreasonable.
(B) He says the company is embarrassing.
(C) He says that he didn't know how to help.
(D) He says that he has been too busy.

cards.passage:
PLEASE READ BEFORE ENTERING
Several injuries have occurred in the last year in the walk-in freezer. On two separate occasions, employees have fallen in the freezer due to slippery frozen water on the floor. In one case, the worker was carrying a large, heavy load, and was hospitalized with a sprained leg. Here at The Henderson Hotel Lounge, we expect nothing but the highest safety standards to be followed. Therefore, please read and abide by the following new regulations:
Do not prop the freezer door open for long periods of time. Warm air entering the cooler creates frost.
Any spills in the freezer must be cleaned immediately, even during lunch and dinner rush hours.
Daily inspecting of the fan and air ventilation system is required. It is the duty of the line manager to delegate this duty to staff members. Upon inspection, the inspector should sign and date the sheet on the wall below the main fan.
Heavy loads should never be carried without the use of a cart. Workers should request a coworker to assist them for opening the freezer door.
Make sure to lift large items with the knees bent and the back upright.
Every staff member must initial this sheet to show they have read it.
cards.passageTranslation:
進入前請仔細閱讀
過去一年在冰櫃有數起傷害事件發生。在兩個不同的情況下，員工在冰櫃中跌傷，由於地板上的水結冰且濕滑。
另一個案例則是，工人當時背著一個大又重的物件，結果扭傷了腿住院。在The Henderson Hotel Lounge，我們只期望員工們能遵守最高的安全標準。因此，請閱讀並遵守以下新規定：
1. 不要長一段時間撐開冷凍室的門。暖空氣進入冷卻器會結霜。
2. 在冷凍室有任何液體灑漏，即使在午餐及晚餐的忙碌時段，也必須立即清理。
3. 必需每日檢查風扇和空氣通風系統。團隊經理有責任將工作委託給工作人員。檢查後，檢查員應簽署並加註日期在主風扇牆下的單子上。
4. 沒有使用推車不可搬運重物。工作人員應要求同事協助打開冰櫃。
5. 搬運重物時請一定要膝蓋彎曲，背部直立。
6. 閱讀後每一位工作人員必須簽上名字縮寫。
vocabulary: walk-in adj. 大得可走進去的
occasion n. 場合；重大活動
hospitalized adj. 使…住院治療的
spill v. 灑水/n. 潑灑出來的東西
ventilation n. 通風；空氣流通
delegate n. 會議代表；代表團團員

questions.stem: What kinds of items are likely stored in the walk-in freezer?
translation: 以下什麼物品可能被存儲在大冰櫃中？

b. 清潔和浴室用品。
c. 重的飯店客房用品。
d. 科學性的安全設備。

questions.stem: What can cause slippery floors?

b. 暖空氣造成的結霜。
c. 店裡使用的塑膠類軟地毯。
d. 冰櫃裡紊亂的物品。
options: (A) Chemicals used to clean the floor.
(C) The soft, plastic rugs that are used.

questions.stem: Which new safety regulation is not related to slippery floors?
translation: 以下哪項新的規則與濕滑的地板沒有關係？

cards.passage:
Somebody will greet you and escort you to your resort. Andy Feng 16:04
Wonderful. Where will I find them? Jim Phelps 16:10
He or she will be waiting for your in the arrival area in terminal 1, just after you pass through customs. I'll instruct him or her to hold up a sign with your name on it and our company logo. You won't miss it. Andy Feng 16:12 a.m.
Will that person be fluent in English? Jim Phelps 16:13
Not fluent, but all of our staff are conversational. Andy Feng 16:16
Good enough. Could you also send a conference package along with him or her? I'd like to peruse it the night before the opening day. Jim Phelps 16:17
There will be one with your name on it waiting for you at the check-in counter at the resort. Andy Feng 16:18
Excellent. You've already thought of everything.
Jim Phelps 16:02
cards.passageTranslation:
有人會迎接你並陪同你到達酒店。 Andy Feng 16:04
非常好。我在哪裡可以找到他們？ Jim Phelps 16:10
他或她會在第一航廈的抵達區等你，就在你通過海關之後。我會指示他或她舉著上面有你的名字和我們公司標誌的牌子。你不會錯過的。 Andy Feng 16:12 a.m.
那個人會說流利的英語嗎？ Jim Phelps 16:13
不很流利，但我們所有的員工都可進行日常生活英文會話的交談。 Andy Feng 16:16
夠好了。你能不能讓他或她也送來會議包裹？我想開幕前晚上細讀它。 Jim Phelps 16:17
在酒店辦理入住手續的櫃檯，會有一個註明你姓名的包裹。 Andy Feng 16:18 優秀。你都已經想到了。

cards.passage:
CUSTOMER FEEDBACK CARD
Here at the Cristobal Royal Hotel & Spa we care about what our customers think. If there was anything not enjoyable about your stay, or any way that you think we can improve our facilities to guarantee satisfaction for all our customers, please use this form to let us know.
Please mark how much you agree with the following statements. 0 = strongly disagree, 1 = agree somewhat, 2 = agree, 3 = strongly agree, N/A = does not pertain to your visit.
Service and facilities 0 1 2 3 N/A 1. My reservation was easy to make. V 2. The lobby staff greeted me when I arrived and helped me with my luggage. V 3. The check-in counter staff members were efficient and friendly. V 4. The room was clean and smelled fresh. V 5. All the complimentary supplies were well stocked. V 6. The mini-fridge contained water bottles and sodas. V 7. The shower water was hot and the water pressure was satisfactory. V 8. Room service was prompt and the items ordered were a good value. V 9. Wake-up call came on time. V 10. The spa packages were excellent and relaxing. V 11. The gift shop supplies interesting souvenirs at reasonable rates. V 12. The laundry service was quick and clothes were returned well folded. V 13. The pool was clean and free towels were provided. V 14. Check-out was quick and hassle-free. V 15. The airport shuttle driver was professional. V Additional Comments Section Please explain the reasons behind any 0s that you selected, or provide any other comments you wish to.
Regarding the spa, my wife and I went for the 2 hours Swedish massage for couples. We found that the two massage girls were so engrossed in their conversation with one another (in a language we couldn't understand) during the massage treatment that they weren't putting much effort into it. The oil used was also quite greasy. We would not get it again. The laundry service was indeed quick, but perhaps a little too quick. The clothes were stiff and starchy, and were left on a pile outside of our door while we were away. Finally, the airport shuttle was supposed to come by the arrivals terminal every 15 minutes, but we waited for over 45. The driver seemed to be in a great rush to catch up, and was driving well above the speed limit. It was not a great way to be introduced to this country!
Contact name and e-mail Bryan Dupont, travelingcouple222@gmail.com To: travelingcouple222@gmail.com
From: cristobalroyal@hotels.com
Sent: Fri. January 12, 1999 19:33
Subject: Regarding your comments
Dear Bryan Dupont,
I'd like to begin this communication by sincerely thanking you for filling out the comments card provided in our hotel room on your visit last month. Now I would like to take the time to specifically address each of your comments.
The two spa girls that provided poor service to you are normally very professional and receive rave reviews from our guests. We have spoken to them about what may have been the cause of the lack of attentiveness on the day of your visit. It turns out that there had been a major disaster that had struck their country of origin that day, which they had learned over the news on their lunch break, and they were very concerned about their relatives that may have been affected. We hope you will excuse the incident, and accept the enclosed voucher for a free treatment of your choice on your next visit.
Regarding the laundry incident, we have a policy that clean clothing should only be handed directly to customers, and have used punitive action against those responsible. We will also look into using a different detergent. Finally, the airport shuttle bus is a subcontracted service, but we will forward your complaint to the company.
We trust that these explanations are adequate, and hope that we will still see you again in the future.
Sincerely yours,
Malinda Baker
Cristobal Royal Customer Relations Manager
The Cristobal Royal Hotel and Spa

克里斯托柏豪華旅宿水療會館
顧客意見回饋卡 在克里斯托柏豪華旅溫泉館這裏，我們在乎我們客人的意見。如果有任何關於您住宿方面的不滿意，或者有任何您認為我們的設施可再改進以保證我們所有的顧客都滿意的措施，請透過這張表讓我們知道。 請寫下您對下列敘述的認同程度。0 = 強烈不同意， 1 = 大致同意，2 = 同意， 3 = 強烈同意， N/A = 不適用於您的情況 服務及設施
0
1
2

附帶意見部份 請解釋任何您選擇0的項目背後的原因，或者任何您想提供的意見。 有關於水療的方面，我太太和我選了夫妻雙人兩小時瑞典按摩。我們覺得那兩位按摩女孩在按摩過程中太專注於與對方對話（用我們不懂的語言）而沒有太盡力。使用的精油也太油膩。我們不會再選它了。洗衣服務的確是很迅速，但是或許有點太快了。衣物變得又僵又刻板，而且在我們出去時整堆被放在我們房門外。最後一點，機場接駁巴士原本應該要每15分鐘一班到入境航廈的，但是我們等了超過45分鐘。司機看起來急著要趕時間，因而都開在速限之上。這不是個被接待到這個國家的最好方式！ 聯絡人姓名與電子郵件 布萊恩•杜邦, travelingcouple222@gmail.com --------------------------------------------------- 收件人: travelingcouple222@gmail.com
寄件人: cristobalroyal@hotels.com
發送: Fri. January 12, 1999 19:33
主旨: 關於您的意見
親愛的Bryan Dupont先生， 我想藉由誠摯感謝您在上個月的造訪時填寫我們旅館房間內所提供的意見卡作為溝通的開始。現在我要花些時間來具體回覆您的每一個意見。 提供您不佳服務的那兩位按摩女孩平常是非常專業且廣受我們的客人好評的。我們已和她們談過您蒞臨當天可能造成缺乏專注的原因。原來那天她們來自的國家遭逢了一個大災難，她們在午餐休息時得知此事，因此她們非常擔心自己的親人可能受到波及。我們希望您能諒解這件事並接受隨信附上您可於下次蒞臨時使用的自選免費招待券。 關於洗衣房的事，我們有規定乾淨的的衣物應只能被直接交給客人，並且已經對那些該負責的人作了懲處。我們也將研究改用不同的洗潔劑。最後，機場接駁巴士是外包的服務，但我們會將您的申訴轉給該公司。 我們相信這些解釋是充分的，並希望我們仍能夠在未來再次看見您。 誠摯的，
Malinda Baker
顧客關係部經理
克里斯托柏豪華旅宿水療會館

questions.stem: What can we assume about Bryan Dupont and his wife?

a. 他們在度蜜月。
b. 這是他們第一次造訪這個國家。
c. 這家旅館是他們在這個國家所到的第一個地方。
d. 他們未使用水療設施。
options: (B) It was their first time visiting this country.
(C) This hotel was the first place they went in this country.
(D) They did not use the spa facilities.

questions.stem: What did the hotel provide to make up for the complaints?
translation: 該旅館提供了什麼作為客訴的補償？
a. 一張下次可使用的免費水療券。
b. 免費招待住宿一晚。
c. 以後住宿可打折。
d. 來自於做錯事者的道歉。
options: (A) A free spa voucher for the next time.
(D) An apology from those who were guilty.

questions.stem: Which complaint was not addressed in the e-mail reply?
translation: 回覆的電子郵件中未提到那一項抱怨？
a. 太油膩的身體乳液。
b. 不專業的司機。
c. 愛聊天的水療工作人員。
d. 留在門外的送洗衣物。
options: (D) The laundry left outside the door.

questions.stem: Why didn't the replier explain the shuttle bus driver's poor driving?
translation: 回覆者為何沒有解釋接駁巴士司機的不佳駕駛行徑？
a. 因為這個國家每個人都這麼開車。
b. 因為他不確定是哪一名司機。
c. 因為接駁巴士是屬於不同的公司。
d. 因為旅館不再有這項服務。
options: (A) Because everybody drives that way in this country.
(B) Because he wasn't sure which driver it was.
(C) Because the shuttle buses belong to a different company.
(D) Because the hotel no longer has this service.

questions.stem: What might the massage girls been talking about in another language, according to the explanation that was given?
translation: 根據信上給的解釋，那按摩女孩可能以其他語言在談論什麼事？

cards.passage:
General Information
Purchaser: Fernando Valdez, The Corner Cafe
Bidding Period End Date: 14 September 2008
Bidder Name: Tasty Bagel Bakery
Open or closed invitation to tender? Closed
Specifications for Product or Service
Type of Product or Service: Bagels and Cream Cheese
Quantity Required: Approximately 14 dozen bagels per week and 2kg of cream cheese
Product Specifications: Random assortment of bagel flavors preferred. 50% of them should be plain flavored for use in our bagel sandwiches. Only freshly baked bagels, no frozen ones.
Budget Specifications: Maximum 50 cents per bagel and 1$ per 100g of cream cheese.
Delivery Information
Delivery method: Two dozen bagels to be delivered daily. Deliveries accepted from 5:30am-6:00am only. Delivery fee should be included in the offer price.
Delivery packaging: Bagels should be delivered in sealed plastic bags. Deliveries should be inspected upon receipt by The Corner Cafe, and any damaged bagels to be replaced free of charge the following day.
Date: August 19, 2008
Signature: Fernando Valdez
Please note: This form does not constitute an order or official contract. ---------------------------------------- August 21, 2008
Dear Fernando Valdez,
I have attached a proposal for the provision of 14 dozen bagels a week by the Tasty Bagel Bakery to The Corner Cafe. I trust that you will find our proposal meets all of your specifications, except for the following two minor issues: Regarding the sealed plastic bags, the Tasty Bagel Bakery has found from past experience that they can adversely affect the bagels. Freshly baked bagels produce steam, and this steam can cause condensation inside of the bags, resulting in soggy bagels. We prefer to deliver them in brown, paper bags and all of our customers are satisfied with this. You did not specify which cream cheese you would like to order. We can provide plain cream cheese that meets your budget specifications, but if you would like any flavored cream cheeses, the cost may fall outside of your specifications. The specific numbers are included on the proposal form. If you are satisfied with the conditions laid out in our proposal, please sign it and send it back to me at your leisure. I can then provide you with our standard contract and order forms. I prefer to do this in person, so let me know when I can swing by The Corner Cafe for a chat!
Looking forward to doing business with you,
Yours truly,
Simon Fraser
Manager, Tasty Bagel Bakery
Attachment
Proposal for provision of bagels and cream cheese by Tasty Bagel Bakery to The Corner Cafe.
Weekly Cost: $104 or $114 (please check either option below
Cost Breakdown:
☑Option 1: $104/week
$20 for 2000g of plain cream cheese
168 bagels x $0.50 = $84
☐Option 2: $114/week
$30 for 2000g of flavored cream cheese
168 bagels x $0.50 = $84
flavor choices: garlic ☐ strawberry ☐ blueberry ☐ combo (please specify) ☐
Signature: Fernando Valdez
RFP (招標單) (No. YBB 1198)
cards.passageTranslation:
一般資訊
採購單位：Fernando Valdez，角落咖啡店
結標日期：14 九月 2008
投標者：美味貝果烘培坊
公開或非公開招標？非公開
產品或服務說明
產品或服務類型：貝果及奶油乳酪
需求數量：每週大約14 打貝果以及2公斤奶油乳酪
產品規格：偏好各種貝果口味任意搭配。其中的50%必須是普通口味的貝果以用在我們的貝果三明治上。只接受新出爐貝果，不收冷凍的。
預算規格：最高每顆貝果50分奶油乳酪每100克1美金。
交貨資訊
出貨方式：每日交兩打貝果。收貨時間只有早上五點半到六點。運費必須包含在報價內。
出貨包裝：貝果必須裝在密封塑膠袋內運送。貨物在收貨時須經角落咖啡店查驗，任何受損的貝果隔日應免費更換。
日期：2008年8月19日
簽名：Fernando Valdez
請注意：本報價單不構成訂單或正式契約。 ----------------------------------- 2008 年8月21日
親愛的Fernando Valdez，
我已照一週由美味貝果烘培坊供應14打貝果給角落咖啡店的規定附上一份報價單。我相信您會認為我們的報價完全符合您的規格明細，除了以下兩點小問題： 關於密封塑膠袋，美味貝果烘培坊由過去的經驗已發現到它可能對貝果有不利的影響。新鮮出爐的貝果產生蒸氣，而蒸氣可能造成在袋內凝結，導致貝果潮濕。我們傾向用棕色紙袋出貨，我們所有的客戶都對此感到滿意。 您未指明您想訂何種奶油乳酪。我們可以供應符合您預算規格的普通奶油乳酪，但是如果您想要任何調味了的奶油乳酪，費用可能會超出您的規格。明確的金額內含在報價單上。 如果您對我們報價單上所列的條件感到滿意，請您簽名並在您有空時回傳給我。然後我會提供我們的制式契約書跟訂單給您。我比較喜歡親自辦好這件事，因此請讓我知道我何時可晃到角落咖啡店聊聊。 期待能與您作生意，
您真誠的，
Simon Fraser
經理，美味貝果烘培坊 附加文件
美味貝果烘培坊針對提供予角落咖啡的貝果與奶油起司提案：
每週支出：$104或$114 (請勾選以下選項)
費用細項：:
☑選項1：$104/週
2000克原味奶油起司$20美元
168貝果x $0.50 = $84美元
☐選項2：$114/週
2000克風味奶油起司$30美元
168 貝果x $0.50 =$84美元
口味可選：大蒜☐ 草莓☐藍莓☐ 綜合(請註明)☐
簽名：Fernando Valdez 重要單字片語： proposal n. 提議；提案 bidding n. 出價；投票 tender n. 投標 random adj. 隨意的；任意的 specification n. 具體說明；詳細說明書 maximum n. 最大量 damaged adj. 破壞的 minor adj. 最小的 assortment n. 類別；分類 plain adj. 單調的；平坦的 leisure n. 休閒 inspected adj. 檢閱的 provision n. 供應量；提供 except for 除了…之外(否定) adversely adv. 逆向的；相反的 steam n. 蒸氣/v. 蒸煮；靠蒸氣行進 condensation n. 壓縮；凝結 swing by (動詞片語) (口語) 繞過來一下 Ex. After work, I will swing by my parents’ place to get the luggage. 下班後，後我會繞過去我父母的地方去拿行李。

options: (B) To ask for a proposal for weekly bagel purchases.

questions.stem: Which of the following was not a specification on The Corner Cafe's RFP?
translation: 下列何者非角落咖啡店的招標單上的一項規格？
a. 他們要一半的貝果是普通口味的。
b. 他們不在乎貝果是裝在塑膠袋或是紙袋裏過來。
c. 他們不想每個貝果支付超過0.5美金。
d. 他們想在九月中前對交易條件達成一致。
options: (A) They want half the bagels to be plain.
(B) They don't care whether the bagels come in plastic or paper bags.
(C) They don't want to pay more than $0.50 per bagel.
(D) They want to agree on the terms by mid-September.

questions.stem: Which condition cannot be met by Simon Fraser's bagel company?
translation: Simon Fraser的貝果公司無法達成哪一個條件？
a. 出貨時間。
b. 出貨包裝。
c. 運費。
d. 出貨報告。

questions.stem: What assumption can we make?
translation: 我們可以做出以下何項推論？
a. 角落咖啡很好奇想用風味奶油起司來實驗菜色。
b風味奶油起司並不在角落咖啡的預算範圍內。
c. 角落咖啡與美味貝果烘培坊的意見迥異。
d. 角落咖啡對建議的紙袋並不覺得OK。
options: (A) The Corner Cafe is curious to experiment with flavored cream cheeses.
(B) Flavored cream cheeses did not fall within the Corner Cafe's budget.
(C) The Corner Cafe and Tasty Bagel Bakery will not enter into an agreement.
(D) The Corner Cafe was not OK with the proposed paper bags.

questions.stem: If Fernando Valdez signs the proposal, what will happen next?
translation: 若Fernando Valdez簽了該報價單，接下來會發生什麼事？
a. 他們會見面討論契約。
b. Simon Fraser會簽了招標單。
c. 角落咖啡店會開始接受每週168個的貝果。
d. 他們會商議所需的貝果口味。
options: (A) They will meet to discuss a contract.
(B) Simon Fraser will sign the RFP form.
(C) The Corner Cafe will begin receiving 168 bagels per week.
(D) They will negotiate the flavors of bagels required.

cards.passage:
Date Posted: Sat. Jan. 16, 2001
Ad Headline: Mathematics Tutor Required ASAP
Ad Poster’s Name: Sue Nozak
Where: Lower East Side
Number of Students: 2
Age Level: Grade 5 and Grade 7
Ad Number: 12982
Details:
My husband and I are looking for a mathematics tutor to teach our two boys once a week from 5pm to 7pm. Tuesday are preferred, but Thursdays are also possible. We are looking for somebody who is aggressive and can put the boys to work. They have a tendency to slack off, and both are failing their math classes at the moment. We are not home at the time to supervise the class, so we need somebody who is punctual, responsible, and reliable.
Ideally, the candidate should have at least two years of experience teaching mathematics to elementary or junior high students. The boys attend an international school, so the level of material being taught is higher than what is normal for their age. To be honest, it is a little too difficult even for me to fully comprehend. Currently, Kent (grade 5) is on a geometry unit and Mike (grade 7) is doing algebra. Both of them have exams coming soon, so we’d like to get started as quickly as possible.
Please include a simple CV and summary of your teaching style when replying to this ad. The hourly rate is negotiable. Only male teachers above the age of 30 will be considered.
Click HERE to reply to this ad.
---------------------------------------------------
Dear Sue Nozak,
I am a 52-year-old stern, qualified, and professional mathematics tutor. I am quite serious, and I am used to dealing with students of Kent and Mike’s age. I am quite a demanding teacher, and don’t tolerate any silliness or shenanigans in class. I was a mathematics professor for several years, and I am now semi-retired and focused on private teaching.
My hourly rate for two students is $100 an hour and this is non-negotiable. Tuesdays are fine with me. I know that you mentioned you prefer a male teacher because you feel that they would be more aggressive, but please be aware that I have no problems controlling the students I work with.
If you want a friend for the kids to fool around with, try someone else. But if you want them to get down to business, I’m the teacher for you.
Please see my attached CV. I look forward to your reply!
Sincerely,
Pat Richardson
Pat Richardson
(666) 334-9173 patrichardson11@mail.com
Education:
Certificate for Teaching in the state of Kansas

cards.passageTranslation:
張貼日期： 星期六，一月 16, 2001年
廣告標題： 急徵數學家教
張貼者姓名：蘇· 諾扎克
地點：下東區
學生人數：2人
年齡層：五年級和七年級
廣告編號： 12982
詳情：
我丈夫和我正在找一位數學家教每週一次從下午五點到七點來教我們家的兩個男孩。最好是禮拜二，但禮拜四也行。我們要找的是積極又能督促男孩們的人。他們生性懶散，而且目前兩個人都把數學唸得很糟。我們沒辦法即時到家監督功課，因此需要的是準時、負責和可信賴的人。
理想上，應徵者必須有至少教過兩年的國小或國中生數學的經驗。男孩們上的是一所國際學校，所以教材的困難程度高於一般同年齡者。老實說，連我要完全理解都很困難。現在肯特（五年級）正在學幾何單元，而麥克（七年級）在學代數。他們倆都快考試了，所以我們想盡可能的快點開始。
請在回覆這則廣告時附上您的簡歷跟您的教學風格摘要。鐘點費可議。僅考慮年齡在30歲以上的男性教師。
按此處回覆這則廣告。
------------------------------------------------
親愛的蘇· 諾扎克，
我是一個52歲嚴格、夠資格，而且專業的數學家教。我非常認真，慣於和肯特跟麥克的年齡的學生打交道。我是名要求高的老師，並且不能容許班上有任何的愚蠢行徑跟胡鬧。我曾擔任過數年的數學教授，現在是半退休並專注在私人教學上。
教兩個學生我的鐘點費是一小時100美金，不二價。星期二我可以來。我知道您提過因為覺得男老師會比較積極而較想找男生，但是請您要知道的是控制我所教的學生對我一點都不成問題。
如果您是想為孩子們找個朋友當玩伴，請別處去找。但是如果您想讓他們作正經事，我就是您要的老師。
請參考我隨信附上的履歷表。我期待能收到您的回覆！
誠摯的，
派特·理查森
派特· 理查森
(666) 334-9173 patrichardson11@mail.com
學歷：
堪薩斯州教師證書
加州大學數學系碩士
工作經歷：
數學系教授，堪薩斯州立大學 1979-1999
“推測可能性：統計學在近代” 作者
數學專門家教 1999-2001
個性簡介：
認真、堅定、專注、思慮敏捷
準時、嚴格、可靠
推薦人：
珍·海妮蒂 (666) 837-9272 目前家教學生的母親
哈爾·辛普森 (666) 283-8271 前同事
vocabulary: aggressive adj. 有侵略性的；好爭論的

All of our baked items (including muffins, doughnuts, buns, and bagels) contain traces of nuts, eggs, soy, wheat, and milk products. Do not eat them if you are allergic to any of the above-mentioned products.

cards.passage:
Jason Walls (19:09)
Hey folks, I’m new to the city. Just transferred here from the team in Valeton. I’ve been given the a choice of three districts to work in and wondering if anybody could offer me some advice on which one is the most lucrative. The three districts are: Upper Heights, Lower Heights, and North-East.
Ageet Singh (19:42)
I can only comment on Upper and Lower Heights, since I used to work in the former, and now in the latter. A lot of rental properties in the Upper, and prices are generally lower, but the turnover rate is high. It’s not a bad place to be, but sales have dropped since last year’s economic downturn. Lower is all about luxury condos. If you are good with young couples and families like I am, this is your place.
Jason Walls (19:55)
Excellent info, thanks for that. Can anybody weigh in on the North-East?
Agatha Wandu (20:22)
Here’s my two cents: The North-East used to be everybody’s dream territory, but it’s not what it used to be.
Jason Walls (20:30)
Why’s that?
Agatha Wandu (20:44)
Ever since the Schweiss case, the housing market has plummeted.
Jason Walls (20:50)
The Schweiss case?
Ageet Singh (21:06)
There was a string of kidnappings in the neighborhood back in the mid-2000s and city residents still haven’t forgotten it, even though the perpetrator’s been locked up.
Jason Walls (21:10)
Is that so? Wow.
Agatha Wandu (21:29)
IMO, I think it has the potential to make a major comeback. Most of us have been avoiding it, but it might be a goldmine for anybody who’s willing to try again.
Jason Walls (19:09)
cards.passageTranslation:
嘿，夥伴們，我新到這城市。從威黎頓團隊轉來。我現在得從三個區域裡中選擇一個，想知道有沒有人可以給我一些建議，哪一個是最賺錢的。這三個區分別是：上高地區，下高地區，和東北區。
Ageet Singh (19:42)
我只能對上高地區和下高地區發表評論，我之前在前者工作，而目前在後者。在上高地區有很多租賃物業，價格普遍較低，但流動率很高。這個地方不錯，但去年的經濟衰退銷售下降。下高地區都是豪華公寓。如果你像我一樣，對年輕夫婦和有家庭的客戶很有一套，這裡就是你的歸屬。
Jason Walls (19:55)
優秀，感謝。有人能對東北區給點建議嗎？
Agatha Wandu (20:22)
我的意見是：東北區以往是每個人的夢想版圖，但已不如以往。
Jason Walls (20:30)
為什麼？
Agatha Wandu (20:44)
自從史維斯一案，房地產市場一落千丈。
Jason Walls (20:50)
史維斯案？
Ageet Singh (21:06)
20世紀中在附近有一連串的綁架案，即使犯案人已經被關，居民們仍沒有忘記。
Jason Walls (21:10)
是這樣嗎？哇！
Agatha Wandu (21:29)
在我看來。我認為東北區有捲土重來的重大可能性。我們大多數人一直在迴避它，但它可能是任何願意再次嘗試的人的大金礦。

cards.passage:
Notice of Failure to File a Tax Return
Monday, May 6, 2013
Dear Mr. Stanley Gomez,
This is an official notice regarding your failure to report your taxes for the 2012 tax year. (1)___________ It is standard practice for us to issue this notice sixty (60) days after the official tax due date. According to government records, you have a net value of $8673.00 owing. (2)___________ This brings the net total owing to $9106.65. (3)___________ If this amount is not paid in full by June 6, 2013, an additional 10% fee will be levied. (4)___________ Failure to settle your payment by August 6th, 2013, could result in legal punitive action, including arrest and possible imprisonment.
Please go to your local registry office and file your taxes using form 10A as quickly as possible. Agents are on hand 8:30am to 5:30pm, Mondays to Fridays, to assist you. If you are not the proper recipient of this letter, please contact the Department of Income and Revenue at 1-800-830-1111.
Sincerely yours,
Elsa McLain, Income Revenue Officer
cards.passageTranslation:
未報稅通知
2013年5月6日星期一
親愛的史丹利·哥梅茲,
這封正式通知信函關於您2012年未申報課稅。我們的標準流程在法定申報截止日後的六十(60)日發出通知。根據官方紀錄，您共積欠8673元整，外加5%的滯納金。積欠總金額達9106.65元整。未於2013年6月6日將該筆金額全額付清，將加收10%滯納金。未於2013年8月6日前完成付款，可能會導致法律懲處的後果，包括逮捕及可能入獄。
請儘速前往您當地的登記處並用10A表申報您的稅金。從星期一到星期五，上午8點半到下午5點半在現場有辦事員可協助您。若您並非本信函的法定收件人，請您撥1-800-830-1111與稅務局聯絡。
誠摯的,
稅務官Elsa McLain
vocabulary: regarding prep. 關於；就…而論 Ex. The whole team knows nothing regarding the potential risks of the case. 整個小組對案件潛在的風險都一無所知。
according to 根據 Ex. According to the news report, there was a terrorist attack in Madrid. 根據新聞報導，在馬德里發生一起恐怖份子攻擊事件。
Owing to 由於 Ex. Owing to the unsatisfactory salary, the man decided to find a new job. 由於對薪水不滿意，那個男子決定找另一份新工作

options: (B) To explain why he/she didn't file his/her taxes on time.
(C) To say that he/she is not Stanley Gomez.
(D) To inform them that they got the numbers wrong.

cards.passage:
You are cordially invited to the monthly Lion's Club Meeting at the Crestwood Community Hall this weekend.
Meeting time: Saturday, October 29, 1-4pm
(Please note: We must vacate the facilities by 4:30pm at the latest!
Meeting Minutes
Call to Order: Crestwood Community Lion's Chapter President John Inglewood will open the meeting at precisely 1pm with a brief greeting.
Review of Minutes from Previous Meeting: Secretary Lisa May will sum up what was accomplished at the last meeting to refresh out memories and for those who weren't present.
Upcoming Project Reports:
* The Used Clothing Drive We will ask for volunteers to nominate themselves to a committee for organizing a clothing drive. All collected clothing will be donated to the Bissell Center on 17th Ave.
* Plans to Decorate the Hall for the Christmas Season We will invite the crowd to propose ideas for decorating our hall.
* Movember Are all you macho males ready to grow mustaches in November? All funds raised will be donated to men's health centers. We will be sharing more information and providing forms to be used for collecting and recording funds.
Slideshow of Halloween Party Photos: A collection of photos that will be taken at the children's Halloween party the evening before the meeting will be presented in an entertaining slideshow.
Socializing Period: As usual, a variety of light snacks and beverages will be served during the socializing period. An advance thanks to the Miller and Thompson families for their delicious baking!
cards.passageTranslation:
誠摯邀請您參加本週在克里斯伍德社區活動中心所舉辦的獅子會月會。

即將開展項目報告:
* 舊衣募集活動 我們將徵求自願者參加一個組織舊衣募集活動的委員會。所有收集到的衣服將會被捐給17大道的比塞爾中心。
* 活動中心聖誕節裝飾計畫 我們將邀請大眾提供裝飾我們活動中心的構想。
* 鬍渣十一月 你們這些大男人們是否準備好在11月留個大鬍子了呢? 募集到的所有捐款將會被捐給男性醫療中心。我們將會分享更多的資訊並提供用來收取和記錄捐款的表格。
萬聖節派對照片幻燈片放映: 會議前一晚的萬聖節派對將拍攝照片集並作成一個有趣的幻燈片放映。
社交時段: 照例，社交時段將供應各種小吃和飲料。先為米勒和湯普森家族的烘培美食向他們致謝!
vocabulary: call v. 打電話； 叫喊；呼喚 /n. 要求；呼叫
vacate v. 空出；撤出；取消
accomplished adj. 已實現的；熟練的
refresh v. 清新；提振精神
propose v. 提議；推薦；求婚
light snacks n. 熱量不高的點心
sum up (動詞片語) 計算；總結 Ex. Could you please sum up your working experience before we continue on to the next part of the interview? 在我們進行最後一場面試前，請先總結一下你的工作經驗。

c. 募集舊衣物。
d. 主持萬聖節派對。

questions.stem: What is not true about the Crestwood Community Lion's Chapter?

cards.passage: The new Partner Deluxe Pocket Translator is the most effective electronic translator on the market today. Preloaded with over 80 modern languages, the Partner Deluxe is ideal for all your translation needs. The brand new speech translation function can detect voices or even announcements and translate them into the language of your choice almost simultaneously. The Partner Deluxe comes equipped with mini internal speakers to play anything you see on the screen. Finally, the most advanced new feature is the ‘perfect your pronunciation’ tool, in which you can try reading the words aloud, and the device will let you know if you got it right or not. This is truly an all-in-one tool for communication, learning, and practicing languages. It comes in your choice of sleek silver or royal gold and includes a soft carrying case. Visit your local electronics shops today and ask for the Partner Deluxe Pocket Translator! Also available in airport duty free shops across America.
cards.passageTranslation: 新的好夥伴豪華型口袋翻譯機是今日市面上最高效率的電子翻譯機。預載了超過80種近代語言，好夥伴豪華豪型是您所有翻譯需要的理想選擇。全新的語音翻譯功能可以偵測語音或甚至是廣播並幾乎同步的將它翻譯成您所選擇的語言。好夥伴豪華型配備了迷你內建揚聲器可播放您在畫面上見到的任何東西。最後，最先進的新特點是‘矯正您的發音’工具，您可以試著大聲地念出單字，然後翻譯機會讓您知道您的發音是否正確。這真是一部用來溝通、學習、練習語言全功能合一的工具。它有滑亮銀或皇家兩色金供您選擇並包含一個軟質攜行套。今天就去一趟您當地的電子產品商店洽詢好夥伴豪華型口袋翻譯機吧!全美的機場免稅店也有發售。
vocabulary: translator n. 翻譯員/v. translate 翻譯
deluxe adj. 豪華的；奢華的
advanced adj. 進階的；高等的；
feature n. 特徵；特色/ v. 以…為特色
sleek adj. 柔滑的；圓滑的；花言巧語的
royal adj. 皇室的；第一流的
be equipped with (形容詞片語) 備有…裝備 Ex. Our laboratory is equipped with all kinds of devices that are used for our experiments. 我們的實驗室備有各種實驗器材。

questions.stem: Which function is the Partner Deluxe not able to do?
translation: 哪一個功能是好夥伴豪華型作不到的?
a. 檢查你的單字發音。
b. 從喇叭放出單字和片語。
c. 翻譯廣播訊息。

options: (B) Play words and sentences through a speaker.
(D) Test your speaking with simple games.

questions.stem: What can we assume about the size of the device?

b. 它雖然很小但重量不輕，因為它使用很強力的電池。
c. 它小到足以放進你的口袋。
d. 它很大，因為有觸控螢幕。
options: (A) It might be a little big because it has so many functions.
(B) It is tiny but heavy because it uses a strong battery.
(C) It is small enough to fit in your pocket.
(D) It is large because of the touchscreen.

questions.stem: Which language is unlikely to be on the device?

b. 阿拉伯文。
c. 西班牙文。
d. 中文。

cards.passage:
Commonwealth Conference Center
Banquet Hall-Reservation Form
Please fill in the form below and press ‘submit’. All fields are mandatory.
Company Name: Go Smart Laptops & PCs
Company Address: #34, E. Hasting St. Vancouver, BC V6H 7J8
Contact Person: Craig Murphy
Contact Phone Number: (604) 928-2981
Contact E-mail: C.Murphy@BC.com
Type of Function: Company Awards Ceremony
Date of Function: December 28, 2000
Alternate Date if first date is not available: We need it to be on this night.
Hours of Function: 16:30-21:30
Expected number of Guests: 80-100
Catering required?* yes
Entertainment required?* no
Stage/Sound System required?* yes
*Please provide as many details as possible here:
This is a year-end awards ceremony for our company, and we would like to provide a buffet dinner. Please provide us with a full catering menu, including the price per head. We do not want alcohol served, and would prefer an international-friendly menu, since a lot of our staff members come from the Middle East and India. Guests are expected to arrive at 17:00, and we would like dinner to commence at 17:30 after a few introductory announcements. Once the dinner is finished, we will have a number of speeches. For the stage, nothing fancy is required. A simple elevated platform and podium would be sufficient. We will not be showing any videos or slides. Smooth jazz music on the sound system during the meal would be appreciated. The event is scheduled to finish at 21:00, but we’d like the extra 30 minutes in case people linger to chat.
--------------------------------------------------
To: C.Murphy@BC.com
From: bookings@commonwealthHALL.com
Sent: Today 19:33
Subject: Banquet hall reservation
Dear Craig Murphy,
Thank you for choosing the Commonwealth Hall for your banquet. I would like to confirm that we have two choices of banquet halls available for you that night, both of which are 1500 square feet.
The first is the Emperor’s Hall, a luxurious choice offering the finest decorations, including water fountains, a Zen garden, and various lighting options. The price for your event would be $2000 for the evening, excluding taxes and catering charges. This price includes the use of the stage and sound system. Our more budget-friendly option, the Classic Hall, has a slick, comfortable atmosphere and is an ideal choice for business-casual functions. At $1499 for the evening, I feel it might be your best choice, unless you are really looking to dazzle your employees with the first option. Our third and most basic option, the Economy Hall, is not available for the evening in question.
I have attached a catering menu (attachment #1), and I think you be quite pleased with the Indo-Mediterranean package, which has a large variety of Indian, vegetarian, and Lebanese dishes alongside the standard Western fare. You can find the prices in the attachment.
For the time being, I will need a credit card number to confirm the reservation. Also, please take the time to fill out the complete reservation form (attachment #2) and send it back to me at your convenience.
Sincerely,
Dean Cleaver, Director of Bookings, Commonwealth Hall
cards.passageTranslation:
聯邦會議中心
宴會廳-預約單
請填妥以下表格再按下"提交"。所有欄位皆必須填寫。
公司名稱: 夠聰明筆電桌機公司
公司地址: 34號, 哈斯丁東街，溫哥華, BC V6H 7J8
聯絡人: 克雷格·墨菲
聯絡電話號碼: (604) 928-2981
聯絡電子信箱: C.Murphy@BC.com
宴會類型: 公司頒獎典禮
宴會日期: 十二月 28, 2000
若上一日期不允許時的替代日期: 我們一定要在這個晚上。
宴會時段: 16:30-21:30
預期來賓人數: 80-100
需外燴服務?* 要
需餘興節目?* 不要
需要舞台/音響系統?* 要
*請盡可能的於此提供更多的細節:
這是我們公司的年終頒獎典禮，我們想要供應自助式的晚餐。請給我們完整的外燴菜單，包括每人的單價。我們不供應酒精飲料並較喜歡國際化友善度高的菜單，因為許多我們的員工來自於中東跟印度。來賓預計在17:00抵達，在幾個介紹性的宣布後我們希望晚餐在17:30開始。晚餐一結束後，我們會有幾段演講。舞台部份不要花俏。一個簡單的高台跟放講稿的講臺就夠了。我們將不會放映任何的影片或幻燈片。用餐的時候音響系統若能播放柔合的爵士樂會很好。活動訂在21:00結束，不過我們希望可多給30分鐘以防有人留下來聊天。
------------------------------------------------
收件人： C.Murphy@BC.com
寄件人：bookings@commonwealthHALL.com
寄件日期：今天 19:33
主旨： 宴會廳預訂
親愛的克雷格·墨菲，
感謝您選擇聯邦宴會廳來舉辦您的晚宴。我確認我們當晚有兩間都是1500平方呎的晚宴廳可供您選擇。
第一個選擇是帝王廳，是有著精美裝潢的奢華選擇，包含噴泉、禪風庭園，以及各種燈光選項。您活動當晚的要價是2000美金，不含稅跟外燴費用。這個價格包括使用舞台和音響系統。古典廳是我們預算親和度較高的選擇，它有漂亮、舒適的氛圍，是商務休閒宴會的理想選擇。當晚報價是1499美金，我覺得它可能會是您的最佳選擇，除非您真的想採用第一個選擇來讓您的員工讚嘆不已。經濟廳是我們的第三個，也是最基本的選擇，您洽詢的那個晚上是沒有空的。
我附上了一張外燴菜單（附件一），我想您應該會十分滿意印度地中海套餐，它有琳瑯滿目的印度、素食，以及黎巴嫩料理伴隨著標準的西式風味。您可在該附件裏找到價目表。
目前我需要信用卡號碼來確認預約。此外，請花點時間將整個預約單填妥（附件二），並在您方便時將它寄回給我。
誠摯的，
迪恩·克里夫，訂席部主任，聯邦宴會廳
vocabulary: mandatory adj. 命令的；委任的
alternate adj. 交替的；輪流的
catering n. 包辦飲食；提供飯菜
commence v. 開始著手；獲得(學位)
elevated adj. 抬高的(比基準高)；高潔的(知識/道德水準)
smooth adj. 平滑的；滑順的
square n. 廣場；正方形；平方
dazzle v. 耀眼；使(人)驚嘆
in case 以免；萬一 Ex. Why don’t you cancel the field trip in case it really rains tomorrow? 你為何不取消校外教學，以免明天下雨?
a large variety of 各式各樣的 Ex. In this book fair, visitors can easily find find a large variety of publications to meet their needs. 在這場書展中，參訪者很容易找到各種他們想要的出版本。
For the time being 目前；暫時 Ex. For the time being, I’m staying with my aunt and uncle because my house is being renovated. 在房屋的裝修完成前，我現在暫時和叔叔嬸嬸一起住。

cards.passage:
To: Betty@Cinterplex.net
From: CalebCole@SunnyP.com
Sent: July 12, 2008, 11:11am
Subject: Urgent notice about drink recall
Dear Betty Laforce,
This is an urgent notice for you to halt sales of all the following products immediately:
Sunny P Orange Juice 500ml bottle
Sunny P Grape Apple Blend 500ml bottle
Sunny P Pina Colada Juice Mix 500ml bottle
Sunny P Mint Iced Green Tea 500ml bottle
These drinks should be removed from your coolers and taken away from the public view. Employees of the Cinterplex theatre should also refrain from consumption of any of them. The drinks have been recalled by the manufacturer because there is a batch of the artificial sweetening agent Stevia that has been found to be contaminated with a dangerous form of bacteria. The contaminated batch may have affected all above-mentioned juice-based drinks with expiry dates between July 8 and July 15. Nevertheless, as a precautionary measure, we are asking all sellers to remove ALL bottles of these four drinks, no matter the expiry date.
Please do not discard any of the potentially contaminated drinks. A pick-up is scheduled for your theatre tomorrow, July 13th at 9:30am. Please confirm that the pick-up time is acceptable and the drinks will be packaged in cases and ready to go at that time. Sunny P Beverages Inc. will be replacing all the drinks free of charge, with a complimentary case of each of the four beverages to make up for the hassle. At this point we ask that you keep all information regarding the potential contamination confidential from the public or any media.
Thank you for your cooperation. We will be making a follow up call this afternoon to confirm the details of the pickup.
Yours truly,
Caleb Cole,
Sales Manager, Sunny P Beverages Inc.
收件人: Betty@Cinterplex.net
寄件人: CalebCole@SunnyP.com
cards.passageTranslation:
發送日期: 七月 12日, 2008, 11:11上午
主旨: 關於飲料回收的緊急通知
親愛的貝蒂·拉佛斯,
這是要求您立即停止銷售所有下列產品的緊急通知:
陽光P 柳橙汁 500ml 瓶
陽光P 葡萄蘋果汁 500ml 瓶
陽光P 鳳梨可樂達 500ml 瓶
陽光P 冰薄荷綠茶 500ml 瓶
這些飲料必須自您的冷藏庫移除並遠離大眾的視線。且欣特佩斯電影院的員工亦應被禁止飲用任何的這些飲料。該飲料因有一批人工甜味劑 甜菊糖 被發現受到一種危險形式的細菌的污染而已經被製造商召回。受污染的那一批可能已經影響到有效期限介於七月8日與七月15日之間的所有上述果汁類飲料。然而，為了安全起見，我們要求所有銷售商將這四種飲料全數下架，不論有效期限為何。
請勿丟棄任何潛在已受汙染的飲料。已安排了在明天七月13日上午9點30分至您的電影院取回。煩請確認該取回時間是否可且屆時該飲料已裝箱妥當準備運走。陽光P飲料股份有限公司將會免費更換所有的飲料，並且這四種飲料各贈送一箱作為不便的補償。在這個時間點上我們要求您保密不要讓大眾或任何媒體知道所有關於潛在汙染的資訊。
謝謝您的合作。今天下午我們會打電話跟催以確認取貨細節。
您真誠的,
凱萊布·科爾,
業務經理, 陽光P 飲料股份有限公司
vocabulary: urgent adj. 緊急的；急迫的
halt n. 終止；暫停/ v. 停止行進；使終止
artificial adj. 人工的；手工的
batch n. 一批生產量；一爐(麵包)
precautionary adj. 預先警戒的；小心的
complimentary adj. 恭維的；讚賞的
hassle n. 口角；麻煩/ v. 找麻煩
confidential adj. 機密的；表示信任的
removed from (動詞片語)將A從B處移除 Ex. In fact, some people regret getting tattoos later in life, and have to pay lots of money to have them removed from their bodies. 事實上，有些人後悔刺青，而想要將刺青從身體上移除。

questions.stem: What is the problem with the drinks?
translation: 這些飲料有什麼問題?
a. 它們異常的甜。
b. 它們過期了。
c. 有問題的糖吃下後可能會有害健康。
d. 它們是在錯誤的工廠製造的。
options: (B) They are past the expiry date.
(C) The fake sugar might be harmful if consumed.
(D) They were manufactured in the wrong factory.

questions.stem: What additional precaution is Sunny P making?
translation: 陽光P公司作了什麼預防措施?
a. 要求將即使未受影響的飲料也移除。
b. 要求立即丟棄該飲料。
c. 要求冰咖啡飲料也要移除。
d. 允許電影院職員謹慎飲用該飲料。
options: (A) Requesting the removal of drinks that may not even be affected.
(B) Asking that the drinks be discarded immediately.
(C) Demanding that iced coffee drinks also be removed.
(D) Permitting theatre staff to drink the beverages discreetly.

questions.stem: What is Caleb Cole hoping the theatre staff will not do?
translation: 凱萊布·科爾希望電影院職員不要做什麼?
a. 把飲料還給陽光P公司。
b. 把飲料從冷藏庫清出。
c. 向陽光P公司總部提出申訴。
d. 告訴顧客發生了什麼事。
options: (A) Send the drinks back to Sunny P.
(B) Take the bottles out of the cooler.
(C) File a complaint to Sunny P headquarters.

questions.stem: What should Betty Laforce's theatre staff members do with any Sunny P-made carbonated soft drinks?
translation: 貝蒂·拉佛斯的電影院職員對於任何陽光P公司生產的碳酸飲料應該怎麼辦?
a. 將它留在冰箱內。
b. 回收瓶子。
c. 將它丟棄。
d. 明天把它交給送貨員。
options: (D) Give them to the deliverymen tomorrow.

cards.passage:
Please use this form to report any issues that are covered by the B&T Warranty included with the product that you have purchased. Take note of the following: Please fill out the online claim form as completely as possible in order to expedite your claim. You will receive a mailed confirmation with your RMA (Returned Merchandise Authorization) number. Please note it can take up to 2 months to receive your RMA number. Reply to the letter and include a copy of your receipt. You may be asked to send in an image showing the product. Follow any other instructions included in the letter. Once we have the necessary information and it meets all of our requirements, we'll send the replacement product out to you. Product Name: Blend-O-Matic 2000
Product Serial Number: 98272819HJKY111
Purchase Date: September 18, 2012
Location of Purchase: The Bay, Westmount Mall, 14578-124st, Regina, Saskatchewan
Description of damage or malfunction: The seal on the bottom of the blender leaks profusely when the blender is operating. Despite trying to reposition the seal in several different ways, it continues to leak. On closer inspection, there appears to be a small crack on the plastic base of the blender. We have only had the blender for 2 weeks.
Contact Name: Jess Stanphill
Contact Number: (248) 291-1111
Contact Address: 12231-118ave, Regina, Saskatchewan -------------------------------------- October 30th, 2000
Warranty Department, B&T Appliances
Dear Mrs. Jess Stanphill,
The RMA (Returned Merchandise Authorization) number for your product “Blend-O-Matic 2000” with the product Serial Number 98272819HJKY111 is as follows:
VG-91819999
Please carefully package and mail us the plastic base of your blender. Please note: the plastic base is detachable from the motor. We do not need the motor itself, only the damaged base. Once we have confirmed that the damage is as you have described, we will happily mail you a replacement piece as quickly as possible.
Please include your original receipt and clearly written RMA number in the package.
Your replacement base will be mailed to the following address:
Jess Stanphill
12231-118ave, Toronto, Ontario
If we have made any errors with your mailing address or any other information provided in this letter, please notify our customer service department at 1-888-728-2711 immediately.
Thank you, and have a wonderful day.
B&T Appliances Warranty Department
cards.passageTranslation:
B&T 線上保固索賠表
請利用本表來回報您購買的產品所附的B&T保固範圍內的任何問題。請注意以下事項： 請盡可能完整地填妥本線上索賠表以利迅速處理您的索賠。 您會收到一封帶有您的RMA（退貨許可）號碼的確認信。請注意您的RMA號碼有可能要花上2個月才能收到。 回信並附上一份您的收據副本。您有可能被要求繳交一張出示該產品的影像。按照信上的任何其他指示。 待我們取得必要的資訊而且它符合我們所有的條件時，我們會將替換品寄出給您。 產品名稱： Blend-O-Matic 2000果汁機
產品序號：98272819HJKY111

聯絡人姓名：Jess Stanphill
聯絡電話：(248) 291-1111
聯絡地址：12231-118大道, 雷金納, 薩斯卡其旺 ---------------------------------------- 2000年10月30日
保固服務部，B&T 家電公司
親愛的Jess Stanphill夫人，
您序號為98272819HJKY111 的“Blend-O-Matic 2000” 果汁機的RMA (退貨許可) 號碼如下：
VG-91819999
請將您果汁機的塑膠底座仔細包裝好並郵寄給我們。請注意：該底座是可從馬達上分離的。我們不需要馬達本體，只須損壞的底座。待我們確認該損壞與您所述的相符後，我們會很樂意的儘快郵寄一個替換品給您。 請附上您原來的收據並在包裹清楚寫上RMA號碼。您的底座替換品將會被寄至以下地址：
Jess Stanphill
渥太華，多倫多，12231-118大道

In order to recruit more waiters, the company has posted ads everywhere. 為了要招募更多的服務生，公司到處招貼廣告。 take up to (動詞片語) 最高約達 Ex. The whole presentation will take up to five hours. 整場發表最多會到五個小時。

questions.stem: Why is the customer trying to get a replacement for her appliance?
translation: 為何該顧客試著為她的家電要替換品？
a. 因為它啟動時會灑出來。
b. 因為它無法啟動。
c. 因為它發出響亮、嘎滋作響的噪音。
d. 因為它不能攪的很剛好。
options: (A) Because it spills when turned on.
(C) Because it is making a loud, crunching noise.

questions.stem: In the reply, what did they ask Jess to do that wasn't mentioned on the online warranty form?
translation: 在回信中，他們要求潔絲做什麼事是線上保固索賠表上所沒有提到的？
a. 繳交一張產品的相片。
b. 繳交她的收據。
c. 繳交RMA號碼。
d. 繳交產品的部分零件。
options: (A) Send in a photo of her product.

questions.stem: Why will Jess Stanphill call the warranty department immediately?
translation: 為何潔絲·史丹菲爾將會馬上去電給保固服務部？
a. 他們給她錯誤的RMA號碼。
b. 他們說的是完全不同的產品。
c. 他們拼錯她的姓名。
d. 他們把她的地址弄錯。
options: (A) They gave her the wrong RMA number.

questions.stem: What should happen after Jess sends in the base?
translation: 潔絲繳交了底座後應該發生什麼事？
a. 她會被核發一個RMA號碼。

c. 他們會寄一個新底座給她。
d. 他們會寄一個全新的果汁機給她。
options: (A) She will be issued an RMA number.
(B) She will get a full refund.
(C) They will send her a new base.
(D) They will send her a brand new blender.

questions.stem: Which step is never included in the warranty replacement process for B&T Appliances?

b. 申請一個新的RMA號碼。

options: (A) Taking the product in to the shop where you purchased it.
(C) Taking a photo of your product.

cards.passage:
to: amandalin@gmail.com
subject: Long-haul HK$500 off, short haul HK$200 off!
Having trouble reading this?
To ensure your newsletters go directly to your inbox, please add zaji@news.zaji.com.hk to your safe senders list.
BRA Credit Cardholders Exclusively Enjoy up to HK$500 Instant Flight Discount
From 01 September through to 15 October, BRA credit cardholders can enjoy up to HK$500 instant discount on their flight bookings, by entering designated coupon code on the Checkout page. The discount will become visible after the credit card number and code is entered, but before final confirmation of the transaction.
Click here to view more details.
Example reduced fares*
Prague from $910
Osaka from $1040
Sydney from $1899
Bangkok from $618
Chicago from $2920
*All listed prices are for return economy class flights from Hong Kong, taxes and fuel surcharges excluded. Departure date must be before December 31, 2016. Memorandum
To all office directors,
As you all know, the company outing to Europe is coming soon but we have yet to book our flights. Recently we've come across an unusually low fare to Prague, the only stipulation being that we'd have to move our original departure date back by about a week. We don't normally like to do this, but due to recent budget constraints, we need to cut corners in any way possible on this trip, and taking advantage of this offer will save us thousands.
The offer ends in three days, so what I need from each of you right now is to find out whether all staff on your teams signed up for the outing would be okay with the proposed change to the departure date. All other tour details, including the total number of days abroad, would remain the same.
Please let me know no later than tomorrow at 8 AM. So long as 90% or more of outing guests are in acceptance with the change, we will move forward with it and book the flights. For those that are not in acceptance, please politely inform them after the decision has been made, and insist that they still join us.
Ben Brown
Director of Company Outings & Social Events Messages
Hey Miriam,
Sorry, I was exhausted and had to hit the sack before you got back from your chess night. Your manager Burt called and insisted on leaving a message because he said it was really important that you reply tonight or early tomorrow, like before you get to work. He said to call his cell.
He said the company wants to change the dates of your Europe outing, and move it a week earlier. But you know what that means, right? It's totally going to conflict with our ski trip to Hokkaido. And don't forget that we bought the Hokkaido flights on a budget airline, so they are non-refundable.
I know you were looking forward to both trips, but if you have to give one up, which one will it be?
寄件人：ZAJI Hong Kong<zaji@news.zaji.com.hk>
收件人：amandalin@gmail.com
cards.passageTranslation:
主題：長途折價港幣$ 500，短途折價港幣$ 200！ 無法閱讀此信？
為了確保您的電子報直接寄到您的收件箱，請將zaji@news.zaji.com.hk加入您的安全發件人名單。 布萊信用卡客戶獨享機票立即折扣高達港幣$500 從09月01日到10月15日，布萊信用卡持有人可以在結帳頁面上輸入指定的優惠券代碼，立即享有高達港幣 $500以上的機票預訂折扣。在輸入信用卡號碼和代碼後，交易最終確認前會顯示折扣金額。 點擊這裡查看更多詳細信息。 減價票價舉例* 布拉格$910起
大阪$1040起
悉尼$1899起
曼谷$618起
芝加哥$2920起 *以上所列價格是香港起飛之回程經濟艙機票，不含稅金和燃油費。出發日期必須在2016年12月31日之前。 備忘錄 致所有辦事處主管： 大家都知道，公司的員工歐洲旅遊即將到來，但我們還沒預訂我們的航班。最近我們看到一個去布拉格的少見低價機票，唯一的規定是，我們不得不把我們原來的出發日往前移一個星期左右。我們通常不喜歡這樣做，但由於最近的預算限制，這次旅行我們需要以任何方式縮減開支，並利用此優惠為我們節省許多。 這一優惠將於三日內結束，所以我現在需要知道，更改出發日期後，原報名的全體團隊員工是否依然會參加旅遊。其他所有旅遊細節，包括在國外的總天數將維持不變。 最晚請在明天上午8點前告知我。只要有90％以上的旅遊人數接受此變動，我們就立即行動並預訂航班。對於那些不贊成的同事，請在決議後禮貌地告訴他們，並堅持他們仍然參加旅遊。 Ben Brown
公司旅遊和社交活動總監 訊息留言 嘿Miriam： 對不起，我太累了，在你下完棋回來前就睡了。您的主管Burt打來並堅持要留訊息，因為他說這點非常重要，你得在今晚或明天早上上班前回覆他。他叫你打他手機。 他說公司要將你們歐洲旅行的日期提前一周。但你知道這代表什麼吧？這會完全和我們的北海道滑雪旅行衝突。別忘了我們的北海道機票是一家廉價航空公司，所以不可退款。 我知道兩個行程你都很期待，但如果你必須放棄一個，會是哪一個呢？

questions.stem: What does one need to do to get the prices listed on the email from ZAJI?

questions.stem: What would likely happen if 15% of the outing guests disagreed with the new travel dates?
translation: 假若有百分之15的人數都不贊成變更過的新日期，以下選項何者將會發生？
a. 公司還是會做出這項變更。

options: (A) The company would make the change anyway.

questions.stem: What will happen if Miriam chooses to give up on her Hokkaido trip?

b. 她和先生會損失北海道的機票費用。
c. 她不能和同事一起去布拉格旅行。
d. 她得選擇廉價航空。
options: (A) She and her partner will go on a skiing holiday.
(B) She and her partner will lose the money they paid for their Hokkaido flights.
(C) She won't be able to travel to Prague with her colleagues.
(D) She will have to travel on a budget airline.

cards.passage:
Cc: recipients undisclosed
From: Desk of the VP
Sent: Today, 08:45
Subject: Memo about Dress Code
To all members of the logistics department,
There have been some recent additions to our company’s dress code policy. In the following attachment, you can see both the previous policy and the new changes effective immediately for each working position.
The most notable modification affecting ALL employees is the cancellation of “Casual Fridays”. We fear that our company’s professional image might be jeopardized by it, since it is not common practice in this country. Instead we are aiming for an image that is business oriented and consistent, 7 days a week.
Attachment #1:
Job Title Previous Dress Code New Dress Code Inclusions All logistics supervisors, managers, consultants and brokers Business-formal. (Business suit and tie for men. For women business suits or skirt and blouse, with dress shoes or high heels). No accessories for men besides wedding rings and watches. Shipping and receiving dock workers Black pants, short or long sleeve shirts, covered toe-shoes. No sandals allowed. Must wear company shirt at all times. Jeans not allowed. Drivers Company uniform shirt and pants only. No long hair for men unless in a ponytail. Uniform must be clean with no visible stains or spots.
cards.passageTranslation:
收件人: 員工群組收件人
副本: 收件人不顯示
寄件人: 副總經理辦公室
發送日期: 今日, 08:45
主旨: 服裝規定備忘錄 致物流部全體成員, 最近我們公司的服裝規定有做了一些增加。在以下的附件中，你可以看到之前的舊規定以及即刻對各職位生效的新規定。 影響全體員工的最明顯變動是取消了“週五便服日”。我們擔心它可能損及公司的專業形象，因為它並非這個國家的慣例。而我們要的目標是隨時保持商業導向及一至性的形象 附件 #1: 職稱
舊服裝規定
新服裝規定
所有物流部督導、經理、 顧問及代理人。

男性不得佩戴結婚戒指和手錶以外之配件。
收發貨月台工
黑長褲、短袖或長袖襯衫、不露趾鞋。不得穿涼鞋。

司機
限著公司制式襯衫及長褲。
男性不得留長髮除非綁成馬尾。制服必須潔淨無任何可見的斑漬。

questions.stem: What's the main reason for cancelling Casual Fridays?
translation: 取消週五便服日的理由是什麼?
a. 員工越來越懶散。
b. 它並非本地的通俗。
c. 員工沒有按它的規定做。
d. 它變得太隨意。
options: (B) It is not a common custom here.
(C) Workers weren't following the rules of it.

questions.stem: Starting now, which employees can wear jeans in the logistics department?
translation: 從現在開始，物流部的哪些員工可以穿牛仔褲?
a. 只有位居最高階的員工。
b. 只有在收發貨單位的員工。
c. 只有駕駛。
d. 沒有任何人。
options: (A) Only the workers at the top end of the hierarchy.
(B) Only the workers in shipping and receiving.

questions.stem: Which if following is not allowed now for a male logistics broker?

cards.passage:
Martin's Footwear
November 13, 2013
Bruce Thompson
1919 Ferry Drive
Houston, TX 77005
USA
Angel Lu
No. 32, Lane 16, Arlington Ave
Houston, TX 77005
USA
Dear Ms. Lu,
It has come to our attention that Martin's Footwear has experienced a drop in sales over the past few months. Sales dropped by 20% in the previous month. (1) _____________ Regrettably, we must downsize soon. We are decreasing our sales department staff by 30%. (2) _____________ While some of our company branches are making enough profit, the branch that you currently work at is not earning enough income. It will likely be closed before December 25, and it will definitely be closed by the end of the year. (3) _____________
On December 15th we will terminate your employment at Martin's Footwear. We hope we have given you enough notice. You are entitled to two weeks of severance pay. This payment will be included in your final paycheck, which you will receive on your last day of work. You will also be given a year-end bonus. (4) _____________ The amount of the bonus is the same as the previous year's year-end bonus, and it will be included in your final paycheck as well.
We would like to thank you for your outstanding service over the past three years. It has been a pleasure working with you.
Sincerely,
Bruce Thompson
CEO of Martin's Footwear
cards.passageTranslation:
馬丁鞋品
2013年11月13日
Bruce Thompson
1919 Ferry Drive
休士頓, TX 77005
美國
Angel Lu
No. 32, Lane 16, Arlington Ave
休士頓, TX 77005
美國
致盧小姐：
我們注意到馬丁鞋品公司在過去幾個月裡銷售業績下滑。上個月銷售額下滑20%，更糟糕的是，我們預計這個情況會一直持續到明年春天。遺憾的，我們不久後就必須裁員。我們要減少30%的銷售部門人力。儘管我們公司一些部門有足夠的獲利，但你現在工作的分部卻沒有足夠的營利。可能在12月25日，最晚今年底一定會關閉。
我們會在12月15當天終止你在馬丁鞋品公司的工作。希望我們已經給你足夠的知會時間。你可以領到兩個禮拜的遣散費。這筆款項會包括你最後一次的薪資裡，在你工作的最後一天會收到。你也會領到年終獎金。金額跟去年一樣，它也會包括在你最後的薪資裡。
我們要謝謝你過去三年來的傑出服務。很榮幸與你共事。
誠摯的，
Bruce Thompson
馬丁鞋品執行長

cards.passage:
Saskatchewan Council Education Department
This employment contract is made and entered into on the date _____________ between:
Party A: Saskatchewan Council
Party B: Graham McPherson
Party A agrees to employ party B as Head of Welfare, and party B agrees to be employed. Both parties agree to adhere to the following terms and conditions:
1.Party A agrees to pay party B $1845 per month as a base salary. Party B agrees to provide party A with the service of effectively managing the Access and Welfare Department in accordance with the schedule provided by party A. It has been mutually agreed that Party B will complete no less than 8 working hours per day from Monday to Friday of every week.
2.The employment of Party B by Party A will commence on the date July 1 2014 and terminate on July 30 2015. Should Party B wish to terminate the contract prior to the date of termination, Party B must notify Party A no less than two months in advance of the new requested date of termination.
3.Party A will terminate the contract with immediate effect under any of the following circumstances:
A.Party B arrives late for work on one occasion.
B.Party B takes a day off work as a result of sickness on any more than two occasions.
C.Party B reveals confidential information relating to Party A to any third party thought to be in direct competition with Party A.
...........................................................................................................................................
Transcript of recorded telephone answering machine message, recorded on Monday May 26 2014 at 09:34am:
“Hi, Jane. This is Graham McPherson; the guy who came in for the interview with Helen for the position of Head of Access and Welfare last week. I’m very happy that the Council has accepted me for the position and I’m very grateful to you for sending me the contract so I could take a look at it before coming in and signing it. I was actually supposed to be coming in this morning to sign the contract with Helen, but I was reading it through last night and I noticed something which I’m not completely happy with. Under point 3A the contract states that if I’m late for work even once then that would be grounds for dismissal. I can’t help but feel that this is a mistake on the contract as this kind of policy really doesn’t seem fair. As we all know, sometimes people can’t help being late due to reasons beyond their control. I hope that it’s just a mistake and if so I’ll still be happy to come in later and sign, but could you please ask Helen to call me back about this first so that I can ask her directly. Okay, thanks very much. I hope I hear from you later today. Bye bye.”
............................................................................................................................................
to: Jane@sc.com
from: Helen@sc.com
sent: June 12, 2014 at 09:11
subject: modification to contract
Hi Jane,
I got your message about the request from the candidate to modify section 3A of the contract. It is not a mistake, as he suggested, but after some discussion with Bill we do agree that this is rather extreme. In reality, while this policy exists on paper for all new recruits, we have never actually enforced it. Still, we are going to change it on this and all future contracts.
Please modify the statement as follows:
A.Party B arrives ten or more minutes late for work on three occasions, or 1-10 minutes late for work on 5 occasions.
Please inform the candidate about the change and issue a new copy of the contract to be mailed to him immediately.
Thanks for your help!
Helen
cards.passageTranslation:
薩克其萬省議會教育廳
本合約雙方特於 簽訂本聘僱合約：
甲方：薩克其萬省議會
乙方：Graham McPherson
甲方同意僱用乙方擔任員工福利部主管，乙方同意接受僱用。雙方同意遵守下列條款：
1. 甲方同意支付乙方每月1845美金為基本薪資。乙方同意按照甲方所提供之進度表，提供對員工福利部門作有效管理之勞務給甲方。雙方一致同意乙方每週自週一至週五應履行每日不少於8小時之勞務。
2. 甲方與乙方之僱傭關係將自2014年7月1日開始，終止於2015年7月30日。若乙方希望於合約終止日前解除契約，乙方應在新的合約終止日提出前至少兩個月通知甲方。
3. 甲方於下列任一情況下得立即終止本契約：
A. 乙方有上班遲到一次的狀況。
B. 乙方有兩次以上因病請假一日的狀況。
C. 乙方向任何與甲方有直接競爭關係之第三人方揭露與甲方有關之機密訊息。
…………………………………………………………………………………………
電話答錄機所錄內容，錄於2014年5月26日上午9:34：
「嗨Jane，我是Graham McPherson，上星期和Helen面試員工福利部門主管職位的那位。我很高興理事會接受我來擔任這個職位，我也很感激妳將合約寄來，我才能在過來簽約前檢視一下合約。事實上我原本是應該在今天早上過來和Helen簽這份合約，可是昨晚我合約整個看過一遍後我發現有些地方我無法完全接受。合約的第三條A項規定，假如我上班遲到的話，即使只有一次也能以這個為理由而解雇。我無法不認為這是合約上的一個誤會，因為這樣的條款真的不怎麼公平。我們都曉得，人有時候會因為超過他所能控制的原因而不可避免的遲到。我希望這只是個誤會，假如是如此的話，稍後我還是願意過來簽約，但是能否請妳要Helen對於此事先回我個電話，我好當面問她。就這樣，非常感謝。我希望今天稍晚可以收到你的回覆。再見。」
……………………………………
收件者：Jane@sc.com
寄件者：Helen@sc.com
寄出日期：2014年6月12日上午9:11
主題：合約修改
嗨Jane：
我已收到你傳送過來說應徵者請求修改合約3A部分的訊息了。這不是他所說的合約打錯，但我和Bill討論後也都認為這點太過極端了。實際上，所有新進人員的合約上都有這條規定，我們從未真的將這條付諸實行。我們還是依然要在這份合約以及未來的合約中修改這一條。
請修改為以下內容：
A. 乙方有三次上班遲到10分鐘或更久，或五次上班遲到1-10分鐘。
請知會應徵者相關變更，並立即將新合約寄送給他。
感謝你的協助！
Helen
vocabulary: transcript n. 抄本、副本、(錄音)文字紀錄
ex. The two parties entered into a formal agreement concerning their future working relationship.
考慮到這兩方未來的合作關係，他們開始討論正式協定。
ex. In accordance with local safety regulations, we can't use this water unless it's been treated.
根據當地的安全規範，我們不得使用生水。
ex. Prior to submitting this application, you need to affix two professional references.
在繳交這份申請書之前，你需要附上兩份工作推薦函。

d.休假薪資的資訊

a.整整四十小時
b.至少四十小時
c.不到四十小時
d.至少八小時

questions.stem: What does the transcript let us know about the contract?

a.員工的工作範圍為何
b.這份合約尚未簽約
c.面試日期
d.約好簽約的確切時間
options: (A) what the employee's duties will be at work
(B) that the contract has not been signed yet
(D) the exact time of the contract signing appointment

questions.stem: Why is the employee unhappy with the contract?
translation: 為何這名員工對合約不滿意？
a.他認為他不該因請病假而被開除。
b.他認為他的薪水太低。
c.合約不完整。
d.他認為他不該因未遲到而被開除。
options: (A) He thinks he shouldn't be fired for calling in sick.
(B) He thinks his salary is too low.
(D) He thinks he shouldn't be fired for being late.

questions.stem: According to Helen's reply, which of the following statements is true?
translation: 根據Helen的回覆，以下敘述何者正確？
a. 理事會不再和Graham McPherson簽署這份同意書。
b. Graham McPherson不同意新條款。
c. 理事會同意Graham McPherson所建議的變更。
d. 理事會以前曾因為一次遲到就解雇員工。
options: (A) The council is no longer going to sign the agreement with Graham McPherson.
(B) Graham McPherson won't accept the new terms.
(C) The council has agreed to Graham McPherson's proposed changes.
(D) The council has fired workers before just for being late once.

cards.passage: Attention all passengers. This is just a reminder that any suspicious parcels or luggage may be taken and examined by the station authorities. (1) _____________ If you see any suspicious activity in the train station, please report it to the authorities. (2) _____________ Eating inside the station gates is prohibited. Once onboard the train, you are free to eat. Also, please do not smoke on the train or in the station, as they are nonsmoking areas. Wait until you have left the premises to smoke. (3) _____________ The time is now 7:40 PM. The next train, 282, destined for Birmingham, will arrive on platform A at 7:45 PM. If you will be boarding this train, please keep your ticket out and hand it to the attendant before you board the train. Train 577, which is destined for Manchester, was expected to arrive on platform B at 7:47 PM, but is now expected to arrive on platform C at 7:56 PM. We apologize for the short delay. (4) _____________ If you have any questions, please find a station attendant.
cards.passageTranslation: 所有的旅客請注意。謹提醒您任何可疑的包裹或行李都可能會被站務人員帶走檢查。請遵守檢查人員或人員們的指示。如果你在車站內看見任何可疑的行動，請向站務人員舉報。禁止在進入車站閘口後飲食。一旦上了列車後，你可以自由飲食。此外，請勿在列車上或車站內吸菸，因為屬於禁菸區。請您等到離開這些處所後再吸菸。現在時間是下午七點四十分。下一班282次，開往伯明罕的列車將在下午七點四十五分抵達A月台。如果你是要搭這班車，上車前請拿出你的車票交給服務人員。577次列車，開往曼徹斯特，原本預計在下午七點四十七分抵達B月台，現在預計在下午七點五十六分抵達C月台。我們為這個短暫的延誤致歉。若你有任何問題，請找車站服務人員。

questions.stem: How many minutes do passengers have before train 577 reaches the platform?
translation: 在577次列車抵達月台前，旅客還有幾分鐘時間？

questions.stem: What should a person inside the station gates do if he or she wants to eat dinner?
translation: 進到車站閘門後的人如果想吃晚餐應怎麼辦？
a. 等抵達目的地再吃。
b. 可自由用餐。
c. 詢問車站服務人員。
d. 等到上了車後。
options: (A) Wait until he or she has arrived at his or her destination.
(B) He or she is free to eat dinner.
(C) Ask one of the station attendants.
(D) Wait until he or she has boarded a train.

questions.stem: In which of the positions marked (1), (2), (3), and (4) does the following sentence best belong? "Please comply with all instructions from the inspecting officer or officers."

.........................................................................
To: johncfarrelly@gmail.com, kev36ttt@gmail.com
From: janehuang@xyz.com.tw
Sent: Tues Oct 21 2014 at 3:55 PM
Subject: Winter classes
Dear John and Kevin,
As you have both only been working with us since August, you may not be aware that we run winter classes in the mornings during both the summer and winter vacations. They're not starting for a few months yet, but we are already making preparations for next year's winter vacation classes, which will be taking place over the course of three weeks, from the week commencing Monday January 26 to the week ending Friday February 13. There will be two classes per week on Monday and Thursday mornings, running from 10:30am until noon. We know you are both only contracted to work with us in the afternoons, but usually we invite our foreign teachers to come and teach the morning classes during these periods, and we were hoping that one or both of you would be available. It would be better if both of you could manage it, as we are expecting there to be over forty students enrolled, and that way they could be split into two smaller classes. You will be provided with a full curriculum. Please let me know what your availability is for this period. It's still a few months away yet, but we need to know your availability soon, so if you could let me know before the end of this month that would be much appreciated. If you have any questions you can email me or come to find me in the office.
Best regards,
Jane Huang

收件人： johncfarrelly@gmail.com, kev36ttt@gmail.com
寄件人：janehuang@xyz.com.tw
發送日期：2014年10月21日，星期二 下午3:55
主旨：寒假課程
親愛的 John 和 Kevin，
由於兩位是八月才開始與我們共事，因此你們可能不知道我們在寒暑假期間的上午時段有開課。雖然還有幾個月才開始，不過我們已經開始準備明年寒假的開授課程，也就是為期三個禮拜的課程，從1月26日星期一的那個禮拜開始上到2月13日星期五的那週結束。一週有兩堂課在星期一和星期四早上，從上午10點30分一直到中午。我們知道你們只是約聘來上下午的課，可是在這段期間我們通常會請外籍教師來上早上的課，我們希望你們其中一位或者是兩位都可以配合。如果你們兩位都可以來最好，因為我們預期會有四十位以上的學生報名，這麼一來他們就可以分成兩小班。你會拿到完整的課程內容。請盡快告訴我你這段期間能不能來。雖然離寒假還有幾個月，可是我們必須盡快知道你有沒有時間，我會非常感激如果你這個月底前讓我知道。如果你有任何疑問，你可以寄電子郵件或是來辦公室找我。
誠摯的問候，
Jane Huang
vocabulary: ex. Do you know who is in charge of wiring the money to client accounts?
你知道是誰負責轉帳到顧客的帳號嗎？
making preparations for 為…做準備
ex. The government of the small African nation is making preparations for war.
那個非洲小國的政府正在準備打仗。
ex. The boat split into two piece and slowly began sinking.
那艘船隻裂為兩半然後開始下沉。

cards.passage:
Kelvin Wu (08:11)
Hello all. We’ve only received the revised policy files from 3 out of 10 of you. The deadline was yesterday. Honestly speaking, I am both surprised and disappointed. We were very clear about the urgency of this project in the outline, and most of you are normally quite reliable when it comes to timeliless. Here are the names of the people we have yet to receive anything from:
Dan Walker
Martha Streuss
Rick White
Alex Xydias
Randy Speranza
Louis Senter
Amy Thompson
Martha Stress (08:35)
With all due respect, sir, I see my name on that list, but I am positive I sent those files in three days ago.
Kelvin Wu (08:38)
I’m looking at my email inbox right now, and I’m just not seeing it. I’ve even checked my “junk” and “other” folders in case it got sent there.
Martha Stress (08:55)
This is highly unusual. I’m with Amy in the sales department and she said the same thing. Here, I’ve just forwarded the original email with attachments to you again. Could you please check if you’ve received it?
Kelvin Wu (08:59)
Nada.
Rick White (09:22)
Sorry, just saw this. I also sent the files yesterday. We’ve actually been having the same problem with emails in payroll. I’ve contact Jay from the IT department and he said there’s something going on with our company server that is blocking certain emails from getting sent out from company email accounts. Personal emails seem to be fine though.
Kelvin Wu (09:24)
Well that explains it. But I need these files now. Like right now. Please send them to my personal address kwu8881@gmail.com using your personal email addresses without delay.
Martha Stress (09:25)
Got it. I’ll tell Amy and Louis, too.
Rick White (09:30)
Sure, and I’ll inform Dan and Alexis. They’re just on coffee break in the next room.
Kelvin Wu (09:34)
What about Randy? I’ve just dialed him but there’s no answer.
Rick White (09:36)
I’m afraid he’s on short-term stress leave. Would you like me to get ahold of him?
Kelvin Wu (09:40)
Please.
Kelvin Wu (08:11)
cards.passageTranslation:
大家好。我們只收到你們十人之中的三人的修訂政策檔案。截止日是昨天。說實話，我很驚訝也很失望。我們很清楚在計畫綱要裡提到的急迫性，且你們之中大部分通常是在提到即時性時是相當可靠的。以下是我們還沒收到任何東西的名單：
Dan Walker
Martha Streuss
Rick White
Alex Xydias
Randy Speranza
Louis Senter
Amy Thompson
Martha Stress (08:35)
恕我直言，先生，我在名單裡看到我的名子，但我很確定我在三天前已經寄出這些檔案。
Kelvin Wu (08:38)
我正在看我的電子信箱收件夾，而我就是沒有看到。我甚至檢查過垃圾郵件和其他資料以免有被寄到那裡的情形。
Martha Stress (08:55)
這非常不尋常。我和銷售部門的Amy在一起而她也說了相同的事。我剛剛又轉寄一次原始郵件和附件給你。可以請你看一下你有收到嗎？
Kelvin Wu (08:59)
不
Rick White (09:22)
抱歉，剛剛看到這件事。我昨天也寄出了檔案。我們應該是發生跟薪資給付的電子郵件相同的問題。我已經聯絡IT部門的Jay而他說我們公司伺服器發生一個問題會擋住部分由公司電子郵件帳號寄出的某些電子郵件。個人電子郵件似乎是沒問題的。
Kelvin Wu (09:24)
好吧那解釋了問題。但我現在需要這些檔案。應該說立刻。請立即用你們的個人電子信箱把檔案寄到我的個人信箱kwu8881@gmail.com 。
Martha Stress (09:25)
了解。我也會告知Amy跟Louis。
Rick White (09:30)
好的，而我會通知Dan跟Alexis。他們正在隔壁房間休息喝咖啡。
Kelvin Wu (09:34)
關於Randy呢？ 我剛打電話給他但沒有回應。
Rick White (09:36)
恐怕他正在休短期的減輕壓力假。你需要我幫你連絡他嗎？
Kelvin Wu (09:40)
拜託了。

(B) He's the only one who forgot to send in the files.
(D) He'll know how to fix the problem.

cards.passage:
Hey, everyone. Bartholomew and I have finally finished moving into the new house. What a journey that was! I'm not a fan of the paint color on the walls (that was Bartholomew's idea), but we have plenty of decorations to cover that up! This is our new address:
777 Aloha Lane
Honolulu, Hawaii 96850
Thanksgiving is just around the corner, and you are all welcome at our new place. We will start cooking at 12 o'clock on Thursday and we'll feast at 4:00 PM. Feel free to drop by anytime before that. We also have a little surprise for you all, and I'm going to spoil the surprise, because well you know me! We have a new addition to the family. Her name is Molly, and she's a Golden Retriever. If you have any spare puppy toys, toss them our way!
cards.passageTranslation:
大家好。Bartholomew和我終於大功告成搬進新屋了。真是折騰人的一段歷程啊！我不喜歡牆上的油漆顏色(那是Bartholomew的主意)，不過我們有許多的裝飾品把它遮了起來！這是我們的新住址：
777 Aloha Lane
Honolulu, Hawaii 96850
感恩節就快到了，歡迎大家到我們的新家來。星期四中午十二點我們開始準備食物，下午四點饗宴開始。也歡迎之前就過來聚聚。我們還準備了一個小驚喜給大家，但我要把這個驚喜先說出來，因為…哎呀，你們知道我的！我們家裡添了一位新成員。她的名字是Molly，她是隻黃金獵犬。如果你有什麼多餘的寵物玩具就丟過來吧！
vocabulary: fan n. 狂熱者；愛好者
addition n. 增加的人或物；附加物
spare adj. 多餘的；備用的
ex. No matter how hard you try to cover up the mistake you made, they will still find out the truth someday. 不論你多努力地想要掩飾自己犯的錯，有天他們還是會找出真相。
just around the corner 即將到來；在附近
ex. His medical check for cancer is just around the corner, so he is starting to feel nervous.
他的癌症測試結果快出來了，所以他開始感到很緊張。
ex. We will drop by your uncle's place on the way to Alishan. 在去阿里山的途中我們會順便拜訪你的叔叔。

b. 她想要她的朋友給她一些玩具。
c. 她想把她的狗玩具扔掉。

cards.passage:
To: mcgill@gmail.com
From: info@imli.sce.edu.dk
Sent: Tues June 17 2014 at 12:44 PM
Subject: Your class next semester
Dear Mark Gill,
We have on our records that you are registered to study with us here at the International Spanish Learning Institute next semester, which will begin next week on Wednesday June 25. Unfortunately, we currently only have yourself and one other student registered for the level you requested (Upper Intermediate 1), and in order to run a class we must have at least five students registered. Therefore we regret to inform you that there will not be a class for you to attend this coming semester. We're very sorry, and we would like to offer you the following solutions:
We have another semester beginning towards the end of next month (July 23). If you are willing to postpone your studies for one month, then we could register you for the same level next semester. However, we feel we should inform you that currently there are no students registered for that class, so it is possible that you will be disappointed again.
We can offer you a full refund for your course fees for the coming semester, but that means you will have to find a different school to study at.
You could take one-on-one classes here (these are more expensive so you would be required to pay more money).
On behalf of the International Spanish Leaning Institute I would like to apologise for the inconvenience this has caused you, and I wish you good luck with your Spanish learning in the future, whatever you decide to do.
Best regards,
Charlene Hsu
Secretary, International Spanish Learning Institute
(+45) 2-2736-2974 ext. 03
To: info@imli.sce.edu.dk
From: mcgill@gmail.com
Sent: Wed June 18th 2014 at 11:20 AM
Subject: RE: Your class next semester
Dear Charlene,
Thank you very much for your email. That is disappointing. I was very much looking forward to starting the new semester next week. The reason I like studying at the IMLI is that the course fees are very cheap when compared with other Spanish schools in the city, and therefore I think I would like to wait and see if a class becomes available for the semester starting in July. I just have one further question: I think that if a class doesn't become available for that semester I would then like a full refund. I have already bought the book I require for study next semester. If there is no class then would it also be possible to have the book money refunded, or would the refund only be for the course fees?
I hope to hear from you again about this soon,
Best regards,
Mark Gill
收件人：mcgill@gmail.com
寄件人：info@imli.sce.edu.dk
cards.passageTranslation:
發送日期：2014年6月17日，星期二下午12:44
主旨：你下學期的課
致Mark Gill，
我們的資料顯示你報名了我們校區下學期的西語國際研習中心，6月25日下禮拜三就要開課。很遺憾的是，你要上的級別(中高級1)目前僅有你跟另一位學生報名，我們一班至少要有五名學生報名才能開班。因此我們很抱歉要通知你即將到來的這的學期沒有適合你的課程。我們非常的抱歉，以下是我們所提供的解決方案：
我們在下個月底有另一個期要開課(7月23日)。如果你願意延後一個月上課，我們就可以替你報名下期同樣級別的班。不過，我們覺得有必要告訴你這個班目前沒有學生報名，因此你可能會再失望一次。
我們可以把學費全額退還，但是這表示你得去另一間學校看看。
你可以上我們的一對一課程 (會比較貴，所以學費會比較高)
我謹代表華語國際研習中心為造成你的不便致歉，不管你的決定為何，祝你未來的西語學習順利。
誠摯的問候，
Charlene Hsu
西語國際研習中心秘書
(+45)2-2736-2974 分機 03
收件人：info@imli.sce.edu.dk
寄件人：mcgill@gmail.com
發送日期：2014年6月18日，星期三 上午11:20
主旨：RE: 你下學期的課
致 Charlene：
非常感謝您的來信。這真令人失望。我本來非常期待下禮拜就要開始上新學期的課程。我喜歡在IMLI上課，因為的學費比起市內其他西語學校來說要便宜多了，因此我想我會等等看七月要開始的那一期是否可以開班。我只想再問個問題：假如那一期還是開班開不成的話，我想要全額退費。我已經買了下個學期上課需要用的書。如果到時候沒有開班，那麼有沒有可能退還書錢，還是只退還學費而已？
希望能盡快得到您的答覆，
誠摯的問候，
Mark Gill
vocabulary: be willing to 樂於；願意
ex. Would you be willing to meet me again to discuss possible negotiations?

ex. On behalf of everybody at HIAT Corp., I'd like to thank you for that wonderful speech. 僅代表HIAT的每個人，我要感謝你發表這場絕佳的演說。
ex. If you compare the new model with the previous one, you'll find that it takes much clearer pictures.
如果你將新機型與前一代做比較，你會發現這一台照的相片較為清晰。

cards.passage:
To: oartsubmit@oartstudios.com
From: patriciadeviant@yahoo.com
Subject: Questions about submission
Date: November 25th, 2012
Dear OART staff,
I would like to submit my photos for the upcoming photo contest: A World of Color 2012. I saw your post about it on Facebook. Then, I followed the link to your website. It's been a dream of mine for years to make it as a photographer in the art world.
I have a couple questions about the submission guidelines. You mention that participants should select ten of their best photos and send them in a digital format. Is there a particular digital format you prefer? I usually send my photos in the format that my camera uses, because the quality is better, but in previous contests the submission guidelines have called for a JPEG format, because it's smaller and takes up less storage space.
Another question I have pertains to appropriateness. You mention nothing in particular about nudity. Some of my photos are nude photos. I just want to make sure before I send them that exposed private parts are acceptable for this contest.
I appreciate your time,
Patricia Bellamy
P.S. I've also decided to subscribe to your magazine!
收件人：oartsubmit@oartstudios.com
寄件人：patriciadeviant@yahoo.com
cards.passageTranslation:
主旨：有關報名方面的問題
日期：2012年11月25日
致OART工作人員，
我想要拿我的照片報名參加即將到來的攝影比賽：2012彩色世界。我看到你們在臉書上的發文。然後我連結到你們的網站。成為藝術界的攝影師一直是我多年的夢想。
我有幾個關於報名規則方面的問題。你們提到說參賽者應挑選十張最棒的照片然後以數位的格式寄出。你們有偏好任何特定的格式嗎？我通常用我相機所使用的格式來傳送照片，因為畫質比較好，但之前的比賽要求JPEG格式，比較小又佔用較少的儲存空間。
我有另一個問題是有關照片恰當性。你們沒有特別提到裸體像的事宜。我有部分的照片是裸體人像照。我只是想在照片寄出前先確定一下隱私部位的暴露在這個比賽是允許的。
謝謝您的時間，
Patricia Bellamy
附註：我也決定訂閱你們的雜誌了！
vocabulary: appropriateness n. 恰當性；合適性
make it as 成功作…(職業/身分)

cards.passage:
Looking for a Sales Consultant
Position: Sales Consultant
Pay: $16.50 per hour
Posted at 7:48 p.m. on December 23, 2009 (2 days ago)
Interest Investments, a ten-year-old brokerage firm, is looking to add a member to its team of consultants. We are seeking an experienced sales consultant who can drive up company profits, engage well with potential customers, and communicate effectively at all times.
Applicants must have exceptional time management skills. They must also be able to communicate clearly with team members, solve problems, and have a working knowledge of various computer programs such as Microsoft Word, Excel, and PowerPoint. Furthermore, applicants must be able to attend weekly company meetings. Being punctual is of the utmost importance.
Responsibilities include explaining our company's programs to interested individuals, speaking to small businesses about our company's programs, and participating in company tradeshows and exhibitions. Participants must also network and promote the company on a daily basis.
We require a minimum of 5 years of experience in the field. These years can include education or work experience, but must include at least two years of work experience. Compensation is negotiable, and applicants must be able to commute to our corporate office.
cards.passageTranslation:
徵求銷售顧問一名
職缺：銷售顧問
薪資： 時薪16.5美金
張貼於 2009年12月23日下午7:48 (2 天前)
利豐投顧，是一家成立十年的經紀公司，計畫增添一名成員加入他們的顧問團隊。我們要找一位可以提升公司獲利、與潛在顧客關係良好、溝通有效率的銷售顧問老手。
應徵者必須有卓越的時間管理技巧。他們還必須有能力與團隊成員溝通，能夠解決問題，還要懂得多種電腦程式，像是Microsoft Word、Excel，以及 PowerPoint。此外，應徵者必須能夠參每週的公司會議。準時是最重要的。
工作職掌包括向感興趣的人說明公司的方案，跟小企業洽談公司方案，以及參加公司的商品交易會及展覽。參與人員每天還必須拓展人脈並推銷公司。
我們要求最少在這個領域有五年資歷。這些年資可以包括學習經歷或工作經歷，但至少必須包括兩年的工作經驗。薪資可議，應徵者必須能夠通勤總公司辦公室上班。
vocabulary: exceptional adj. 特別的；卓越的
utmost adj. 極度的；最大的
negotiable adj. 可磋商的；可議的
commute v. 通勤；經常往來
ex. Rampant inflation is causing many landlords to drive up the rent.
失控的通膨促使許多房東將房租漲價。
ex. Parents must accompany their kids at all times in the zoo.
在動物園裡，父母們一定要隨時陪在孩子身邊。
ex. In your new position, you will be responsible for ordering all the supplies and office stationery.
你的新職位將會負責訂購所有的辦公室文具及用品。

cards.passage:
Starters
Huevos Rancheros Nachos: Get your fiesta started with some nachos! These crispy chips are weighed down by heaps of beans, mixed cheeses, peppers, and guacamole. We sprinkle the top with cumin. It comes with salsa and sour cream on the side. £6
Holy Tamale Wings: Not 5, not 6, not 7, but 8 wings come braised with spicy tamale (the best pepper!) and chipotle sauce. These hot, holy bird bits are served with your choice of either blue cheese or ranch dressing. £7.50
Tacos
Fish Tacos: Miss the ocean? We have you covered. These fish tacos, a mix of mackerel and cod, come breaded and hot, but aren't too spicy. They're adorned with lettuce, cheese and guacamole. Just ask if you want to include some sour cream or salsa. There are three tacos, but add one more for just £1! £6.50
Soup
Tortilla Soup: It's a chilly day, right? Who cares? This soup is good any day, but it really hits the spot on those cold days. It's also great for those who choose not to eat meat. Smoked chili peppers, onions, garlic, black beans, and of course corn tortillas make this an excellent dish. We also add a dash of cilantro. £5.50
cards.passageTranslation:
開胃菜
墨西哥鄉村蛋餅玉米脆片： 派對開場就吃墨西哥玉米脆片吧！ 成堆的豆子、綜合起司、辣椒與酪梨醬把這些酥脆的玉米脆片壓得彎彎的。上頭灑上孜然粉。附餐有莎莎醬及酸奶油。6英鎊
嗆辣墨西哥雞翅： 不是5，不是6，也不是7，而是8根燴雞翅配上辣味墨西哥辣椒（最棒的辣椒！）和煙燻辣椒醬。令人讚嘆的嗆辣雞翅搭配藍紋乳酪醬或是田園沙拉醬擇一。7.5英鎊
捲餅
炸魚捲餅： 想念大海嗎？我們替你想到了。綜合鯖魚、鱈魚肉再裹在熱騰騰但不會太辣的餅皮裡的魚肉捲餅。加上生菜、乳酪與酪梨點綴。需要的話可以加上酸奶油或莎莎醬。每份有三個捲餅，再多加一個只要1英鎊！6.5英鎊
湯
墨西哥玉米餅濃湯：天氣很冷對嗎？誰在乎呢？這道湯適合任何日子，但它絕對是這種大冷天的剋星。對於選擇不吃肉的人也非常適合。用煙燻辣椒、洋蔥、大蒜、黑豆，還有當然要有的玉米餅所做成的一道佳餚。我們還加了少許香菜。5.5英鎊
vocabulary: nachos n. 墨西哥玉米片
cumin n. 孜然粉；小茴香
ex. Weighed down by snow, the balcony canopy collapsed in the night.
陽台頂棚晚間因為積雪的重量被壓壞了。
hit the spot 正中下懷
ex. A cold drink right now would really hit the spot!
現在來杯冷飲正對我意。

cards.passage:
I can't believe it. I'm halfway to Boston and just realized I forgot the company stamp. What should I do? Emilia Costas 11:29 a.m.
I just ringed them and they said it's fine. Sign for today, and they will USPS the copies to us to be stamped and returned ASAP. Cameron Swift 11:37 a.m.
Can't I just bring them back with me? Emilia Costas 11:46 a.m.
Time is of the essence here. You'll be in Boston for two nights after that, but they need to submit the signed and stamped contract to their headquarters within no more than two days, so they'll send it by USPS. Cameron Swift 11:50 a.m.
Is that even possible in two days? Emilia Costas 12:01 p.m.
Yes. We'll receive them tomorrow, and then so long as we send it back before 9 AM of the next day, they offer same day service for areas within 100 km of the destination.
Cameron Swift 11:11 a.m.
cards.passageTranslation:
我不敢相信。 我到前往波士頓的半途才注意到我忘了帶公司章。 我該怎麼辦？ Emilia Costas 11:29 a.m.
我剛打給他們，他們說沒關係。今天簽名然後他們會將副本用美國郵政寄給我們蓋章，再盡快寄回。 Cameron Swift 11:37 a.m.
我不能直接把他們帶回去嗎？ Emilia Costas 11:46 a.m.
時間緊迫。你之後會在波士頓待兩晚，但他們須在兩天內提交簽名蓋章好的合約給他們總部，所以他們會用美國郵政寄送。 Cameron Swift 11:50 a.m.
真的可能在兩天內到嗎？ Emilia Costas 12:01 p.m.
是的。我們明天會收到，然後只要我們在第二天上午9點之前寄回，目的地100公里以內的地區有提供當日收件的服務。

questions.stem: What does Emilia Costas mean when she says "Time is of the essence here"?
translation: Emilia Costas所說「Time is of the essence here」是什麼意思？
a. Cameron Swift必須按時赴約。
b. 另一家公司急著拿到簽名並蓋章的文件。
c. 在上午9點之前將文件交給美國郵政是必要的。
d. 公司總部在不同的時區。
options: (A) Cameron Swift must be on time for the appointment.
(B) The other company is rushed to get the signed and stamped document.
(C) It is essential to give the document to USPS before 9 AM.
(D) The headquarters of the company is in a different time zone.

questions.stem: What is USPS?
translation: USPS是以下哪一機構？
a. Emilia Costas的公司。
b. 合約談判公司
c. Cameron Swift前往的公司總部
d. 快遞公司
options: (C) the headquarters of the company Cameron Swift will visit
