Degree: Communications and Media Please describe yourself briefly:
Ever since I was young, I knew that my voice was powerful. My friends always told me I had a gift. Because of their encouragement, I pursued a degree in Communications and Media, and eventually went on to get a Master’s degree in the field. I started out as a radio announcer. That was fine for several years, but I eventually decided I wanted to pursue a greater goal: reporting news. World events are very important to me, and I want to use my voice to connect viewers to the world. ------------------------------------------------ 8 September 2013
To whom it may concern,
It is with immense pleasure that I recommend one of my brightest students, Isaiah Latoya, for whichever position he may be seeking on your news team. In my time as the instructor of his public speaking class, his overwhelming intelligence, perseverance, and combination of confidence and modesty made him a model student for others. And above all else, his speaking voice commanded attention and respect from all.
I first came to know him in the spring semester of 2003 when I taught his public speaking class. However, do not be misled by how long ago this connection existed. In Isaiah’s last year of study, when he was the director of the students’ reporting club, he often came to me for direction, and we also collabrated on a several of his club’s events. In participating in these events, I got to witness Isaiah’s extraordinary leadership skills. I can only imagine how much he has progressed now that he has been working in the field for several years. Following Isaiah’s graduation, we have still kept in touch on social media over the years, and he sometimes still comes to me for advice, and also vice versa!
Isaiah Latoya would be a valuable asset to your company. Please do not hesitate to contact me if you have any further questions. Charles Whittaker
Retired professor of journalism
College of Cape Town
c.whittaker@gmail.com.za --------------------------------------- to: c.whittaker@gmail.com.za
from: applications@jnews.za
sent: 09/13/13
subject: Isaiah Latoya’s application
Dear Mr. Whittaker,
I represent Johannesburg News, and we are currently seeking a new full time news anchor for our daily news report. As I’m sure you are aware, with your lifetime of experience, this is an extremely important decision for us, as a news anchor is the public face of our organization.
I am holding in my hand now your praise-filled recommendation letter for a Mr. Isaiah Latoya, and I don’t doubt the contents of it for one minute. Isaiah Latoya has recently completed and impressed us all in the final stage of our interview process, and there is no doubt among our selection team that he is the man for the job.
However, just before the final interview, when Mr. Latoya was in the waiting room, we noticed that he was using an inhaler, which would lead us to believe he suffers from asthma or some other kind of respiratory condition. Now let me be clear that we at Johannesburg News in no way discriminate against people with any medical conditions. Nevertheless, if Isaiah Latoya suffers from any condition that could jeopardize his future performance on the job, we would need to know about it. When we asked him about it, he denied that he had used or even possessed an inhaler, which we found strange, to say the least.
Do you have any knowledge that Isaiah Latoya suffers from or has ever suffered from any kind of respiratory condition? We hope that you can answer this question honestly, and we guarantee absolute confidentiality regarding any communication between us, and we would also expect from you.
Sincerely,
Coral Suweisi
Johannesburg News

學位：傳播與媒體碩士 請簡短描述你自己：
從我小時候，我就知道我的聲音很有力。我的朋友總是告訴我說我有天賦。因為他們的鼓勵，我去攻讀傳播與媒體學位，一直讀到最後獲得了這個領域的碩士學位。我從播音員開始做起。做了幾年還不錯，但我最後決定我要去追求一個更遠大的目標：播報新聞。世界大事對我而言非常重要，我想用我的聲音來讓觀眾與世界接軌。
---------------------------------------
2013年9月8日 致啟者： 無論是你們身處新聞團隊中的哪個職位，我很榮幸向您推薦我最聰慧的學生之一：Isaiah Latoya。在我作為他的演講課教師的時候，他壓倒性的智慧、毅力、信心和謙遜的結合使他成為其他人的模範學生。最重要的是，他說話的聲音能引起所有人的注意和尊重。 初次認識他是在2003年的春季學期，當時我教導演講課。請別因為我們結識的時間之長而誤解我的用意。Isaiah在學最後一年，身為學生報社團的社長，他常向我尋求意見，我們也在幾個社團活動中合作過。在這些參與中，我見證了Isaiah非凡的領導能力。我能想像現在他在這領域工作這些年後會有多少進步。Isaiah畢業後，多年來我們仍用社交媒體保持聯繫，他有時仍然向我尋求建議，而我也是！ Isaiah Latoya將是您公司的寶貴資產。如果您有任何其他問題，請隨時與我聯繫。 Charles Whittaker
退休的新聞教授
開普敦學院

主題：Isaiah Latoya申請 親愛的Whittaker先生： 我代表約翰尼斯堡新聞，我們正為我們的每日新聞報導尋找一位新的全職主播。我相信憑藉您的畢生經驗，你會了解這是我們的一個重大決定，作為我們的新聞主播即是公司的形象代表。 我現在手裡拿著你的推薦信，內容對Isaiah Latoya先生讚譽有加，我絲毫不懷疑信件內容。Isaiah Latoya近日已經通過面試的最後階段，並讓我們留下了深刻的印象，毫無疑問地在選拔隊伍中他是這份工作的不二人選。 然而，在最後面試之前，當Latoya先生在等候室時，我們發現他正在使用吸入器，這讓我們相信他患有哮喘或其他類型的呼吸病。現在讓我清楚闡明一點，約翰尼斯堡新聞不歧視任何有醫療狀況的人。然而，如果Isaiah Latoya有任何可能影響他未來工作的狀況，我們必須得知道。當我們問他的時候，他否認他有使用或甚至擁有一個吸入器，這點讓我們覺得很古怪。 你是否知道Isaiah Latoya有或曾有任何類型的呼吸病症呢？我們希望您能誠實地回答這個問題，我們保證我們之間的任何對話絕對保密，反之，也希望你能保密。 誠摯地 Coral Suweisi

questions.stem: What was Isaiah Latoya's second job after school?
translation: Isaiah Latoya畢業後的第二份工作是以下何者？

c. 首席新聞主播
d. 記者
options: (A) He worked as Charles Whittaker's assistant.

questions.stem: Why does former professor Charles Whittaker insist that the reader of his recommendation letter not be misled by how long ago he developed a connection with Isaiah Latoya?
translation: 前任教授Charles Whittaker為何堅持要這封推薦信的讀者不要因為他和Isaiah Latoya很久以前就認識而誤解教授的用意？
a. 他認識Isaiah Latoya的時間很短，但很激烈。
b. Isaiah Latoya留下了持久的印象且他們保持聯繫。
c. 因為實際上沒多久前；只是幾年前而已。
d. 因為Isaiah Latoya即便在年輕時也是一名偉大的領導人才。
options: (A) The time he knew Isaiah Latoya was short but intense.
(B) Isaiah Latoya left a long-lasting impression and they stayed in touch.
(C) Because it actually wasn't that long ago; it was only a few years in the past.
(D) Because Isaiah Latoya was a great leader, even when he was young.

questions.stem: What information does Charles Whittaker share in his letter that was not mentioned in Isaiah Latoya's resume?
translation: Charles Whittaker信中分享的Isaiah Latoya履歷資訊中，以下何者並無提及？
a. Isaiah Latoya 說話的聲音很好聽。
b. Isaiah Latoya曾在開普頓大學就讀。
c. Isaiah Latoya從小就想報導新聞。
d. Isaiah Latoya曾是相關領域的學生俱樂部會長。
options: (A) Isaiah Latoya has a good speaking voice.
(B) Isaiah Latoya attended College of Cape Town.
(C) Isaiah Latoya has wanted to report the news since he was little.
(D) Isaiah Latoya was head of a relevant student club.

questions.stem: What does Coral Suweisi think in regard to Charles Whittaker's letter of recommendation for Isaiah Latoya?
translation: 關於Charles Whittaker對Isaiah Latoya的推薦信，Coral Suweisi有何想法？
a. 她認為非常清晰且想要給Charles Whittaker一個職位。
b. 她對Charles Whittaker在信中指出的有些事有疑問。
c. 基於Isaiah Latoya在面談中的表現，她深信不疑。
d. 她懷疑內含的一些訊息可能不準確。
options: (A) She thinks it was very articulate and actually wants to offer Charles Whittaker a position.
(B) She has some questions about some matters that Charles Whittaker pointed out in his letter.
(C) She believes every word of it based on Isaiah Latoya's performance during the interviews.
(D) She wonders if some of the information it contains may not be accurate.

questions.stem: What concerns does Coral Suweisi have about Isaiah Latoya?
translation: 以下選項何者是Coral Suweisi 對Isaiah Latoya的擔憂之處？
a. 他可能缺乏相關的技能和經驗。
b. 他可能不是這個職位最具資格的人。
c. 若有需要他的時間與地點，他可能無法配合。
d. 他可能不夠誠實且有可疑的健康問題。
options: (A) He may lack related skills and experience.
(B) He may not be the most qualified person for the position.
(C) He may not be available at the time and place that they need him.
(D) He may lack honesty and have a problematic health issue.

cards.passage:
On April 18, 2014, Adriana Bienvenida will marry John Edgars. Adriana is the lovely daughter of Bernardo and Carmela Bienvenida. John is the noble son of Henry and Susanne Edgars.
A beach on the island of Sicily will be the gathering place for the reception. Guests are invited to come at or around 4:00 p.m. This beach is the place where Adriana and John first laid eyes on one another.
Adriana is currently completing her graduate degree in law at the International University of Catalonia. She works part-time in a local bakery. John has completed his undergraduate degree and works in sales at Hollister.
After a short honeymoon to Las Vegas, the couple will settle down in their new apartment in Barcelona.
cards.passageTranslation:
2014年4月18日當天，Adriana Bienvenida即將嫁給John Edgars。Adriana是Bernardo和Carmela Bienvenida夫婦美麗動人的女兒。John是Henry和Susanne Edgars夫婦高尚的兒子。
婚宴場所將在西西里島上的一個海灘舉辦。受邀賓客約莫在下午四點到場。這個海灘是Adriana與John第一次相識的地方。
Adriana目前已完成在加泰隆尼亞國際大學的法律碩士學位。她現在在當地一間麵包店打工。John已經大學畢業目前在Hollister公司當業務。
在拉斯維佳斯短暫蜜月後，這對新人將定居於他們位於巴塞隆納的新公寓。
vocabulary: noble adj. 高貴的；高尚的
part-time adj. 兼職的；半工半讀的
honeymoon n. 蜜月；蜜月旅行
lay eyes on 瞧見；第一眼看到
ex. The first time I laid eyes on the French countryside, I knew I would buy a house there someday.
一眼看到法國的鄉間，我就知道有天我會在那裡買間房子。
ex. More and more foreigners are settling down in Taiwan these days.
現在有愈來愈多的外國人在台定居。

questions.stem: Who is most likely to be interested in this passage?
translation: 以下何者最有可能對這篇短文感興趣？
a. 在拉斯維佳斯賭場裡的工人
b. 在Adriana的大學裡教書的藝術系教授
c. John的大學同學
d. Adriana的密友
options: (A) a worker in a Las Vegas casino
(B) an art professor who teaches in Adriana's university

questions.stem: Where did the couple first encounter one another?
translation: 這對夫妻第一次彼此相遇是在以下何處？
a. 在Bernardo和Carmela Bienvenida夫婦的家
b. 在西西里島上的一個海灘
c. 在加泰隆尼亞的國際大學
d. 在巴塞隆納市
options: (A) at the household of Bernardo and Carmela Bienvenida
(B) at a beach on the island of Sicily
(C) at the International University of Catalonia
